cooldownText.ValeeraEviscerate|ValeeraEviscerate|E: Cooldown: 1 second Consumes all Combo Points

fullText.:PASSIVE:|AlarakSadism|Trait: Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Repeatable Quest: Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|AlexstraszaDragonqueenDragonFo: Alexstrasza has transformed into a powerful dragon aspect, gaining 500 Health, resistance to disabling effects, and empowered Basic Attacks and Abilities.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|AmazonAvoidance|Trait: While moving, Cassia gradually gains up to 30 Armor over 3 seconds. After being stationary for 0.75 seconds, the Armor is rapidly lost over .5 seconds.   Avoidance remains charged while Fending.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ArtanisTwinBladesPrimed|W: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy 2 times.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ArthasFrostmourneHungersPrimed: The next Basic Attack deals 71 bonus damage. Dealing damage restores 40 Mana.  Quest: Killing a Minion or hitting a Hero with Frostmourne Hungers permanently increases its bonus damage and Arthas' Basic Attack damage by 1.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|AzmodanTideOfSinPassive|Heroic: Your next Globe of Annihilation costs no Mana and deals 50% more damage.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|BarbarianFury|Trait: Use Fury instead of Mana, which is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Using a Basic or Heroic Ability grants 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ChoOgreHidePassive|Trait: Cho's Armor is increased by 25, but Gall's damage is reduced by 25%.  Gall can activate Ogre Rage to grant himself 25% increased damage, but remove this Armor bonus.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ChromieTimewalkerTrait|Trait: Chromie has traveled to the future, and as such, will learn her Talents 2 levels earlier than her teammates!  Detonate Time Trap  Detonates active Time Traps.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DeathwingAspectOfDeath|Trait: Deathwing is fitted with 4 Armor Plates which grant 10 Armor each. Every 25% Health lost causes Deathwing to lose a plate. Plates are only restored when Dragonflight is used, based on the amount of Health Deathwing has when landing.  Deathwing is also a mighty Dragon Aspect who is permanently Unstoppable and deals 100% additional Spell Damage to Heroes, but views his allies with contempt and ignores any of their friendly effects.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DeckardFortitudeOfTheFaithful|: When at least 1 other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains 10 Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge 50% faster.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DemonHunterHatred|Trait: Basic Attacks grant a stack of Hatred, up to 10. Each Hatred stack increases Basic Attack damage by 8% and Movement Speed by 1%. Lasts 5 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DiabloBlackSoulstone|Trait: Repeatable Quest: Gain 10 Souls per Hero killed and 1 Soul per Minion, up to 100. For each Soul, gain 0.3% maximum Health. If Diablo has 100 Souls upon dying, he will resurrect in 5 seconds but lose 100 Souls.  After reaching level 10, Diablo only consumes 75 Souls when resurrecting.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DryadDryadsSwiftness|Z: Lunara moves 20% faster by leaping short distances.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DryadNaturesToxin|Trait: Lunara's Basic Attacks and damaging Abilities poison their target, dealing 33 damage a second for 3 seconds. Every additional application increases the duration by 3 seconds, up to a maximum of 9 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DVaMechanizedWalker|Z: D.Va's Mech can shoot while moving. While shooting or channeling an ability, the Mech's Movement Speed is quickly reduced by 25%.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DVaMechMechMode|Trait: When D.Va's Mech dies, she is ejected out after 0.75 seconds and can continue to fight. D.Va's Mech only awards 50% of a normal Hero's experience upon dying.  Fusion Cannons  D.Va's Mech Basic Attacks deal 22 damage in a large area every 0.25 seconds. Deals 40% bonus damage against enemies very close to the Mech.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|DVaPilotPilotMode|Trait: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 0.5 seconds. As a Pilot, D.Va only awards 50% of a normal Hero's experience upon dying.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|FenixShieldCapacitor|Trait: Fenix has a permanent 760 Shield which regenerates at 10% per second after not taking damage for 5 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|GallOgreRagePassive|Trait: Gall's damage is increased by 25%, but Cho's Armor is reduced by 25.  Cho can activate Ogre Hide to grant himself 25 Armor, but remove this damage bonus.  Passive: Gall is permanently immune to Stun and Silence effects.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|GarroshArmorUp|Trait: Garrosh gains 1 Armor for every 2% of maximum Health missing.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|GreymaneInnerBeastActive|W: Gain 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh this duration, and reduce the cooldown of Inner Beast by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|GreymaneWorgenForm|Trait: Greymane can use certain Abilities to shapeshift between a Human and a Worgen.  While Human, Greymane's Basic Attacks are ranged.  While Worgen, Greymane gains 10 Armor, and his Basic Attacks become melee but deal 40% more damage.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|IllidanBetrayersThirst|Trait: Basic Attacks heal for 30% of damage dealt and reduce Ability cooldowns by 1 second.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ImperiusValorousBrand|Trait: Each Basic Ability marks enemy Heroes hit for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks consume the target's marks, dealing 20% bonus damage per mark and healing for 75 per mark.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|JainaTraitFrostbite|Trait: Jaina's Abilities Chill targets, Slowing them by 25% and amplifying damage taken from her Abilities by 50%. Lasts 4 seconds.  Quest: Deal Ability damage to Chilled Heroes.  Reward: Upon dealing 12000 damage, unlock the Improved Ice Block Ability, allowing Jaina to become temporarily Invulnerable.  Mythic Reward: Upon dealing 30000 damage, Ice Block upgrades to Ice Cold, allowing Jaina to move and cast while active.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|JunkratTotalMayhem|Trait: Upon dying, drop 5 grenades that explode after 0.75 seconds, each dealing 250 damage to nearby enemies. Deals 75% less damage to Structures.  Detonate Mine  Detonate an active Concussion Mine.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|KaelthasVerdantSpheresActive|T: Kael'thas's next Basic Ability is more powerful
fullText.:PASSIVE:|KelThuzadMasterOfTheColdDark|T: Quest: Gain 1 Blight every time a Hero is Rooted by Frost Nova or hit by Chains of Kel'Thuzad.  Reward: After gaining 15 Blight, gain the Glacial Spike Ability.  Reward: After gaining 30 Blight, gain 75% Spell Power.  Blight: 0/30
fullText.:PASSIVE:|KerriganAssimilation|Trait: Gain 10% of damage dealt from Abilities and 20% from Basic Attacks as Shields for 6 seconds. Shield amount gained doubled against Heroes.  Current maximum: 1004
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LeoricUndyingTrait|Trait: Leoric becomes a ghost when he dies, and resurrects upon reaching full Health. Leoric deals no damage while dead.  Wrath Of The Bone King  Leoric's first two Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage, and his third Basic Attack deals 225% damage to a single target.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LiLiFastFeet|Trait: Upon taking damage, your Basic Ability cooldowns refresh 50% faster and you gain 10% Movement Speed for 1 second.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LostVikingSelectAll|Active: The Lost Vikings can be controlled individually or as a group. Each Viking has particular strengths.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LostVikingSelectBaleog|Active: Baleog's Basic Attacks deal 50% damage to enemies behind his attack target.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LostVikingSelectErik|Active: Erik moves faster than the other Vikings and has increased Basic Attack range.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LostVikingSelectOlaf|Active: Olaf can charge enemies and slow their Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds by right-clicking on them. 8 second cooldown.   Olaf gains increased Health Regeneration when out of combat for 4 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|LostVikingsVikingHoardTalent|T: Gathering a Regeneration Globe with a Viking permanently increases all their Health Regeneration by 0.5 per second.  Current Bonus: 0 Regen per second
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MaievUmbralBindPrimed|W: Maiev's next Basic Attack cleaves and applies a tether to enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. If a tethered Hero moves too far from Maiev, they are pulled toward her, dealing 110 damage and breaking the tether.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MalGanisVampiricTouch|Trait: Mal'Ganis heals for 45% of damage dealt to enemy Heroes and 10% of damage dealt to non-Heroes.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MalthaelReapersMark|Trait: Basic Attacks cleave in an area in front of Malthael and afflict non-Structure targets with Reaper's Mark for 4 seconds. Marked enemies are revealed and take damage equal to 2% of their maximum Health every 1 second.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MedicCaduceusReactor|Trait: While channeling Healing Beam, Lt. Morales regenerates 2% of her maximum Health per second.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MedivhRavenForm|Trait: Instead of mounting, Medivh can transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by 20%. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over all terrain and is immune to all effects.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MephistoLordOfHatred|Trait: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Abilities reduces Mephisto's Basic Ability cooldowns.  Skull Missile and Shade of Mephisto grant 1.5 seconds of cooldown reduction per Hero hit, and Lightning Nova grants 0.3 seconds per Hero hit.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MonkBlankTrait|Trait: Choose between Transcendence, Iron Fists, and Insight from the Talents panel.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MonkDeadlyReachActive|E: Kharazim's next Basic Attack increases his Attack Speed and Attack Range by 100% for 2 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MonkInsight|Trait: Quest: Every 3rd Basic Attack restores 14 Mana, grants a stack of Insight, and gives 25% increased Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.  Reward: Upon getting 100 stacks of Insight, every 3rd attack also reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.75 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MonkIronFists|Trait: Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 110% bonus damage and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MonkTranscendence|Trait: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|MuradinSecondWind|Trait: Muradin restores 55 Health per second when he has not taken damage for 4 seconds. When below 40% Health, increased to 111 Health per second.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|NecromancerCursedStrikesPassiv: Xul's Basic Attacks deal damage in a wide area and reduce the Attack Speed of Heroes and Summons by 40% for 2 seconds. Lasts 4 seconds once triggered.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|NovaPermanentCloak|Trait: Gain Stealth when out of combat for 3 seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Passive: Gain 15% Movement Speed while Stealthed.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|OrpheaOverflowingChaos|Trait: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability grants 1 Chaos. Chaos can stack up to 3 times.  While Orphea has Chaos, her Basic Attacks against Heroes consume all Chaos, dealing 50% increased damage per stack, and healing for 100% of the damage dealt.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasActive|: Ragnaros's next Basic Attack is instant, dealing 191 Ability damage in an area, and heals for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing doubled versus Heroes.  Molten Core: Molten Swing Stun and damage nearby enemies.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|RaynorGiveEmSomePepper|Trait: Every 4th Basic Attack splashes in a small area and deals 125% more damage to the main target.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|SamuroSelectAll|Active: Select All  Issue orders to Samuro and all Mirror Images.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|SamuroSelectSamuroPrime|Active: Select Samuro  Issue orders to Samuro only.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|SylvanasBlackArrowsPassive|Tra: Basic Attacks infect enemies with Black Arrows for 3 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. Sylvanas deals 15% more damage to enemies with 3 stacks.  Quest: Damage Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.  Reward: Upon damaging enemies 250 times, increase the damage bonus provided by Black Arrows to 50%.  Pinnacle Reward: Upon damaging enemies 400 times, Black Arrows now heals Sylvanas for 25% of damage dealt at 3 stacks, doubled against Heroes.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|TassadarArchon|Heroic: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to 25% of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for 12 seconds.  Resonance Beam: Deals 140 damage to the target and splashes 70 damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 2 seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|TassadarResonanceBeam|Trait: Tassadar's Basic Attack is a Channeled beam that Slows by 15%. While Channeling, your Basic Attack damage and Mana regeneration increases by 25% a second, to a maximum of 100%. While at full charge, gain an extra 3 Mana every second.  This bonus is lost after 6 seconds of not Channeling.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ThrallFrostwolfResilience|Trai: Dealing damage with Abilities grants 1 stack of Frostwolf Resilience. At 5 stacks, Thrall is instantly healed for 240 Health.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|TychusMinigun|Trait: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 2.5% of their maximum Health. Lasts 3 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|UtherEternalDevotion|Trait: Uther's Basic Abilities grant 25 Armor to allied Heroes, and 15 to Uther, for 2 seconds.  Eternal Vanguard  Upon dying, Uther becomes an Invulnerable spirit for up to 8 seconds. While in spirit form, Uther can heal allies with Flash of Light for 230.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|VarianHeroicStrikeActive|Trait: Every 18 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack deals 125 bonus Spell Damage. Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|VarianTwinBladesOfFury|Heroic: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by an additional 7 seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Attack Speed increased by 100%. Passive: Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|WitchDoctorGargantuanStomp|Her: Order the Gargantuan to stomp, dealing 240 damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|WitchDoctorVoodooRitualTrait|T: Nazeebo's Basic Attacks and Abilities poison Non-Heroic enemies, causing them to take 67 additional damage over 6 seconds.   Quest: If a Minion dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, Nazeebo permanently gains 6 Health and 1 Mana.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|WizardTraitCriticalMass|Trait: Getting a Takedown will refresh the cooldown on all of Li-Ming's Abilities.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|YrelDivinePurposeActive|Trait: Activate to instantly charge Yrel's next Basic Ability at no mana cost. Divine Purpose's cooldown is reset when Yrel casts a Heroic ability.  Passive: Yrel's Basic Abilities charge up over 1.5 seconds, increasing in effectiveness, but reducing Yrel's Movement Speed by 25%.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ZaryaEnergy|Trait: Each time Zarya's Personal Barrier or Shield Ally absorbs 9 damage, her Energy is increased by 1. Each point of Energy increases Zarya's damage by 2%. After 0.5 seconds, Energy decays by 3 per second.
fullText.:PASSIVE:|ZeratulPermanentCloak|Trait: Gain Stealth when out of combat for 3 seconds. Taking damage, attacking, using Abilities, or Channeling ends Stealth. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
fullText.AbathurDeepTunnel|AbathurDeepTunnel|Z: Quickly tunnel to a visible location.
fullText.AbathurEvolveMonstrosityActiveSymbiote|E: Activate to cast Symbiote on Abathur's Monstrosity.
fullText.AbathurEvolveMonstrosity|AbathurEvolveMo: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.
fullText.AbathurLocustNest|AbathurLocustMasterHot: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.
fullText.AbathurLocustSwarm|AbathurLocustSwarm|Ac: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.
fullText.AbathurMonstrosityDeepTunnel|AbathurMons: Order your Evolved Monstrosity to quickly tunnel to a visible location
fullText.AbathurSpawnLocusts|AbathurLocustStrain|: Spawns a Locust to attack down the nearest lane every 15 seconds. Locusts last for 16 seconds, have 350 health and deal 58 damage with each Basic Attack, dealing 25% bonus damage to enemy Structures.
fullText.AbathurSymbioteCarapace|AbathurSymbioteC: Shields the assisted ally for 150. Allied Heroes are healed for 22 Health per second while the Shield is active. Lasts for 6 seconds.
fullText.AbathurSymbioteStab|AbathurSymbioteStab|: Shoots a spike towards target area that deals 119 damage to the first enemy it contacts.
fullText.AbathurSymbiote|AbathurSymbiote|Q: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.
fullText.AbathurToxicNest|AbathurToxicNest|W: Spawn a mine that becomes active after a short time. Deals 153 damage and reveals the enemy for 4 seconds. Lasts 90 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.AbathurUltimateEvolution|AbathurUltimate: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.
fullText.AlarakCounterStrikeTargeted2ndHeroic|Ala: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.  Sadism  Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakCounterStrikeTargeted|AlarakCounte: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.
fullText.AlarakDeadlyChargeActivate2ndHeroic|Alar: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.  Sadism  Alarak's Ability damage and self-healing are increased by 100% against enemy Heroes.  Takedowns increase Sadism by 3%, up to 30%. Sadism gained from Takedowns is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakDeadlyChargeActivate|AlarakDeadlyC: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
fullText.AlarakDeadlyChargeExecute2ndHeroic|Alara: Unleash Alarak's Deadly Charge.  Issuing a move order while this is channeling will cancel the cast at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
fullText.AlarakDeadlyChargeExecute|AlarakUnleashD: Unleash Alarak's Deadly Charge.  Issuing a move order while this is channeling will cancel the cast at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
fullText.AlarakDiscordStrike|AlarakDiscordStrike|: After a 0.5 second delay, enemies in front of Alarak take 165 damage and are silenced for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.AlarakHastyBargain|AlarakHastyBargain|Ac: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.
fullText.AlarakLastLaugh|AlarakLastLaugh|Active: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.
fullText.AlarakLightningSurgeLightningBarrage|Ala: Deal 62 damage to an enemy and an additional 100% damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore 75 health for each Hero hit.
fullText.AlarakLightningSurge|AlarakLightningSurg: Deal 62 damage to an enemy and an additional 100% damage to enemies between Alarak and the target. Restore 75 health for each Hero hit.
fullText.AlarakMightOfTheHighlordSetCounterStrike: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.
fullText.AlarakMightOfTheHighlordSetDeadlyChargeA: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.
fullText.AlarakRiteofRakShir|AlarakRiteofRakShir|: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakTelekinesis|AlarakTelekinesis|W: Vector Targeting Create a force, pushing Alarak and all enemies hit from the targeted point towards the targeted direction. Deals 48 damage to enemies.
fullText.AlexstraszaAbundance|AlexstraszaAbundanc: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 20% of their maximum Health.  Dragonqueen: Preservation Heal area and amount greatly increased.
fullText.AlexstraszaBlessingOfTheRed|AlexstraszaB: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.
fullText.AlexstraszaBreathOfLife|AlexstraszaBreat: Heal an allied Hero for 20% of Alexstrasza's current Health.
fullText.AlexstraszaCleansingFlameDragonqueen|Ale: Take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.
fullText.AlexstraszaCleansingFlame|AlexstraszaCle: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.
fullText.AlexstraszaDragonqueen|AlexstraszaDragon: After 1.25 seconds, transform into a dragon and gain 500 Health.  While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Abilities are empowered, and her Basic Attacks deal 143 damage and heal allied Heroes for 43 in an arc in front of her. Additionally, the duration of incoming Stuns, Roots, and Slows, is reduced by 50%.  Lasts 15 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaDragonScales|AlexstraszaDrago: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for 2 seconds after. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaFlameBuffet|AlexstraszaFlameB: Launch a fireball, Burning enemies hit for 75 damage over 5.5 seconds.  Hitting enemies that are already Burning deals 125 bonus damage upon impact, Slows them by 40% decaying over 2 seconds, and refunds the Mana cost.  Dragonqueen: Wing Buffet Damage and Knockback enemies in an arc.
fullText.AlexstraszaGiftOfLife|AlexstraszaGiftOfL: Sacrifice 15% of Alexstrasza's current Health, healing an allied Hero for 150% of that amount.  Passive: Increase Alexstrasza's Health regeneration by 150%.  Dragonqueen: Breath of Life Cooldown greatly reduced and does not cost Health.
fullText.AlexstraszaLifebinder|AlexstraszaLifebin: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.
fullText.AlexstraszaLifeUnbound|AlexstraszaLifeUn: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 damage to nearby enemies.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.
fullText.AlexstraszaPacify|AlexstraszaPacify|Acti: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaPreservation|AlexstraszaPrese: Plant a seed of healing that blooms after 3 seconds, healing nearby allied Heroes for 30% of their maximum Health.
fullText.AlexstraszaWingBuffet|AlexstraszaWingBuf: Deal 150 damage to enemies in an area, knocking them back and Slowing them by 50% for 3 seconds.
fullText.AmazonAvoidanceRockstopper|AmazonAvoidan: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to 60 for 4 seconds.    Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.
fullText.AmazonBallLightning|AmazonBallLightning|: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 damage to enemies hit.
fullText.AmazonBlindingLight|AmazonBlindingLight|: After 0.5 seconds, deal 50 damage and Blind enemies in the target area for 2 seconds.  Passive: Cassia deals 15% increased damage to Blinded targets.
fullText.AmazonFend|AmazonFend|E: Charge at an enemy, and upon arriving Channel for up to 1.5 seconds, dealing 64 damage to enemies in front of Cassia every 0.25 seconds. Deals 50% reduced damage to non-Heroes. Avoidance remains charged while Channeling.
fullText.AmazonInnerLight|AmazonLightningFuryInne: Activate to heal for 25% of your maximum Health over 5 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by 10 seconds.
fullText.AmazonLightningFury|AmazonLightningFury|: Hurl a lightning javelin that deals 158 damage to the first enemy hit and splits into two lightning bolts that deal 158 damage to enemies in their path.
fullText.AmazonSurgeOfLight|AmazonAvoidance|Trait: While moving, Cassia gradually gains up to 30 Armor over 3 seconds. After being stationary for 0.75 seconds, the Armor is rapidly lost over .5 seconds.   Avoidance remains charged while Fending.
fullText.AmazonValkyrie|AmazonValkyrie|Heroic: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.
fullText.AmazonWarTravelerSummonMount|AmazonWarTr: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 30% Movement Speed.
fullText.AnaAimDownSightsActivate|AnaAimDownSight: Basic Attacks apply a Dose to enemies, dealing 40 damage over 5 seconds, plus additional damage equal to the current number of stacks on the target, stacking up to 5 times. Every 0.5 seconds, Ana is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Shrike.  Aim Down Sights  Activating Shrike reduces your Movement Speed by 25%, but increases the Range of Healing Dart and Sleep Dart by 25% while also allowing them to pierce one Hero. Lasts until canceled.
fullText.AnaAimDownSightsDeactivate|AnaAimDownSig: Basic Attacks apply a Dose to enemies, dealing 40 damage over 5 seconds, plus additional damage equal to the current number of stacks on the target, stacking up to 5 times. Every 0.5 seconds, Ana is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Shrike.  Aim Down Sights  Activating Shrike reduces your Movement Speed by 25%, but increases the Range of Healing Dart and Sleep Dart by 25% while also allowing them to pierce one Hero. Lasts until canceled.
fullText.AnaBioticGrenade|AnaBioticGrenade|W: Toss a grenade at the target area. Allied Heroes hit are healed for 152 Health and receive 25% increased healing from Ana for 4 seconds. Enemies hit take 60 damage and receive 100% less healing for 1.75 seconds.  If Biotic Grenade does not hit any enemies, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and if Ana is the only target hit, reduce its cooldown by an additional 2 seconds.
fullText.AnaDebilitatingDart|AnaDebilitatingDart|: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.
fullText.AnaDetachableBoxMagazine|AnaDetachableBo: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.
fullText.AnaEyeOfHorusActivate|AnaEyeOfHorusActiv: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
fullText.AnaEyeOfHorusAttackDummy|AnaEyeOfHorusHi: Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.
Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.
fullText.AnaEyeOfHorusAttack|AnaEyeOfHorusHighPow: Fire a specialized round with unlimited range, piercing all allied and enemy Heroes in its path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.
fullText.AnaHealingDart|AnaHealingDart|Q: Fire a dart which heals the first allied Hero hit for 195 Health. Does not affect full Health Heroes.
fullText.AnaNanoBoost|AnaNanoBoost|Heroic: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.
fullText.AnaSleepDart|AnaSleepDart|E: Fire a dart that puts the first enemy Hero hit to Sleep, Stunning them for 3 seconds. Sleep's effects end instantly if the target takes damage after the first 0.5 seconds.  Cannot be used on Vehicles.
fullText.AnduinBlessedRecovery|AnduinBlessedRecov: If Anduin loses more than 8% of his maximum Health at once, recover 15% Health over 3 seconds.   This effect has a 10 second cooldown.  Current Health required: 133
fullText.AnduinChastise|AnduinChastise|E: Shove a swell of light forward, dealing 175 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Rooting them for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.AnduinDivineStar|AnduinDivineStar|W: Send light that deals 140 damage to enemies and then returns to Anduin, healing allied Heroes for 130 in a wider path. Healing increases by 25% per enemy Hero hit.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealDesperatePrayer|AnduinFla: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for 375, but kneel for 2 seconds, unable to act.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealInnerFocus|AnduinFlashHea: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for 25% more.  Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.AnduinFlashHeal|AnduinFlashHeal|Q: Cast for 0.75 seconds to heal an allied Hero for 280.
fullText.AnduinHolyWordSalvation|AnduinHolyWordSa: After 0.5 seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.
fullText.AnduinLeapOfFaithInstant|AnduinLeapOfFai: Faith instantly pulls an allied Hero to Anduin's location, granting them Unstoppable while they travel.  Pursued By Grace  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal the lowest Health allied Hero near Anduin for 32.
fullText.AnduinLightBomb|AnduinLightBomb|Heroic: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.  The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.
fullText.AnduinLightwell|AnduinLightwell|Active: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for 50. The well only fades after healing 15 times or when recast.  This cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.
fullText.AnubarakBurrowCharge|AnubarakBurrowCharg: Burrow to the target location, dealing 91 damage and briefly stunning enemies in a small area upon surfacing, slowing them by 25% for 2.5 seconds.  Burrow Charge can be reactivated to surface early.
fullText.AnubarakCocoon|AnubarakCocoon|Heroic: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.
fullText.AnubarakHardenCarapace|AnubarakHardenCar: Gain a Shield that grants 40 Spell Armor and absorbs 340 damage over 3 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakLegionOfBeetlesToggle|AnubarakSc: Press to toggle Legion of Beetles OFF.
Press to toggle Legion of Beetles ON.
fullText.AnubarakLegionOfBeetlesVisual|AnubarakSc: Using an Ability spawns a Beetle which loses Health over 10 seconds, attacking nearby enemies for 20 damage.
fullText.AnubarakLocustSwarm|AnubarakLocustSwarm|: Deal 68 damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 Health. Lasts 6 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakTheTraitorKing|AnubarakTheTraito: Gain 10% bonus maximum Health and 20 Spell Armor.  Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisBladeDash|ArtanisBladeDash|Q: Dash forward and deal 63 damage to enemies, then return and deal 171 damage. Every enemy hit reduces the cooldown on Shield Overload by 1 second, and Heroes by 2 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisPhasePrism|ArtanisPhasePrism|E: Fire a Phase Prism that deals 66 damage to the first Hero hit and swaps Artanis's position with theirs. Hitting a Hero also grants Artanis Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds. Can be used during Blade Dash.
fullText.ArtanisShieldOverloadDummy|ArtanisShield: After taking damage while below 75% Health, Artanis gains a 365 Shield for 5 seconds. Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Shield Overload by 4 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeam|ArtanisSp: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.
fullText.ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulse|Artan: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBlades|ArtanisTwinBlades|W: Artanis's next Basic Attack immediately causes him to charge a short distance and strike the enemy 2 times.
fullText.ArthasAntiMagicShell|ArthasAntiMagicShel: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for 4 seconds and heal Arthas for 25% of the damage prevented.
fullText.ArthasArmyOfTheDeadSacrifice|ArthasArmyO: Sacrifice a Ghoul to restore 240 Health.
fullText.ArthasArmyOfTheDead|ArthasArmyOfTheDead|: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over 20 seconds and attack for 20 damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for 240 Health. Stores up to 6 charges.  Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 1 second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 6 seconds.
fullText.ArthasDeathCoil|ArthasDeathCoil|Q: Deals 164 damage to target enemy.  Can be self-cast to heal for 262 Health.
fullText.ArthasFrostmourneHungers|ArthasFrostmour: Activate to make Arthas's next Basic Attack strike immediately and deal 71 bonus damage. Dealing damage restores 40 Mana.  Quest: Killing a Minion or hitting a Hero with Frostmourne Hungers permanently increases its bonus damage and Arthas's Basic Attack damage by 1.
fullText.ArthasFrozenTempest|ArthasFrozenTempest|: Deal 36 damage per second to nearby enemies and Slow them by 10% per second, stacking up to 40%. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by 10% per second, stacking up to 40%. Frozen Tempest's effects last for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.ArthasHowlingBlast|ArthasHowlingBlast|W: Root enemies within the target area for 1.25 seconds and deals 68 damage.
fullText.ArthasIceboundFortitude|ArthasIceboundFo: Activate to gain 25 Armor and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by 75% for 3 seconds.  Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by 2 seconds.
fullText.ArthasPathofFrost|ArthasPathofFrost|Acti: Activate to instantly mount with 10% additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to 5 seconds.  When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by 30% for 2 seconds and deal 66 damage.
fullText.ArthasSummonSindragosa|ArthasSummonSindr: Deals 230 damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.
fullText.AurielAngelicFlight|AurielAngelicFlightT: After 2 seconds, fly to a target location.
fullText.AurielBestowHope|AurielBestowHope|Trait: Passive: 70% of the damage Auriel deals to Heroes and 35% dealt to non-Heroes is stored as energy.  Bestow an allied Hero with Hope. While they remain near Auriel, 30% of their damage to Heroes and 10% of their damage to non-Heroes is converted to energy. Auriel can only have Bestow Hope on 1 ally at a time.  Auriel can store up to 475 energy.
fullText.AurielCrystalAegis|AurielCrystalAegis|He: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 damage to all nearby enemies.
fullText.AurielDetainmentStrike|AurielDetainmentS: Deal 55 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and knock them back. If they collide with terrain, they are also stunned for 1.25 seconds and take an additional 165 damage.
fullText.AurielRayOfHeaven|AurielRayOfHeaven|W: Consume Auriel's stored energy and heal allied Heroes in the area for the amount of energy consumed.
fullText.AurielResurrectSelf|AurielResurrectSelf|: After a 3 second delay, you are brought back to life with 100% of maximum Health at the location where you died.
fullText.AurielResurrect|AurielResurrect|Heroic: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 3 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died.  Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.
fullText.AurielSacredSweep|AurielSacredSweep|Q: Sweep the area with sacred power, dealing 40 damage to enemies and an additional 160 damage to enemies caught in the center.
fullText.AurielShieldOfHope|AurielShieldOfHopeTal: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for 3 seconds equal to 50% of the amount of Health they are missing.
fullText.AzmodanAllShallBurn|AzmodanAllShallBurn|: Channel a beam of death on an enemy, dealing 128 damage per second for 2.5 seconds. If the Channel lasts its full duration, deal an extra 340 damage to the target.  Azmodan's Movement Speed is reduced by 30% while Channeling.
fullText.AzmodanDemonicInvasion|AzmodanDemonicInv: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing 85 damage per impact. Grunts deal 39 damage, have 750 Health and last up to 10 seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing 40 damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
fullText.AzmodanDemonLieutenant|AzmodanDemonLieut: Summon a Demon Lieutenant at any allied Mercenary, Minion, or Azmodan Demon. The Lieutenant will cast Demonic Smite every 7 seconds, instantly killing an enemy Minion. Loses Health over 21 seconds.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
fullText.AzmodanGlobeOfAnnihilation|AzmodanGlobeO: Shoot a globe of destruction, dealing 176 damage on impact.  Deals 50% damage to non-Heroes.  Quest: Hitting a Hero or killing a Minion within 3 seconds of being hit by Globe Of Annihilation grants 2 stacks of Annihilation.  Each stack increases its damage by 1.   Mythic Reward: After gaining 450 Annihilation, the area of Globe of Annihilation is increased by 15% and it deals 150 additional damage.
fullText.AzmodanSummonDemonWarrior|AzmodanSummonD: Spawn a Demon Warrior that marches forward. Warriors deal 53 damage per Attack. Loses Health over 17 seconds. Deals 100% bonus damage to Minions and Mercenaries.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
fullText.AzmodanTideOfSin|AzmodanTideOfSin|Heroic: Activate to make the next Globe of Annihilation cost no Mana and deal 50% more damage.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
fullText.AzmodanTrample|AzmodanTrample|Active: Activate to charge a short distance, dealing 275 damage and Slowing enemies caught in the path by 60% for 1.25 second.  After hitting an enemy Hero with Trample, reduce the cooldown of Azmodan's Heroic Ability by 25%.
fullText.BarbarianAncientSpear|BarbarianAncientSp: Throw out a spear that pulls Sonya to the first enemy hit, dealing 173 damage and briefly stunning them. If this hits an enemy, generate 40 Fury.
fullText.BarbarianBattleRage|BarbarianBattleRage|: Activate to instantly restore 10% of Sonya's maximum Health. Stores up to 2 charges. Usable while Whirlwinding.  Passive: Sonya deals 25% more damage to Mercenaries.
fullText.BarbarianIgnorePain|BarbarianIgnorePain|: Activate to gain 60 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 60% less damage. Usable while Whirlwinding.
fullText.BarbarianLeap|BarbarianLeap|Heroic: Leap into the air, dealing 135 damage to nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianNervesOfSteel|BarbarianNervesOf: Activate to gain 25% of your maximum Health as a Shield for 3 seconds. Usable while Whirlwinding.
fullText.BarbarianSeismicSlam|BarbarianSeismicSla: Deals 176 damage to the target enemy, and 44 to enemies behind the target.
fullText.BarbarianShotofFury|BarbarianFuryShotOfF: Use Fury instead of Mana, which is gained by taking damage or dealing Basic Attack damage. Using a Basic or Heroic Ability grants 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianStridingGiant|BarbarianStriding: Activate to become unstoppable for 2 seconds. Usable only when Wrath Of The Berserker is active.
fullText.BarbarianWhirlwind|BarbarianWhirlwind|E: Deals 138 damage a second to nearby enemies for 3 seconds, healing for 25% of damage dealt. Healing tripled versus Heroes.
fullText.BarbarianWrathoftheBerserker|BarbarianWr: Increase damage dealt by 40%. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows against Sonya by 50%. Lasts 15 seconds, and extends by 1 second for every 10 Fury gained.
fullText.BrightwingBlinkHealDoubleWyrmholeDash|Br: Teleport to a nearby ally, healing them for 200.
fullText.BrightwingCalmingMist|BrightwingSoothing: Activate to remove all Stun, Root, Slow, and Silence effects from nearby allied Heroes.  Passive: Brightwing heals nearby allied Heroes for 110 every 4 seconds
fullText.BrightwingFaerieProtector|BrightwingFaer: Activate to apply Pixie Dust to all nearby Heroes.  Passive: Pixie Dust always bounces back and applies to Brightwing.
fullText.BrightwingPhaseOut|BrightwingPhaseOut|Ac: Activate to place Brightwing in Stasis for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingPhaseShift|BrightwingPhaseShif: After 2 seconds, teleport to an allied Hero and heal them for 25% of their maximum Health.
fullText.ButcherButchersBrand|ButcherButchersBran: Deal 37 damage to an enemy and Brand them for 4 seconds. The Butcher's Basic Attacks against the Branded target heal him for 75% of the damage done.  Basic Attacks against Branded Heroes heal for double and extend the duration of the Brand by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ButcherEnraged|ButcherEnragedHotbar|Pass: While below 50% of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for 10 seconds, gaining 40% Attack Speed and 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%.  This effect has a 25 second cooldown.
fullText.ButcherFreshMeatDummy|ButcherFreshMeat|T: Upon dying, nearby enemy Minions drop 1 Fresh Meat and enemy Heroes drop 20 Fresh Meat. Fresh Meat can be picked up to gain 0.5 Attack Damage per Meat. The Butcher loses 15 Fresh Meat upon dying.  Quest: Collect 200 Fresh Meat.  Reward: Gain an additional 125 Attack Damage and 25% increased Attack Speed. Heroes continue to drop 10 Fresh Meat, Minions no longer drop Fresh Meat, and Fresh Meat is no longer lost on death.
fullText.ButcherFurnaceBlast|ButcherFurnaceBlast|: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 damage to enemies.  Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.
fullText.ButcherHamstring|ButcherHamstring|Q: Deal 110 damage and Slow enemies by 50%, decaying over 2 seconds. The Butcher's next Basic Attack will strike immediately.
fullText.ButcherLambToTheSlaughter|ButcherLambToT: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.
fullText.ButcherRuthlessOnslaught|ButcherRuthless: Charge at an enemy, becoming Unstoppable and gaining Movement Speed. If The Butcher reaches the target, they are stunned for 1 second and take 119 damage.
fullText.ChenBreathOfFire|ChenBreathOfFire|W: Breathe a cone of flames, dealing 40 damage. Enemies that are soaked in Brew are Ignited, dealing 342 additional damage over 6 seconds and adding 1.5 seconds to the duration of the Slow from Keg Smash.   After being used or after 6 seconds, this ability becomes Keg Smash.  Keg Smash Damage and Slow enemies.
fullText.ChenEarth|ChenEarth|W: Fire and Earth leap to the target location, dealing 32 damage and Slowing enemies in a large area by 70% for 1.5 seconds.  If this is the final Ability cast, increase the damage dealt by 300% and instead of Slowing, the leap Roots enemy Heroes hit for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.ChenElusiveBrawler|ChenElusiveBrawlerHot: Activate to gain 20% Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2 seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 2 seconds.
fullText.ChenFire|ChenFire|E: Increase the Attack Speed and Basic Attack damage of the spirits by 50% for 5 seconds.  If this is the final Ability cast, the Attack Speed and damage bonus is increased to 75% and the spirits gain 50% Movement Speed for its duration.
fullText.ChenFlyingKick|ChenFlyingKick|Q: Kick through target enemy, dealing 120 damage.
fullText.ChenFortifyingBrew|ChenFortifyingBrew|Tr: Chen drinks from his keg, gaining 50 Brew and 180 temporary Shields per second, up to a maximum of 540 while drinking. Shields persist for 4 seconds after he stops drinking.
fullText.ChenKegSmash|ChenKegSmash|W: Deal 50 damage and soak enemies in Brew for 3 seconds, Slowing them by 10%. After 1.25 seconds, the Slow is increased to 40%.  After being used, this Ability becomes Breath of Fire.  Breath of Fire Deal damage and Ignite Brew-soaked enemies.
fullText.ChenStagger|ChenStagger|E: Damage taken over the next 3 seconds is prevented.  Once this effect ends, Chen receives 75% of the damage taken over 5 seconds. This damage cannot be modified.
fullText.ChenStormEarthFire|ChenStormEarthFire|He: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.
fullText.ChenStorm|ChenStorm|Q: The spirits gain a Shield for 400 over 3 seconds.  If this is the final Ability cast, the shield amount is increased to 750 with no limited duration, and the duration of Storm, Earth, Fire is increased by 5 seconds.
fullText.ChenWanderingKeg|ChenWanderingKeg|Heroic: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.
fullText.ChoConsumingBlaze|ChoConsumingBlaze|W: Ignite nearby enemies, dealing 150 damage over 5 seconds. Basic Attacking burning enemies re-Ignites them. Cho is healed for 40 when an enemy is Ignited.
fullText.ChoHammerOfTwilight|ChoHammerOfTwilight|: Activate to swing the Hammer of Twilight, dealing 150 damage, pushing enemies away, and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.  Passive: Cho's Basic Attacks deal 25% increased damage.
fullText.ChoOgreHide|ChoOgreHideActivated|Trait: Activate to gain 25 Armor, but reduce Gall's damage by 25%.
fullText.ChoRuneBomb|ChoRuneBomb|E: Roll a bomb dealing 91 damage to enemies in its path. Gall can use Runic Blast to detonate it to deal 210 damage in an area.
fullText.ChoSurgingFistCast|ChoSurgingFist|Q: Activate to begin charging Surging Fist. Activate again to dash forward, knocking aside enemies and dealing 46 damage. The dash range increases by up to 250%, depending on how long it is charged.
fullText.ChoSurgingFistTrigger|ChoSurgingFistTrig: Activate again to dash forward, knocking aside enemies and dealing 46 damage. The dash range increases by up to 250%, depending on how long it is charged.
fullText.ChoTalentMoltenBlock|ChoTalentMoltenBloc: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds, damaging nearby enemies for 92 damage per second.
fullText.ChoTwilightVeil|ChoTwilightVeilTalent|Ac: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to 75 for 4 seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.
fullText.ChoUpheaval|ChoUpheaval|Heroic: After 1 second, pull enemies towards Cho'gall, Slowing them by 25% for 3 seconds and dealing 175 damage.
fullText.ChromieBlessingOfTheBronze|ChromieBlessi: Activate to cause Chromie and all allied Heroes to gain 20% Movement Speed and their Basic Abilities recharge 35% faster for 8 seconds.  Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes reduces the cooldown of Blessing of the Bronze by 1 second.
fullText.ChromieDragonsBreath|ChromieDragonsBreat: Vector Targeting Launch 3 blasts into the air that land every 0.75 seconds towards the targeted direction, dealing 215 damage each.
fullText.ChromieHereAndThere|ChromieHereAndThere|: Activate to teleport to an area near an Echo, swapping it with Chromie's previous location.
fullText.ChromieQuantumOverdrive|ChromieQuantumOv: Activate to increase Spell Power by 30% for 8 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast reduces this cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.ChromieSandBlast|ChromieSandBlast|Q: After 0.5 seconds, fire a missile that deals 305 damage to the first enemy hit. Deals 50% damage to Structures.  Casting Sand Blast leaves an Echo behind that mimics Chromie's Sand Blast and Basic Attack, dealing 40% damage. Maximum of 1 Echo active at a time.
fullText.ChromieSlowingSands|ChromieSlowingSands|: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.
fullText.ChromieTemporalLoop|ChromieTemporalLoop|: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.  Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.
fullText.ChromieTimeOut|ChromieTimeOutHotbar|Acti: Activate to place Chromie in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for up to 5 seconds. Can be reactivated to end the effect early.
fullText.ChromieTimeTrapDetonate|ChromieDetonateT: Detonates active Time Traps, placing all nearby allied or enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 2 seconds.
fullText.ChromieTimeTrap|ChromieTimeTrap|E: Place a Time Trap that arms and Stealths after 2 seconds. Chromie's Trait can be activated to detonate the trap, placing all nearby allied or enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 2 seconds. Maximum of 1 trap active at a time.
fullText.ChromieTimewalkersPursuit|ChromieTimewal: Activate to reveal the targeted area for 4 seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for 4 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderBlessedHammer|CrusaderCondemnBle: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 65 damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.
fullText.CrusaderBlessedShield|CrusaderBlessedShi: Deal 114 damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderBlindedByTheLight|CrusaderBlinde: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.  Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderCondemn|CrusaderCondemn|W: After 1 second, Johanna pulls nearby enemies toward her, Stunning them for 0.25 seconds and dealing 55 damage. Deals 200% increased damage to Minions and Mercenaries.
fullText.CrusaderFallingSword|CrusaderFallingSwor: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderIndestructible|CrusaderIndestruc: Upon taking fatal damage, Johanna gains a Shield equal to her maximum Health for 4 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderIronSkin|CrusaderIronSkin|Trait: Activate to grant Johanna a Shield that absorbs 810 damage for 4 seconds. While this Shield is active, Johanna is Unstoppable.
fullText.CrusaderLawsOfHope|CrusaderLawsOfHope|Ac: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.  Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by 5% of Johanna's max Health.
fullText.CrusaderPunish|CrusaderPunish|Q: Step forward dealing 113 damage and Slowing enemies by 50%, decaying over 2 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderShieldGlare|CrusaderShieldGlare|: Deal 59 damage to enemies and Blind them for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderSteedCharge|CrusaderIronSkinStee: Activate to instantly Mount for 4 seconds, unhindered by damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 second.
fullText.DeathwingBellowingRoar|DeathwingBellowin: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.DeathwingCataclysm|DeathwingCataclysm|He: After 2 seconds, Deathwing flies in the targeted direction, dealing 90 damage on impact and leaving scorched ground that deals 36 damage a second. Lasts 6 seconds.  Quest: Hit Heroes with Molten Flame to grant 1 stack. Quest: Score Takedowns to grant 50 stacks.  Mythic Reward: After reaching 2000 stacks, Deathwing brings on the Hour of Twilight. Cataclysm's periodic damage to Structures is increased by 2500%.
fullText.DeathwingDestroyerForm|DeathwingDestroye: After 1.75 seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing 50 damage to enemies in the area and landing in Destroyer form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities 3 seconds after landing.
fullText.DeathwingDragonflight|DeathwingDragonfli: After 3 seconds, fly into the sky, becoming Immune to all effects and gaining 2.5% Health per second. Once cast, this ability cannot be interrupted. Cannot be cast for 6 seconds after taking damage, Basic Attacking or casting an Ability.
fullText.DeathwingEarthShatter|DeathwingEarthShat: Create a fissure of earth that deals 90 damage to enemies hit and Stuns them for 0.75 seconds.  Destroyer: Onslaught Lunge in a direction
fullText.DeathwingElementiumPlating|DeathwingElem: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second.   When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.  The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.
fullText.DeathwingIncinerate|DeathwingIncinerate|: After 0.75 seconds, Deathwing flaps his wings, dealing 100 damage to nearby enemies.  World Breaker: Lava Burst Create a lava pool that damages and Slows
fullText.DeathwingLavaBurst|DeathwingLavaBurst|W: After a 1 second delay, deal 35 damage to all enemies in an area and create a pool of magma that deals 28 damage per second and Slows enemies by 45%. Lasts 6 seconds.  Destroyer: Incinerate Damage enemies near Deathwing
fullText.DeathwingMoltenFlameCancel|DeathwingMolt: After 1.5 seconds, Deathwing breathes a stream of flame, dealing 19 damage every 0.125 seconds. Drains 30 Energy per second.
fullText.DeathwingMoltenFlame|DeathwingMoltenFlam: After 1.5 seconds, Deathwing breathes a stream of flame, dealing 19 damage every 0.125 seconds. Drains 30 Energy per second.
fullText.DeathwingOnslaught|DeathwingOnslaught|E: After 0.5 seconds, Deathwing lunges in a direction dealing 60 damage to enemies and Slowing them by 35% for 2 seconds. Deathwing bites enemies at the end of the lunge, dealing an additional 120 damage.  World Breaker: Earth Shatter Damage and Stun enemies in two lines
fullText.DeathwingSkyfall|DeathwingSkyfallActive|: After 0.8 seconds, a meteor falls from the sky, dealing 58 damage to enemies in the area.  If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
fullText.DeathwingWorldbreakerForm|DeathwingWorld: After 1.75 seconds, Deathwing slams down to the ground, dealing 50 damage to enemies in the area and landing in World Breaker form. Deathwing can begin to cast Abilities 3 seconds after landing.
fullText.DeckardAncientBlessings|DeckardFortitude: When at least 1 other allied Hero is nearby, Deckard gains 10 Armor and his Basic Abilities recharge 50% faster.
fullText.DeckardGemEmerald|DeckardGemEmerald|Acti: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by 75% for 4 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
fullText.DeckardGemRuby|DeckardGemRuby|Active: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100%  and it spawns 3 Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for 250 when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for 10 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
fullText.DeckardGemSapphire|DeckardGemSapphire|Ac: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and its slow by 30%.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
fullText.DeckardHealingPotion|DeckardHealingPotio: Throw a Healing Potion on the ground that heals the first allied Hero that comes in contact with it for 285.  Limit 5 active Potions.
fullText.DeckardHoradricCube|DeckardHoradricCubeC: Release the Horadric Cube. After 0.5 seconds it explodes, dealing 80 damage to all enemies in the area and Slowing them by 35% for 2 seconds.
fullText.DeckardLorenado|DeckardLorenado|Heroic: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 damage to Heroes hit.
fullText.DeckardScrollOfSealing|DeckardScrollOfSe: Unfurl an enchanted scroll over 2.25 seconds, forming a triangle that deals 150 damage to enemies inside and Roots them for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.DeckardStayAWhileAndListen|DeckardStayAW: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after.  Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.
fullText.DehakaAdaptation|DehakaAdaptation|Heroic: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
fullText.DehakaBrushstalker|DehakaBrushstalker|Z: Activate to burrow to a bush on the Battleground.  Passive: Gain 20% movement speed while in a bush and for 2 seconds after leaving.   Passive: Gathering a Regeneration Globe reduces the cooldown of Brushstalker by 40 seconds.
fullText.DehakaBurrow|DehakaBurrow|E: Burrow into the ground, entering Stasis and becoming Invulnerable for 2 seconds. While Burrowed, Dehaka can move at 50% movement speed.
fullText.DehakaDarkSwarm|DehakaDarkSwarm|W: Deal 48 damage every 0.5 seconds to nearby enemies for 3.5 seconds. While active, you are able to move through units. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.
fullText.DehakaDrag|DehakaDrag|Q: Dehaka lashes out his tongue, dealing 160 damage to the first enemy hit, Stunning and dragging them with him for 1.75 seconds.  If Dehaka is Stunned or Silenced while using Drag, the effect ends.
fullText.DehakaEssenceCollection|DehakaEssenceCol: Heal Dehaka for 29 Health per stored Essence over 5 seconds. Can be cast during Drag and Burrow.  Passive: Gain 10 Essence from Takedowns and 2 Essence from nearby Minions dying. Maximum of 50 Essence.
fullText.DehakaIsolation|DehakaIsolation|Heroic: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.
fullText.DemonHunterGloom|DemonHunterGloomItem|Ac: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 Health per second.
fullText.DemonHunterHungeringArrow|DemonHunterHun: Fire an arrow that deals 140 damage to the first target hit, then seeks up to 2 additional enemies, prioritizing Heroes, dealing 80 damage. Can hit an enemy multiple times.
fullText.DemonHunterMultishot|DemonHunterMultisho: Deal 159 damage to enemies within the target area.
fullText.DemonHunterRainOfVengeance|DemonHunterRa: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.DemonHunterStrafe|DemonHunterStrafe|Hero: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.
fullText.DemonHunterVault|DemonHunterVault|E: Dash to the target area. Valla's next Basic Attack within 2 seconds deals 6% increased damage per stack of Hatred.
fullText.DiabloApocalypse|DiabloApocalypse|Heroic: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.DiabloBlackSoulstoneSoulShield|DiabloSou: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.DiabloFireStomp|DiabloFireStomp|W: Unleashes fire waves toward the targeted area that deal 12 damage each. Once they reach maximum range they return, dealing an additional 36 damage. Diablo heals for 130% of the damage dealt to Heroes.
fullText.DiabloHellgate|DiabloHellgateTalent|Acti: Teleport and place a demonic rune at target location. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 damage and stunning enemies for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.DiabloLightningBreath|DiabloLightningBre: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.   Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.
fullText.DiabloOverpower|DiabloOverpower|E: Grabs the target and slams it behind Diablo, dealing 73 damage and Stunning for 0.25 seconds.
fullText.DiabloShadowCharge|DiabloShadowCharge|Q: Charge an enemy, knocking them back, dealing 40 damage and gaining 15% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. If the enemy hits terrain, they are Stunned for 1 second and take an additional 130 damage.

fullText.DryadAbolishMagic|DryadAbolishMagicHotba: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For 2 seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by 50%.
fullText.DryadCripplingSpores|DryadCripplingSpore: Enemies currently afflicted by Nature's Toxin have its duration increased by 3 seconds and are Slowed by 40%, decaying over 3 seconds.
fullText.DryadGallopingGait|DryadDryadsSwiftness|: Lunara moves 20% faster by leaping short distances.
fullText.DryadGreaterSpellShield|DryadGreaterSpel: Greater Spell Shield is disabled and will not trigger.  Click this button to enable Greater Spell Shield.

Every 30 seconds, gain 75 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Click this button to disable Greater Spell Shield from Triggering automatically.
fullText.DryadLeapingStrike|DryadLeapingStrike|He: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.DryadNoxiousBlossom|DryadNoxiousBlossom|: After 0.5 seconds, cause an area to explode with pollen dealing 160 damage.

fullText.DryadWisp|DryadWisp|E: Spawn a Wisp to scout an area. Can be redirected once active. When the Wisp is in a bush for more 2 seconds, its vision radius is increased by 75%. Lasts 45 seconds.
fullText.DVaBoostersOn|DVaMechBoosters|Q: Increase D.Va's Movement Speed by 115% for 1.75 seconds. Enemies that are hit take 135 damage and are knocked away.   D.Va cannot be Slowed while Boosters are active, and each enemy can only be hit once per use.
fullText.DVaLiquidCoolingAbility|DVaLiquidCooling: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.  Passive: While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to 50 seconds and its effects last 50% longer.
fullText.DVaMechBunnyHopHeroic|DVaBunnyHopOn|Hero: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 78 damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 80% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.  Lasts for 4 seconds.  Requires Mech Mode.
fullText.DVaMechDefenseMatrixOn|DVaMechDefenseMat: Project a defensive field in the target direction for 3 seconds, reducing the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside it by 60%.  Activate again to change the angle of projection.  Damage dealt to the Mech from enemies within Defense Matrix still grants the same amount of Self-Destruct Charge.
fullText.DVaMechPilotSelfDestruct|DVaMechSelfDest: Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct after 4 seconds. Deals 400 to 1100 damage in a large area, depending on distance from center. Deals 50% damage against Structures.  Gain 1% Charge for every 2 seconds spent Basic Attacking, and 25% Charge per 100% of Mech Health lost.
fullText.DVaMechSelfDestruct|DVaMechSelfDestruct|: Eject from the Mech, setting it to self-destruct after 4 seconds. Deals 400 to 1100 damage in a large area, depending on distance from center. Deals 50% damage against Structures.  Gain 1% Charge for every 2 seconds spent Basic Attacking, and 25% Charge per 100% of Mech Health lost.
fullText.DVaMicroMissiles|DVaMicroMissiles|Heroic: After .375 seconds, Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds.  Stores 2 charges with a 3 second cooldown between each use.  Requires Mech Mode.
fullText.DVaPilotBigShot|DVaPilotBigShot|Heroic: Deal 150 damage to all enemies in a line. Heroes hit have their Movement Speed Slowed by 25% for 1.5 seconds. The cooldown of Call Mech is reduced by 5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.  Requires Pilot Mode.

fullText.FaerieDragonArcaneFlare|BrightwingArcane: Shoot a flare dealing 75 damage to enemies hit, and an additional 105 damage to enemies in the center. If a Hero is hit by the center, Soothing Mist's passive healing instantly activates.

fullText.Hearthstone|HearthstoneBrew|B: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health and 150 Brew.
fullText.Hearthstone|HearthstoneNoMana|B: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health.
fullText.Hearthstone|Hearthstone|B: After Channeling for 6 seconds, teleport back to the Hall of Storms, instantly restoring 1125 Health and 150 Mana.
fullText.HeroGenericSpellShield|GenericSpellShiel: Spell Shield is disabled and will not trigger.  Click this button to enable Spell Shield.

Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Click this button to disable Spell Shield from Triggering automatically.
fullText.HoggerEzThroDynamite|HoggerEzThroDynamit: Toss a bundle of Dynamite with a 1.5 second fuse. Upon detonation, enemies take 180 damage and are Slowed by 30% for 2 seconds.   The Dynamite instantly detonates when landing on an enemy Hero granting Hogger 10 Rage.
fullText.HoggerHoardapult|HoggerHoardapult|Heroic: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
fullText.HoggerHoggWild|HoggerHoggWild|E: After 0.25 seconds, become Unstoppable and uncontrollably spin towards the target direction, ricocheting off terrain. Ricocheting off terrain refreshes the duration.  Every 0.125 seconds, deal 44 damage to nearby non-Structure enemies. Damage against Heroes is increased by .5% for each point of Rage.
fullText.HoggerLootHoard|HoggerLootHoard|Trait: Toss a pile of junk onto the battlefield, dealing 102 damage in an area, knocking enemies away, and acting as terrain for up to 5 seconds.  When the Loot Hoard expires or is destroyed, a chunk of Meat falls out that can be picked up to restore 3% of maximum Health every second for 4 seconds.  Reactivate to destroy Loot Hoard.
fullText.HoggerNoControl|HoggerNoControl|Active: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.  Cannot be cancelled.
fullText.HoggerOnTheProwl|HoggerOnTheProwl|Active: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds.  Passive: You heal for 7 Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.
fullText.HoggerShockwave|HoggerShockwave|Heroic: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.HoggerStaggeringBlow|HoggerStaggeringBlo: Swing your chain in a wide arc, dealing 140 damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. If an enemy hits terrain, deal an additional 150 damage, Stun for 0.75 seconds, and gain 15 Rage.
fullText.IcyVeins|JainaIcyVeinsHotbar|Active: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge 200% faster and reduce their Mana cost by 50% for 5 seconds.
fullText.IllidanBladesOfAzzinoth|IllidanBladesOfA: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.
fullText.IllidanDive|IllidanDive|Q: Dive at the target, dealing 66 damage and flipping to the other side of the target.
fullText.IllidanEvasion|IllidanEvasion|E: Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.IllidanMetamorphosisMountCustom|SummonMo: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 30% Movement Speed.
fullText.IllidanMetamorphosisTargeted|IllidanMeta: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.
fullText.IllidanSweepingStrike|IllidanSweepingStr: Dash towards target point, dealing 119 damage to enemies along the way. Hitting an enemy increases Illidan's Basic Attack damage by 35% for 3 seconds.
fullText.IllidanTheHunt|IllidanTheHunt|Heroic: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.
fullText.ImperiusAngelicArmaments|ImperiusAngelic: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 Shield for 3 seconds.  If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 damage to the first enemy hit.
fullText.ImperiusCelestialCharge|ImperiusCelestia: Lunge towards a targeted direction and stab, dealing 35 damage. If an enemy Hero is hit, Channel to Stun for 1 second and deal 80 additional damage when it fully finishes.
fullText.ImperiusHolyFervor|ImperiusHolyFervor|Ac: Activate to reset Imperius's Basic Attack cooldown and cause the next 4 Basic Attacks within 10 seconds to cleave for 30% additional damage.
fullText.ImperiusImpervious|ImperiusImpervious|Ac: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by 5 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusMoltenArmor|ImperiusMoltenArmor|: Shroud Imperius in flames for 3 seconds, striking a nearby enemy for 19 damage every 0.25 seconds. Imperius heals for 50% of the damage dealt, increased to 100% against Heroes. Strikes 2 additional targets if no Heroes are in range, and restores 1 Mana for each strike on expiration.
fullText.ImperiusSolarionsFire|ImperiusSolarionsF: Release a fiery wave that deals 110 damage. Enemies hit by the center take 50% bonus damage and are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusValorousPursuit|ImperiusValorous: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusWrathOfTheAngiris|ImperiusWrathO: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.  After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 250 damage to them, increased by 20% for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for 1 second.
fullText.ImprovedIceBlock|JainaImprovedIceBlockCa: Cancel Improved Ice Block, removing the Stasis and Invulnerability and Chilling nearby enemies.
fullText.ImprovedIceBlock|JainaImprovedIceBlockHo: Activate to place Jaina in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 2.5 seconds. When this effect expires, nearby enemies are Chilled.
fullText.JainaBlizzard|JainaBlizzard|W: Bombard an area with 3 waves of ice, dealing 142 damage each. Damaged enemies are Chilled.
fullText.JainaCommandWaterElemental|JainaCommandW: Wills the Water Elemental to attack an enemy or move to an area.
fullText.JainaFrigidTransmission|JainaFrigidTrans: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.
fullText.JainaFrostbolt|JainaFrostbolt|Q: Deal 184 damage and Chill the target.
fullText.JainaRingOfFrost|JainaRingOfFrost|Heroic: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.
fullText.JainaSummonWaterElemental|JainaSummonWat: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over 32 seconds.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMine|JunkratConcussionM: Place a mine on the ground. Junkrat's Trait can be activated to detonate the mine, dealing 180 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.  Limit 1 active mine.
fullText.JunkratDetonateMine|JunkratDetonateMine|: Detonate the planted Concussion Mine, dealing 180 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them back. Junkrat can also be affected by Concussion Mine, but takes no damage.
fullText.JunkratDetonateRIPTire|JunkratDetonateRI: Instantly detonate the RIP-Tire, knocking nearby enemies back, and dealing 720 damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 to enemies on the edge.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncher|JunkratFragLauncher|: Launch a grenade that explodes at the end of its path or upon hitting an enemy, dealing 124 damage to nearby enemies. Grenades can ricochet off of terrain. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Stores up to 4 charges. Frag Launcher's cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
fullText.JunkratIHateWaitingSummonMount|JunkratRo: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 150% Movement Speed.
fullText.JunkratRIPTireJump|JunkratRIPTireJump|Q: Activate to make the RIP-Tire jump. Can be used to pass over terrain and Structures.
fullText.JunkratRIPTire|JunkratRIPTire|Heroic: Create a motorized bomb with 530 Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 to enemies on the edge.
fullText.JunkratRocketRide|JunkratRocketRide|Hero: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
fullText.JunkratSpreadVolley|JunkratSpreadVolleyA: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrap|JunkratSteelTrap|E: Place a trap on the ground that arms after 2 seconds. Deals 130 damage to the first enemy that walks over it and Roots them for 2 seconds.  Limit 1 active trap.
fullText.JunkratTotalMayhemDirtyTrickster|Junkrat: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode.   This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
fullText.KaelthasArcaneBarrier|KaelthasArcaneBarr: Gain a Shield equal to 100% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana for 4 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrike|KaelthasFlamestrike|: After 1 second, deal 345 damage in an area.   Verdant Spheres increases the radius by 50%.
fullText.KaelthasGravityLapse|KaelthasGravityLaps: Stun the first enemy hit for 1 second.   Verdant Spheres causes Gravity Lapse to stun the first 3 enemies hit and increases the stun duration by 50%.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBomb|KaelthasLivingBomb|W: Deal 126 damage over 3 seconds to an enemy, then they explode dealing 215 damage to all nearby enemies.  Other Heroes damaged by this explosion are also affected by Living Bomb, though the secondary explosions cannot spread.  Verdant Spheres makes this Ability cost no Mana and have no cooldown.
fullText.KaelthasPhoenixRetargetPhoenixAbility|Ka: Send the Phoenix to a different area.
fullText.KaelthasPhoenix|KaelthasPhoenix|Heroic: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 damage and splashing for 42 damage.
fullText.KaelthasPyroblast|KaelthasPyroblast|Hero: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 damage to an enemy Hero and 405 damage to enemies nearby.
fullText.KaelthasVerdantSpheres|KaelthasVerdantSp: Activate to make Kael'thas's next Basic Ability more powerful.
fullText.KelThuzadArchlichArmor|KelThuzadArchlich: Activate to gain 50 Physical Armor for 4 seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take 45 damage and are Slowed by 35% for 4 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadChainsLink|KelThuzadChainsLink|: Launch a new chain from the currently chained enemy. Deals 97 damage upon impacting a Hero and pulls both enemies together.
