fullText.KelThuzadChains|KelThuzadChains|E: Launch a chain, dealing 97 damage to the first enemy Hero hit. For 3 seconds after hitting an enemy, Chains can be reactivated to launch to an additional enemy, pulling both enemies together and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadDeathAndDecay|KelThuzadDeathAnd: After 0.5 seconds, launch an orb that explodes upon hitting an enemy, dealing 150 damage to enemies in the area. The explosion leaves behind a pool of decay that lasts 2 seconds, dealing 82 damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies.
fullText.KelThuzadFrostNova|KelThuzadFrostNova|W: Create a nova that explodes after 1 second, dealing 180 damage to enemies inside and Slowing them by 35% for 2.5 seconds. Enemies in the center are Rooted for 1 second.
fullText.KelThuzadFrozenTomb|KelThuzadFrozenTomb|: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals 115 damage to its target and 275 damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for 2 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadGlacialSpike|KelThuzadGlacialSp: Activate to create a spike that detonates after 4 seconds, dealing 70 damage to nearby enemies. The spike can be affected by Chains of Kel'Thuzad.
fullText.KelThuzadPhylacteryItem|KelThuzadPhylact: Can be activated while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms, but must be charged again.  Passive: Kel'Thuzad heals for 10% of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.
fullText.KelThuzadShadowFissure|KelThuzadShadowFi: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing 320 damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to 1.5 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadShiftingMalice|KelThuzadShiftin: Activate to dash forward, dealing 150 damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.
fullText.KelThuzadSpawnShade|KelThuzadTheDamnedRe: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts 15 seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.
fullText.KerriganChrysalis|KerriganChrysalis|Acti: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 650 Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 4% of her maximum Health per second.  Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.
fullText.KerriganImpalingBlades|KerriganImpalingB: After 1.25 seconds, deal 150 damage to enemies within the target area, Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.KerriganMaelstrom|KerriganMaelstrom|Hero: Deals 74 damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.
fullText.KerriganPrimalGrasp|KerriganPrimalGrasp|: Pulls enemies within the target area towards Kerrigan, dealing 40 damage. After 2.5 seconds, an explosion occurs around Kerrigan, dealing 160 damage to nearby enemies.
fullText.KerriganPsionicShift|KerriganPsionicShif: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.
fullText.KerriganRavage|KerriganRavage|Q: Leap to a target, dealing 115 damage. If the enemy dies within 0.75 seconds, restore 1 charge and refund 20 Mana.  Quest: Kill enemies within a short distance of Kerrigan. Minions grant 1 stack and Heroes grant 7 stacks.   Reward: After reaching 100 stacks, Ravage deals 125 additional damage and Hero kills now provide 14 stacks.  Mythic Reward: After reaching a 250 stacks, Ravage deals a further 200 additional damage.
fullText.KerriganSummonUltraliskIssueOrder|Kerrig: Order the Ultralisk to attack an enemy or move to an area.
fullText.KerriganSummonUltralisk|KerriganSummonUl: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 225 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.
fullText.L90ETCFaceMelt|L90ETCFaceMelt|W: Deals 68 damage to nearby enemies, knocking them back.
fullText.L90ETCGuitarSolo|L90ETCGuitarSolo|E: Regenerate 66 Health per second for 4 seconds.
fullText.L90ETCMoshPit|L90ETCMoshPit|Heroic: After 0.75 seconds, channel to stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.
fullText.L90ETCPoweroftheHorde|L90ETCPoweroftheHo: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds, increased by 2% for each other allied Hero in the area.
fullText.L90ETCPowerslide|L90ETCPowerslide|Q: Slide to a location dealing 105 damage and Stunning enemies hit for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.L90ETCRidetheLightning|L90ETCRidetheLigh: Activate to teleport to a nearby location and deal 48 damage to nearby enemy Heroes. The cooldown is reduced by 10 second for every enemy Hero hit, up to 50 seconds.
fullText.L90ETCStageDive|L90ETCStageDive|Heroic: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 damage to enemies in the area, and slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
fullText.LeoricDrainEssence|LeoricDrainEssence|W: Throw out a chain, attaching to the first enemy Hero hit, healing Leoric for up to 10% of his maximum Health over 4 seconds as long as the enemy remains close.
fullText.LeoricDrainHope|LeoricDrainHope|W: Grab an enemy Hero's soul, dealing up to 20% of their maximum Health as damage and healing Leoric for up to 20% of his maximum Health while he is nearby, over 4 seconds. Leoric's Movement Speed is reduced by 20% while this is active.
fullText.LeoricEntomb|LeoricEntomb|Heroic: Create an unpassable tomb for 4 seconds.
fullText.LeoricMarchoftheBlackKing|LeoricMarchoft: Leoric becomes Unstoppable and walks forward, swinging his mace 3 times. Enemies hit take 250 damage, and Heroes hit heal Leoric for 12% of his maximum Health.
fullText.LeoricOsseinRenewal|LeoricOsseinRenewalH: Activate to heal Leoric for 30% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. Regeneration Globes lower the cooldown of this Ability by 20 seconds.
fullText.LeoricShroudOfTheDeadKing|LeoricShroudof: Activate to become Protected for 3 seconds, preventing all damage.
fullText.LeoricSkeletalSwingTargetedReady|LeoricS: Leoric swings his mace, dealing 150 damage and Slowing enemies by 40% for 2.5 seconds. If an enemy Hero is hit, refund 50% of the cooldown and Mana cost. Deals 75% additional damage to Minions. Peasants!
fullText.LeoricWraithWalk|LeoricWraithWalk|E: Leoric separates from his body, becoming Unstoppable and gaining Movement Speed accelerating up to 50% over 2.5 seconds. When Wraith Walk ends or is canceled, his body jumps to his wraith.
fullText.LiLiBlindingWind|LiLiBlindingWind|E: Throw a cloud of wind at the 2 nearest enemies (prioritizing Heroes), dealing 133 damage. Heroes hit are Blinded and Slowed by 15% for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.LiLiCloudSerpent|LiLiCloudSerpent|W: Summon a Cloud Serpent on an allied Hero that attacks nearby enemies every second. Each attack deals 26 damage and heals the ally for 20. Lasts for 8 seconds.
fullText.LiLiHealingBrew|LiLiHealingBrew|Q: Heal the lowest Health allied Hero within 6 range for 210 Health.
fullText.LiLiJugof1000Cups|LiLiJugof1000Cups|Hero: Channel for up to 6 seconds. Every 0.25 seconds, increase the cooldown of Jug of 1,000 Cups by 2 seconds, up to 50 additional seconds, and heal the lowest Health nearby allied Hero for 75 Health.
fullText.LiLiLetsGo|LiLiLetsGo|Active: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 160 and make them Unstoppable for 1 second. Let's Go's cooldown is affected by Fast Feet.  Cannot be used on Li Li.
fullText.LiLiMistweaver|LiLiMistweaver|Active: Activate to heal nearby allied Heroes for 149. Basic Attacks and Cloud Serpent attacks reduce the cooldown of Mistweaver by 1 second.
fullText.LiLiSafetySprint|LiLiFastFeet|Trait: Upon taking damage, your Basic Ability cooldowns refresh 50% faster and you gain 10% Movement Speed for 1 second.
fullText.LiLiWaterDragon|LiLiWaterDragon|Heroic: Li Li channels for 2 seconds, summoning a Water Dragon that hits the nearest enemy Hero within 12 range and all enemies near them, dealing 300 damage and slowing their Movement Speed by 70% for 4 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsGoGoGo|LostVikingsGoGoGo|Z: The Vikings gain 30% increased Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsLongboatRaidMortar|LostViking: Fires a mortar at the targeted location, dealing 228 damage in a large area.
fullText.LostVikingsLongboatRaidNewer|LostVikings: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 damage in an area.  The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds.  Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.
fullText.LostVikingsNordicAttackSquad|LostVikings: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to 1.25% maximum Health to enemy Heroes.
fullText.LostVikingsNorseForce|LostVikingsNorseFo: All Vikings gain a 140 to 308 point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts 4 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsPlayAgain|LostVikingsPlayAgai: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.   Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.
fullText.LostVikingsPressA|LostVikingsJump|W: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsSpinToWin|LostVikingsSpinToWi: Activate to have each Viking deal 85 damage to nearby enemies.  Deals 100% bonus damage to enemy Heroes.
fullText.LostVikingsVikingBribery|LostVikingsViki: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use 40 stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: 200.
fullText.LucioAmpItUp|LucioAmpItUp|E: Raise Lúcio's Crossfade track volume for 3 seconds, amping Healing Boost to 112 Health per second and Speed Boost to 30% increased Movement Speed.
fullText.LucioBoombox|LucioBoomboxBoombox|Active: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor.  Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.
fullText.LucioCrossfade|LucioCrossfadeActivateHea: Currently playing Speed Boost, increasing the Movement Speed of Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes by 10%.  Toggle to play Healing Boost instead.
fullText.LucioCrossfade|LucioCrossfadeActivateSpe: Currently playing Healing Boost, passively healing Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes for 15 Health per second.  Toggle to play Speed Boost instead.
fullText.LucioHighFive|LucioHighFive|Heroic: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230, Lúcio is healed for 80, and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.
fullText.LucioPushOff|LucioPushOff|Trait: While moving alongside terrain, activate to slide towards a targeted location. Enemies hit take 100 damage and are Slowed by 75% for 1 second.
fullText.LucioSoundBarrier|LucioSoundBarrier|Hero: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.
fullText.LucioSoundwave|LucioSoundwave|Q: Deal 105 damage to enemies in an area and knock them back.
fullText.LucioSummerAnthem|LucioItemSummerAnthem|: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.LucioWallRide|LucioWallRide|Z: When moving alongside terrain, Lúcio begins to Wall Ride for 2 seconds. While Wall Ride is active, Lúcio can walk through units and gains 20% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
fullText.MaievContainmentDiscContain|MaievContain: Activate to remove the target's vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds.
fullText.MaievContainmentDisc|MaievContainmentDis: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving Containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds.  Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnivesNaishasMemento|MaievFanO: Activate to make primary Basic Attacks bounce between nearby enemies up to 2 times. Lasts 8 seconds.  Recharge Naisha's Memento by hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnives|MaievFanOfKnives|Q: Deal 152 damage to enemies in a crescent area.  Hitting at least 2 enemy Heroes with Fan of Knives reduces its cooldown to 0.5 seconds, and refunds its Mana cost.
fullText.MaievShadowOrbHuntress|MaievShadowOrbHun: Activate to increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed by 40% for 5 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Physical Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
fullText.MaievShadowOrbShadowStrike|MaievShadowOr: Activate to deal 75 damage to an enemy Hero, Slowing them by 30% and reducing their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Spell Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceBlink|MaievSpiritO: Teleport to the Spirit of Vengeance, consuming it.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceShadowOrbVengeance: Activate to reset the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance.  Recharge Shadow Orb by damaging enemy Heroes with Spirit of Vengeance 5 times.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeance|MaievSpiritOfVeng: Send a shadow of Maiev outward that will return to its cast location, dealing 150 damage to enemies along both paths. If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce the cooldown by 4 seconds.
fullText.MaievUmbralBind|MaievUmbralBind|W: Maiev's next Basic Attack cleaves and applies a tether to enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. If a tethered Hero moves too far from Maiev, they are pulled toward her, dealing 110 damage and breaking the tether.
fullText.MaievVaultOfTheWardens|MaievVaultOfTheWa: Leap into the air, becoming Immune to all hostile effects for 0.75 seconds.  After reaching Level 20, Vault of the Wardens gains an additional charge.
fullText.MaievWardensCage|MaievWardensCage|Heroic: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionAstralCommunion|MalfurionTwilig: Activate to Channel for 1 second, and then instantly teleport and cast Twilight Dream at the targeted location. Cooldown is shared with Twilight Dream.  Passive: Increase Twilight Dream's Silence duration to 5 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionEntanglingRootsTenaciousRoots|M: When Malfurion is Stunned, the cooldown of Entangling Roots is instantly reset.
fullText.MalfurionEntanglingRoots|MalfurionEntang: Root enemy Heroes in an area for 1.25 seconds, and deal 117 damage over the duration. Affected area grows over 3 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionInnervate|MalfurionInnervate|Tr: Grant an allied Hero 20% of their maximum Mana over 5 seconds. While affected by Innervate, their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Cannot be used on Heroes that do not use Mana.
fullText.MalfurionMoonfire|MalfurionMoonfire|W: Deal 90 damage to enemies in an area and reveal them for 2 seconds.  Allies with an active Regrowth are healed for 130 Health for each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire.
fullText.MalfurionNaturesCure|MalfurionNaturesCur: Activate to remove all Stuns, Roots, and Slows from allies affected by Regrowth.
fullText.MalfurionRegrowth|MalfurionRegrowth|Q: Heal an allied Hero for 380 Health over 20 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionTranquility|MalfurionTranquilit: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affected by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.
fullText.MalfurionTwilightDream|MalfurionTwilight: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisCarrionSwarm|MalGanisCarrionSwar: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
fullText.MalGanisDarkConversion|MalGanisDarkConve: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsBlindAsABat|MalGanisFelC: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 5.5 seconds.   Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.  Does not provide quest stacks while active.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsFirst|MalGanisFelClawsFi: Violently slash in the chosen direction, dealing 66 damage to enemies.  Reactivate to slash up to 2 more times. The third slash Stuns enemies for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsSecond|MalGanisFelClawsS: Violently slash in the chosen direction, dealing 66 damage to enemies.  Reactivate to slash up to 2 more times. The third slash Stuns enemies for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsThird|MalGanisFelClawsTh: Violently slash in the chosen direction, dealing 66 damage to enemies.  Reactivate to slash up to 2 more times. The third slash Stuns enemies for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisNecroticEmbrace|MalGanisNecrotic: Desecrate the air, dealing 121 damage to nearby enemies and gaining 15 Spell Armor for 3 Seconds.  This ability's base damage provides double healing from Vampiric Touch.
fullText.MalGanisNightRush|MalGanisNightRush|E: After 0.75 seconds, gain 50% Movement Speed for 2 seconds. While active, Mal'Ganis can move through enemy Heroes and put them to Sleep for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelDeathShroud|MalthaelDeathShroud|: After 0.25 seconds, unleash a wave of dark mist that applies Reaper's Mark to enemies it hits.
fullText.MalthaelFearTheReaper|MalthaelFearTheRea: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelInevitableEnd|MalthaelInevitable: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active Reaper's Marks.
fullText.MalthaelLastRites|MalthaelLastRites|Hero: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelNoOneCanStopDeath|MalthaelNoOneC: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.
fullText.MalthaelShroudOfWisdom|MalthaelShroudOfW: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelSoulRip|MalthaelSoulRip|Q: Extract the souls of nearby enemies afflicted by Reaper's Mark, dealing 100 damage and healing Malthael for 25 per target hit. Heroic targets heal Malthael for an additional 4% of the Hero's maximum Health.
fullText.MalthaelTormentedSouls|MalthaelTormented: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelTouchOfDeath|MalthaelTouchOfDeat: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by Reaper's Mark by 50% for 4 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelWraithStrike|MalthaelWraithStrik: Instantly teleport through an enemy afflicted by Reaper's Mark, dealing 59 damage and refreshing Reaper's Mark.
fullText.MedicCellularReactor|MedicCellularReacto: Consume 30 Energy to heal Lt. Morales for 30% of her maximum Health over 3 seconds. Caduceus Reactor is disabled while this is active.
fullText.MedicDetonateDisplacementGrenade|MedicDe: Detonate Displacement Grenade, dealing 208 damage to nearby enemies and knocking them away.
fullText.MedicDisplacementGrenade|MedicDisplaceme: Fire a grenade that can be manually detonated, dealing 208 to nearby enemies and knocking them away.
fullText.MedicHealingBeam|MedicHealingBeam|Q: Heal target allied Hero or Minion for 172 Health per second as long as they are in range. After not channeling Healing Beam for 2 seconds, regenerate 6 Energy per second.  Reactivate to switch targets, or self-cast to cancel channeling.
fullText.MedicMedivacDropshipDepart|MedicMedivacD: Departs for the targeted location immediately.
fullText.MedicMedivacDropship|MedicMedivacDropshi: Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to 10 seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.
fullText.MedicRedirectHealingBeam|MedicRedirectHe: Redirect Healing Beam to another Hero or Minion. Self-cast to cancel channeling.
fullText.MedicReinforcements|MedicMedivacDropship: Order your Medivac to travel to the original cast location.
fullText.MedicReinforcements|MedicReinforcements|: Activate to call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After 10 seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to the original cast location to unload its passengers. Cooldown is shared with Medivac Dropship.
fullText.MedicSafeguard|MedicSafeguard|W: Grant target ally Hero 35 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.MedicStimDrone|MedicStimDrone|Heroic: Grant an allied Hero 75% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 10 seconds.
fullText.MedicTraumaTriggerAbility|MedicTraumaTri: Taking damage while below 40% Health grants 40 Armor for 3 seconds. This effect has a 30 second cooldown.  Passive: Increase the healing provided by Caduceus Reactor from 2% to 4% of Lt. Morales's maximum Health per second.
fullText.MedivhArcaneBrilliance|MedivhArcaneBrill: Activate to instantly restore 200 mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
fullText.MedivhArcaneRift|MedivhArcaneRift|Q: Launch a rift that deals 170 damage to enemies in its path. If an enemy Hero is hit, reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds and refund 50 Mana.  Quest: Hit 40 enemy Heroes with Arcane Rift without dying.  Reward: Permanently increase the damage dealt by 75 and cooldown reduction for hitting a Hero by 1 second.
fullText.MedivhDustOfAppearance|MedivhDustOfAppea: Activate to greatly increase sight range for 5 seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for 8 seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.  Passive: Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by 25%.
fullText.MedivhDustofDisappearance|MedivhDustofDi: Stealth an allied Hero for 40 seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.MedivhForceOfWill|MedivhForceOfWill|W: Protect an allied Hero from all damage for 1.5 seconds. Upon expiration, Force of Will heals the target for 20% of the damage it absorbed.
fullText.MedivhLeyLineSealMedivhCheats|MedivhLeyL: Redirect the energy wave to a new location.
fullText.MedivhLeyLineSeal|MedivhLeyLineSeal|Hero: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.
fullText.MedivhPolyBombGlyphOfPolyBomb|MedivhPoly: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.MedivhPolyBomb|MedivhPolyBomb|Heroic: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.MedivhPortal2|MedivhPortal|E: Create a set of portals between Medivh and the target location, allowing allies to teleport between both. The portals last 6 seconds.
fullText.MedivhPortalInstant|MedivhPortal|E: Create a set of portals between Medivh and the target location, allowing allies to teleport between both. The portals last 6 seconds.
fullText.MedivhPortalMastery|MedivhPortalPortalMa: Create a Portal entrance or exit at the targeted location.   Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal.
fullText.MedivhTransformRaven|MedivhTransformRave: Transform into a raven, increasing Movement Speed by 20%. While transformed, Medivh can see and fly over terrain and is immune to all effects.
fullText.MeiOWAvalanche|MeiOWAvalanche|Heroic: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds per Hero consumed.
fullText.MeiOWBackupBattery|MeiOWBackupBattery|Ac: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate 20% of maximum Health over 2 seconds. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by 10 seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.
fullText.MeiOWBlizzard|MeiOWBlizzard|W: Command Snowball to create a Blizzard at the target location for 2 seconds. Enemies within the blizzard take 13 damage every 0.25 seconds and are Slowed by 7%, stacking up to 35%. When the Blizzard ends, enemies within its area take an additional 75 damage and are Stunned for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWCryoFreezeFlashFreezeTalentHotbar|M: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a 180 second cooldown.
fullText.MeiOWCryoFreeze|MeiOWCryoFreeze|Trait: Become encased in ice for 3 seconds, gaining a rapidly decaying Shield that absorbs up to 1104 damage. While active, this Shield grants Unstoppable and restores up to 35% of Mei's maximum Health.
fullText.MeiOWIceWall|MeiOWIceWall|Heroic: Vector Targeting After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by 75%, decaying over 3 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWIcing|MeiOWIcing|E: Slide quickly in the targeted direction. When this effect ends, enemies near Mei are knocked back, take 52 damage, and are Slowed by 80%, rapidly decaying over 1.5 seconds.  Can be canceled during sliding.
fullText.MeiOWSnowBlindTheBigOneDummyAbility|MeiO: Every 15 seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has 67% increased area and 200% increased damage.
fullText.MeiOWSnowBlind|MeiOWSnowBlind|Q: Throw a snowball that hits all enemies in an area. Enemies hit take 70 damage, are Slowed by 35%, and are Blinded for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.MephistoConsumeSouls|MephistoConsumeSoul: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MephistoDuranceOfHate|MephistoDuranceOfH: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 damage to them over the same duration.  Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.MephistoLightningNova|MephistoLightningN: A ring of lightning appears around Mephisto for 2.5 seconds. Enemies within the ring take 43 damage every 0.25 seconds.  Each time a cast of Lightning Nova hits a Hero, its damage is increased by 3%, up to 30%.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephistoShadeLord|Mephist: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration.  Passive: Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level 7 Talents.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephisto|MephistoShadeOfM: Teleport to a location, dealing 78 damage to nearby enemies and leaving behind a Shade of Mephisto at Mephisto's original location.   After 2.5 seconds, Mephisto is teleported back to the Shade's location.
fullText.MephistoSkullMissile|MephistoSkullMissil: Conjure a skull that travels in the target direction after 0.625 seconds, dealing 127 damage to enemies hit and Slowing Heroes hit by 25% for 2 seconds.
fullText.MonkAirAlly|MonkAirAlly|Active: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes 20% Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has 300 Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.
fullText.MonkBreathOfHeaven|MonkBreathOfHeaven|W: Heal nearby Heroes for 295 and give them 15% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.MonkDeadlyReach|MonkDeadlyReach|E: Kharazim's next Basic Attack increases his Attack Speed and Attack Range by 100% for 2 seconds.
fullText.MonkDivinePalm|MonkDivinePalm|Heroic: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.
fullText.MonkEarthAlly|MonkEarthAlly|Active: Place an Earth Ally that grants nearby allied Heroes 50 Physical Armor against Heroic Basic Attacks, reducing damage taken by 50%. Has 400 Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Earth Allies.
fullText.MonkEpiphany|MonkEpiphany|Active: Activate to restore 70% of Kharazim's maximum Mana and refill 2 charges of Radiant Dash.
fullText.MonkRadiantDash|MonkRadiantDash|Q: Jump to an allied or enemy unit. Enemies are immediately hit with a Basic Attack.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.MonkSevenSidedStrike|MonkSevenSidedStrik: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.
fullText.MonkSpiritAlly|MonkSpiritAlly|Active: Place a Spirit Ally that heals allied Heroes in a large area around it for 2% of their maximum Health every second. Has 150 Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.
fullText.Mount|GreymaneSummonMount|Z: Shapeshift into Human form and increase Greymane's Movement Speed by 40%.
fullText.Mount|SummonMount|Z: After Channeling for 1 second, gain 30% Movement Speed.
fullText.MuradinDwarfToss|MuradinDwarfToss|E: Leap to target location, dealing 59 damage to enemies on landing. Upon leaping, gain 30 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.
fullText.MuradinHaymaker|MuradinHaymaker|Heroic: Stun target enemy Hero, and wind up a punch dealing 319 damage and knocking the target back, hitting enemies in the way for 319 damage and knocking them aside.
fullText.MuradinStormBolt|MuradinStormbolt|Q: Throw a hammer, dealing 110 damage to the first enemy hit and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds  Quest: Basic Attack Heroes affected by Stuns, Slows, or Roots. Slowed or Rooted enemies grant 1 stack. Stunned enemies provide 2 stacks.  If the Hero dies within 3 seconds, gain 5 stacks.  Reward: Upon hitting 45 targets, Storm Bolt pierces to hit an additional target, and Muradin's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Storm Bolt by 0.5 seconds.  Mythic Reward: Upon hitting 160 targets, Storm Bolt's range is increased by 50%, width increased by 100%, and now pierces all targets.
fullText.MuradinThunderclap|MuradinThunderclap|W: Blast nearby enemies for 96 damage and Slow them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Heroes hit also have their Attack Speed reduced by 30% for the duration.
fullText.MurkyAFishyDeal|MurkyAFishyDeal|Active: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.
fullText.MurkyCancelMarchoftheMurlocs|MurkyCancel: Stop channeling March of the Murlocs
fullText.MurkyMarchoftheMurlocs|MurkyMarchOfTheMu: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.
fullText.MurkyOctoGrab|MurkyOctoGrab|Heroic: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.
fullText.MurkyPufferfish|MurkyPufferfish|W: Spit out a Pufferfish with 225 health at the target point. After 2.75 seconds, the fish will blow up for 330 damage. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Quest: Kill Slimed Enemies or hit them with Pufferfish. Heroes and Structures award 4 bonus stacks.  Reward: After obtaining 200 stacks, Murky's Basic Abilities no longer deal reduced damage to structures.  Mythic Reward: After obtaining 400 stacks, Murky's health is increased by 50%.
fullText.MurkyRespawnEgg|MurkySpawnEgg|Trait: Place an Egg at target location, revealing the nearby area. Upon dying, Murky respawns at the Egg after 8 seconds. Murky only grants 25% of a real Hero's experience upon dying.  If Murky's Egg is killed, he is revealed to enemies for 15 seconds, and Spawn Egg is placed on cooldown.
fullText.MurkySafetyBubble|MurkySafetyBubble|E: Becomes Invulnerable for 2 seconds. While active, Murky cannot attack or use abilities.
fullText.MurkySlime|MurkySlime|Q: Deal 86 damage and apply Slime on nearby enemies for 6 seconds, Slowing them by 20%.   Deal 210 damage to enemies who are already Slimed. Structures take 50% damage.
fullText.NecromancerBoneArmor|NecromancerBoneArmo: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 25% of Xul's maximum Health for 3 seconds.
Activate to gain a Shield equal to 25% of Xul's maximum Health for 3 seconds.
Activate to gain a Shield equal to 25% of Xul's maximum Health for 3 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerBonePrison|NecromancerBonePri: After a 2 second delay, deal 80 damage and Root the target enemy Hero for 1.75 seconds.  All nearby Skeletal Warriors will fixate on the target for their duration.
fullText.NecromancerBoneSpear|NecromancerBoneSpea: Deal 230 damage to enemies in a line.
fullText.NecromancerCursedStrikes|NecromancerCurs: Xul's Basic Attacks deal damage in a wide area and reduce the Attack Speed of Heroes and Summons by 40% for 2 seconds. Lasts 4 seconds once triggered.
fullText.NecromancerPoisonNovaInstant|Necromancer: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerRaiseSkeletonDisplayAbility|N: When a nearby enemy Minion dies, it becomes a Skeletal Warrior with 240 Health that attacks for 21 damage and lasts up to 12 seconds. Upon death, Skeletal Warriors deal 40 damage to nearby enemies.  Up to 3 Skeletal Warriors can be active at once when spawned in this way.
fullText.NecromancerSkeletalMages|NecromancerSkel: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerSpectralScythe|NecromancerSpe: Summon a scythe that travels to Xul after 1 second, dealing 190 damage to enemies and spawning a Skeletal Warrior when hitting enemy Heroes.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.
fullText.NexusHunterBloodRage|NexusHunterBloodRag: Passive: Basic Attack and Ability damage cause enemies to bleed for 44 damage over 4 seconds. Stacks 5 times.  Qhira deals 32 damage and heals for 90 Health per enemy Hero affected. Damage and healing is increased by 50% per each additional stack on that Hero.
fullText.NexusHunterCarnage|NexusHunterCarnage|Q: Unleash your sword in the target direction, continuously dealing 30 damage to enemies caught in its path.
fullText.NexusHunterFinalStrikeActivate|NexusHunt: After 1 second, deal 410 damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes who are below 50% Health.
fullText.NexusHunterGrapplingHook|NexusHunterGrap: Qhira fires a grappling hook that pulls her to terrain it contacts. If an enemy Hero is hit, they take 35 damage and Qhira launches at them, kicking them for an additional 108 damage.  Can be used while Revolving Sweep is active.
fullText.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepSecondary|Nexus: Fly into your target dealing 108 damage, knocking them away and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterRevolvingSweep|NexusHunterRev: Attach your sword on the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 96 damage and Stunning them for 0.25 seconds. Once attached, Qhira becomes Immune to all effects, swinging around the target for 2.75 seconds and dealing 105 damage to enemies between you and the target.  Re-activate to send you to the target's location knocking them away, dealing 108 damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikes|NexusHunte: Deal 44 damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.NovaCovertMission|NovaCovertMission|Acti: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them.  Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.  Current number of Bribe stacks: 0
fullText.NovaGhostProtocol|NovaGhostProtocol|Acti: Activate to instantly grant Stealth to Nova and spawn a Holo Decoy at her location. Nova is Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds when Stealthed by Ghost Protocol.
fullText.NovaHoloDecoy|NovaHoloDecoy|E: Create a Decoy for 5 seconds with 100% of Nova's current Health that attacks enemies, dealing 10% of Nova's base damage. Whenever a Decoy takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
fullText.NovaPinningShot|NovaPinningShot|W: Deal 100 damage to an enemy and Slow them by 40% for 2.25 seconds.
fullText.NovaPrecisionStrike|NovaPrecisionStrike|: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
fullText.NovaSnipeStorm|NovaSnipe|Q: Deal 230 damage to the first enemy hit.  Passive: Hitting an enemy Hero with Snipe permanently increases the damage of Snipe by 6%, stacking up to 30%. Gain an additional 25% damage bonus at maximum stacks. All stacks are lost if Snipe fails to hit an enemy.
fullText.NovaTripleTap|NovaTripleTap|Heroic: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 damage each.
fullText.OrpheaChomp|OrpheaChomp|W: After 0.625 seconds, deal 305 damage to nearby enemies in front of Orphea.
fullText.OrpheaCrushingJaws|OrpheaCrushingJaws|He: After 1.25 seconds, pull enemies in an area towards the center, dealing 250 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaDread|OrpheaDread|E: Release a wave of dread that deals 85 damage to enemies hit. Dread erupts 0.75 seconds after reaching the end of its path, dealing 175 damage. Enemies hit by Dread's wave or eruption are Slowed by 25% for 2 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaEternalFeast|OrpheaEternalFeast|He: After 1.5 seconds, deal 210 damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every 1 second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.
fullText.OrpheaFinalToccata|OrpheaFinalToccata|Ac: Activate to instantly reset the cooldown of Shadow Waltz. For the next 5 seconds, dashing with Shadow Waltz resets its cooldown and increases the duration of Final Toccata by 1 second.
fullText.OrpheaLurkingTerror|OrpheaLurkingTerror|: After Dread erupts and for 2 seconds after, activate to cast Chomp from the eruption area. Enemy Heroes hit by this Chomp are Slowed by 70% for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaOverflowingChaosInvasiveMiasma|Orp: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability grants 1 Chaos. Chaos can stack up to 3 times.  While Orphea has Chaos, her Basic Attacks against Heroes consumes all Chaos, dealing 50% increased damage per stack, and healing for 100% of the damage dealt.
fullText.OrpheaShadowWaltz|OrpheaShadowWaltz|Q: After 0.5 seconds, deal 165 damage to enemies in a line.   Hitting a Hero with Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to 2 seconds, refunds 35 Mana, and causes Orphea to dash a short distance upon moving.
fullText.OverkillTargetedRetarget|TychusOverkillR: Focuses Overkill on a different target or direction.
fullText.ProbiusDisruptionPulse|ProbiusDisruption: Fire a burst of energy forward, dealing 142 damage to all enemies it passes through.  Hitting the center of a Warp Rift will cause it to explode, dealing additional damage.
fullText.ProbiusNullGate|ProbiusNullGate|Heroic: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.
fullText.ProbiusPhotonCannon|ProbiusPhotonCannon|: Warp in a Photon Cannon that deals 105 damage. Lasts for 13 seconds.  While within a Pylon's Power Field, Photon Cannons gain 40% Attack Speed over 4 seconds and reveal nearby enemies.
fullText.ProbiusPylonOvercharge|ProbiusPylonOverc: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.
fullText.ProbiusWarpInPylon|ProbiusWarpInPylon|Tr: Warp in a Pylon that generates a Power Field and grants vision of the surrounding area. Probius only regenerates mana while inside a Power Field. Enemy Heroes and Minions drop Minerals when killed. Gather Minerals to reduce the cooldown of Warp In Pylon by 0.75 seconds.  Up to 2 Pylons can be active at a time.
fullText.ProbiusWarpRift|ProbiusWarpRift|W: Open an unstable Warp Rift at a location that takes 1.25 seconds to arm, which then Slows nearby enemies by 25% lasting 3 seconds.  Armed Warp Rifts explode when they expire or when hit by Disruption Pulse, dealing 261 damage to nearby enemies.
fullText.ProbiusWorkerRush|ProbiusWorkerRush|Z: Activate to gain an additional 60% Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Taking damage ends this effect early. Worker Rush is always active while at the Hall of Storms.  Passive: Probius moves 10% faster by hovering over the ground.
fullText.RagnarosBigRagExplosiveRune|RagnarosBigR: Create a rune that deals 285 damage to non-Structure enemies after 1.5 seconds.  Damage increased by 25% versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.RagnarosBigRagMeteorShower|RagnarosBigRa: Vector Targeting Summon 3 meteors at the target point that fall in the target direction. Each meteor deals 151 damage and Slows enemies by 25% for 2 seconds.  Damage increased by 25% versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.RagnarosBigRagMoltenSwing|RagnarosBigRag: Swing Sulfuras in a wide arc, dealing 161 damage and Stunning enemies for 1 second.  Damage increased by 25% versus Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.RagnarosBigRagSulfurasSmash|RagnarosSulf: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 damage. Enemies in the center take 594 damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosBlastWave|RagnarosBlastWave|E: Ignite Ragnaros or an ally, granting 25% Movement Speed for 1.5 seconds before exploding dealing 104 damage to nearby enemies.  Molten Core: Explosive Rune Cause a delayed explosion in a large area.
fullText.RagnarosCatchingFire|RagnarosCatchingFir: Activate to gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
fullText.RagnarosEmpowerSulfuras|RagnarosEmpowerS: Ragnaros's next Basic Attack is instant, dealing 191 Ability damage in an area, and heals for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing doubled versus Heroes.  Molten Core: Molten Swing Stun and damage nearby enemies.
fullText.RagnarosLavaWaveTargetPoint|RagnarosLava: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing 240 damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by 100% versus Heroes.
fullText.RagnarosLivingMeteorShiftingMeteor|Ragna: Change the direction of Living Meteor.
fullText.RagnarosLivingMeteor|RagnarosLivingMeteo: Vector Targeting Summon a meteor at the target point that deals 68 damage, then rolls in the target direction dealing 272 damage per second for 1.75 seconds.  Molten Core: Meteor Shower Drop a line of meteor impacts.
fullText.RagnarosMoltenCore|RagnarosMoltenCore|Tr: Channel on an allied or destroyed Fort or Keep to replace it with Ragnaros's ultimate form, temporarily gaining new Abilities, having 3996 Health that burns away over 18 seconds.  Ragnaros returns to his normal form upon losing all Health in Molten Core.
fullText.RagnarosResilientFlameCooldownDisplay|Ra: When Ragnaros is Stunned, he gains 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%.   This effect has a 15 second cooldown.
fullText.RagnarosSubmerge|RagnarosSubmerge|Active: Ragnaros submerges below, entering Stasis and healing for 600 Health over 3 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosSulfurasSmash|RagnarosSulfurasSm: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 damage. Enemies in the center take 594 damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.RaynorAdrenalineRush|RaynorAdrenalineRus: Heal Raynor for 25% of his maximum Health over 1 second. Raynor's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 0.5 seconds, increased to 1 second against Heroes.
fullText.RaynorBountyHunter|RaynorGiveEmSomePeppe: Every 4th Basic Attack splashes in a small area and deals 125% more damage to the main target.
fullText.RaynorHyperion|RaynorHyperion|Heroic: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 damage.
fullText.RaynorInspire|RaynorInspire|W: Raynor and all nearby allied Minions and Mercenaries gain 30% Attack Speed and 10% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.  Casting Inspire resets Raynor's Basic Attack cooldown.
fullText.RaynorPenetratingRound|RaynorPenetrating: Deal 205 damage, knock back, and Slow enemies in a line by 20% for 2 seconds. Enemies close to Raynor are knocked back further.
fullText.RaynorRaynorsRaidersDummy|RaynorRaynorsR: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 damage per second and regenerates 75 Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.
fullText.RaynorRaynorsRaidersRedirect|RaynorRayno: Order the Banshee to attack an enemy.
fullText.RehgarAncestralHealing|RehgarAncestralHe: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 Health.
fullText.RehgarBloodlust|RehgarBloodlust|Heroic: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.
fullText.RehgarChainHeal|RehgarChainHeal|Q: Heal an ally with a wave of healing for 260 Health. The wave then bounces 2 times to nearby allies within 7 range, restoring 260 Health to them.
fullText.RehgarEarthbindTotem|RehgarEarthbindTote: Create a totem that Slows nearby enemies by 35%. The totem has 260 Health and lasts for 6 seconds.
fullText.RehgarElementalConduit|RehgarElementalCo: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 10% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.   For up to 5 seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.
fullText.RehgarGhostWolfActivate|RehgarGhostWolfA: Instead of using a mount, Rehgar transforms into a Ghost Wolf with 20% increased Movement Speed. Basic Attacks in Ghost Wolf form cause him to lunge at his target and deal 60% bonus damage. Dealing damage, using Abilities, and channeling cancels Ghost Wolf form.
fullText.RehgarHealingTotem|RehgarHealingTotem|Ac: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for 2% of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has 125 Health and lasts for 10 seconds.
fullText.RehgarLightningShield|RehgarLightningShi: Imbue an ally with lightning dealing 64 damage a second to nearby enemies. Each enemy hit restores 1 Mana to Rehgar. Lasts 5 seconds.
fullText.RehgarPurge|RehgarPurge|Trait: When used on an allied Hero, make them Unstoppable for 0.5 seconds. When used on an enemy Hero, Slow them by 80%, decaying over 2 seconds.  Cannot be cast on yourself.
fullText.RehgarTotemicProjection|RehgarTotemicPro: Instantly move Earthbind Totem to a new location.
fullText.RexxarBestialWrath|RexxarBestialWrath|He: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by 200% for 12 seconds.
fullText.RexxarFeignDeath|RexxarFeignDeath|Active: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for 5 seconds. During this time you control Misha.
fullText.RexxarFlare|RexxarFlare|Active: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for 20 seconds.
fullText.RexxarHardenedSkin|RexxarHardenedSkin|Ac: Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.
fullText.RexxarMendPet|RexxarMendPet|E: Heal Misha for 714 Health over 5 seconds.
fullText.RexxarMishaChargeRedirect|RexxarMishaCha: Misha charges in a line, dealing 150 damage and stunning enemies for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.RexxarMishaCharge|RexxarMishaChargeRedir: Misha charges in a line, dealing 150 damage and stunning enemies for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.RexxarMishaFocus|RexxarMishaFocus|Trait: Passive: Misha gains 15% move speed.   Command Misha to attack a specific enemy or move to a point and wait.  Targeting Rexxar commands Misha to retreat to his position, gaining 30% move speed until she reaches Rexxar.  Targeting Misha commands her to hold her current position.
fullText.RexxarPrimalIntimidation|RexxarSpiritBon: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.RexxarSpiritSwoop|RexxarSpiritSwoop|Q: Deal 141 damage to enemies in a line, slowing them by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.RexxarUnleashTheBoars|RexxarUnleashTheBo: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing 110 damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by 40% for 5 seconds.
fullText.RockstarDummy|L90ETCRockstar|Trait: Using a Basic Ability grants 25 Armor for 2 seconds. Heroic Abilities grant 50 Armor.
fullText.SamuroBladeStormDummy|SamuroBladestorm|H: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for 3 seconds, granting him 25 Armor and dealing 180 damage per second to nearby enemies.
fullText.SamuroCriticalStrike|SamuroCriticalStrik: Activate to cause Samuro and his Mirror Images next Basic Attack within 8 seconds to be a Critical Strike, dealing 50% additional damage. Stealth is not broken when activated.  Passive: Samuro and his Images also deal a Critical Strike every 4th Basic Attack.
fullText.SamuroIllusionMaster|SamuroAdvancingStri: Activate to switch places with a target Mirror Image, removing most negative effects from Samuro and all Mirror Images.  Advancing Strikes  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds.
fullText.SamuroIllusionMaster|SamuroIllusionMaste: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by 100%.   Passive: Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to 8 seconds.
fullText.SamuroMirrorImageTargeted|SamuroMirrorIm: Teleport a short distance in the direction of the mouse cursor, creating 2 Mirror Image in the opposite direction with as much Health as Samuro, each dealing 11 damage with their Basic Attacks. Whenever an Image takes damage, it deals that amount of damage to itself, effectively doubling the damage it takes.  Mirror Images last for 8 seconds, and up to 2 Mirror Images can be active at a time. Each time they or Samuro hit an enemy Hero with their Basic Attack, their duration is extended by 1 second. Using Mirror Image removes most negative effects from Samuro.
fullText.SamuroWindwalk|SamuroWindwalk|E: Grant Samuro Stealth for up to 10 seconds or until he attacks, uses an Ability, or takes damage.  While Stealthed, Samuro heals for 2% of his maximum Health every second, his Movement Speed is increased by 20% and he can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Samuro is Unrevealable for the first 1 second of Wind Walk.
fullText.SgtHammerBluntForceGun|SgtHammerBluntFor: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing 500 damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.
fullText.SgtHammerConcussiveBlast|SgtHammerConcus: Deal 141 damage to enemies in front of Sgt. Hammer and knock them back.  Siege Mode: Radius increased by 50%.
fullText.SgtHammerNapalmStrikeSiege|SgtHammerNapa: Deals 164 damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals 50 damage per second. Lasts for 4 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerNapalmStrike|SgtHammerNapalmStr: Deals 164 damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals 50 damage per second. Lasts for 4 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerNeosteelPlating|SgtHammerNeoste: Gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds.  Siege Mode: Grants 100% more Armor.
fullText.SgtHammerSiegeModeMaelstromRounds|SgtHam: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by 40% for 5 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by 5 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.SgtHammerSiegeMode|SgtHammerSiegeMode|Tr: Activate to enter Siege Mode. While in Siege Mode, Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage, have 100% increased range, and deal 25% of their damage as splash damage around the target.
fullText.SgtHammerSpiderMinesSiegeMode|SgtHammerS: Create 3 mines that arm after 1.25 seconds. Mines detonate when an enemy comes in range, dealing 96 damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 25% for 1.5 seconds.  Siege Mode: Cast range increased by 100%.
fullText.SgtHammerSpiderMines|SgtHammerSpiderMine: Create 3 mines that arm after 1.25 seconds. Mines detonate when an enemy comes in range, dealing 96 damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 25% for 1.5 seconds.  Siege Mode: Cast range increased by 100%.
fullText.SgtHammerThrusters|SgtHammerThrusters|Z: Increase Movement Speed by 60% for 4 seconds. Thrusters are always active while at the Hall of Storms. Activating Thrusters cancels Siege Mode.
fullText.StitchesDevour|StitchesDevour|E: Deal 319 damage to non-Heroic units, or 114 damage to Heroes. Restores 20% of Stitches's maximum Health.
fullText.StitchesGorge|StitchesGorge|Heroic: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for 4 seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes 274 damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.
fullText.StitchesHookHelpingHand|StitchesHelpingH: Activate to use Hook that can hit allied Heroes. Hitting an allied Hero this way reduces the cooldown of Hook by 8 seconds.  After reaching level 13, Helping Hand's range is increased by 40%.
fullText.StitchesHook|StitchesHook|Q: Pull the first enemy hit towards Stitches and deal 91 damage.  After reaching level 13, Hook's range is increased by 40%.
fullText.StitchesPutridBile|StitchesPutridBile|He: Emit bile that deals 37 damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Gain 20% Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts 8 seconds.
fullText.StitchesShamblingHorror|StitchesShamblin: Activate to spread Vile Gas in a large area every second and prevent your Movement Speed from being reduced below 110% for 4 seconds.  Vile Gas Hitting enemies with Basic Attacks or the inner area of Slam afflicts them with Vile Gas, dealing an additional 36 damage over 4 seconds. Deals 150% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.StitchesSlam|StitchesSlam|W: Deal 104 damage to enemies within the target area. Enemies in the inner impact take 50% more damage and are Slowed by 45% for 2 seconds.
fullText.Stoneform|MuradinSecondWindActivateable|: Muradin restores 55 Health per second when he has not taken damage for 4 seconds. When below 40% Health, increased to 111 Health per second.
fullText.StukovBioKillSwitch|StukovBioKillSwitch|: Activate to detonate all of Stukov's Viruses. Each Healing Pathogen heals its target for 435 Health, and each Weighted Pustule does 100 damage and Slows its target by 70% for 2 seconds.  Can be cast while Channeling Lurking Arm.
fullText.StukovFlailingSwipe|StukovFlailingSwipe|: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.
fullText.StukovHealingPathogen|StukovHealingPatho: Infest an allied Hero with a Healing Pathogen that heals the target for 222 Health over 4.5 seconds. Healing Pathogens can spread to a nearby allied Hero every 0.75 seconds.  Each cast of Healing Pathogen can only spread to each allied Hero 1 time.
fullText.StukovLurkingArm|StukovLurkingArm|E: Channel at a target location, creating an area that deals 136 damage per second to non-Structure enemies and Silences them. Deals 50% reduced damage to non-Heroes.  Does not cost Mana while Channeling, and lasts until canceled or interrupted.
fullText.StukovMassiveShove|StukovMassiveShove|He: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.
fullText.StukovSpineLauncher|StukovSpineLauncherT: Basic Attacks are ranged and Slow enemies by 20% for 1.5 seconds, but their damage is reduced by 35%.  Toggle to revert to melee Basic Attacks.
Basic Attacks are melee.  Toggle to have Basic Attacks become ranged and Slow enemies by 20% for 1.5 seconds, but they deal 35% less damage.
fullText.StukovWeightedPustuleReactiveBallistospo: Activate to instantly spread a Weighted Pustule to all nearby enemy Heroes and reset the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch.  Passive: While below 50% Health, the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch refreshes 100% faster.
fullText.StukovWeightedPustule|StukovWeightedPust: Hurl a pustule that impacts all enemy Heroes in its path, dealing 20 damage and Slowing by 5%, increasing to 50% over 3 seconds. Deals an additional 88 damage upon expiring or being removed.
fullText.SylvanasBlackArrowsActive|SylvanasBlackA: Basic Attacks infect enemies with Black Arrows for 3 seconds, stacking up to 3 times. Sylvanas deals 15% more damage to enemies with 3 stacks.  Quest: Damage Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.  Reward: Upon damaging enemies 250 times, increase the damage bonus provided by Black Arrows to 50%.  Mythic Reward: Upon damaging enemies 400 times, Black Arrows now heals Sylvanas for 25% of damage dealt at 3 stacks, doubled against Heroes.
fullText.SylvanasHauntingWaveActivateWindrunnerTa: Activate to teleport to the banshees' location.
fullText.SylvanasHauntingWaveActivate|SylvanasHau: Activate to teleport to the banshees' location.
fullText.SylvanasHauntingWaveWindrunnerTalent|Syl: Send forth a wave of banshees dealing 114 damage to all targets. Reactivate to teleport to the banshees' location.
fullText.SylvanasHauntingWave|SylvanasHauntingWav: Send forth a wave of banshees dealing 114 damage to all targets. Reactivate to teleport to the banshees' location.
fullText.SylvanasMindControlMissile|SylvanasMindC: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasPossession|SylvanasPossession|Ac: Activate to force an enemy Minion to fight for Sylvanas's team. Catapults require 3 charges. Stores up to 4 charges.
fullText.SylvanasShadowDagger|SylvanasShadowDagge: Throw a dagger at a target enemy that deals 30 damage and an additional 150 damage over 2.5 seconds. Damage dealt by Sylvanas to the initial target spreads Shadow Dagger to all nearby enemies.
fullText.SylvanasWailingArrow|SylvanasWailingArro: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.
fullText.SylvanasWillOfTheForsaken|SylvanasWillOf: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasWitheringFire|SylvanasWitheringF: Shoot the closest enemy up to 5 times over 1.5 seconds for 39 damage, prioritizing Heroes. Cooldown is reset on getting a Takedown.
fullText.TalentBucketCalldownMule|GenericCalldown: Activate to calldown a Mule that repairs Structures, one at a time, near target point for 40 seconds, healing for 90 Health every 1 second.
fullText.TalentBucketIceBlock|GenericIceBlockCanc: Cancel Ice Block early, removing the Stasis and Invulnerability.
fullText.TalentBucketIceBlock|GenericIceBlockTale: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.
fullText.TalentBucketStormShield|GenericStormShie: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.
fullText.TalentHardenedShield|HardenedShieldTalen: Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 75% less damage.
fullText.TalentImposingPresence|GenericImposingPr: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.TalentRewind|GenericRewindHotbar|Active: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
fullText.TassadarArchon|TassadarArchon|Heroic: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to 25% of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for 12 seconds.  Resonance Beam: Deals 140 damage to the target and splashes 70 damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 2 seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.
fullText.TassadarBlackHole|TassadarBlackHole|Hero: After a 0.5 second cast, create a Black Hole that travels in a long line. Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled towards its center. Touching the center deals 310 damage and Stuns the target for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.TassadarExecutorsWill|TassadarExecutorsW: Activate to gain full Resonance Beam charge, 20% Spell Power, and cause Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns to regenerate 25% faster. This effect lasts as long as Resonance Beam remains at full charge.
fullText.TassadarForceWall|TassadarForceWall|E: After a 0.5 second delay, create a wall that blocks all units from moving through it for 2 seconds.
fullText.TassadarOracleTargeted|TassadarOracleTar: Passive: While stationary, gain 30 Spell Armor for 0.75 seconds and restore 12 Health a second.  Activate to Channel for up to 4 seconds, revealing a gradually increasing area anywhere on the map.
fullText.TassadarPsionicStorm|TassadarPsionicStor: Create a Psionic Storm at the targeted location for 3 seconds. While in a storm, enemies take 38 damage every 0.5 seconds, increasing by 20% for each consecutive instance of damage, up to 100%.
fullText.TassadarResonanceBeamArcDischargeDummy|T: Tassadar's Basic Attack is a Channeled beam that Slows by 15%. While Channeling, your Basic Attack damage and Mana regeneration increases by 25% a second, to a maximum of 100%. While at full charge, gain an extra 3 Mana every second.  This bonus is lost after 6 seconds of not Channeling.
fullText.TassadarShadowWalk|TassadarShadowWalk|Ac: Tassadar becomes Stealthed and Unrevealable, but cannot attack or use Abilities for 1.5 seconds. While this effect is active, gain 40% increased Movement Speed and 35 Armor.  Can be cast while Channeling Shock Ray.
fullText.TassadarShockRay|TassadarShockRay|Q: Channel a beam of Psionic energy, dealing 280 damage and Slowing enemies in a line by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.ThrallAncestralWrath|ThrallAncestralWrat: Activate to consume 8 stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for 15% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds, and healing Thrall for 150% of the damage dealt.  Gain 1 stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.
fullText.ThrallChainLightning|ThrallChainLightnin: Shock an enemy with lightning, dealing 170 damage. The lightning then bounces 3 times to nearby enemies, dealing 85 damage to each enemy hit.
fullText.ThrallEarthquake|ThrallEarthquake|Heroic: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.
fullText.ThrallFeralSpirit|ThrallFeralSpirit|W: Unleash a Feral Spirit that deals 153 damage to enemies in its path and Roots Heroes hit for 1 second. Each Hero hit increases the distance traveled by 25%.
fullText.ThrallFrostwolfsGrace|ThrallFrostwolfRes: Dealing damage with Abilities grants 1 stack of Frostwolf Resilience. At 5 stacks, Thrall is instantly healed for 240 Health.
fullText.ThrallSpiritShield|ThrallSpiritShieldDis: Spirit Shield is disabled and will not trigger.  Click this button to enable Spirit Shield.
fullText.ThrallSpiritShield|ThrallSpiritShieldEna: Every 45 seconds, gain 70 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 4 seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by 10 seconds.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
fullText.ThrallSundering|Sundering|Heroic: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.
fullText.ThrallWindfury|Windfury|E: Increase Thrall's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds. His next 3 Basic Attacks occur 100% faster and generate stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.
fullText.ThrallWindRush|ThrallWindRush|Active: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.
fullText.TinkerFocusTurrets|TinkerFocusTurrets|Ac: Orders any nearby Rock-It! Turrets to focus the target.
fullText.TinkerGravOBomb3000|TinkerGravOBomb3000|: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing 220 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.
fullText.TinkerRoboGoblin|TinkerRoboGoblinPassive: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.   Passive: Basic Attacks deal 100 bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
fullText.TinkerRockItTurret|TinkerRockItTurret|Q: Create a turret that deals 36 damage. Loses Health over 20 seconds.   Turrets prioritize the nearest enemy Hero when first created.
fullText.TinkerXplodiumBomb|TinkerXplodiumCharge|: Place a bomb that deals 142 damage to enemies within the target area after 1.25 seconds. Enemies hit are also Stunned for 1 second.
fullText.TracerBlink|TracerBlink|Q: Dash towards an area.  Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.TracerLockedandLoadedFailReload|TracerLo: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.
fullText.TracerLockedandLoaded|TracerLockedandLoa: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.
fullText.TracerMelee|TracerMelee|W: Deal 220 damage to a nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes. Gain 5% Pulse Bomb charge when using Melee against an enemy, and 10% against Heroes.
fullText.TracerPulseBomb|TracerPulseBomb|Heroic: Fire a short range bomb that can attach to an enemy if it hits them. The bomb explodes after 2 seconds dealing 298 damage to them and 149 damage to other nearby enemies.  This ability is slowly charged over time by dealing damage to enemies with Basic Attacks and Melee.
fullText.TracerRecall|TracerRecall|E: After 1.25 seconds, Tracer returns to the position she was at 2 seconds prior to casting, refilling her ammo, and removing all negative status effects from herself.
fullText.TracerReload|TracerReload|Trait: Tracer can Basic Attack while moving, and after attacking 10 times she needs to reload over 0.75 seconds. Tracer can manually reload early by activating Reload.  Basic Attacks heal Tracer for 10% of the damage dealt.
fullText.TychusDrakkenLaserDrillIssueOrder|Tychus: Order the Laser Drill to attack a new target.
fullText.TychusDrakkenLaserDrill|TychusDrakkenLas: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.
fullText.TychusGrenade|TychusFragGrenade|W: Lob a grenade that deals 256 damage, knocking enemies away.
fullText.TychusMinigunActive|TychusMinigunActive|: Activate to have Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 2.5% of their maximum Health. Lasts 3 seconds.
fullText.TychusNeosteelCoating|TychusNeosteelCoat: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.
fullText.TychusOdinAnnihilate|TychusCommandeerOdi: Fire the Odin's cannons in a straight line, dealing 196 damage to everything in the path.
fullText.TychusOdinNoHealth|TychusCommandeerOdin|: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.
fullText.TychusOdinRagnarokMissilesTargeted|Tychu: Launches a volley of missiles at target area, dealing 132 damage and slowing enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.TychusOverkillTargeted|TychusOverkill|Q: Deal 552 damage to the target and 276 damage to nearby targets over 4 seconds. Reactivate to select a new target or direction. Can move and use Abilities while Channeling.
fullText.TyraelArchangelsWrathDummy|TyraelArchang: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain 20% Movement Speed for 4 seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing 450 damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by 10% per enemy Hero hit.  Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by 50% while active and for 3 seconds when it expires.
fullText.TyraelAspectofJustice|TyraelArchangelsWr: Upon dying, become Invulnerable and gain 20% Movement Speed for 4 seconds. Upon expiration, explode, dealing 450 damage and reducing Tyrael's death timer by 10% per enemy Hero hit.  Archangel's Wrath reduces nearby enemy Heroes' damage by 50% while active and for 3 seconds when it expires.
fullText.TyraelDefenseOfTheAngels|TyraelDefenseOf: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds.  Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.TyraelElDruinsMight|TyraelElDruinsMight|: Throw El'druin to the target area, dealing 110 damage to nearby enemies and Slowing them by 30% for 2.5 seconds. It can be reactivated within 5 seconds to teleport Tyrael to El'druin and Slow nearby enemies again.
fullText.TyraelJudgement|TyraelJudgment|Heroic: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 damage.
fullText.TyraelRighteousness|TyraelRighteousness|: Shields Tyrael for 350 damage and nearby allied Heroes and Minions for 40% as much for 4 seconds.
fullText.TyraelSanctificationStationary|TyraelSan: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.
fullText.TyraelSmite|TyraelSmite|E: Rake target area, dealing 150 damage. For the next 3 seconds, allies moving through the targeted area gain 25% increased Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeElunesChosen|TyrandeElunesChosen|: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeHuntersMark|TyrandeHuntersMark|Tr: Reveal a non-Structure enemy and reduce their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds.  Passive: Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal her for 1% of her maximum Health, doubled against targets with Hunter's Mark.
fullText.TyrandeLightofElune|TyrandeLightOfElune|: Heal an ally Hero for 270. Light of Elune's cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds every time Tyrande hits an enemy with a Basic Attack or damages an enemy Hero.  Stores up to 2 charges. Cooldown replenishes all charges at the same time.
fullText.TyrandeLunarFlare|TyrandeLunarFlare|E: After 0.75 seconds, deal 150 damage and Stun enemies in the target area for 0.75 seconds. Restores 25 Mana per enemy hit.  Quest: Hitting a Hero with Lunar Flare increases its damage by 3%, up to 120%. Double this bonus if the Hero dies within 3 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 10 Heroes, increase Lunar Flare's range by 30%.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, Sentinel now pierces the first Hero hit.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Every 8th Basic Attacks fires a Lunar Flare, prioritizing Heroes. Attack Range increased by 1.
fullText.TyrandeSentinelShot|TyrandeSentinel|W: Send an Owl across the battleground revealing its path, dealing 120 damage to the first Hero hit, and revealing them for 5 seconds. If a Hero revealed by Sentinel dies, refresh its cooldown.
fullText.TyrandeShadowstalk|TyrandeShadowstalk|He: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
fullText.TyrandeStarfall|TyrandeStarfall|Heroic: Deal 92 damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeTrueshotAura|TyrandeHuntersMarkTr: Activate to grant Tyrande and nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.
fullText.UtherBenediction|UtherBenedictionHotbar|: Activate to reduce the Mana cost of Uther's next Basic Ability by 50 and its cooldown by 10 seconds.
fullText.UtherDivineIntervention|UtherDivineShiel: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
fullText.UtherDivineStorm|UtherDivineStorm|Heroic: Deal 170 damage and Stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.UtherHammerOfJustice|UtherHammerofJustic: Deal 109 damage and Stun the target for 1 second.
fullText.UtherHandOfProtection|UtherHandOfProtect: Activate to make target ally Unstoppable for 1 second. Cannot be cast on Uther. Basic Attacks reduce Hand of Protection's cooldown by 5 seconds.
fullText.UtherHolyLightArmorOfFaithCooldownDispla: Being Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants Uther 90 Mana and causes Holy Light's cooldown to recharge 200% faster for 6 seconds. This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
fullText.UtherHolyLight|UtherHolyLight|Q: Heal target allied Hero for 362 Health. When used on a target other than Uther, also heal Uther for 181 Health.
fullText.UtherHolyRadiance|UtherHolyRadiance|W: Heal all allied Heroes and Minions in a line for 194 Health, dealing 177 damage to enemies.
fullText.UtherHolyShock|UtherHolyShock|Active: Activate to deal 145 damage to the target enemy, and gain the self-healing benefits of Holy Light. Shares a cooldown with Holy Light
fullText.ValeeraAmbush|ValeeraAmbush|Q: Ambush an enemy, dealing 130 damage and reducing their Armor by 10 for 5 seconds.  Awards 1 Combo Point.  Unstealth: Sinister Strike Dash forward, damaging enemies.
fullText.ValeeraBladeFlurry|ValeeraBladeFlurry|W: Deal 130 damage in an area around Valeera.   Awards 1 Combo Point per enemy Hero hit.  Stealth: Cheap Shot Stun, Blind, and damage an enemy.
fullText.ValeeraCheapShot|ValeeraCheapShot|W: Deal 30 damage to an enemy, Stun them for 0.75 seconds, and Blind them for 2 seconds once Cheap Shot's Stun expires.  Awards 1 Combo Point.  Unstealth: Blade Flurry Deal damage in an area around Valeera.
fullText.ValeeraCloakOfShadows|ValeeraCloakOfShad: Valeera is enveloped in a Cloak of Shadows, which immediately removes all damage over time effects from her. For 1.5 seconds, she becomes Unstoppable and gains 75 Spell Armor, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraCripplingPoison|ValeeraCripplingP: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds Slow targets by 20% for 4 seconds.  Activating Crippling Poison does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraEviscerate|ValeeraEviscerate|E: Eviscerate an enemy, dealing damage per Combo Point.   1 Point: 85 2 Points: 170 3 Points: 255  Stealth: Garrote Silence and damage an enemy over time.
fullText.ValeeraGarrote|ValeeraGarrote|E: Deal 20 damage to an enemy and an additional 140 damage over 7 seconds, and Silence them for 2.5 seconds.  Awards 1 Combo Point.  Unstealth: Eviscerate High damage finishing move.
fullText.ValeeraSinisterStrike|ValeeraSinisterStr: Dash forward, hitting all enemies in a line for 110 damage. If Sinister Strike hits a Hero, Valeera stops dashing immediately and the cooldown is reduced to 1 second.  Awards 1 Combo Point.  Stealth: Ambush Heavily damage an enemy and reduce their Armor.
fullText.ValeeraSmokeBomb|ValeeraSmokeBomb|Heroic: Create a cloud of smoke. While in the smoke, Valeera is Unrevealable, can pass through other units, and gains 60 Armor, reducing damage taken by 60%. Valeera can continue to attack and use abilities without being revealed. Lasts 5 seconds.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraStealth|ValeeraStealth|Trait: Vanish from sight, becoming Stealthed, gaining 20% Movement Speed and access to new Abilities. For the first second, Valeera is Unrevealable and can pass through other units. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  After being Stealthed for 3 seconds, the cast range of Ambush, Cheap Shot, and Garrote is increased from 2.5 to 5, and they cause Valeera to teleport to the target when used.
fullText.ValeeraThistleTea|ValeeraThistleTea|Acti: Activate to instantly restore 100 Energy.  Activating Thistle Tea does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraWoundPoison|ValeeraWoundPoison|Ac: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds reduce enemy healing received by 50% for 4 seconds.  Activating Wound Poison does not break Stealth.
fullText.VarianBannerOfDalaran|VarianBannerOfDala: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20% increased Spell Power to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
fullText.VarianBannerOfIronforge|VarianBannerOfIr: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20 Armor to nearby allied Heroes, reducing damage taken by 20%. Lasts 12 seconds.
fullText.VarianBannerOfStormwind|VarianBannerOfSt: Activate to place a Banner that grants 25% increased Movement Speed to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
fullText.VarianCharge|VarianCharge|E: Charge to the target enemy, dealing 50 damage and Slowing them by 75% for 1 second.
fullText.VarianColossusSmash|VarianColossusSmash|: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage.  Passive: Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by 10%.
fullText.VarianDemoralizingShout|VarianDemoralizi: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by 40% for 5 seconds.  Each time an enemy Hero affected by Demoralizing Shout deals damage to a Hero, reduce its cooldown and Parry's cooldown by 5%.
fullText.VarianHeroicStrike|VarianHeroicStrike|Tr: Every 18 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack deals 125 bonus Spell Damage. Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.VarianLionsFang|VarianLionsFang|Q: Create a shockwave that travels in a straight line, dealing 150 damage and Slowing enemies by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Each enemy hit heals Varian for 35, increased to 140 against Heroes.
fullText.VarianParry|VarianParry|W: Parry all incoming Basic Attacks for 1.25 seconds, reducing their damage by 100%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.VarianShatteringThrow|VarianShatteringTh: Activate to throw a sword at a target Hero that deals 50 damage, and up to 1400 bonus damage to their Shields.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal up to 200% bonus Physical Damage to Shields.
fullText.VarianTaunt|VarianTaunt|Heroic: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds.  Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.
fullText.VarianVictoryRush|VarianVictoryRush|Pass: Every 30 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for 350 Health. When a nearby enemy Minion or Monster dies, the cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
