fullText.AbathurCombatStyleBombardStrain|AbathurL: Locust's Basic Attacks become a long-range siege attack and their duration is increased by 75%.
fullText.AbathurCombatStyleLocustBrood|AbathurLoc: Activate to spawn 3 Locusts at a nearby location.
fullText.AbathurCombatStyleSurvivalInstincts|Abat: Increases Locust's Health by 100% and damage by 60%.
fullText.AbathurHeroicAbilityEvolveMonstrosity|Ab: Turn an allied Minion or Locust into a Monstrosity. When enemy Minions near the Monstrosity die, it gains 2% Health and 2% Basic Attack damage, stacking up to 40 times. The Monstrosity can be healed by Carapace and has the ability to Burrow to a visible location every 80 seconds.  Using Symbiote on the Monstrosity allows Abathur to control it, in addition to Symbiote's normal benefits. This Ability can be reactivated to automatically cast Symbiote on his Monstrosity.
fullText.AbathurHeroicAbilityUltimateEvolution|Ab: Clone target allied Hero and control it for 20 seconds. Abathur has perfected the clone, granting it 20% Spell Power, 20% bonus Attack Damage, and 10% bonus Movement Speed. Cannot use their Heroic Ability.
fullText.AbathurMasteryAdrenalineBoost|AbathurSym: Symbiote's Carapace increases the Movement Speed of the target by 40% for 3.5 seconds.
fullText.AbathurMasteryEnvenomedNestsToxicNest|Ab: Toxic Nests deal 75% more damage over 3 seconds and reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.
fullText.AbathurMasteryEnvenomedSpikes|AbathurSym: Abathur's Symbiote's Spike Burst also Slows enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2 seconds.
fullText.AbathurMasteryEvolutionComplete|AbathurM: Increase Monstrosity's Basic Attack damage by 100%.
fullText.AbathurMasteryLocustMaster|AbathurLocust: Activate to create a nest that periodically spawns Locusts. Only one Locust Nest can be active at a time.
fullText.AbathurMasteryNeedlespine|AbathurSymbiot: Increases the damage and range of Symbiote's Stab by 20%.
fullText.AbathurMasteryPressurizedGlands|AbathurS: Increases the range of Symbiote's Spike Burst by 25% and decreases the cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.AbathurMasteryProlificDispersal|AbathurT: Increase the duration of Toxic Nests by 45 seconds, reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, and add 2 additional charges.
fullText.AbathurMasterySpatialEfficiency|AbathurS: Symbiote's Stab gains 1 additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by .5 seconds.
fullText.AbathurMasteryVileNestsToxicNest|Abathur: Toxic Nests Slow enemy Movement Speed by 40% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.AbathurReinforcedCarapace|AbathurReinfor: Increase the Shield amount of Carapace by 40%.
fullText.AbathurSymbioteAdrenalOverload|AbathurSy: Heroic Symbiote hosts gain 25% increased Attack Speed.
fullText.AbathurSymbioteCarapaceNetworkedCarapace: Using Symbiote's Carapace also applies an untalented Carapace Shield to all nearby allied Heroes, Minions, and Mercenaries.
fullText.AbathurSymbioteHivemind|AbathurSymbioteH: Symbiote creates an additional Symbiote on a nearby allied Hero.  This Symbiote mimics the commands of the first, but does half damage and Shielding.
fullText.AbathurSymbioteSpikeBurstSomaTransferenc: Symbiote's Spike Burst heals the host for 64 Health per enemy Hero hit.
fullText.AbathurUltimateEvolutionEvolutionaryLink: Increase the duration of Ultimate Evolution by 50%. As long as the Ultimate Evolution is alive, the original target of the clone gains a Shield equal to 35% of their maximum Health. Refreshes every 5 seconds.
fullText.AbathurVolatileMutation|AbathurVolatileM: Ultimate Evolution clones and Monstrosities deal 137 damage to nearby enemies every 3 seconds and when they die. Enemy Heroes hit heal the clone or Monstrosity for 100% of the damage dealt.
fullText.AlarakAppliedForce|AlarakAppliedForce|W|: Reduce Sadism by 10%, but Telekinesis pushes 15% further and has 15% increased range.
fullText.AlarakBladeoftheHighlord|AlarakBladeofth: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Sadism by 2% stacking up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Blade of the Highlord is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakChaosReigns|AlarakChaosReigns|Q|Le: Quest: Hit Heroes with Discord Strike.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, increase Discord Strike's damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 2 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 60.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with a single Discord Strike, increase its damage by 100 and instantly gain all other Rewards.
fullText.AlarakDeadlyChargeFirstHeroic|AlarakDead: After channeling, Alarak charges forward dealing 200 damage to all enemies in his path. Distance is increased based on the amount of time channeled, up to 1.5 seconds.  Issuing a Move order while this is channeling will cancel it at no cost. Taking damage will interrupt the channeling.
fullText.AlarakDissonance|AlarakDissonance|Q|Leve: Increase Discord Strike's Silence duration by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.AlarakExtendedLightning|AlarakExtendedLi: Reduce Sadism by 10%.  Quest: Hit Heroes with the center of Lightning Surge.  Reward: After hitting 5 Heroes, increase Lightning Surge's range by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Lightning Surge's center also Slows enemies by 40% for 2 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 3 Heroes with the center of a single cast, increase Sadism by 10% and instantly gain all other Rewards.
fullText.AlarakHastyBargain|AlarakHastyBargain|Ac: Activate to permanently reduce Alarak's Sadism by 4% and reset the cooldowns of his Basic Abilities.
fullText.AlarakHeroicAbilityCounterStrike|AlarakC: Alarak targets an area and channels for 1 second, becoming Protected and Unstoppable. After, if he took damage from an enemy Hero, he sends a shockwave that deals 275 damage.
fullText.AlarakHinderedMotion|AlarakHinderedMotio: Telekinesis Slows enemies by 30% for 3 seconds.
fullText.AlarakLastLaugh|AlarakLastLaugh|Active|L: Activate to teleport to the chosen location and remove all Roots, Slows, and damage over time effects. If Alarak fails to hit enemy Heroes 3 times with Basic Abilities within 4 seconds of using Last Laugh, his Health is reduced to 1.
fullText.AlarakLethalOnslaughtDiscordStrike|Alara: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 50% of Sadism's damage bonus to Alarak's Basic Attacks for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh this duration.
fullText.AlarakLightningBarrage|AlarakLightningBa: Hitting an enemy Hero with the center of Lightning Surge allows it to be cast again for free on a different primary target within the next 3 seconds. This free cast cannot benefit from Lightning Barrage.
fullText.AlarakMightOfTheHighlord|AlarakMightOfTh: Alarak gains access to both of his Heroic Abilities. This can be activated to change which Ability occupies the Heroic slot, with the other Ability using the Trait slot.
fullText.AlarakMockingStrikes|AlarakMockingStrike: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Alarak's Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds. This bonus is doubled against enemy Heroes who are Stunned, Silenced, Slowed, or Rooted.
fullText.AlarakNegativelyCharged|AlarakNegatively: Increase the Lightning Surge damage bonus to enemies between Alarak and his victim to 175%.  Repeatable Quest: Each Hero hit by the center of Lightning Surge permanently increases the damage bonus by 5%.
fullText.AlarakOverwhelmingPowerDiscordStrike|Ala: Hitting an enemy Hero with Discord Strike grants 40% Attack Speed and causes Basic Attacks to heal for 15% of the damage dealt, increased by 50% of Sadism's bonus when hitting Heroes. These effects last for 4 seconds.
fullText.AlarakPureMalice|AlarakPureMalice|Trait|: Increase Sadism by 10% any time an allied Hero dies, up to 40%.  Sadism gained from Pure Malice is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakRiteofRakShir|AlarakRiteofRakShir|: Activate to mark an enemy Hero for 300 seconds.  Hitting the marked Hero with Discord Strike increases Sadism by 3%. Killing the marked Hero increases Sadism by 5% and lowers the cooldown of Rite of Rak'Shir to 10 seconds.  Sadism gained from Rite of Rak'Shir is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakRuthlessMomentum|AlarakRuthlessMom: Reduce the Mana cost of Telekinesis from 30 to 20. Telekinesis's cooldown recharges 100% faster while above 80% Health.
fullText.AlarakShowofForce|AlarakShowofForce|Trai: Heroes hit with 3 of Alarak's Abilities within 2 seconds take an additional 61 damage and increase Sadism by 2%, stacking up to 20%.   Sadism gained from Show of Force is lost on death.
fullText.AlarakWrathOfTheHighlord|AlarakWrathOfTh: If Deadly Charge was the selected Heroic, Heroes hit by Deadly Charge take bonus damage from Alarak's Abilities equal to 75% of Sadism's bonus damage for 4 seconds.  If Counter-Strike was the selected Heroic, its cooldown is reduced by 2.5 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by Alarak's Basic Abilities.
fullText.AlexstraszaAncientFlameFlameBuffet|Alexs: While Dragonqueen is active, Alexstrasza's Basic Attacks apply Flame Buffet.
fullText.AlexstraszaBlessingOfTheRed|AlexstraszaB: Activate to grant an allied Hero 500 bonus maximum Health until they die.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza, or on a Hero who already has Blessing of the Red.
fullText.AlexstraszaCircleOfLifeAbundance|Alexstr: Quest: Collect Regeneration Globes.  Reward: After collecting 10 Regeneration Globes, Abundance heals for an additional 5% maximum Health.  Reward: After collecting 15 Regeneration Globes, Abundance's healing burst creates a Regeneration Globe.
fullText.AlexstraszaCleansingFlame|AlexstraszaCle: After 1.25 seconds, take to the sky and drop 5 fireballs over 6 seconds at the position of the mouse cursor. Fireballs deal 135 damage to enemies and heal allied Heroes for 300 Health.  2 seconds after dropping all fireballs, Alexstrasza lands at the position of the mouse cursor.
fullText.AlexstraszaDraconicDisciplineDragonqueen: Increase Dragonqueen's duration by 6 seconds, and Basic Attack healing by 50%.
fullText.AlexstraszaDragonScales|AlexstraszaDrago: Gain 50 Armor while Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced, and for 2 seconds after. Can only trigger once every 10 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaExuberance|AlexstraszaExubera: While above 75% Health, gain 15% Movement Speed.
fullText.AlexstraszaFireWithinFlameBuffet|Alexstr: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet heals Alexstrasza for 10% of her maximum Health.
fullText.AlexstraszaFlamesOfFuryFlameBuffet|Alexs: Reduce the Mana cost of Flame Buffet from 50 to 40.  Quest: Hit 20 Burning Heroes with Flame Buffet.  Reward: Hitting a Burning Hero with Flame Buffet reduces Dragonqueen's cooldown by 5 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaHeatExhaustionFlameBuffet|Ale: Increase Flame Buffet's Slow from 40% to 50% and cause it to no longer decay.
fullText.AlexstraszaLifebinder|AlexstraszaLifebin: Bind Alexstrasza's life force with an allied Hero. Both her and her target are healed for 480 Health over 2 seconds. Afterwards, the Hero with a lower percentage of Health is healed to the same Health percentage as the other Hero.  Dragonqueen: Cast range increased by 45%.
fullText.AlexstraszaLifeblossomGiftOfLife|Alexstr: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life creates a Lifeblossom at the target's location. Alexstrasza can collect the Lifeblossom to make her next Gift of Life cost no Health.  Passive: Reduces the cost of Gift of Life to 10% of Alexstrasza's current Health.
fullText.AlexstraszaLifeUnbound|AlexstraszaLifeUn: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 15% of their maximum Health and deal 200 damage to nearby enemies.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Life Unbound's cooldown by 30 seconds.  Cannot be used on Alexstrasza.
fullText.AlexstraszaLiveAndLetLiveGiftOfLife|Alex: While Alexstrasza is above 75% Health, Gift of Life's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
fullText.AlexstraszaOnRubyWingsCleansingFlame|Ale: Healing or damaging Heroes 8 or more times with Cleansing Flame activates Dragonqueen for 15 seconds upon landing.
fullText.AlexstraszaOverprotectiveAbundance|Alexs: Heroes healed by Abundance gain a Shield for 6 seconds equal to 70% of the amount healed.
fullText.AlexstraszaPacify|AlexstraszaPacify|Acti: Activate to Slow and reduce an enemy Hero's damage by 50% for 3 seconds.  Healing a Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced ally reduces Pacify's cooldown by 30 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaSurgeOfVitalityAbundance|Alex: Abundance's healing burst grants allied Heroes 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.AlexstraszaToughLoveGiftOfLife|Alexstras: Gift of Life grants its target 10 Armor for 2.5 seconds, increased to 30 while Alexstrasza is above 75% Health.
fullText.AlexstraszaVerdantFlourishAbundance|Alex: Alexstrasza receives 40% more healing from Abundance and 100% more healing from Regeneration Globes.
fullText.Amazon-AvoidanceRockstopper|AmazonAvoida: Activate to fully charge Avoidance and increase its Armor value to 60 for 4 seconds.    Losing Avoidance removes this bonus.
fullText.AmazonBallLightning|AmazonBallLightning|: Throw a ball of lightning at an enemy Hero that bounces up to 6 times between nearby enemy Heroes and Cassia, dealing 180 damage to enemies hit.
fullText.AmazonChargedStrikes|AmazonAvoidanceChar: Gain 15% Attack Speed. Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 20% bonus damage and bounces to nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.AmazonFendGlovesOfAlacrity|AmazonFendGlo: Gain 1 Basic Attack range. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 1 Basic Attack range.
fullText.AmazonFendGroundingRod|AmazonFendGroundi: Enemies hit by Lightning Fury or Fend are Slowed by 20% for 2 seconds.
fullText.AmazonFendWarMatron|Amazon-FendWarMatron: Cassia becomes Protected while Channeling Fend and for an additional 1 second if the Channel is completed.
fullText.AmazonImpale|AmazonFendImpale|E|Level1: Increase Fend's cast range and radius by 25%. It deals an additional 70% damage to enemies below 50% Health.
fullText.AmazonImprisoningLight|AmazonValkyrieImp: Upon impaling an enemy Hero, they are Blinded for 5 seconds and Cassia's Valkyrie creates a wave of light that deals 200 damage to nearby enemies. This wave Silences and Roots them for 3 seconds.
fullText.AmazonInfiniteLightning|AmazonBallLightn: Ball Lightning can now bounce indefinitely. Every bounce reduces its cooldown by 4 seconds.
fullText.AmazonInnerLight|AmazonLightningFuryInne: Activate to heal for 25% of your maximum Health over 5 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit with Lightning Fury lower the cooldown of this ability by 10 seconds.
fullText.AmazonMartialLaw|AmazonMartialLaw|Passiv: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Increase this to 3% if they are Stunned, Rooted, Slowed, or Blinded.
fullText.AmazonPlateoftheWhale|AmazonAvoidancePla: Regenerate 6 Health per second while Avoidance is active. If fully charged, gain an additional 12 Health per second.
fullText.AmazonPowerStrike|AmazonPowerStrike|Q|Le: Lightning Fury pierces but only splits on Heroes. Enemy Heroes hit reduce its cooldown by 1 second and become marked for 15 seconds. Upon reaching 3 marks, remove them and cast a Blinding Light at their feet.
fullText.AmazonRingoftheLeech|AmazonRingoftheLeec: Basic Attacks against your primary target heal for 20% of their damage. If an enemy is Blinded, this also affects Lightning Fury and Fend.
fullText.AmazonSeraphsHymn|AmazonBlindingLightSer: Basic Attacks against your primary enemy Hero grant 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Blinding Light by 2 seconds.  Passive: Increase the passive damage bonus of Blinding Light from 15% to 30%.
fullText.AmazonStaticElectricity|AmazonFendStatic: Gain 2 additional charges of Lightning Fury. Fend's impact launches a lightning bolt towards each nearby enemy Hero.
fullText.AmazonSurgeOfLight|AmazonAvoidanceSurgeO: After taking 650 damage with Avoidance active, Cassia can activate Avoidance to deal 220 damage to enemies around her.
fullText.AmazonThunderstroke|AmazonLightningFuryT: Increase the damage of Lightning Fury by 20.  Quest: Lightning Fury's damage is increased by 1.5 every time it hits a Hero.
fullText.AmazonTitansRevenge|AmazonTitansRevenge|: Cassia's Basic Attacks now ignore Armor and while Avoidance is fully charged, they deal an additional 20% bonus damage.
fullText.AmazonValkyrie|AmazonValkyrie|Heroic|Lev: Summon a Valkyrie that rushes to Cassia after 0.75 seconds, pulling the first enemy Hero hit, dealing 225 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds at the end of her path. The Valkyrie knocks back all other enemy Heroes in her way.
fullText.AmazonWarTraveler|AmazonAvoidanceWarTrav: Gain 5% Movement Speed. While Avoidance is fully charged, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed and Mounting is instant.
fullText.AnaBioticGrenadeAntiHealer|AnaBioticGren: Increase the area of Biotic Grenade by 25% and the duration of the healing reduction by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.AnaBioticGrenadeBioticEnhancements|AnaBi: Increase the bonus healing duration of Biotic Grenade by 50% and reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.AnaBioticGrenadeContactHealing|AnaBiotic: Hitting Heroes with Biotic Grenade increases its damage and healing by 30% per Hero hit.
fullText.AnaDebilitatingDart|AnaDebilitatingDart|: Fire a dart which Slows the Movement Speed and reduces the damage dealt by the first enemy Hero it hits by 50% for 4 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, reduce this cooldown by 8 seconds.
fullText.AnaDetachableBoxMagazine|AnaDetachableBo: Activate to instantly gain 3 charges of Healing Dart.
fullText.AnaDynamicOptics|AnaDynamicOptics|Trait|: Basic Attacks increase Attack Speed by 10% for 3 seconds, up to 100%. While Aim Down Sights is active, increase your Basic Attack Range by 4.
fullText.AnaEyeOfHorusDeadeye|AnaEyeOfHorusDeadey: Eye of Horus cooldown reduced to 6 seconds, but it only regains new rounds every 10 seconds. Remaining cooldown is converted to rounds.  For every Hero Eye of Horus hits, increases its damage and healing by 5%. This bonus resets after leaving Eye of Horus or after 4 seconds.
fullText.AnaHealingDartConcentratedDoses|AnaHeali: Increase Healing Dart's healing by 12% for each Dose active on enemy Heroes.
fullText.AnaHealingDartPurifyingDarts|AnaHealingD: Healing Dart removes Roots and Slows from the target, and heals for 20% more when doing so.
fullText.AnaHealingDartSharpshooter|AnaHealingDar: Healing Dart's healing is increased by 5% if it heals a Hero, up to 50%. At maximum bonus, further increase its healing by 35%. This bonus is reset if Healing Dart fails to hit a Hero.
fullText.AnaHealingDartSmellingSalts|AnaHealingDa: Healing Dart removes Stuns from the target, and grants them 50 Armor for 2 seconds when doing so.
fullText.AnaHealingDartSpeedSerum|AnaHealingDartS: Healing Dart grants 25% Movement Speed to affected Heroes for 2 seconds.
fullText.AnaHeroicAbilityEyeOfHorus|AnaEyeOfHorus: Assume a sniping position, gaining the ability to fire up to 6 specialized rounds with unlimited range. Rounds pierce allied and enemy Heroes but collide with enemy Structures in their path. Allies are healed for 225 and enemies are damaged for 135. Deals 50% less damage to Structures.  Ana is unable to move while Eye of Horus is active.
fullText.AnaHeroicAbilityNanaBoost|AnaNanoBoost|H: Instantly boost an allied Hero, restoring 200 Mana. For the next 8 seconds, they gain 30% Spell Power and their Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 150% faster.  Cannot be used on Ana.
fullText.AnaMindNumbingAgent|AnaMindNumbingAgent|: Every Dose a Hero has reduces their Spell Power by 10%.
fullText.AnaNanoInfusion|AnaNanoInfusion|Heroic|L: Allies affected by Nano Boost heal for 50% of Spell Damage dealt.
fullText.AnaOverdose|AnaOverdose|E|Level4: Sleep Dart applies 4 Doses. While Aim Down Sights is active, Sleep Dart pierces all enemy Heroes.
fullText.AnaShrikeArmoredStance|AnaShrikeArmoredS: Increase Shrike's damage by 50%. While Aim Down Sights is active, gain 25 Armor.
fullText.AnaShrikeVampiricRounds|AnaShrikeVampiri: Increase Shrike's healing by 15%.  Repeatable Quest: Stack 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 1%.  Repeatable Quest: Basic Attack a Hero with 5 Doses to increase Shrike's healing by 0.25%.
fullText.AnaSleepDartNightTerrors|AnaSleepDartNig: Gain 25% Movement Speed for 2 seconds for every Hero hit by Sleep Dart. Upon waking, enemy Heroes take 8% of their Maximum Health in damage.
fullText.AnaSleepingDartSlumberShells|AnaSleeping: Reduce the cooldown of Sleep Dart by 2 seconds. Upon waking, enemy Heroes are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.AnduinBlessedRecovery|AnduinBlessedRecov: If Anduin loses more than 8% of his maximum Health at once, recover 15% Health over 3 seconds.   This effect has a 10 second cooldown.  Current Health required: 133
fullText.AnduinCensure|AnduinCensure|E|Level20: Chastise Stuns for 0.75 seconds and its Root duration is increased by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.AnduinDivineStarHolyNova|AnduinDivineSta: After Anduin catches Divine Star, it explodes, healing nearby allied Heroes for 105 and damaging enemies for 150.
fullText.AnduinDivineStarMoralCompass|AnduinDivin: Divine Star fires Basic Attacks at Heroes close to its apex.  Passive: Increase Attack Range by 1.1.
fullText.AnduinDivineStarPowerWordShield|AnduinDi: While Divine Star is traveling out, allies in its path gain a Shield that absorbs 128 damage for 4 seconds.  If Divine Star hits an enemy Hero, Anduin gains a Shield that absorbs 185 damage for 4 seconds.
fullText.AnduinDivineStarSpeedOfThePious|AnduinDi: While Divine Star is traveling, gain 30% Movement Speed. Each allied Hero healed by Divine Star on its return to Anduin reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealBindingHeal|AnduinFlashHe: Casting Flash Heal on an ally heals Anduin for 135.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealDesperatePrayer|AnduinFla: Activate to instantly heal an allied Hero for 375, but kneel for 2 seconds, unable to act.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealEvenhandedBlessings|Andui: If Flash Heal is cast on a different target from its last, increase its healing by 15% and refund 40% of its cooldown.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealInnerFocus|AnduinFlashHea: Activate to reset the cooldown of Flash Heal and its next cast heals for 25% more.  Damaging enemy Heroes reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.AnduinFlashHealRenew|AnduinFlashHealRene: Flash Heal heals an additional 180 over 6 seconds. The duration of this heal is refreshed each time Anduin hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack.
fullText.AnduinHolyWordSalvationLightOfStormwind|: Holy Word: Salvation grants allied Heroes Invulnerability instead of Protected. This does not affect Anduin.   Channeling Holy Word: Salvation for its full duration reduces its cooldown by 60 seconds.
fullText.AnduinHolyWordSalvation|AnduinHolyWordSa: After 0.5 seconds, Channel to invoke the Light for 3 seconds. While nearby, allied Heroes heal for up to 30% of their max Health and are Protected.
fullText.AnduinInnerFire|AnduinInnerFire|Heroic|L: The target of Light Bomb gains 40% Move Speed and 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.AnduinLeapOfFaithEnchantBootsLionsSpeed|: Gain 5% Movement Speed. This bonus is quadrupled while Leap of Faith's cooldown is available. Allies pulled by Leap of Faith are healed for 280 over 4 seconds.
fullText.AnduinLeapOfFaithGlyphOfFaith|AnduinLeap: Leap of Faith gains a 2nd charge.
fullText.AnduinLightBomb|AnduinLightBomb|Heroic|L: Imbue an allied Hero with the Light. After 1.5 seconds, it explodes, dealing 150 damage to enemies and Stunning them for 1.25 seconds.  The target gains a Shield that absorbs 165 damage per enemy Hero hit. Lasts for 5 seconds.
fullText.AnduinLightwell|AnduinLightwell|Active|L: Summon a Lightwell that periodically heals a nearby allied Hero for 50. The well only fades after healing 15 times or when recast.  This cooldown is reduced by 1 second each time Anduin heals an allied Hero.
fullText.AnduinPiercingLight|AnduinPiercingLight|: Chastise pierces to hit an additional Hero.  Quest: Hitting two Heroes with a single Chastise permanently increases Spell Power by 1, to a maximum of 10.
fullText.AnduinPushForward|AnduinPushForward|Trai: Damaging an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 2.5% and the amount healed by Pursued By Grace by 5% for 6 seconds. These effects stack up to 8 times.
fullText.AnduinSurgeofLight|AnduinSurgeofLight|E|: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Chastise by 0.75 seconds. Basic Attacks against Heroes Rooted by Chastise launch an additional Basic Attack and restore 25 Mana.
fullText.AnduinVariansLegacy|AnduinVariansLegacy|: Basic Attacks burn enemies for 87 damage over 3 seconds and Anduin heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
fullText.AnubarakAcidDrenchedMandibles|AnubarakAc: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Anub'arak's Basic Attack damage by 80% for 4 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakBurningBeetles|AnubarakBurningBe: Deal 21 damage per second to nearby enemies. Beetles deal 6 damage per second to nearby enemies.
fullText.AnubarakCocoonCryptweave|AnubarakCryptwe: Staying near the Cocoon allows Anub'arak to extend the duration by up to 6 seconds per Cocoon. Upon exiting the Cocoon, enemies take 60 damage over 4 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% for each second that they were inside.
fullText.AnubarakCombatStyleChitinousPlating|Anub: While Harden Carapace is active, taking damage from enemy Abilities reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 3 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakCombatStyleLegionOfBeetles|Anuba: Beetles have 30 Spell Armor. Automatically spawn a Beetle every 12 seconds. Can be toggled on and off.
fullText.AnubarakDebilitation|AnubarakDebilitatio: Enemy Heroes hit by Burrow Charge or Impale have their Spell Power reduced by 50% for 4 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakHeroicAbilityCocoon|AnubarakCoco: Wraps target enemy Hero in a cocoon, rendering them unable to act or be targeted for 7 seconds. Allies of the Hero can attack the cocoon to break it and free them early.
fullText.AnubarakLocustSwarmHiveMaster|AnubarakLo: Gain a permanent Vampire Locust that attacks a nearby enemy every 3 seconds. The Vampire Locust deals 165 damage and returns to heal Anub'arak for 80 health.
fullText.AnubarakLocustSwarm|AnubarakLocustSwarm|: Deal 68 damage per second to nearby enemies. Each enemy damaged restores 24 Health. Lasts 6 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakMasteryBedOfBarbs|AnubarakImpale: Create a bed of spikes along Impale's path that Slows enemies by 25% and deals 21 damage per second. Spikes persist for 3.5 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakMasteryEpicenterBurrowCharge|Anu: Increases Burrow Charge impact area by 60% and lowers the cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
fullText.AnubarakMasteryLeechingScarabs|AnubarakL: Beetles gain 30% bonus attack damage and they heal Anub'arak for 50% of their damage with each attack if he is nearby.
fullText.AnubarakMasteryShedExoskeletonHardenCara: Harden Carapace grants 30% increased Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakMasteryUnderkingBurrowCharge|Anu: Increases Burrow Charge range by 20% and damage by 100%.
fullText.AnubarakMasteryUrticatingSpines|Anubarak: Casting Harden Carapace will also deal 90 damage to nearby enemies. Deals double damage against Heroes.
fullText.AnubarakNerubianArmor|AnubarakNerubianAr: Increase Harden Carapace's Spell Armor by 25.
fullText.AnubarakScarabHostBeetleJuiced|AnubarakB: Passive: Beetles gain 30% increased health.  Every 4th Basic Attack spawns a Beetle.
fullText.AnubarakSubterraneanShield|AnubarakSubte: Burrow Charge also grants a 400 point Shield for 5 seconds.
fullText.AnubarakTheTraitorKing|AnubarakTheTraito: Gain 10% bonus maximum Health and 20 Spell Armor.  Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisBladeDashSolariteReaper|ArtanisBl: Increases the damage of the first dash of Blade Dash by 175%.
fullText.ArtanisBladeDashTemplarsZeal|ArtanisBlad: Reduce the Mana cost of Blade Dash from 50 to 25. Each time that Shield Overload activates, reduce the cooldown of Blade Dash by 6 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisFinalCut|ArtanisFinalCut|Passive|: After using an Ability, your next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 40% additional damage. While under 25% Health, this damage bonus is increased to 60%.
fullText.ArtanisHeroicAbilitySpearofAdunPurifierB: Target an enemy Hero with an orbital beam from the Spear of Adun, dealing 184 damage per second for 8 seconds. The beam will chase the target as they move. Unlimited range.
fullText.ArtanisHeroicAbilitySpearofAdunSuppressi: Fire a large area pulse from the Spear of Adun, dealing 114 damage and Blinding enemies for 4 seconds. Unlimited range.
fullText.ArtanisPhasePrismChronoSurge|ArtanisPhas: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 40% bonus Attack Speed for 5 seconds and Slows the enemy's Movement Speed by 30% for 4 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisPhasePrismGravitonVortex|ArtanisP: Reduce the Mana cost of Phase Prism from 50 to 25. Hitting an enemy Hero with Basic Attacks or Blade Dash reduces the cooldown of Phase Prism by 2 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisPhasePrismPsionicSynergy|ArtanisP: Hitting an enemy Hero with Phase Prism grants 30 Armor for 5 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisPlasmaBurn|ArtanisPlasmaBurn|Trai: While Shield Overload is active, deal 70 damage per second to nearby enemies.
fullText.ArtanisProtectorOfAiur|ArtanisProtectorO: Quest: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase Artanis's Attack damage by 0.1%. Takedowns grant 1% bonus damage.
fullText.ArtanisShieldOverloadForceofWill|Artanis: Casting Basic Abilities reduces the cooldown of Shield Overload by 5 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisShieldOverloadPhaseBulwark|Artani: Shield Overload grants 50 Spell Armor while active and for 2 seconds after it expires.
fullText.ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldBattery|Artan: Shield Overload's cooldown recharges 125% faster while its Shield is active.   Passive: Reduce Shield Overload's cooldown by 4 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisShieldOverloadShieldSurge|Artanis: Increases Shield Overload's Shields by 80% while below 25% Health.
fullText.ArtanisSpearofAdunPurifierBeamTargetPuri: Increase the speed of Purifier Beam by 15%. If the target of Purifier Beam dies, it automatically recasts on the nearest visible enemy Hero.
fullText.ArtanisSpearofAdunSuppressionPulseOrbita: Suppression Pulse gains an additional charge.  There is a 10 second cooldown between uses.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBladesAmateurOpponent|Artanis: Twin Blades attacks deal 150% bonus damage to non-Heroes.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBladesBladesofaTemplar|Artani: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBladesReactiveParry|ArtanisTw: Damaging enemy Heroes with Twin Blades or Blade Dash grants Artanis 50 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 50%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBladesTitanKiller|ArtanisTwin: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 0.5% of the target's maximum Health in damage, increased to 1.5% when empowered by Twin Blades.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBladesTripleStrike|ArtanisTwi: Increases Twin Blades's number of Basic Attacks to 3, but increase its cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.ArtanisTwinBladesZealotCharge|ArtanisTwi: Increase Twin Blades' charge distance by 75%.
fullText.ArthasAntiMagicShell|ArthasAntiMagicShel: Activate to make Arthas immune to Spell Damage for 4 seconds and heal Arthas for 25% of the damage prevented.
fullText.ArthasBoreanWinds|ArthasBoreanWinds|E|Le: After Frozen Tempest has been active for 2 seconds, Arthas gains 10% Movement Speed.  Passive: Frozen Tempest's Slowing effects last an additional 0.5 seconds and its Mana cost is reduced by 4 per second.
fullText.ArthasDeathchill|ArthasDeathchill|W|Leve: Howling Blast's damage is increased by 2 for each stack of Frostmourne Hungers.   Howling Blast deals 100% additional damage and Roots for an additional 0.25 seconds against Heroes under 50% Health.
fullText.ArthasDeathlord|ArthasDeathlord|Q|Level1: If Death Coil is used on an enemy Hero, launch an additional Death Coil at a nearby enemy Hero.  Passive: Death Coil deals more damage the lower Arthas's current Health is, up to a maximum of 50% bonus damage.
fullText.ArthasDeathPact|ArthasDeathPact|Trait|Le: Instantly double your stacks of Frostmourne Hungers, but it no longer gains stacks from hitting Heroes or killing Minions.  Passive: Takedowns grant 2 stacks of Frostmourne Hungers.
fullText.ArthasHeroicAbilityArmyoftheDead|ArthasA: Consume all charges to summon an equal number of Ghouls that lose Health over 20 seconds and attack for 20 damage. Reactivate to sacrifice a ghoul, healing Arthas for 240 Health. Stores up to 6 charges.  Whenever a nearby enemy Minion dies, reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 1 second. Takedowns reduce the charge cooldown of this Ability by 6 seconds.
fullText.ArthasHeroicAbilitySummonSindragosa|Arth: Deals 230 damage and Slows enemies by 60% for 4 seconds. Also disables Minions, Mercenaries, Monsters and Structures for 20 seconds.
fullText.ArthasIceboundFortitude|ArthasIceboundFo: Activate to gain 25 Armor and reduce the duration of Stuns, Slows, and Roots against Arthas by 75% for 3 seconds.  Each Hero Rooted by Howling Blast reduces the cooldown of this ability by 2 seconds.
fullText.ArthasIcyTalons|ArthasIcyTalons|E|Level4: Gain 3% Attack Speed for 2 seconds every time a Hero is damaged by Frozen Tempest, up to a maximum of 60%.
fullText.ArthasMasteryAbsoluteZeroSummonSindragos: Sindragosa flies twice as far. Enemy Heroes are Rooted for 2.5 seconds, and then Slowed by 60% for 4 seconds.
fullText.ArthasMasteryBitingColdFrozenTempest|Art: Each second an enemy is damaged by Frozen Tempest, it deals 15% bonus damage, up to a 75% bonus.
fullText.ArthasMasteryFrostmourneFeedsFrostmourne: Reduce the cooldown of Frostmourne Hungers by 6 seconds. Arthas heals for 75% of the Basic Attack damage dealt by Frostmourne Hungers.
fullText.ArthasMasteryFrostPresenceHowlingBlast|A: Increase the area of Howling Blast by 20%.  Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Howling Blast.  Reward: After Hitting 15 Heroes, Howling Blast's range is increased by 20% and it hits enemies in its path.  Reward: After Hitting 30 Heroes, Death Coil Slows Heroes hit by 50% for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.ArthasMasteryFrostStrikeFrostmourneHunge: Frostmourne Hungers deals an additional 115 Spell Damage in an area and Slows enemy Heroes hit by 20% for 2 seconds.
fullText.ArthasMasteryImmortalCoilDeathCoil|Artha: Gain the healing effect of Death Coil even when used on enemies. If Death Coil is used on Arthas, it heals for an additional 75% bonus healing and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
fullText.ArthasMasteryLegionOfNorthrendArmyoftheD: Reduce Army of the Dead's charge cooldown by 5 seconds.  Each charge consumed spawns an additional Ghoul to attack nearby enemies. These Ghouls cannot be sacrificed.
fullText.ArthasMasteryRemorselessWinterFrozenTemp: Enemy Heroes that remain within Frozen Tempest for 2.5 seconds are Rooted for 1.25 seconds and heal Arthas for 3% of his maximum Health. This effect has an 8 second cooldown per target.
fullText.ArthasPathofFrost|ArthasPathofFrost|Acti: Activate to instantly mount with 10% additional Movement Speed. Taking damage does not dismount Arthas from this Mount. Lasts up to 5 seconds.  When Arthas dismounts, Slow all nearby enemies by 30% for 2 seconds and deal 66 damage.
fullText.ArthasRime|ArthasRime|Passive|Level1: Every 5 seconds, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges.  Passive: Arthas heals for 24 Health per second while Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.
fullText.ArthasRuneTap|ArthasRuneTapTalent|Passiv: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals Arthas for 5% of his max Health.  Passive: Each stack of Frostmourne Hungers increases Arthas's maximum Health by 10.
fullText.ArthasShatteredArmor|ArthasShatteredArmo: Enemy Heroes hit by Howling Blast have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
fullText.AurielAngelicFlightTalent|AurielAngelicF: After 2 seconds, fly to a target location.
fullText.AurielBlindingFlashSacredSweepTalent|Aur: Enemies hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep are blinded for 2 seconds.
fullText.AurielConvergingForceSacredSweepTalent|A: Enemies hit by the outer area are pushed slightly toward the center.
fullText.AurielDiamondResolveCrystalAegisTalent|A: When Crystal Aegis expires, it grants the target 75 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.
fullText.AurielEmpathicLinkBestowHopeTalent|Aurie: Auriel stores 25% of damage taken by allies with Bestow Hope.
fullText.AurielEnergizedCordRayOfHeavenTalent|Aur: Increases the energy stored from Auriel's Basic Attacks to 130% of the damage against Heroes and 70% of the damage against non-Heroes.  Does not affect Auriel's Bestow Hope ally.  Passive: Increase Basic Attack Range by 1.1.
fullText.AurielGlimmerofHopeRayOfHeavenTalent|Aur: Collecting a Regeneration Globe reduces the cost of Auriel's next Ray of Heaven by 75%.
fullText.AurielHeavyBurdenDetainmentStrikeTalent|: Detainment Strike Slows enemy Heroes by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Slow amount and duration doubled on enemies it Stuns.  Passive: Increase Detainment Strikes' Stun duration by 0.25 seconds.
fullText.AurielHeroicCrystalAegis|AurielCrystalAe: Place an allied Hero into Stasis for 2 seconds. Upon expiration, Crystal Aegis deals 255 damage to all nearby enemies.
fullText.AurielHeroicResurrect|AurielResurrect|He: Channel on the spirit of a dead ally for 1 second. After a 3 second delay, they are brought back to life with 100% of their maximum Health at the location where they died.  Auriel can use this ability while dead to resurrect herself.
fullText.AurielIncreasingClaritySacredSweepTalent: Quest: Every time Sacred Sweep hits a Hero in the center, increase the center damage by 2, up to 50.   Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, this center damage bonus is increased to 180.
fullText.AurielLightSpeedResurrectTalent|AurielLi: Resurrected allies gain 200% increased Movement Speed, decaying over 4 seconds. While a resurrected ally remains alive, Resurrect's next cooldown recharges 100% faster.
fullText.AurielMajesticSpanSacredSweepTalent|Auri: Increases the radius of Sacred Sweep by 15%.
fullText.AurielPiercingLashDetainmentStrikeTalent: Detainment Strike now pierces and hits all enemy Heroes in a line, reducing the cooldown by 2 seconds for each Hero hit.
fullText.AurielRepeatedOffenseDetainmentStrikeTal: Enemies hit by Detainment Strike are knocked back 30% farther.  Quest: Every time Detainment Strike stuns a Hero, increase the stun damage by 10, up to 60.  Reward: After stunning 6 Heroes, increase this damage bonus to 250.
fullText.AurielReservoirofHopeRayOfHeavenTalent|A: Quest: Each maximum energy Ray of Heaven Auriel casts increases the maximum amount of energy that can be stored by 55.
fullText.AurielRighteousAssaultSacredSweepTalent|: Reduces the cooldown of Sacred Sweep by 3 seconds for each enemy Hero hit by its center.
fullText.AurielSearingLightRayOfHeavenTalent|Auri: Ray of Heaven also deals damage to enemy Heroes in the area equal to 30% of the energy consumed.
fullText.AurielShieldOfHopeTalent|AurielShieldOfH: Activate to grant all nearby allied Heroes a shield for 3 seconds equal to 50% of the amount of Health they are missing.
fullText.AurielWillofHeavenBestowHopeTalent|Aurie: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 20% Attack Speed.  Passive: Auriel gains 10% increased Basic Attack Damage.
fullText.AurielWrathofHeavenBestowHopeTalent|Auri: Allies with Bestow Hope gain 15% Spell Power.  Enemy Heroes hit by the center area of Sacred Sweep or the terrain collision of Detainment Strike have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds.
fullText.AzmodanArmyOfHell|AzmodanArmyOfHell|W|Le: Summon Demon Warrior spawns an additional Demon, but its cooldown is increased by 10 seconds.
fullText.AzmodanArtOfChaos|AzmodanArtOfChaos|Q|Le: If Globe of Annihilation hits 2 or more Heroes, restore 40 Mana and gain an extra 2 Annihilation.
fullText.AzmodanBattleborn|AzmodanGlobOfAnnihilat: Reduce the Mana cost of Summon Demon Warrior from 25 to 20. Azmodan's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Summon Demon Warrior by 0.75 seconds and Demon Lieutenant by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.AzmodanBlackPool|AzmodanTideOfSinBlackPo: Globes of Annihilation empowered by Tide of Sin also leave a Black Pool at their impact location for 5 seconds. Enemies within the pool lose 8 Armor per second, up to 15, and take 56 damage per second.
fullText.AzmodanBombardment|AzmodanBombardment|Q|: After casting Globe of Annihilation, Azmodan's Basic Attacks within the next 3 seconds have an additional 1.5 range and can hit 3 additional targets. Hitting Heroes with Basic Attacks empowered by Bombardment grant 1 Annihilation.
fullText.AzmodanBrutishVanguard|AzmodanBrutishVan: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain 25% increased Health. Demon Warriors Slow attacked targets by 30%.
fullText.AzmodanChainOfCommand|AzmodanChainOfComm: The cooldown of Demon Lieutenants' Demonic Smite is reduced by 2 seconds and they grant 25% increased damage to nearby friendly Minions, Mercenaries, and Azmodan's summoned Demons.
fullText.AzmodanCydaeasKiss|AzmodanCydaeasKiss|E|: Reduces the Channel time of All Shall Burn by 0.5 seconds. If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration against a Hero, Azmodan is healed for 8% of his maximum Health.
fullText.AzmodanGluttony|AzmodanGluttony|Q|Level1: Increase the number of stacks of Annihilation gained by hitting Heroes with Globe of Annihilation from 2 to 4.  Quest: After gaining 225 Annihilation, each enemy hit by Globe of Annihilation reduces its cooldown by 0.25 seconds, doubled against Heroes. Globe of Annihilation's damage penalty against Minions and Mercenaries is removed.
fullText.AzmodanGreed|AzmodanGreed|Q|Level1: Globe of Annihilation deals 15% more damage to non-Heroic targets.  Quest: After gaining 225 Annihilation, increase the range of All Shall Burn by 25% and Demon Warriors gain 20% Attack Speed and Movement Speed. Globe of Annihilation's damage penalty against Minions and Mercenaries is removed.
fullText.AzmodanHellforgedArmor|AzmodanSummonDemo: Demon Warriors and Lieutenants gain 20 Armor and lose 25% less health per second.
fullText.AzmodanHellRift|AzmodanHellRift|E|Level1: If All Shall Burn Channels for its full duration or kills the target, a Demon Warrior is summoned at the target's location and all Demon Warriors deal 35% increased damage for 5 seconds.
fullText.AzmodanHeroicAbilityDemonicInvasion|Azmo: Rain a small army of Demonic Grunts down on enemies, dealing 85 damage per impact. Grunts deal 39 damage, have 750 Health and last up to 10 seconds. When Grunts die they explode, dealing 40 damage to nearby enemies, doubled against enemy Heroes.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
fullText.AzmodanMasterofDestruction|AzmodanAllSha: If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration, All Shall Burn's final damage applies to all enemies in an area around the target and grants 1 Annihilation per Hero hit.
fullText.AzmodanSiegebreaker|AzmodanSiegebreaker|: Azmodan's Demons deal 40% increased damage to Structures.
fullText.AzmodanSinsGrasp|AzmodanSinsGraspHotbar|: All Shall Burn Slows enemy Heroes. While active, the target is Slowed by 15%, and if it lasts its full duration, they are Slowed by 50% for 2.5 seconds.  If All Shall Burn's Channel kills or lasts its full duration against a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 50%.
fullText.AzmodanTideOfSin|AzmodanTideOfSin|Heroic: Activate to make the next Globe of Annihilation cost no Mana and deal 50% more damage.  Usable while Channeling All Shall Burn.
fullText.AzmodanTotalAnnihilation|AzmodanTotalAnn: Globe of Annihilation damages Heroes for an additional 4% of their maximum Health.
fullText.AzmodanTrample|AzmodanTrample|Active|Lev: Activate to charge a short distance, dealing 275 damage and Slowing enemies caught in the path by 60% for 1.25 second.  After hitting an enemy Hero with Trample, reduce the cooldown of Azmodan's Heroic Ability by 25%.
fullText.AzmodanWrath|AzmodanWrath|Q|Level1: Every other Basic Attack against Heroes or Structures grant Annihilation.   Quest: After gaining 225 Annihilation, hitting a Hero with Globe of Annihilation increases the damage of Azmodan's next Basic Attack against them within 3 seconds by 85% the amount of Annihilation he has. Globe of Annihilation's damage penalty against Minions and Mercenaries is removed.
fullText.BarbarianArreatCrater|BarbarianLeapArrea: Leap leaves behind an impassable crater for 5 seconds.  Reduces Leap's cooldown by 20 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianBattleRage|BarbarianBattleRage|: Activate to instantly restore 10% of Sonya's maximum Health. Stores up to 2 charges. Usable while Whirlwinding.  Passive: Sonya deals 25% more damage to Mercenaries.
fullText.BarbarianCompositeSpear|BarbarianAncient: Increases Ancient Spear's range by 50%. Hitting an enemy Hero with Ancient Spear grants 25 Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianFuriousBlow|BarbarianSeismicSla: Every 4th cast of Seismic Slam deals 40% more damage to the primary target and costs no Fury.
fullText.BarbarianGiantSlammer|BarbarianGiantSlam: Basic Attacks and Seismic Slam deal an additional 1.5% of Heroes' maximum Health as damage and heal Sonya for 60% of the damage dealt.
fullText.BarbarianHeroicAbilityLeap|BarbarianLeap: Leap into the air, dealing 135 damage to nearby enemies, and stunning them for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianHeroicAbilityWrathoftheBerserke: Increase damage dealt by 40%. Reduce the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows against Sonya by 50%. Lasts 15 seconds, and extends by 1 second for every 10 Fury gained.
fullText.BarbarianHurricane|BarbarianHurricaneWhi: Reduce the cooldown of Whirlwind by 2 seconds. Casting Whirlwind removes all Slows and Roots from Sonya.
fullText.BarbarianIgnorePain|BarbarianIgnorePain|: Activate to gain 60 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 60% less damage. Usable while Whirlwinding.
fullText.BarbarianLifeFunnel|BarbarianWhirlwindLi: Increases the healing of Whirlwind to 35% of damage dealt.
fullText.BarbarianMysticalSpear|BarbarianAncientS: Ancient Spear always pulls Sonya to the target location even if it doesn't hit an enemy. When used this way, Ancient Spear's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianNervesOfSteel|BarbarianNervesOf: Activate to gain 25% of your maximum Health as a Shield for 3 seconds. Usable while Whirlwinding.
fullText.BarbarianNoEscape|BarbarianFuryNoEscapeT: Increases the Movement Speed bonus from using Basic and Heroic Abilities to 20%.
fullText.BarbarianPoisonedSpear|BarbarianAncientS: Ancient Spear deals an additional 100% damage over 6 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianRampage|BarbarianRampage|Passiv: Increase Basic Attack damage by 25%. Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Ancient Spear by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.BarbarianRuthless|BarbarianRuthless|E|Le: Whirlwind deals an additional 50 damage per second to Heroes below 50% Health. Does not generate additional healing.
fullText.BarbarianShatteredGround|BarbarianSeismi: Increase Seismic Slam's splash damage by 250%. Targeting a Hero with Seismic Slam further increases its splash damage by 250%, while targeting other enemies increases the length of its splash by 66%.
fullText.BarbarianShotOfFury|BarbarianFuryShotOfF: Activate to gain 50 Fury. Usable while Whirlwinding.  Passive: After casting Seismic Slam, your next Basic Attack deals 40% more damage.
fullText.BarbarianStridingGiant|BarbarianStriding: Wrath of the Berserker increases maximum Health by 10% and grants Striding Giant, which can be activated to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds. 30 second cooldown.
fullText.BarbarianToughAsNails|BarbarianToughAsNa: Every 16 seconds, gain 60 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 60%.  Stores up to 3 charges. Charges refresh 200% faster while Fury's Movement Speed bonus is active.
fullText.BarbarianWarPaint|BarbarianFuryWarPaintT: Sonya's Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt.
fullText.BrightwingArcaneFlareHush!|BrightwingArc: Enemy Heroes hit by the center of Arcane Flare are Silenced for 1 second and deal 25% less damage for 3 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingArcaneFlareStickyFlare|Brightw: Enemy Heroes hit by Arcane Flare have their Movement Speed Slowed by 20% for 3 seconds. Increase the Slow to 40% if they are hit by the center portion.
fullText.BrightwingCriticalMistCalmingMist|Bright: Soothing Mist heals allied Heroes for 165. Increase this healing by 140% if Soothing Mist removed a disabling effect from that ally.
fullText.BrightwingDreamShotArcaneFlare|Brightwin: Increase Arcane Flare's range by 60%. Hitting a Hero with Arcane Flare's center reduces its cooldown to 2 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingFaerieProtector|BrightwingFaer: Activate to apply Pixie Dust to all nearby Heroes.  Passive: Pixie Dust always bounces back and applies to Brightwing.
fullText.BrightwingGreaterPolymorphPolymorph|Brig: Passive: Increase Polymorph's range by 30%.   If Brightwing hits an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center within 2 seconds of being Polymorphed, then reduce Polymorph's cooldown by 7 seconds and gain 50 Mana.
fullText.BrightwingIntensiveWinds|BrightwingEmera: Permanently reduce Emerald Wind's cooldown to 5 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingInvisibleFriends|BrightwingInv: Blink Heal grants Stealth to Brightwing and her Heroic targets for 9 seconds, and they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. While Stealthed by Invisible Friends, Heroes heal for 25 health per second.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
fullText.BrightwingMagicSpit|BrightwingMagicSpit|: Increase Basic Attack range by 1.1. Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Soothing Mist by 4 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingPhaseOut|BrightwingPhaseOut|Ac: Activate to place Brightwing in Stasis for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingPhaseShiftHyperShift|Brightwin: Increase Phase Shift's healing by an additional 4% of the target's maximum Health. Nearby enemy Minion deaths reduce Phase Shift's cooldown by 0.5 second.
fullText.BrightwingPhaseShiftPeekaboo|BrightwingP: Phase Shifting to an ally grants both Brightwing and her target a 335 Shield for 4 seconds and reveals a large area around them for 5 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingPixieBoostPixieDust|Brightwing: Increase Pixie Dust's Movement Speed bonus to 50%, decaying to 20% over 3 seconds.
fullText.BrightwingPixieCharm|FaerieDragonPixieCh: Activate to consume 20 stacks of Bribe to instantly defeat an uncaptured non-Elite Mercenary.  Passive: Gain 1 stack of Bribe when a nearby enemy Minion dies, and 5 stacks when hitting an enemy Hero with Arcane Flare's center. Maximum 80 stacks.
fullText.BrightwingPixieDustPixiePower|Brightwing: Reduce the cooldown of Pixie Dust by 3 seconds and increase the Spell Armor granted by 25.
fullText.BrightwingPixieDustSafetyDust|Brightwing: Increase Pixie Dust's duration by 1 second. Soothing Mist and Blink Heal heal allies with an active Pixie Dust for 75% more.
fullText.BrightwingSpeedyDragon|BrightwingSpeedyD: Permanently gain 20% Movement Speed. Reduce Phase Shift's cast time by 1 second.
fullText.BrightwingUnstableAnomalyPolymorph|Brigh: Increase Polymorph's Slow by 15%. Upon expiration, Polymorph deals damage to nearby enemy Heroes equal to 2% of their maximum Health.
fullText.ButcherCleaver|ButcherCleaver|Passive|Le: Basic Attacks deal 35% of The Butcher's Basic Attack Damage in an area around the target.
fullText.ButcherHeroicAbilityButcherFurnaceBlast|: After a 3 second delay, fire explodes around The Butcher dealing 500 damage to enemies.  Can be cast while using Ruthless Onslaught.
fullText.ButcherHeroicAbilityLambToTheSlaughter|B: Throw a hitching post that attaches to the nearest enemy Hero after a 1 second delay. This deals 171 damage and causes the enemy to be chained to the post and Silenced for 3 seconds.
fullText.ButcherMasteryButchersBrandInsatiableBla: While facing a branded enemy, The Butcher's Movement Speed is increased by 25%.
fullText.ButcherMasteryFiresofHell|ButcherFurnace: Furnace Blast explodes a second time 3 seconds after the initial explosion.

fullText.ButcherMasteryFreshMeatVictuals|ButcherF: Every time a nearby enemy minion dies, The Butcher heals 5% of his maximum health.
fullText.ButcherMasteryHamstringBrutalStrike|Butc: After using Hamstring, The Butcher's next 3 Basic Attacks within 5 seconds deal an additional 15% damage.
fullText.ButcherMasteryHamstringCheapShot|Butcher: Hamstring does 100% more damage to targets affected by a Slow, Root, or Stun.
fullText.ButcherMasteryHamstringChopMeat|ButcherH: Increases Hamstring damage by 100% to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.ButcherMasteryHamstringCripplingSlam|But: Hamstring's Slow no longer decays, and its duration is increased by 30%.
fullText.ButcherMasteryHamstringFlailAxe|ButcherH: Increases the length of Hamstring by 40%.

fullText.ButcherMasteryRuthlessOnslaughtUnrelenti: Reduces the cooldown of Ruthless Onslaught by 33% upon impact.

fullText.ButcherMeatShield|ButcherMeatShield|E|Le: When Ruthless Onslaught impacts an enemy Hero, The Butcher gains 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
fullText.ButcherTalentEnraged|ButcherEnragedTalen: While below 50% of his maximum Health, taking damage causes The Butcher to become Enraged for 10 seconds, gaining 40% Attack Speed and 25 Armor, reducing damage taken by 25%.  This effect has a 25 second cooldown.
fullText.ChenAccumulatingFlame|ChenAccumulatingFl: Reward: Damage enemy Heroes with Breath of Fire to permanently increase periodic damage by 0.25. Kills grant 2.  Reward: After gaining 20 damage, increase the range of Keg Smash.  Mythic Reward: Upon gaining 75 damage, Breath of Fire reduces enemy Armor by 20 and its duration is increased by 0.75 seconds each time Chen attacks the Hero.
fullText.ChenBrewmastersBalance|ChenFortifyingBre: While at or below 50 Brew, gain 20% Movement Speed. While at or above 50 Brew, regenerate an additional 18 Health per second.
fullText.ChenCelerity|ChenCelerityStagger|E|Level: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Stagger by 2 seconds and grant Chen 30 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.ChenComboStrikes|ChenFortifyingBrewCombo: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same target deals 75% bonus damage. While Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew and for 2 seconds after, he gains 35% Attack Speed.
fullText.ChenDeadlyStrike|ChenFlyingKickDeadlyStr: Flying Kick no longer costs Brew. Additionally, its damage is increased by 125% while Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
fullText.ChenElementalConduit|ChenStormEarthFireE: Increase the spirits' Health to 100% of Chen's maximum Health and all of their Abilities are empowered.
fullText.ChenElusiveBrawler|ChenElusiveBrawler|Ac: Activate to gain 20% Movement Speed and Evade enemy Basic Attacks for 2 seconds. Chen's Basic Attacks reduce this cooldown by 2 seconds.
fullText.ChenEnergizingBrew|ChenFortifyingBrewEne: If Chen Channels Fortifying Brew for its full duration, then he gains 20% bonus Health and 20% bonus damage for 25 seconds.
fullText.ChenEyeOfTheTiger|ChenEyeOfTheTiger|W|Le: Basic Attacks against Brew-soaked enemy Heroes deal 50% more damage and heal Chen for 60% of the damage done.
fullText.ChenFlyingLeap|ChenFlyingLeap|Q|Level16: Increase Flying Kick's range by 15% and reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds each time an enemy Hero takes damage from being Ignited.
fullText.ChenFreshestIngredients|ChenFreshestIngr: Increase the healing duration of Regeneration Globes by 150%.  Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Reduce Fortifying Brew's cooldown by 2 seconds, and 50% of its Shield persists indefinitely after drinking.
fullText.ChenGiftOfTheOxStagger|ChenGiftOfTheOxSt: Increase the duration of Stagger's damage prevention by 2 seconds, and reduce the amount of damage taken over time to 50% of damage taken.
fullText.ChenHeroicAbilityStormEarthFire|ChenStor: After 1 second, Chen splits into three elemental spirits for 12 seconds, each with 70% of Chen's maximum Health and a unique Ability.  The last spirit Ability that is cast is empowered. If all three spirits are killed, Chen will die as well.  Storm can grant the spirits a Shield.  Earth can leap to an area and Slow enemies.  Fire can grant the spirits Attack Speed, damage.
fullText.ChenHeroicAbilityWanderingKeg|ChenWander: Roll around inside an Unstoppable barrel with 70% increased Movement Speed and 25 Armor, dealing 59 damage to enemies in the way and knocking them back. Lasts for 5 seconds.
fullText.ChenMasteryFortifyingBrewEnoughToShare|C: Fortifying Brew instantly grants Chen a Shield that absorbs 180 damage, and each second grants nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs 140 damage, up to 420.
fullText.ChenMasteryKegSmashATouchOfHoney|ChenKeg: Increase the Slows from Keg Smash by 30% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ChenMasteryWanderingKegUntappedPotential: Increase Wandering Keg's Movement Speed bonus from 70% to 125%, and its Armor bonus to 75 for its duration and 5 seconds afterwards.
fullText.ChenPressurePoint|ChenFlyingKickPressure: Flying Kick Slows the target enemy by 40% for 1.5 seconds, or by 80% if Chen has Shields from Fortifying Brew.
fullText.ChenPurifyingBrew|ChenPurifyingBrew|Trai: Casting Fortifying Brew grants Chen Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.ChenRingofFire|ChenBreathOfFireRingOfFir: After Igniting an enemy, become bathed in a fiery aura, dealing 60 damage every second to nearby enemies for 6 seconds.
fullText.ChenStormstoutSecretRecipe|ChenStormstou: Chen heals for 3.5% of his maximum Health when his Basic Abilities hit an enemy Hero.
fullText.ChenWitheringFlames|ChenWitheringFlames|: Igniting an enemy Hero reduces their Spell Power by 60% for 4 seconds.
fullText.ChoCallousedHide|ChoCallousedHide|Trait|: While under 60% maximum Health, Cho gains 15% increased Movement Speed and healing received.
fullText.ChoConsumingFire|ChoConsumingFire|W|Leve: Consuming Blaze heals for 150% more when a Hero is Ignited.
fullText.ChoCthunsGift|ChoCthunsGiftTalent|Heroic: Cho's Basic Attack becomes ranged and Slows targets by 20% for 2 seconds.
fullText.ChoEnragedRegeneration|ChoEnragedRegener: Each time Cho hits an enemy Hero with an Ability or Basic Attack, he heals for 60 over 3 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Gall's Dread Orb receive 35% less healing for 2 seconds.
fullText.ChoFavorOfTheOldGods|ChoFavorOfTheOldGod: Upheaval Roots enemy Heroes for 2 seconds.
fullText.ChoFirestarter|ChoFirestarter|W|Level7: Basic Attacks against ignited Heroes decreases the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Consuming Blaze by 3 seconds.
fullText.ChoFrenziedFists|ChoFrenziedFistsTalent|: Gain 75% Attack Speed for 5 seconds after using Surging Fist.

fullText.ChoPowerSurge|ChoPowerSurgeTalent|Q|Leve: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Surging Fist are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds. Gain 15% Movement Speed while charging Surging Fist and for 2.5 seconds after casting the Ability.
fullText.ChoRollback|ChoRollbackTalent|E|Level4: Rune Bomb rolls back to Cho, damaging enemies in its path.

fullText.ChoSearedFlesh|ChoSearedFleshTalent|Pass: Each consecutive Basic Attack to enemy Heroes deals 20% more damage, to a maximum of 60% damage. This bonus lasts 5 seconds or until a non-Heroic enemy is attacked.
fullText.ChoSurgingDash|ChoSurgingDashTalent|Q|Le: While Channeling Surging Fist, Cho heals for 150 Health per second.
fullText.ChoTalentMoltenBlock|ChoTalentMoltenBloc: Activate to enter Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds, damaging nearby enemies for 92 damage per second.
fullText.ChoTheWillofCho|ChoTheWillofCho|Trait|Le: Quest: Killing enemy Minions grants 1 stack of The Will of Cho, and Hero takedowns grant 10 stacks. Gain 1 Armor for every 30 stacks of The Will of Cho, up to a maximum of 10 Armor.  This Armor bonus stacks with Ogre Hide.
fullText.ChoTwilightVeil|ChoTwilightVeilTalent|Ac: Activate to increase the Armor bonus of Ogre Hide to 75 for 4 seconds. If cast while Ogre Rage is active, it instantly swaps to Ogre Hide.
fullText.ChoUppercut|ChoUppercut|Q|Level4: Hitting an enemy Hero with Surging Fist deals additional damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their max Health and reduces the cooldown of Surging Fist by 5 seconds.
fullText.ChromieAProperGreeting|ChromieAProperGre: Damaging a Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemy Hero grants 20% additional damage for 3 seconds.
fullText.ChromieBlessingOfTheBronze|ChromieBlessi: Activate to cause Chromie and all allied Heroes to gain 20% Movement Speed and their Basic Abilities recharge 35% faster for 8 seconds.  Hitting an enemy Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes reduces the cooldown of Blessing of the Bronze by 1 second.
fullText.ChromieDragonsBreathDeepBreathing|Chromi: Quest: Every time Dragon's Breath hits a Hero increase its damage by 1%, up to 20%.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Dragon's Breath by 4 seconds and its Mana cost from 65 to 40.
fullText.ChromieDragonsBreathMobiusLoop|ChromieDr: Dragon's Breath deals 30% bonus damage to enemies hit by its center. Enemy Heroes hit by its center are Slowed by 40% for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.ChromieHereAndThere|ChromieHereAndThere|: Activate to teleport to an area near an Echo, swapping it with Chromie's previous location.
fullText.ChromieHeroicAbilitySlowingSands|Chromie: Summon a sand vortex that Slows enemies by 10% every 0.25 seconds, up to 70%.
fullText.ChromieHeroicAbilityTemporalLoop|Chromie: Choose an enemy Hero. After 3 seconds, they are teleported back to the location where Temporal Loop was cast on them.  Basic Abilities recharge 500% faster for 3 seconds after casting Temporal Loop.

fullText.ChromieSandBlastBronzeTalons|ChromieSand: Hitting a Hero with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes grants 50% additional Basic Attack damage for 5 seconds.
fullText.ChromieSandBlastFastForward|ChromieSandB: If Chromie's primary Sand Blast travels at least 50% of its base distance and hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced to 0.5 seconds and it refunds 10 Mana.
fullText.ChromieSandBlastGnomeSpeedAhead|ChromieS: After casting Sand Blast, Chromie gains 20% Movement Speed and 200% increased Health Regeneration for 3 seconds.
fullText.ChromieSandBlastOnceAgainTheFirstTime|Ch: Quest: Hit 40 Heroes with Sand Blast from Chromie or her Echoes.  Reward: Increase the maximum number of active Echoes to 2, and increase Echo damage to 45%.
fullText.ChromieSandBlastPiercingSands|ChromieSan: Sand Blasts cast from Chromie and her Echoes now pierce all enemies hit.
fullText.ChromieSandBlastShiftingSands|ChromieSan: Hitting an enemy Hero with Chromie's primary Sand Blast grants 5% Spell Power for 8 seconds, up to a maximum of 50%. The duration is refreshed whenever an enemy is damaged by the primary Sand Blast.
fullText.ChromieSlowingSandsUnravelling|ChromieSl: Every 0.25 seconds, enemy Heroes Slowed by Slowing Sands have their Spell Armor reduced by 10 up to 50.  Passive: Increase Slowing Sands cast range by 50%, and Slowing Sands persists for 5 seconds after it is cancelled.
fullText.ChromieTemporalLoopStuckInALoop|ChromieT: Temporal Loop teleports the target a second time after the first, and Basic Abilities continue recharging for an additional 3 seconds. Increase the cooldown recharge rate from 500% to 700%.
fullText.ChromieTimeOut|ChromieTimeOutHotbar|Acti: Activate to place Chromie in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for up to 5 seconds. Can be reactivated to end the effect early.
fullText.ChromieTimeTrapAndorhalAnomaly|ChromieTi: Increase the charges and maximum active Time Traps to 3, and reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
fullText.ChromieTimeTrapChronicConditions|Chromie: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds and allies gain 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.ChromieTimeTrapTimeTroubles|ChromieTimeT: After its Time Stop ends, enemies affected by Time Trap lose 15 Armor for 3 seconds and allies gain 30 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.ChromieTimewalkersPursuit|ChromieTimewal: Gain 15% Spell Power and reduce the arming time of Time Traps by 0.75 seconds. Activate to reveal the targeted area for 4 seconds. Enemies seen are revealed for 4 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderBlessedHammer|CrusaderCondemnBle: Activate to create 2 hammers that spiral outward from Johanna, dealing 65 damage to enemies hit. Damaging enemies with Basic Abilities reduce the cooldown of this Ability by 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Every 3rd Basic Attack against enemy Heroes releases a hammer.

fullText.CrusaderBlindedByTheLight|CrusaderBlinde: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 25% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.  Hitting Heroes with Shield Glare reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 8 seconds.

fullText.CrusaderHeroicAbilityBlessedShield|Crusa: Deal 114 damage and Stun the first enemy hit for 1.5 seconds. Blessed Shield then bounces to 2 nearby enemies, dealing 57 damage and Stunning them for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderHeroicAbilityFallingSword|Crusad: Johanna leaps into the air for 2 seconds and she can steer the landing location by moving. While in the air, allies below Johanna are Unstoppable. Upon landing enemies hit take 225 damage and are Stunned for 0.25 seconds.

fullText.CrusaderIronSkinSteedCharge|CrusaderIron: Activate to instantly Mount for 4 seconds, unhindered by damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Iron Skin by 2 second.
