fullText.CrusaderMasteryCondemnConviction|Crusade: Gain 10% Movement Speed, increased to 20% while Condemn is charging up.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryCondemnEternalRetaliation: Mark enemies hit by Condemn for 10 seconds. Johanna's next Basic Attack against them removes the mark, lowering the cooldown of Condemn by 1 second, refunding 10 Mana, and killing Minions.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryFallingSwordHeavensFury|C: Falling Sword rains down holy bolts, dealing 50 damage to enemies, healing allied Heroes for 68, and reducing its cooldown by 1 second for each Hero hit.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryIronSkinHoldYourGround|Cr: Increases Iron Skin's Shield by 40% and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryLawsOfHope|CrusaderLawsOf: Activate to heal 20% of Johanna's max Health over 5 seconds.  Quest: Every 10 Regeneration Globes gathered increases this heal amount by 5% of Johanna's max Health.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryPunishRoar|CrusaderRoarTa: Increase Punish's damage by 50%. This bonus is increased to 150% whenever Punish hits 2 or more Heroes.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryPunishSubdue|CrusaderSubd: Hitting 2 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish increases the Slow to 70% and the Slow amount does not decay.  Quest: Hit 4 or more Heroes at the same time with Punish.  Reward: Punish always Slows by 70%.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryShieldGlareHolyRenewal|Cr: Hitting enemy Heroes with Shield Glare reduce its cooldown by 1 second and heals for 5% of Johanna's maximum Health.
fullText.CrusaderMasteryShieldGlareSinsExposed|Cr: Punish reduces healing received by 35% for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them refresh this duration.
fullText.CrusaderPassiveDivineFortress|CrusaderPa: Basic Attacks grant 10 Physical Armor for 4 seconds, stacking up to 40.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus maximum Health. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.
fullText.CrusaderZealousGlare|CrusaderZealousGlar: Shield Glare gains 1 additional charge, and deals 70% more damage.
fullText.DeathwingArrivalOfAGod|DeathwingArrivalO: Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage is increased by 400%.  Deathwing also gains the benefits of all of his level 7 talents.
fullText.DeathwingBellowingRoar|DeathwingBellowin: After 1 second, Deathwing unleashes a mighty roar, dealing 25 damage to nearby Heroes and causing them to run in Fear for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.DeathwingBurnBeneathMyShadow|DeathwingBu: When an enemy Fort or Keep is destroyed the cooldown of Cataclysm is reset. Cataclysm's periodic damage is increased by 80%.
fullText.DeathwingConflagration|DeathwingConflagr: Dealing 320 damage with Molten Flame to enemy Heroes within 4 seconds causes them to burn for an additional 100 damage over 4 seconds. While burning, they explode every 1 second, dealing 80 damage to all nearby enemies.
fullText.DeathwingDeathDrop|DeathwingDeathDrop|Z|: Hitting an enemy Hero with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing damage reduces their Spell Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and Deathwing's Basic Ability cooldowns by 2 seconds.
fullText.DeathwingDestroyersRampage|DeathwingDest: For the next 6 seconds after landing in Destroyer form, Deathwing's damage is increased by 40% and his Basic Ability cooldowns recharge 50% faster.  Damaging Heroes refreshes this effect.
fullText.DeathwingDraconicMight|DeathwingDraconic: Deathwing's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes heal him for 25% of the damage dealt. Upon losing an Armor Plate, Deathwing becomes Protected for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.DeathwingDragonsIre|DeathwingDragonsIre|: While Deathwing has 3 or fewer Armor Plates, his damage is increased by 25%.
fullText.DeathwingDragonSoul|DeathwingDragonSoul|: Destroyer: Incinerate heals Deathwing for 100% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.  World Breaker: Lava Burst's explosion damage heals Deathwing for 200% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes.
fullText.DeathwingElementiumPlating|DeathwingElem: Activate to gain a Shield equal to 30% of Deathwing's missing Health for 8 seconds. While the Shield holds, Deathwing regenerates 2% of his maximum Health per second.   When the Shield expires or is destroyed, Deathwing regains Armor Plates appropriate for his new Health.  The Shield and effect end immediately if Deathwing uses Dragonflight.
fullText.DeathwingFireAndFury|DeathwingFireAndFur: Basic Attacks against Rooted, Slowed, or Stunned enemy Heroes deal 40% additional damage and reduce the cooldowns of Deathwing's Basic Abilities by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.DeathwingFirestorm|DeathwingFirestorm|Z|: Reduce the cooldown of Deathwing's landing Abilities by 3 seconds. When Deathwing lands, he drops 7 meteors near the landing area, dealing 77 damage to enemies hit.   Meteors prioritize landing on Heroes, otherwise they fall randomly in the area.
fullText.DeathwingGazeOntoDestruction|DeathwingGa: Hitting Heroes with Destroyer or World Breaker's landing causes their damage to be reduced by 75% and Slows them by 40% for 3.5 Seconds.
fullText.DeathwingHeatWave|DeathwingHeatWave|W|Le: Destroyer: After hitting an enemy Hero with Incinerate, Deathwing deals 18 damage per second to all nearby enemies for the next 9 seconds. Stacks up to 3 times.  World Breaker: Increase the explosion damage of Lava Burst by 150%.
fullText.DeathwingInfernus|DeathwingInfernus|Q|Le: Increase the damage of Molten Flame against enemy Heroes by 25%. Increase this damage bonus to 75% when Molten Flame is cast at 75 Energy or higher.
fullText.DeathwingMoltenBlood|DeathwingMoltenBloo: While Deathwing has 3 or more Armor Plates, he heals for 0.6% of his maximum Health per second.
fullText.DeathwingRuination|DeathwingRuination|E|: Destroyer: The bite from Onslaught now Slows by 60% for 1.5 seconds.  World Breaker: Reduce Earth Shatter's cooldown by 6 seconds and its Energy cost by 10.
fullText.DeathwingSkyfall|DeathwingSkyfall|E|Leve: After using Dragonflight, Deathwing can drop meteors anywhere within vision dealing 58 damage to enemies in the area. Has 3 charges.  If a Hero is hit, Deathwing heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
fullText.DeathwingStoodInTheFire|DeathwingStoodIn: Enemy Heroes are Slowed by 40% while standing in scorched ground, and its duration is increased by 50%.
fullText.DeathwingWickedInferno|DeathwingWickedIn: Molten Flame's Energy cost per second is reduced by 10. After using Molten Flame, Deathwing gains 15 Energy over 3 seconds.
fullText.DeckardAncientBlessings|DeckardAncientBl: Activate Fortitude of the Faithful to empower nearby allied Hero Basic Attacks for 8 seconds, causing them to deal an additional 62 damage in an area and heal for 90 for each Hero hit. This effect can only occur once per second.
fullText.DeckardBottomlessFlask|DeckardBottomless: After use, Healing Potions recharge after 8 seconds.
fullText.DeckardCubeMastery|DeckardCubeMastery|W|: Reduce the Mana cost of Scroll of Sealing from 40 to 25. Each enemy Hero hit by Horadric Cube reduces the cooldown of Scroll of Sealing by 4 seconds.
fullText.DeckardFieldStudy|DeckardFieldStudy|E|Le: Each enemy Hero hit by Scroll of Sealing grants 20% Spell Power for 16 seconds, up to 40%.
fullText.DeckardGemEmerald|DeckardGemEmerald|Acti: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and have it reduce the healing received of enemy Heroes by 75% for 4 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
fullText.DeckardGemRuby|DeckardGemRuby|Active|Lev: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100%  and it spawns 3 Lesser Healing Potions from each enemy Hero hit, healing allied Heroes for 250 when picked up. Lesser Healing Potions last for 10 seconds.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
fullText.DeckardGemSapphire|DeckardGemSapphire|Ac: Activate to increase the damage of the next Horadric Cube by 100% and its slow by 30%.  Only 1 Gem may be active at a time.
fullText.DeckardHoradricStaff|DeckardHoradricStaf: Every 5 seconds, Deckard's next Basic Attack Stuns Heroes for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.DeckardKanaisCube|DeckardKanaisCube|W|Le: Horadric Cube reduces Hero damage dealt by 30% for 4 seconds.
fullText.DeckardLorenado|DeckardLorenado|Heroic|L: Vector Targeting After 1 second, create a twirling tome tornado that travels towards the targeted direction, continually knocking away enemies that come into contact with it. Deals 20 damage to Heroes hit.
fullText.DeckardMorenados|DeckardMorenados|Heroic: Lorenado gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds every time an enemy Hero is knocked back. This effect can only occur once per 0.5 seconds.
fullText.DeckardPerfectGems|DeckardPerfectGems|W|: Reduce the cooldown of all Gems to 5 seconds and the cooldown of Horadric Cube by 6 seconds.
fullText.DeckardPotionOfRevival|DeckardPotionOfRe: When a Healing Potion is picked up, it also heals all nearby allied Heroes for 75% of the healing amount.
fullText.DeckardPotionOfShielding|DeckardPotionOf: Whenever an ally is healed by a Healing Potion, they gain a 140 Shield for 6 seconds.
fullText.DeckardRejuvenationPotion|DeckardRejuven: Healing Potions restore 15 Mana and heal for an additional 114 over 3 seconds.
fullText.DeckardRespectTheElderly|DeckardRespectT: Stay Awhile and Listen Silences and Blinds enemies for 3 seconds upon waking up from Sleep.
fullText.DeckardSafetyInNumbers|DeckardSafetyInNu: If at least 2 allied Heroes are nearby, Fortitude of the Faithful grants an additional 10 Armor, 50% Mana Regeneration per second, and causes Deckard's Basic Abilities to recharge an additional 50% faster.
fullText.DeckardScrollOfIdentify|DeckardScrollOfI: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Scroll of Sealing permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, Scroll of Sealing reveals and reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 10 for 4 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, this talent's Armor reduction effect is increased to 15 and its duration to 6 seconds.
fullText.DeckardScrollOfStoneCurse|DeckardScrollO: Scroll of Sealing deals 200% more damage when hitting at least 2 Heroes.
fullText.DeckardStayAWhileAndListen|DeckardStayAW: After 1 second, Channel for 3 seconds, putting enemy Heroes in front of Deckard to Sleep while Channeling, and for 2 seconds after.  Enemies can only be put to Sleep once per cast, and Sleep's effects end instantly if they take damage.
fullText.DeckardSuperHealingPotion|DeckardSuperHe: If a Healing Potion isn't picked up for at least 2 seconds, it heals for 100% more.  Passive: Healing Potion heals for 25% more when the target is under 50% health.
fullText.DehakaAdaptationChangeIsSurvivalTalent|D: Increases Adaptation healing to 200% of the damage received and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
fullText.DehakaBrushstalkerApexPredator|DehakaBru: Reduces Brushstalker's cooldown by 120 seconds and the cast time by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.DehakaBrushstalkerFerociousStalker|Dehak: Dark Swarm Slows enemy Heroes by 15% for 0.75 seconds and deals 50% more damage while Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus is active.
fullText.DehakaBurrowTalentLurkerStrain|DehakaBur: Emerging from Burrow grants Dehaka Stealth for 3 seconds and knocks nearby enemies back, dealing 125 damage and Slowing them by 30% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Burrow by 2 seconds.
fullText.DehakaDarkSwarmTalentEnduringSwarm|Dehak: Dark Swarm's duration is increased by 0.5 seconds and grants 50 Spell Armor while active.
fullText.DehakaDarkSwarmTalentSymbiosis|DehakaDar: Every time Dark Swarm damages an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.4 seconds.
fullText.DehakaDragTalentFeedingFrenzy|DehakaDrag: Increase Drag's duration by 0.5 seconds.  Gambit: Basic Attacks reduce Drag's cooldown by 1.5 seconds. Every death reduces this cooldown reduction by 0.25 seconds, up to 3 times.
fullText.DehakaDragTalentParalyzingEnzymes|Dehaka: Drag Slows the target by 40% and reduces their healing received by 50% while active and for 2 seconds after ending. Dehaka's Basic Attacks increase the duration of the healing reduction to 2 seconds.
fullText.DehakaEssenceClaws|DehakaEssenceClaws|Tr: Dehaka's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1 second. If the target is a Hero, Dehaka gains 5 Essence.
fullText.DehakaEssenceCollectionOneWhoCollectsTal: Increases Essence collected from Minions by 50%. Dark Swarm deals 40% more damage to Mercenaries.
fullText.DehakaEssenceCollectionTalentEnhancedAgi: Brushstalker's Movement Speed bonus now lasts for 4 seconds after leaving a bush.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases the Movement Speed bonus of Brushstalker by 2%, up to 20%.
fullText.DehakaEssenceCollectionTalentHeroStalker: Increases Essence gained from Takedowns by 100%, and gain 1 Essence for each enemy Hero hit by Dark Swarm, up to 3 at once.
fullText.DehakaEssenceCollectionTalentTissueRegen: Regeneration Globes grant 10 Essence.  Repeatable Quest: Every 50 Essence collected permanently increases Health Regeneration by 4, up to 40, and maximum Essence by 1, up to 10.
fullText.DehakaHeroicAbilityAdaptation|DehakaAdap: After 4 seconds, heal for 100% of the damage Dehaka took over this period.
fullText.DehakaHeroicAbilityIsolation|DehakaIsola: Launch biomass that hits the first enemy Hero dealing 200 damage, revealing, Silencing, and Slowing them 30% for 3 seconds. Additionally, their vision radius is greatly reduced for 6 seconds.
fullText.DehakaIsolationTalentContagion|DehakaIso: Isolation hits all Heroes near the first target, but it deals 60% less damage to all targets.
fullText.DehakaPackLeaderBrushstalkerTalent|Dehak: Dehaka gains 40 Armor and 15% increased Attack Speed while in a bush and for 4 seconds after leaving.
fullText.DehakaPrimalRage|DehakaPrimalRage|Trait|: Gain 1.25% increased Attack Damage per Essence stored.
fullText.DehakaPrimalSwarm|DehakaPrimalSwarm|W|Le: Dark Swarm causes enemies hit to lose 10 Armor for 0.75 seconds, causing them to take 10% extra damage.
fullText.DehakaTunnelingClaws|DehakaTunnelingClaw: Increase movement speed while Burrowing to 120%.
fullText.DemonHunterCombatStyleHotPursuit|DemonHu: Increase the Movement Speed bonus of each stack of Hatred from 1% to 2%.
fullText.DemonHunterCombatStyleTemperedByDiscipli: Basic Attacks heal for 10% of the damage dealt, increased by 2% per Hatred stack.
fullText.DemonHunterCreedoftheHunter|DemonHunterC: Quest: Every 50 Basic Attacks against Heroes increases Hatred's damage bonus per stack by 1%, up to 6%.  Gambit: Gain 25% bonus Attack Speed. Every death reduces this bonus by 5%.
fullText.DemonHunterDeathDealer|DemonHunterDeathD: Increase Vaults Basic Attack damage bonus from 6% to 15% per stack of Hatred. If this attack kills its victim within 1.5 seconds, the Mana cost and cooldown of Vault are refunded.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Vault by 5 seconds.
fullText.DemonHunterFarflightQuiver|DemonHunterFa: Gain 20% Basic Attack range. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Basic Attack range.
fullText.DemonHunterGloom|DemonHunterGloom|Active: Activate to consume all Hatred, granting 3 Spell Armor per Hatred consumed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 15 Spell Armor, and each stack of Hatred heals for 1.2 Health per second.
fullText.DemonHunterHeroicAbilityRainofVengeance|: Launch a wave of Shadow Beasts that deals 250 damage and Stuns enemies in the target area for 0.5 seconds.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.DemonHunterHeroicAbilityStrafe|DemonHunt: Rapidly attack enemies within 10 range for 70 damage per hit, prioritizing Heroes over Minions. Valla is able to move and use Vault while strafing. Lasts for 4 seconds.
fullText.DemonHunterManticore|DemonHunterManticor: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same Hero deals an additional 4% of their maximum Health as damage.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryArsenal|DemonHunterMul: Increase the range of Multishot by 20%. Multishot also fires 3 grenades that deal 100 damage and refund 25 Mana after hitting enemy Heroes.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryDeathSiphon|DemonHunte: Hitting an enemy Hero with Strafe increases its duration by 0.125 seconds. Strafe also fires penetrating bolts in a line for 34 damage every 0.25 seconds.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryFrostShot|DemonHunterH: Multishot Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds. Hungering Arrows deals 25% more damage to Slowed enemies.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryMonsterHunterHungering: Hungering Arrow deals 150% additional damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryPuncturingArrow|DemonH: Increase the number of Hungering Arrow bounces by 1.  Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Hungering Arrow refunds 40 Mana and permanently increases the damage of its initial impact by 6.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryRepeatingArrowVault|De: Vault no longer has a Mana cost. Casting Vault resets the cooldown of Hungering Arrow.
fullText.DemonHunterMasterySiphoningArrow|DemonHu: Hitting a Hero with Hungering Arrow heals Valla for 4% of her maximum Health, and Multishot heals for 2%.
fullText.DemonHunterMasteryStormofVengeance|Demon: Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Rain of Vengeance by 5 seconds.  Passive: Each stack of Hatred increases your Attack Speed by 2%. While at max Hatred, gain an additional 30% Attack Speed.
fullText.DemonHunterMultishotFireAtWill|DemonHunt: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Multishot grants 2 Hatred and permanently increases its damage by 2.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes with Multishot, increase its damage by 40.
fullText.DemonHunterPunishment|DemonHunterHatredP: While at max Hatred, Multishot's cooldown recharges 50% faster.  Passive: Reduce Multishot's Mana cost from 75 to 55.
fullText.DemonHunterSeethingHatred|DemonHunterSee: While at max Hatred, increase all damage dealt by 10%.
fullText.DemonHunterVaultAcrobat|DemonHunterVault: Gain 2 additional charges of Vault. Drop 3 Caltrops while Vaulting that deal 60 damage and Slow enemies by 40% for 1 second.
fullText.DiabloDebilitatingFlames|DiabloDebilitat: Enemy Heroes hit by Fire Stomp are Slowed by 6% for 4 seconds, up to 60%. Heroes Slowed by 24% or more by Debilitating Flames deal 50% less damage.
fullText.DiabloDevastatingCharge|DiabloDevastatin: Increase Shadow Charge's terrain collision damage by 50%.  Quest: Hit an enemy Hero against terrain 5 times.  Reward: Hitting enemy Heroes against terrain reduces their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.
fullText.DiabloDiabolicalMomentum|DiabloDiabolica: When Diablo's Basic Attacks damage enemies, reduce the cooldown of Shadow Charge and Overpower by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.DiabloFireStompSoulsToTheFlame|DiabloFir: Fire Stomp grants 1 Soul every 3 times it damages an enemy Hero, and heals for an additional 1.3% of its damage dealt per Soul.
fullText.DiabloHellfire|DiabloHellfire|W|Level13: Each enemy Hero hit by Fire Stomp grants 3% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%.  While at maximum stacks, Diablo deals 33 damage per second to nearby enemies.
fullText.DiabloHellgate|DiabloHellgateTalent|Acti: Teleport and place a demonic rune at target location. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 damage and stunning enemies for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.DiabloHeroicAbilityApocalypse|DiabloApoc: Create a demonic rune under each enemy Hero on the battleground. After 1.75 seconds the rune explodes dealing 137 damage and Stunning them for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.DiabloHeroicAbilityLightningBreath|Diabl: After 0.5 seconds, become Unstoppable and Channel for up to 4 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.25 seconds to enemies in front of Diablo. Enemies affected are Slowed by 4% for 2 seconds, up to 40%.   Lightning Breath's direction changes with your mouse cursor position.
fullText.DiabloLifeLeech|DiabloLifeLeechTalent|Pa: Diablo gains 1 Soul and heals for 1.75% of his maximum Health when Basic Attacking an enemy Hero. While at 100 Souls, increase this healing to 3.5% of his maximum Health.
fullText.DiabloMalevolence|DiabloMalevolence|Pass: Basic Abilities cause Diablo's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds to deal an additional 100 Spell Damage. Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.DiabloMasteryDevilsDueBlackSoulstone|Dia: Black Soulstone increases the effects of Regen Globes and Healing Fountains by 2.25% per Soul.
fullText.DiabloMasteryDyingBreathApocalypse|Diabl: Apocalypse's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for every enemy Hero hit (to a minimum of 5 seconds) and is cast for free when Diablo dies.
fullText.DiabloMasteryFeastOnFearBlackSoulstone|D: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower heals Diablo for 10% of his maximum Health over 3 seconds.
fullText.DiabloOverpowerOverpoweringNightmare|Dia: Gain 2 additional charges of Overpower, with a 2 second cooldown between uses.
fullText.DiabloShadowChargeOverpowerCruelty|Diabl: Stunning an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower increases Diablo's Attack Speed by 50% for 7 seconds, up to 100%.
fullText.DiabloShadowChargeOverpowerEternalFlames: Reduce the cooldown of Fire Stomp by 1 second. When Diablo Stuns an enemy Hero with Shadow Charge or Overpower, reset the cooldown of Fire Stomp and restore 45 Mana.
fullText.DiabloShadowChargeSacrificialSoul|Diablo: Stunning a Hero with Shadow Charge grants 10 Souls and 20 Armor for 3 seconds. While at 100 Souls, increase this Armor to 40.
fullText.DiabloSoulShield|DiabloSoulShield|Active: Activate to gain 25 plus 50% of Diablo's current Souls as Spell Armor for 4 seconds. Every time Diablo damages an enemy Hero, reduce this cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.DiabloTalentDominationOverpower|DiabloOv: Casting Overpower resets the cooldown of Shadow Charge.
fullText.DiabloTalentLordOfTerror|DiabloLordOfTer: Activate to steal 10% of the maximum Health of nearby enemy Heroes and gain 5 Souls per Hero hit.
fullText.DryadAbolishMagic|DryadAbolishMagicHotba: Target an ally to remove all damage over time and disabling effects from them and Lunara. For 2 seconds after, the duration of disabling effects is reduced by 50%.
fullText.DryadAcceleratedContamination|DryadAccel: Reduce the Mana cost of Noxious Blossom from 60 to 40. While at least 1 enemy Hero is afflicted with Nature's Toxin, Noxious Blossom's cooldown recharges 75% faster.
fullText.DryadBlossomSwell|DryadBlossomSwellTalen: Increases Noxious Blossom's cast range by 25%. and its radius by 20%. Blossom Swell applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies hit.
fullText.DryadBoundlessStrideTalent|DryadBoundles: All Leaping Strike charges are returned every 15 seconds. Leaping Strike can be used on allies.
fullText.DryadChokingPollen|DryadChokingPollenTal: Noxious Blossom deals 100% more damage to enemies afflicted by Nature's Toxin, increased to 175% against enemies with 3 stacks.
fullText.DryadEndlessSpores|DryadEndlessSpores|W|: Casting Crippling Spores while at least 2 Heroes are afflicted by Nature's Toxin reduces the cooldown by 4 seconds and refunds 50 Mana.
fullText.DryadForestsWrath|DryadForestsWrathTalen: Lunara's Heroic Ability applies 1 additional stack of Nature's Toxin to enemies, and its range is increased by 30%.  Passive: Increase Lunara's vision radius by 35%.
fullText.DryadForTheWildlands|DryadForTheWildland: Thornwood Vine shoots 4 additional vines in an arc.
fullText.DryadGallopingGait|DryadGallopingGaitTal: Activate to increase the Movement Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness to 80% for 6 seconds.
fullText.DryadGreaterSpellShield|DryadGreaterSpel: Every 30 seconds, gain 75 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
fullText.DryadHeroicAbilityLeapingStrike|DryadLea: Leap over an enemy, Slowing them by 80% for 0.35 seconds and dealing 271 damage.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.DryadHeroicAbilityThornwoodVine|DryadTho: Send forth vines that deal 184 damage to all enemies in a line.  Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.DryadHippityHop|DryadHippityHop|Z|Level1: After not Basic Attacking or taking damage for 2 seconds, increase the Move Speed bonus of Dryad's Swiftness by 10%.
fullText.DryadIntensifyingToxin|DryadIntensifying: At 3 stacks, Nature's Toxin deals 40% more damage.
fullText.DryadInvigoratingSpores|DryadInvigoratin: Crippling Spores grants 30% Attack Speed for 6 seconds. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin deal damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.
fullText.DryadLetThemWither|DryadLetThemWitherTal: Increases Crippling Spores' Slow duration by 1 second and causes it to no longer decay.
fullText.DryadNaturalPerspective|DryadNaturalPers: Nature's Toxin reveals enemies for its duration.
fullText.DryadNaturesCulling|DryadNaturesCullingT: Increases Nature's Toxin's damage by 125% to non-Heroes.
fullText.DryadSentinelWisp|DryadSentinelWispTalen: After remaining in a bush for 5 seconds, Wisp's vision radius is increased by 200% and reveals the surrounding area.
fullText.DryadSiphoningToxin|DryadSiphoningToxinT: While at least one enemy is afflicted by Nature's Toxin, heal for 9 per second. When an enemy Hero has 3 stacks of Nature's Toxin, increase this healing by 19 per second.
fullText.DryadSplinteredSpear|DryadSplinteredSpea: Casting Noxious Blossom grants Lunara 3 stacks of Splintered Spear. When Lunara uses her Basic Attack, it hits an additional enemy for each stack of Splintered Spear, consuming 1 stack for each target. Stores up to 3 stacks.  Splintered Spear deals 90 damage, and applies Nature's Toxin.
fullText.DryadStarWoodSpear|DryadStarWoodSpearTal: Increase Lunara's Basic Attack range by 0.5. Using Crippling Spores increases Lunara's Basic Attack range by an additional 2.25 for 6 seconds.
fullText.DryadUnfairAdvantage|DryadUnfairAdvantag: Nature's Toxin deals 60% more damage to Heroes that are Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned.
fullText.DryadWildVigor|DryadWildVigorTalent|W|Le: Using Crippling Spores increases the damage of Lunara's next 4 Basic Attacks by 70%.
fullText.DVaBigShotPewPewPew|DVaBigShotPewPewPew|: Pilot Mode: Instead of a single shot, Big Shot fires 3 shots over 0.5 seconds. Each shot deals 75% damage.
fullText.DVaBoostersHitTheNitrous|DVaBoostersHitT: The initial speed bonus of Boosters is increased to 300%, then decays to normal boost speed over 0.5 seconds. During this time, Boosters Stuns for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.DVaBoostersRushdown|DVaBoostersRushdown|: Boosters deals an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes and heals D.Va's Mech for the damage dealt. Boosters deals 50% increased damage to non-Heroic enemies.
fullText.DVaBunnyHopStopAndPop|DVaBunnyHopStopAnd: Increase Bunny Hop's duration by 4 seconds, and it does not decay while D.Va's Mech is stationary.
fullText.DVaBunnyHop|DVaBunnyHopOn|Heroic|Level10: D.Va's Mech becomes Unstoppable and stomps every 0.5 seconds, dealing 78 damage in a large area. Every 4th consecutive hit on a Hero deals 80% more damage and Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.  Lasts for 4 seconds.  Requires Mech Mode.
fullText.DVaDefenseMatrixAggressionMatrix|DVaDefe: Enemy Heroes within your Defense Matrix receive 35% less healing.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Defense Matrix by 0.1875 seconds.
fullText.DVaDefenseMatrixDivertingPower|DVaDefens: Defense Matrix's area grows drastically in size and each time it reduces damage dealt to Heroes D.Va's Mech is healed for 31 Health.
fullText.DVaDefenseMatrixFusionGenerator|DVaDefen: Every time an enemy Hero deals damage while inside Defense Matrix, D.Va's Self-Destruct Charge increases by 1%. Max of 20% Charge gained per use.   Passive: While at full Self-Destruct charge, Fusion Cannons' bonus damage is increased to 100%.
fullText.DVaFullMetal|DVaFullMetal|Trait|Level1: D.Va's Mech gains 10% increased Health and its Fusion Cannons heal for 16% of the damage dealt to enemies in its bonus area.
fullText.DvaGetOnThePoint|DvaGetOnThePoint|Q|Leve: Casting Boosters grants nearby allies 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.   Passive: If D.Va has not taken damage in the last 2 seconds, Boosters' cooldown refreshes 100% faster.
fullText.DVaGoodToGo|DVaGoodToGo|Trait|Level13: Pilot Mode: Unlocks the Torpedo Dash and Concussive Pulse abilities.  Torpedo Dash: Dash a short distance. 10 second cooldown.  Concussive Pulse: Deal 120 damage to enemies in a cone and knock them back. 10 second cooldown.
fullText.DVaHeadshot|DVaHeadshot|Trait|Level20: Pilot Mode: Increase Big Shot's damage by 75% and reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds.
fullText.DVaInForTheKill|DVaInForTheKill|Q|Level1: Casting Boosters grants a Shield equal to 10% of maximum life for 2.5 seconds. Each Enemy Hero hit by Boosters increases D.Va's Mech's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 5 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
fullText.DVaLiquidCooling|DVaLiquidCooling|Active: Activate to gain the effects of Healing Fountain. Requires Mech Mode.  Passive: While in Mech Mode, Healing Fountain's cooldown is reduced to 50 seconds and its effects last 50% longer.
fullText.DVaMechAblativeArmor|DVaMechAblativeArmo: 45% of Spell damage dealt to D.Va's Mech is returned as healing over 4 seconds.
fullText.DVaMechEmergencyShielding|DVaMechEmergen: When D.Va's Mech would be destroyed, it instead gains a Shield that absorbs 290 damage over 8 seconds.  This effect has a 30 second cooldown.
fullText.DVaMechProMoves|DVaMechProMoves|Trait|Le: D.Va's Mech gains 2% Movement Speed and 2 Armor every time it takes damage, stacking up to 15 times. Stacks of this effect decay every 0.5 seconds.  Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes in Pilot Mode reduce the cooldown of Call Mech by 1 additional second.
fullText.DVaMicroMissiles|DVaMicroMissiles|Heroic: After .375 seconds, Channel to launch a volley of 12 missiles in a target direction. Each missile impacts the first enemy in its path, dealing 40 damage in a small area and Slowing by 30% for 2 seconds.  Stores 2 charges with a 3 second cooldown between each use.  Requires Mech Mode.
fullText.DVaSelfDestructNuclearOption|DVaSelfDest: Hitting your self-destructing Mech with Big Shot causes it to self-destruct 40% faster.  Passive: When Fusion Cannons deal bonus damage to an enemy Hero, gain 0.25 Self-Destruct Charge.
fullText.DVaTargetLocked|DVaTargetLocked|W|Level1: Enemy Heroes that remain in your Defense Matrix for 0.75 seconds have their Armor reduced by 15 and their Movement Speed reduced by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.DVaTimingAttack|DVaTimingAttack|Heroic|L: Micro Missiles gains an additional charge. Each time Micro Missiles hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 0.5 seconds and charge cooldown by 0.25 seconds.
fullText.ElunesGift|ElunesFury|E|Level7: Hitting an enemy Hero with Lunar Flare grants 20% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
fullText.ETCBlockParty|ETCBlockParty|Trait|Level1: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes a stack of Block, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next Hero Basic Attack for 8 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%. Maximum 2 stacks of Block.
fullText.ETCCombatStyleEchoPedal|L90ETCRockstarEc: Using a Basic or Heroic Ability releases two pulses of 18 damage. This deals 200% bonus damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. The first occurs instantly, the second occurs 2 seconds later.
fullText.ETCCrowdSurfer|ETCCrowdSurfer|Q|Level4: Allows Powerslide to travel over walls and terrain. If no enemies are hit, reduce the cooldown by 6 seconds and refund the Mana cost.
fullText.ETCHeroicAbilityMoshPit|L90ETCMoshPit|He: After 0.75 seconds, channel to stun nearby enemies for 4 seconds.
fullText.ETCHeroicAbilityStageDive|L90ETCStageDiv: Leap to target location, landing after 2.75 seconds, dealing 330 damage to enemies in the area, and slowing them by 50% for 4 seconds.
fullText.ETCMasteryEncore|ETCEncoreTalent|W|Level: Face Melt leaves an Amp behind, which will knock enemies away again 2 seconds later.  Passive: Each enemy Hero hit by Face Melt or the Amp reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by 4%.
fullText.ETCMasteryFaceSmelt|L90ETCFaceMeltFaceSm: Face Melt Slows enemies by 50%, decaying over 2 seconds.
fullText.ETCMasteryGuitarHero|L90ETCGuitarSoloGui: While Guitar Solo is active, E.T.C. heals for 60% of his damage dealt by Basic Attacks. Basic Attacks increase the duration of Guitar Solo by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ETCMasteryGuitarSoloAggressiveShredding|: E.T.C.'s Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Guitar Solo by 0.75 seconds.

fullText.ETCMasteryMicCheck|ETCMicCheckTalent|W|L: Hitting at least 2 targets with Face Melt reduces its cooldown by 6 seconds.
fullText.ETCMasteryProgRock|ETCProgRockTalent|E|L: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe permanently increases the healing per second of Guitar Solo by 5, to a maximum of 100  Reward: After gathering 20 Regeneration Globes, Guitar Solo also heals nearby allied Heroes for 50 Health every second while it is active.
fullText.ETCMasteryShowStopper|ETCShowStopperTale: After using Powerslide, gain 35 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing all damage taken by 35%.
fullText.ETCMasterySpeedMetal|ETCSpeedMetalTalent: Using a Basic or Heroic ability also gives nearby allied Heroes 20% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.

Mythic Reward: After hitting 150 Heroes, Hammerang permanently deals an additional 70% damage.

Reward: After 20 stacks, its damage is increased by 30%.  Reward: After 45 stacks, its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds and its damage is increased by an additional 75%.  Mythic Reward: After 75 stacks, its number of strikes is increased by 2 and the final strike Stuns for 1.25 seconds.

Reward: After 60 stacks, gain 20 Attack Damage.  Reward: After 150 stacks, gain 50 additional Attack Damage.  Mythic Reward: After 300 stacks, gain 125 additional Attack Damage.

fullText.FalstadTalentHammerGains|FalstadHammerGa: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt to the primary target.
fullText.FenixAdaniumShell|FenixAdaniumShell|E|Le: After arriving with Warp, gain 50 Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.FenixAdvancedTargeting|FenixAdvancedTarg: Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Plasma Cutter permanently increases Fenix's Basic Attack damage by 0.5, up to 60.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Plasma Cutter circles an additional time.

fullText.FenixCombatAdvantage|FenixCombatAdvantag: Plasma Cutter deals 35% more damage to Slowed targets.

fullText.FenixHeroicAbilityPurificationSalvo|Feni: Channel for 1.5 seconds, sweeping a laser in front of Fenix that locks onto enemy Heroes. Once Channeling finishes, fire 5 missiles at each locked Hero, dealing 79 damage each. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.

fullText.FenixMobileOffense|FenixMobileOffense|W|: After moving, Fenix's next Basic Attack deals 35% more damage to Heroes.

fullText.FenixRapidRecharge|FenixRapidRecharge|Tr: The time before Shield Capacitor begins regenerating after taking damage is reduced by 2 seconds. Whenever Fenix is healed, Shield Capacitor's Shield recharges for 60% of the healing received.
fullText.FenixSecondaryFire|FenixSecondaryFire|Q|: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plasma Cutter fires a Purification Salvo missile at them after 0.5 seconds, dealing 79 damage. Deals 50% increased damage to Slowed targets.

fullText.FirebatActiveJuggernautPlating|FirebatAc: Activate to gain 50 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Upon expiration, gain a Shield equal to 125% of the Spell Damage taken while Juggernaut Plating was active.

fullText.FirebatEnduranceStimpack|FirebatEnduranc: Activate to gain a Shield that absorbs 590 damage over 5 seconds.  When taking damage while below 30% maximum Health, Endurance Stimpack will automatically be cast if it is not on cooldown.

fullText.FirebatHeroicAbilityBunkerDrop|FirebatBu: After 0.5 seconds, deploy and enter a Bunker with 1435 Health. Blaze and his allies can enter and exit the Bunker at will. While in the Bunker, occupants gain access to Flamethrower, dealing 150 damage to enemies in a line.   Exiting the Bunker grants 25 Armor for 2 seconds. Bunkers last 10 seconds, or until destroyed.
fullText.FirebatHeroicAbilityCombustion|FirebatCo: Channel for up to 2.6 seconds. Upon ending, Slow nearby enemies by 60% and deal 55 damage to them every 0.5 seconds. Combustion's Slow and damage over time duration is extended the longer Blaze Channels, from 1 second up to 5 seconds.  Blaze's Movement Speed is reduced by 40% while Channeling.

fullText.FirebatOilSpillAdhesivePetroleum|Firebat: Enemies standing in Oil Spill when it is Ignited are Slowed by 40% and take 35% more Basic Attack damage from Blaze for 3 seconds. Additionally, Basic Attack splashes Ignite Oil Spills.

fullText.GazloweOverklock|GazloweOverklock|Passiv: Basic Attacks grant Gazlowe 15% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.  Dealing Basic Attack damage to Heroes causes them to take an additional 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.

fullText.GazloweXplodiumChargeBombToss|GazloweXpl: Xplodium Charge gains a 2nd charge with a 3 second cooldown between uses and launches 2 more bombs when it detonates.
fullText.GazloweXplodiumChargeRocketBoots|Gazlowe: Increase the cast range of Xplodium Charge by 30% and its damage by 35%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.

fullText.GenericTalentHardenedShield|HardenedShie: Activate to gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, taking 75% less damage.
fullText.GenericTalentIceBlock|GenericIceBlockTal: Activate to place yourself in Stasis and gain Invulnerability for 3 seconds.
fullText.GenericTalentImposingPresence|GenericImp: Activate to reduce the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of nearby Heroes and Summons for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack your Hero have their Attack Speed Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.GenericTalentMercenaryLord|GenericMercen: Friendly non-Boss Mercenaries near your Hero deal 50% more damage. Gain 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
fullText.GenericTalentNexusBlades|NexusBladesTale: Basic Attacks deal 20% more damage and Slow enemy Movement Speed by 20% for 1 second.
fullText.GenericTalentNexusFrenzy|NexusFrenzyTale: Increases Attack Speed by 20% and Attack Range by 1.1.
fullText.GenericTalentRegenerationMaster|GenericR: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases your Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 30.   Reward: After gathering 25 Regeneration Globes, you also gain 500 Health.
fullText.GenericTalentRewind|GenericRewindHotbar|: Activate to reset the cooldowns of your Basic Abilities.
fullText.GenericTalentSpellShield|GenericSpellShi: Every 30 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 50%.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
fullText.GenericTalentStormShield|GenericStormShi: Activate to give all nearby allied Heroes a Shield for 20% of their max Health for 3 seconds.
fullText.GenjiCyberAgilityAgileDismount|GenjiCybe: While mounted the range of Cyber Agility is increased by 70%, its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds, and it Slows enemy Heroes in its landing area by 25% for 2 seconds.
fullText.GenjiCyberAgilityCyberShield|GenjiCyberA: Using Cyber Agility grants 40 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji dodges 1 Heroic Basic Attack every 5 seconds.
fullText.GenjiCyberAgilityPathfinder|GenjiCyberAg: Jumping over terrain with Cyber Agility increases Movement Speed by 30%, and grants Stealth, for 4 seconds.  Passive: Genji's Heroic Ability heals him for 10% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes, increasing up to 30% the lower Genji's Health is.
fullText.GenjiDeflectAugmentedGuard|GenjiDeflectA: When Deflect ends, Genji gains a Shield equal to 100% of the damage blocked for 4 seconds.
fullText.GenjiDeflectDragonClaw|GenjiDeflectDrago: After Genji blocks 330 damage with Deflect, activate to release a Dragon Claw, dealing 190 damage to all nearby enemies.
fullText.GenjiDeflectPerfectDefense|GenjiDeflectP: Deflected damage reduces the cooldown of Deflect by 2 seconds, up to a maximum of 10 seconds.
fullText.GenjiDeflectReflect|GenjiDeflectReflect|: Deflect also deals an additional 33% of the damage blocked.
fullText.GenjiDeflectZanshin|GenjiDeflectZanshin|: Quest: Block 6500 damage with Deflect, including damage blocked so far.  Reward: Deflect hits all nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.GenjiDragonbladeTheDragonBecomesMe|Genji: Each time Dragonblade hits an enemy Hero, the duration of Dragonblade is increased by 0.5 seconds. If a Hero is killed within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Dragonblade, Swift Strike's cooldown is reset.
fullText.GenjiHeroicDragonblade|GenjiDragonblade|: Unleash the Dragonblade for 8 seconds. While active, Dragonblade can be reactivated to lunge forward and slash in a huge arc, dealing 240 damage.
fullText.GenjiHeroicXStrike|GenjiXStrike|Heroic|L: Perform two slashes dealing 145 damage. The slashes detonate after 1.25 seconds causing an additional 290 damage to enemies in their area.
fullText.GenjiShurikenSharpenedStars|GenjiShurike: Shuriken now pierce all enemies hit. Swift Strike's refund grants 1 charge of Shuriken.
fullText.GenjiShurikenShingan|GenjiShurikenShinga: Hitting an enemy with all 3 Shuriken deals 100 bonus damage. Deals 40% less damage to Structures.
fullText.GenjiShurikenShurikenMastery|GenjiShurik: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Shuriken.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, Shuriken damage is increased by 25.  Reward: After hitting 60 Heroes, Cyber Agility now refunds 3 charges of Shuriken.
fullText.GenjiSwiftStrikeFinalCut|GenjiSwiftStrik: After 1 second, Swift Strike deals an additional 125 damage to all enemies in the area.
fullText.GenjiSwiftStrikeFlowLikeWater|GenjiSwift: Each enemy Hero hit with Swift Strike reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.GenjiSwiftStrikeSteadyBlade|GenjiSwiftSt: Each enemy Hero hit by Swift Strike increases the damage of the next Swift Strike by 30%. This bonus stacks up to 3 times.
fullText.GenjiSwiftStrikeStrikeAtTheHeart|GenjiSw: Enemies hit by the end of Swift Strike take an additional 134 damage after 1 second.
fullText.GenjiSwiftStrikeSwiftAsTheWind|GenjiSwif: Hitting an enemy Hero with Swift Strike increases Genji's Movement Speed by 30% for 3 seconds.
fullText.GenjiWayOfTheShimadaTalent|GenjiWayOfThe: Increase Genji's Basic Attack range by 1. Each time Genji hits an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack, increase his Basic Attack damage by 1% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 15%.
fullText.GenjiXStrikeLivingWeapon|GenjiXStrikeLiv: Each enemy Hero hit by X-Strike reduces its cooldown by 12.5 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneCursedBulletGilneanRoulette|Grey: Cursed Bullet's damage is reduced to 30% of current health but its cooldown is reduced by 24 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneDarkflightDisengageRunningWild|G: Increases Darkflight and Disengage's range by 35%, and reduce their cooldowns by 1 second.
fullText.GreymaneDarkflightThickSkin|GreymaneDark: Using Darkflight grants 50 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks while in Worgen Form, reducing the damage taken by 50%.
fullText.GreymaneEagerWolf|GreymaneEagerWolf|W|Le: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Inner Beast by an additional 40% after it has been active for 4 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneGilneanCocktailIncendiaryElixir|: Quest: Reduce the cooldown of Gilnean Cocktail by 2 seconds. Every time Greymane hits an enemy Hero with the explosion damage from Gilnean Cocktail, increase its explosion damage by 25, up to 375.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, the cooldown is reduced by an additional 3 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneGilneanCocktailPerfectAim|Greyma: Increases Gilnean Cocktail's range by 30% and refunds 45 Mana if it hits an enemy Hero.
fullText.GreymaneGoForTheThroatUnleashed|Greymane: Passive: Go For The Throat's damage is increased by 25%.  If Go for the Throat kills its target, refund its Mana cost and reset the cooldowns of Greymane's Abilities.
fullText.GreymaneHeroicAbilityCursedBullet|Greyma: Greymane shapeshifts into a Human and fires a bullet that hits the first enemy Hero in its path, dealing 35% of their current Health in damage.  Does not affect Vehicles.
fullText.GreymaneHeroicAbilityGoForTheThroat|Grey: Leap at an enemy Hero and shapeshift into a Worgen, slashing for 355 damage. If this kills them, the Ability can be used a second time within 10 seconds for free.
fullText.GreymaneHuntersBlunderbuss|GreymaneHunte: Human Basic Attacks splash for 100% damage behind the target.
fullText.GreymaneInnerBeastInsatiable|GreymaneInn: Inner Beast causes Basic Attacks to restore 10 Mana, and reduce the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneInnerBeastOnTheProwl|GreymaneInn: Inner Beast increases Movement Speed by 30% once it has been active for 3 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneInnerBeastViciousness|GreymaneIn: Increases Inner Beast's duration to 4 seconds, and causes Ability damage to also refresh its duration.
fullText.GreymaneInnerBeastWolfheart|GreymaneInne: Increase the cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks during Inner Beast from 0.5 to 1.2 seconds, and Worgen Form's Armor bonus from 10 to 15.
fullText.GreymaneLordofHisPack|GreymaneLordofHisP: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases Greymane's Basic Attack damage by 25% for 3 seconds, increased to 50% while in Worgen Form.
fullText.GreymaneRazorSwipeUnfetteredAssault|Grey: Increases Razor Swipe's lunge distance by 60%, and Worgen Basic Attacks reduce Razor Swipe's cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.GreymaneToothAndClaw|GreymaneToothAndCla: Worgen Basic Attacks cleave for 100% damage. Increase Razor Swipe's damage by 100%.
fullText.GreymaneWizenedDuelist|GreymaneWizenedDu: Quest: Every 6 Human Basic Attacks against Heroes increase Basic Attack damage by 1%, up to 30%. Worgen Basic Attacks grant credit for 3 Basic Attacks. Half of this bonus is lost upon death.
fullText.GreymaneWorgenFormAlphaKiller|GreymaneAl: Worgen Basic Attacks against Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 3% of the Hero's maximum Health.
fullText.GreymaneWorgenFormQuicksilverBullets|Gre: Increases Greymane's Human Basic Attack range by 1.1.
fullText.GuldanChaoticEnergy|GuldanChaoticEnergy|: Increases the cast range of Drain Life by 25%, and Regen Globes heal for 50% more.  Quest: Gather 15 Regen Globes.  Reward: Basic Ability Mana costs are permanently reduced by 20.
fullText.GuldanConsumeSoul|GuldanConsumeSoul|Acti: Instantly kill an enemy Minion and heal for 365 Health.  Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.GuldanCorruptionCurseOfExhaustion|Guldan: Drain Life deals 50% more damage and Slows the target's Movement Speed by 40%.
fullText.GuldanCorruptionEchoedCorruption|GuldanC: Quest: Hit enemy Heroes with Corruption.  Reward: After hitting 40 heroes, Corruption gains new functionality. After the third strike, Corruption strikes 3 times in the opposite direction.  Mythic Reward: After 85 hits, Corruption heals for 100% of the damage dealt.
fullText.GuldanCorruptionRuinousAffliction|Guldan: Corruption deals an additional 70 damage on impact. If the enemy is hit by all three strikes, the third strike deals 242 damage.
fullText.GuldanDarkBargain|GuldanDarkBargain|Pass: Gul'dan's maximum Health is permanently increased by 40% but his respawn time is increased by 10 seconds.
fullText.GuldanDemonicCircle|GuldanDemonicCircle|: Summon a Demonic Circle at Gul'dan's location. Activate to teleport Gul'dan to the Demonic Circle.
fullText.GuldanDrainLifeHarvestLife|GuldanDrainLi: Drain Life heals for 75% more Health when used on Heroes.
fullText.GuldanDrainLifeHealthFunnel|GuldanDrainL: Drain Life's cooldown recharges 100% faster while it is channeling. If an enemy dies while under the effect of Drain Life, the cooldown is instantly refreshed.
fullText.GuldanFelFlameBoundByShadow|GuldanFelFla: Each enemy Hero hit with Fel Flame reduces the cooldown of Corruption by 1.75 seconds.
fullText.GuldanFelFlameFelArmor|GuldanFelFlameFel: Hitting an enemy Hero with Fel Flame grants 50 Spell Armor for 2.5 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 50%.
fullText.GuldanFelFlamePursuitOfFlame|GuldanFelFl: Quest: Hit 30 enemy Heroes with Fel Flame without dying.  Reward: Permanently increase Fel Flame's area by 33%.
fullText.GuldanFelFlameRampantHellfire|GuldanFelF: Fel Flame's damage is increased by 12% for 5 seconds when hitting an enemy Hero. This can stack up to 5 times.
fullText.GuldanHealthstone|GuldanHealthstone|Acti: Activate to heal for 25% of Gul'dan's maximum Health.
fullText.GuldanHorrifyHaunt|GuldanHorrifyHaunt|He: Increases the duration of Horrify by 1 second, and while Feared, enemies lose 20 Armor, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
fullText.GuldanHorrify|GuldanHorrify|Heroic|Level: After 0.5 seconds, deal 120 damage to enemy Heroes in an area and Fear them for 2 seconds. While Feared, Heroes are Silenced and are forced to run away from Horrify's center.
fullText.GuldanLifeTapDarknessWithin|GuldanLifeTa: Dealing 600 damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Life Tap to cost no Health and grant Gul'dan 25% Spell Power for 5 seconds.
fullText.GuldanLifeTapHungerforPower|GuldanLifeTa: Increases Spell Power by 15% but reduces healing received from allies by 25%.
fullText.GuldanLifeTapImprovedLifeTap|GuldanLifeT: Increase the Mana restored by Life Tap to 40%.
fullText.GuldanRainOfDestructionDeepImpact|Guldan: Rain of Destruction Slows enemies Movement Speed by 90% for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.GuldanRainOfDestruction|GuldanRainOfDest: After 1.5 seconds, summon a rain of meteors in an area for 7 seconds. Each meteor deals 165 damage in a small area.
fullText.HanzoBullseye|HanzoBullseye|E|Level20: Increase Sonic Arrow's speed and center radius by 100%. Additionally, Heroes hit by Sonic Arrow's center are Stunned for 1 second.
fullText.HanzoDragonsArrow|HanzoDragonsArrow|Hero: Fire a missile that travels across the battleground. Explodes upon hitting an enemy Hero, dealing 130 damage to all nearby enemies and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  After traveling a medium distance, the damage is increased to 260 and the Stun duration to 1.25 seconds.  After traveling a long distance, the damage is increased to 390 and the Stun duration to 2 seconds.
fullText.HanzoDragonstrike|HanzoDragonstrike|Hero: After 1.5 seconds, summon a pair of Spirit Dragons which travel forward, dealing 84 damage every 0.25 seconds to enemy Heroes in its area. Enemies in the center take 75% increased damage.
fullText.HanzoExplosiveArrows|HanzoExplosiveArrow: Upon hitting a Minion or Monster, Storm Bow deals 60% of its damage to enemies around its target.
fullText.HanzoFlawlessTechnique|HanzoFlawlessTech: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow increases the damage of Hanzo's next Basic Attack within 5 seconds by 40%. Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the damage of Hanzo's next Storm Bow within 5 seconds by 40%.
fullText.HanzoFleetofFoot|HanzoFleetofFoot|Q|Leve: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 10% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 30%.
fullText.HanzoGiantSlayer|HanzoGiantSlayer|Passiv: Enemy Heroes hit by Scatter Arrow and Basic Attacks take a bonus 1.6% of their maximum Health as damage.
fullText.HanzoIgnoreAllDistractions|HanzoIgnoreAl: Basic Attacks instantly kill Minions and increase Hanzo's Basic Attack range by 2 for 3 seconds.
fullText.HanzoMountedArchery|HanzoMountedArchery|: Reduce the cooldown of Summon Mount by 2 seconds. Upon mounting, gain 25% additional Movement Speed for 5 seconds. Using Natural Agility instantly mounts.
fullText.HanzoNeverOutmatched|HanzoNeverOutmatche: Reduce Scatter Arrow's Mana cost from 50 to 30. Basic Attacks against Heroes lower the cooldown of Scatter Arrow by 3 seconds.
fullText.HanzoNinjaAssassin|HanzoNinjaAssassin|Tr: Hitting Heroes with Storm Bow lowers Natural Agility's cooldown by 10 seconds. Additionally, Hero Takedowns reset Natural Agility's cooldown.
fullText.HanzoPerfectAgility|HanzoPerfectAgility|: Natural Agility gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
fullText.HanzoPiercingArrows|HanzoPiercingArrows|: Storm Bow and Scatter Arrow pierce, hitting an additional enemy. Additionally, Scatter Arrow can pierce through 1 enemy each time it ricochets.
fullText.HanzoPOTG|HanzoPOTG|Heroic|Level20: While in flight or for up to 2 seconds after impacting a target, Dragon's Arrow can be reactivated to teleport to its location and jump backwards. If used after impact, Hanzo shoots arrows that deal 132 damage to each target hit by the impact.  Hanzo is Unstoppable during Play of the Game.
fullText.HanzoRedemption|HanzoRedemption|Passive|: Quest: Every 2 Basic Attacks against the same Hero within 10 seconds grants 1 Redemption, stacking up to 12. Dying decreases Redemption by 3, and Redemption can be lost even at maximum stacks.  Reward: At 12 Redemption, gain 50% Attack Speed.
fullText.HanzoSerratedArrows|HanzoSerratedArrows|: Scatter Arrow deals 100% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.HanzoSharpenedArrowheads|HanzoSharpenedA: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow or Basic Attacks reduces their Armor by 3 for 3 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 20 Armor.
fullText.HanzoSimpleGeometry|HanzoSimpleGeometry|: Quest: Hit a Hero with multiple arrows from the same Scatter Arrow cast 20 times. Each arrow hit after the second grants additional progress.  Reward: Upon hitting terrain for the first time, Scatter Arrow creates 2 additional arrows.
fullText.HanzoTargetPractice|HanzoTargetPractice|: Quest: Hit every enemy Hero with Storm Bow.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero once with Storm Bow, its range is increased by 30%.  Reward: After hitting every enemy Hero 3 times with Storm Bow, its damage is increased by 100.
fullText.HanzoTheDragonAwakens|HanzoTheDragonAwak: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow, Scatter Arrow, or Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Dragonstrike by 4 seconds.
fullText.HanzoTheDragonHungers|HanzoTheDragonHung: Hitting a Hero with Storm Bow grants 5% Spell Power for 12 seconds, stacking up to 20%.
fullText.HeroGenericExecutionerPassive|GenericExe: Attacking a Hero that is Slowed, Rooted, or Stunned increases your Basic Attack damage by 30% for 3 seconds.
fullText.HoggerAggroRange|HoggerAggroRange|E|Leve: Increase Hogg Wild's radius by 20% and each enemy hit generates 0.5 Rage, increased to 2 against Heroes.
fullText.HoggerAngerManagement|HoggerAngerManagem: Increase maximum Rage by 50, raising the maximum bonuses for its cooldown refresh rate to 75% and Hogg Wild's Hero damage to 75%.  Passive: Basic Attacks grant 5 additional Rage.
fullText.HoggerBloodthirst|HoggerBloodthirst|Pass: Damaging Heroes with Basic Attacks, Staggering Blow, or Hogg Wild heals you for 33% of the damage dealt.
fullText.HoggerBonestoGnaw|HoggerBonestoGnaw|Trai: Loot Hoard creates a chunk of Meat when it lands. While under the effects of Meat, gain 10 Armor.
fullText.HoggerBruteForce|HoggerBruteForce|Q|Leve: Increase the range of Loot Hoard by 25% and its damage by 50%.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow permanently increases Basic Attack damage by 2, to a maximum of 150 bonus damage. Enemy Heroes that hit terrain grant an additional 6 damage.
fullText.HoggerDenseBlastingPowder|HoggerDenseBla: Instant detonations of Ez-Thro Dynamite creates an additional dynamite behind the Hero hit.  Hitting the bundle of Ez-Thro Dynamite with Staggering Blow breaks it into three sticks and launches them forward in an arc.
fullText.HoggerDustDevil|HoggerDustDevil|E|Level1: Gain 25 Armor while Hogg Wild is active and for 4 seconds after. When at or above 50 Rage, increase this Armor to 40.
fullText.HoggerFurzerker|HoggerFurzerker|Passive|: Hitting Heroes with Staggering Blow or Ez-Thro Dynamite increases the damage of the next Basic Attack within 8 seconds by 50%, stacking up to 2 times.  When Hogg Wild ends, gain 30% Movement Speed for 2 seconds.
fullText.HoggerGarbageFire|HoggerGarbageFire|Trai: Reduce the cooldown of Loot Hoard by 2 seconds. Every 0.5 seconds, enemies in a large area around Loot Hoard take 23 damage and are Slowed by 20%.
fullText.HoggerHeadbanger|HoggerHeadbanger|Q|Leve: Enemy Heroes Stunned by Staggering Blow take an additional 8% of their maximum Health as damage and are Stunned for an additional 0.5 seconds.
fullText.HoggerHoardapult|HoggerHoardapult|Heroic: Launch an empowered Loot Hoard with Hogger attached, dealing 100 damage and Slowing enemies by 50% for 2 seconds.  Hoardapult's Loot Hoard lasts for up to 20 seconds, decaying rapidly while not nearby. Every 10 seconds Hogger can take a chunk of Meat from the Loot Hoard.
fullText.HoggerHoggersJoggers|HoggerHoggersJogger: While above 30 Rage, gain 10% increased Movement Speed and healing received.   When at or above 50 Rage, increase these bonuses to 15%.
fullText.HoggerJourneymanCooking|HoggerJourneyman: Each Hero hit by Ez-Thro Dynamite heals you for 8% of maximum Health.  Quest: Hitting Heroes with Ez-Thro Dynamite permanently increases your maximum Health by 10, to a maximum of 750 bonus Health.
fullText.HoggerKablooie|HoggerKablooie|W|Level16: Instant Ez-Thro Dynamite detonations deal 50% more damage, reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and increase its Slow amount to 50%.   Passive: Increase Ez-Thro Dynamite's range by 25%.
fullText.HoggerNoControl|HoggerNoControl|Active|L: Activate to cast an untalented Hogg Wild and begin chasing an enemy Hero. After reaching the Hero, bounce to a random nearby enemy Hero. Lasts up to 5 seconds, rapidly decaying if there are no other enemy Heroes nearby.  Cannot be cancelled.
fullText.HoggerOnTheProwl|HoggerOnTheProwl|Active: Activate to gain 30 Rage over 8 seconds.  Passive: You heal for 7 Health every second, increased by 2% per point of Rage.
fullText.HoggerPowerSpike|HoggerPowerSpike|Heroic: Hitting Heroes with Shockwave reduces their Armor by 15 for 4 seconds and grants 20 Rage.  Passive: Rage's cooldown reduction affects Shockwave's cooldown.
fullText.HoggerPummel|HoggerPummel|E|Level13: Enemies hit by Hogg Wild are Slowed by 10% for 2 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.   Heroes hit have their Spell Power reduced by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.HoggerSecretStash|HoggerSecretStash|Hero: Every 2 seconds, Hoardapults' Loot Hoard randomly launches Ez-Thro Dynamite, prioritizing nearby enemy Heroes.  Every 5 seconds, it also launches a chunk of Meat towards Hogger.
fullText.HoggerSeeingRed|HoggerSeeingRed|Passive|: While above 50 Rage, gain 35% Attack Speed and the cooldowns of Staggering Blow and Hogg Wild refresh 30% faster.
fullText.HoggerShockwave|HoggerShockwave|Heroic|L: After 0.5 seconds, slam the ground, sending out a shockwave that travels in a long line. Enemies hit by the initial slam take 335 damage and are Stunned for 1.5 seconds. Enemies only hit by the shockwave take 230 damage and are Stunned for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.IllidanBladesOfAzzinoth|IllidanBladesOfA: Hitting 5 Heroes with Sweeping Strike allows Blades of Azzinoth to be activated, increasing Basic Attack damage by 75% for 8 seconds.
fullText.IllidanCombatStyleHuntersOnslaught|Illid: Basic Abilities heal for 35% of the damage they deal. This bonus is doubled versus Heroes.
fullText.IllidanElusiveStrike|IllidanElusiveStrik: Sweeping Strike reduces the cooldown of Evasion by 3 seconds every time it damages an enemy Hero.
fullText.IllidanFieryBrand|IllidanFieryBrand|Pass: Every 3rd attack against the same Hero deals an additional 7% of their maximum Health as damage.
fullText.IllidanHeroicAbilityMetamorphosis|Illida: Transform into Demon Form at the target location, dealing 46 damage in the area. Temporarily increases maximum Health by 220 for each Hero hit by the initial impact. Lasts for 18 seconds.
fullText.IllidanHeroicAbilityTheHunt|IllidanTheHu: Charge to target unit, dealing 251 damage on impact and stunning for 1 second.
fullText.IllidanMasteryBatteredAssaultSweepingStr: Increase Sweeping Strike's Basic Attack damage bonus duration from 3 to 5 seconds. If Sweeping Strike hits 2 Heroes its damage bonus is increased from 35% to 125%.
fullText.IllidanMasteryDemonicFormMetamorphosis|I: Permanently remain in Demonic Form. Metamorphosis also increases Attack Speed by 20% and reduces the duration of Stuns, Roots, and Slows by 50%. Illidan can now mount in Demonic Form.
fullText.IllidanMasteryFriendOrFoeDive|IllidanDiv: Increases the range of Dive by 20% and allows it to be used to dive to allied Heroes.
fullText.IllidanMasteryImmolationSweepingStrike|I: After using Sweeping Strike, burn nearby enemies for 22 damage a second for 4 seconds.
fullText.IllidanMasteryMarkedforDeathDive|Illidan: Dive deals an extra 180 damage if used consecutively on a target within 10 seconds.
fullText.IllidanMasteryNowhereToHideTheHunt|Illid: The Hunt gains unlimited range. Illidan passively reveals enemy Heroes below 25% Health anywhere on the Battleground.
fullText.IllidanMasteryRapidChaseDive|IllidanDive: Dive grants 20% Movement Speed for 3 seconds. If the target is an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.IllidanMasterySixthSenseEvasion|IllidanE: While active, Evasion grants Illidan 75 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 75%.
fullText.IllidanMasteryUnboundSweepingStrike|Illi: Sweeping Strike can go over walls and terrain.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes with Sweeping Strike, gain a second charge.
fullText.IllidanNimbleDefender|IllidanNimbleDefen: If Sweeping Strike hits an enemy Hero, gain 25 Armor for 2 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
fullText.IllidanReflexiveBlock|IllidanEvasionRefl: Using Dive grants 75 Physical Armor against the next 3 Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
fullText.IllidanSweepingStrikesThirstingBlade|Ill: Betrayer's Thirst's healing from Basic Attacks is increased from 30% to 50% while Sweeping Strike's damage bonus is active.
fullText.IllidanUnendingHatredPassive|IllidanUnen: Quest: Minion kills grant 0.2 Basic Attack Damage. Hero Takedowns grant 1 Basic Attack Damage.  Reward: After gaining 20 increased Basic Attack Damage, receive an additional 20 Basic Attack Damage.
fullText.ImperiusAngelicArmamentsHeavenlyHost|Imp: Shields granted by Angelic Armaments no longer expire, and on initial activation, nearby allied Heroes gain a Shield that absorbs 600 damage.  If a Shield granted to an allied Hero lasts 3 seconds, it fires 1 sword at a nearby enemy, prioritizing closest Heroes, dealing 140 damage.
fullText.ImperiusAngelicArmaments|ImperiusAngelic: Summon a ring of blazing swords that grants 850 Shield for 3 seconds.  If the Shield lasts the full duration, this ability can be reactivated within 5 seconds to launch 6 swords toward an area, each dealing 140 damage to the first enemy hit.
fullText.ImperiusCelestialChargeCelestialSwiftnes: Gain 20% Movement Speed for 5 seconds after casting Celestial Charge. Gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds for each Hero Stunned with Celestial Charge.
fullText.ImperiusCelestialChargeFlashOfAnger|Impe: Consuming a mark from Celestial Charge deals 150 damage to the target and nearby enemies and grants Imperius a 250 point Shield for 4 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusCelestialChargeImpalingLight|Imp: Celestial Charge deals 150% more damage to Heroes, reduced by 25% for each additional Hero hit. For each Valorous Brand on the target when Celestial Charge's Stun completes, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.  Passive: Reduce Celestial Charge's cooldown by 1.5 seconds, and its Mana cost from 40 to 30.
fullText.ImperiusCelestialChargePatheticMortals|I: Stunning enemy Heroes with Celestial Charge reduces their Movement Speed by 25% and their damage by 50% for 4 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusHolyFervor|ImperiusHolyFervor|Ac: Activate to reset Imperius's Basic Attack cooldown and cause the next 4 Basic Attacks within 10 seconds to cleave for 30% additional damage.
fullText.ImperiusImpervious|ImperiusImpervious|Ac: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds. Hitting Heroes with the center of Solarion's Fire reduces this cooldown by 5 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusMoltenArmorDivineRage|ImperiusMo: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark reduces the cooldown of Molten Armor by 1 second.
fullText.ImperiusMoltenArmorHeatOfBattle|Imperius: Increase Molten Armor's healing against Heroes by 2% for every 1% Health Imperius is missing.
fullText.ImperiusMoltenArmorMeltingTouch|Imperius: Consuming a Molten Armor mark reduces the target's Armor by 25 for 4 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusMoltenArmorSovereignArmor|Imperi: Molten Armor grants 20 Armor for 1.5 seconds. Hitting an enemy Hero with Molten Armor extends the duration of this Armor by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusMoltenWrath|ImperiusMoltenWrath|: Molten Armor's radius is increased by 25%, and it always strikes 2 additional targets, even if there are Heroes in range.
fullText.ImperiusPressForward|ImperiusPressForwar: Gain 10 Armor while being healed by a Regeneration Globe. Damaging an enemy Hero sets the duration of an active Regeneration Globe on Imperius to 8 seconds (unless it is already higher).
fullText.ImperiusSolarionsFireBlazeOfGlory|Imperi: Solarion's Fire leaves a line of scorched earth along its center that explodes after 1.75 seconds for 212 damage, dealing bonus damage with Valorous Brand marks.
fullText.ImperiusSolarionsFireConsumingFlame|Impe: Increase the center damage of Solarion's Fire by an additional 125% and its Slow amount by 15%. The first enemy Hero hit with Solarion's Fire restores 30 Mana.
fullText.ImperiusValorousBrandBattleHunger|Imperi: Increase the healing of Valorous Brand by 80%.
fullText.ImperiusValorousBrandBrandOfSolarion|Imp: Reduce the duration of Valorous Brand to 5 seconds, but it is no longer consumed when triggered.
fullText.ImperiusValorousBrandBurnTheImpure|Imper: Consuming a Valorous Brand mark deals bonus damage equal to 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health.
fullText.ImperiusValorousPursuit|ImperiusValorous: Activate to teleport to an enemy that has been marked by Valorous Brand and gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusWrathOfTheAngirisUnrelentingDesc: Descending from the Heavens restores 30% of Imperius' maximum Health and Mana. Consuming a Valorous Brand reduces the cooldown of Wrath of the Angiris by 10 seconds.
fullText.ImperiusWrathOfTheAngiris|ImperiusWrathO: After 0.75 seconds, charge in the target direction, lifting the first enemy Hero hit into the Heavens. While in the air, Imperius can steer the landing location by moving.  After 2 seconds, slam the target into the ground, dealing 250 damage to them, increased by 20% for each Valorous Brand on the target when landing, and Stunning them for 1 second.
fullText.InescapableAnnihilation|InescapableAnnih: Globe of Annihilation can now be cast globally.
fullText.JainaBlizzardSnowstorm|JainaBlizzardSnow: The damage of the second wave of Blizzard is increased by 50%. The damage of the third wave is increased by 100%.
fullText.JainaBlizzardStormFront|JainaBlizzardSto: Increase the cast range of Blizzard by 75% and its radius by 30%.
fullText.JainaConeOfColdIceFloes|JainaConeOfColdI: Increase the width of Cone of Cold by 100% and cause each Hero hit to reduce its cooldown by 2 seconds, doubled against chilled Heroes, up to a maximum of 8 seconds per use.
fullText.JainaConeOfColdNorthernExposure|JainaCon: Enemies damaged by Cone of Cold have their Armor lowered by 25 for 2 seconds, increasing their damage taken by 25%.
fullText.JainaConeOfColdNumbingBlast|JainaConeOfC: Cone of Cold Roots Chilled targets for 0.75 seconds.
fullText.JainaFingersOfFrost|JainaFingersOfFrost|: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to increase Jaina's Mana regeneration by 0.1 per second, up to 2 per second.   Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, the damage bonus from Frostbite is increased by 10%.
fullText.JainaFrigidTransmission|JainaFrigidTrans: Activate to teleport a short distance and Chill all nearby enemies.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteArcaneIntellect|JainaFrost: Dealing damage to a Chilled target returns Mana to Jaina. Basic Attacks return 5 Mana and Abilities return 20.  Passive: While above 75% Mana, Jaina gains 10% Spell Power.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteDeepChill|JainaFrostbiteDe: Frostbite's Chill can now stack a second time, slowing targets up to 40%.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteFrostArmor|JainaFrostbiteF: Enemies that attack Jaina are Chilled. Additionally, every 10 seconds, Jaina gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteIceBarrier|JainaFrostbiteI: Gain a Shield for 25% of Ability damage dealt to Chilled targets. The shield lasts 4 seconds.
fullText.JainaFrostbiteLingeringChill|JainaFrostb: Increase the duration of Chill from 4 seconds to 6 seconds.
fullText.JainaFrostboltFrostShards|JainaFrostbolt: Frostbolt will now pierce the first two targets.
fullText.JainaFrostboltIceLance|JainaFrostboltIce: Hitting a Chilled target with Frostbolt reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and restores 10 Mana.
fullText.JainaFrostboltWintersReach|JainaFrostbol: Increase the range and travel speed of Frostbolt by 30%.
fullText.JainaHeroicRingOfFrost|JainaRingOfFrost|: After a 1.5 second delay, create a Ring of Frost in an area that deals 310 damage and Roots enemies for 3 seconds. The ring persists for 3 seconds afterward, Chilling any enemies who touch it.
fullText.JainaHeroicSummonWaterElemental|JainaSum: Summon a Water Elemental at target location. The Water Elemental's Basic Attacks deal 62 damage, splash for 25% damage and Chill. The Ability can be reactivated to retarget the Water Elemental. Loses Health over 32 seconds.
fullText.JainaIcefuryWand|JainaIcefuryWand|Passiv: Basic Attacks against Chilled enemies deal 50% more damage and lower the cooldown of Blizzard by 1.25 seconds. Doubled against enemy Heroes.
fullText.JainaIcyVeins|JainaIcyVeinsHotbar|Active: Activate to make Jaina's Basic Abilities' cooldowns recharge 200% faster and reduce their Mana cost by 50% for 5 seconds.
fullText.JainaRingOfFrostColdSnap|JainaRingOfFros: The center area of Ring of Frost deals 310 damage and Roots enemies after the outer ring expires. Each enemy Hero hit reduces its cooldown by 15 seconds.
fullText.JainaSummonWaterElementalWintermute|Jain: Increases the cast range of Water Elemental by 40%, and the Water Elemental will now mimic Jaina's Basic Abilities for 40% damage.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineBlowEmUp|JunkratBlo: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine or Steel Trap causes Junkrat to deal 25% more damage with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities for 6 seconds.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineBoggedDown|JunkratB: Enemies launched by Concussion Mine are Slowed by 40% for 2.5 seconds upon landing.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineBOOMPOW|JunkratBOOM: Hitting an enemy Hero with Concussion Mine reduces its cooldown by 10 seconds.
fullText.JunkratConcussionMineRipperAir|JunkratRi: Junkrat is knocked back 50% farther by Concussion Mine. Additionally, Concussion Mine's cooldown is reduced by 12 seconds if only Junkrat is hit.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherBombsAwayTalent|Junkr: Increase Junkrat's Basic Attack range by 1. Frag Launcher grenades fired within 0.5 seconds of using a Basic Attack deal 30% bonus damage.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherBurstFire|JunkratBurs: Frag Launcher fires all of its charges in a continuous burst, its cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds, but it loses 1 maximum charge.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherCannonball|JunkratCan: Increase the radius and explosion radius of grenades from Basic Attacks and Frag Launcher by 50%.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherEndlessNades|JunkratE: Hitting an enemy Hero with Frag Launcher reduces its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherExtraWoundTimers|Junk: The final grenade launched from Frag Launcher deals 100% bonus damage, and Frag Launcher grenades last an additional 2 seconds before automatically detonating.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherSpreadVolley|JunkratS: Activate to make Frag Launcher fire 2 additional grenades in a spread. Works for up to 4 total charges, or until Frag Launcher runs out of charges.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherTasteForExplosions|Ju: Quest: Hitting a Hero with Frag Launcher increases its damage by 0.2%, up to 40%.
fullText.JunkratFragLauncherTrickyShuffles|Junkra: While Frag Launcher has no charges left, Junkrat gains 10% Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks deal 15% bonus damage.
fullText.JunkratIHateWaitingTalent|JunkratIHateWa: Junkrat always rides his Rocket Ride Mount, which grants 150% increased Movement Speed, but his Mount cooldown is increased to 8 seconds.
fullText.JunkratRIPTireExtraOomph|JunkratExtraOom: Increase RIP-Tire's knockback distance by 80%, and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds for each enemy Hero hit.
fullText.JunkratRIPTire|JunkratRIPTire|Heroic|Lev: Create a motorized bomb with 530 Health that lasts 15 seconds. While active, Junkrat is immobile but gains control of RIP-Tire's movement.  RIP-Tire can be reactivated to detonate immediately, knocking nearby enemies back and dealing 720 damage to enemies near the center gradually reduced to 445 to enemies on the edge.
fullText.JunkratRocketRidePuckishScamp|JunkratPuc: Junkrat also gains the Ability RIP-Tire. Each time he uses his Heroic, it swaps to the alternate ability.  Passive: Reduce both Heroic cooldowns by 20 seconds.
fullText.JunkratRocketRide|JunkratRocketRide|Hero: After 1.25 seconds, Junkrat launches into the air. While in the air, he can steer the landing location by moving.  After 3.75 seconds, Junkrat lands, dealing 935 damage to nearby enemies and activating Total Mayhem. 5 seconds after landing, Junkrat reappears at the Hall of Storms and gains 150% additional Movement Speed until dismounted.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapBigAs|JunkratBigAsSteelT: Steel Trap now only hits Heroes, and Heroes hit have their Armor reduced by 15 for 3 seconds. Increases Steel Trap's radius and damage by 50%.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapChatteringTeeth|JunkratC: Steel Traps will slowly chase nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapGottaTrapEmAll|JunkratGo: Reduce Steel Trap's cooldown by 5 seconds and increase the maximum number of active traps to 2.
fullText.JunkratSteelTrapStickyWicket|JunkratStic: Enemy Heroes who are hit by Steel Trap are Silenced for 2 seconds.
fullText.JunkratTotalMayhemDirtyTricksterTalent|J: Increase the explosion radius of Total Mayhem by 20%. When Junkrat is Stunned, Rooted, or damaged by an enemy Hero while below 50% Health, he uses Total Mayhem, dropping 5 grenades at his feet that explode.   This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeBurnedFlesh|KaelthasB: When Flamestrike damages 2 or more Heroes, they take additional damage equal to 8% of their maximum Health.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeConvection|KaelthasFl: Repeatable Quest: Hit 20 enemy Heroes with Flamestrike without dying.  Repeatable Reward: Permanently increases Flamestrike damage by 200, and Kael'thas's maximum Health by 100.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeFuryOfTheSunwell|Kael: Flamestrike will explode a second time 1.5 seconds later.
fullText.KaelthasFlamestrikeManaTap|KaelthasManaT: Activating Verdant Spheres restores 5% of Kael'thas's maximum Mana.
fullText.KaelthasGravityLapseEnergyRoil|KaelthasG: Reduce the Mana cost of Gravity Lapse by 70. If Gravity Lapse hits a Hero, reduce its cooldown by 8 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasGravityLapseNetherWind|KaelthasG: Increases Gravity Lapse's range by 30%. When Gravity Lapse hits an enemy Hero, refund 80 Mana.
fullText.KaelthasHeroicAbilityPhoenix|KaelthasPho: Launch a Phoenix to an area, dealing 84 damage to enemies along the way. The Phoenix persists for 7 seconds, attacking enemies for 84 damage and splashing for 42 damage.
fullText.KaelthasHeroicAbilityPyroblast|KaelthasP: After 1.5 seconds, cast a slow-moving fireball that deals 810 damage to an enemy Hero and 405 damage to enemies nearby.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombBackdraft|KaelthasLivi: Living Bomb's explosion slows enemy Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombFissionBomb|KaelthasLi: Increases Living Bomb's explosion radius by 20%.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombIgnite|KaelthasLivingB: Flamestrikes apply Living Bomb to the enemy Hero closest to its center who is not currently affected by Living Bomb.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombPyromaniac|KaelthasLiv: Each time Living Bomb deals periodic damage, Kael'thas's Basic Ability cooldowns are reduced by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasLivingBombSunKingsFury|KaelthasL: Living Bombs that have spread to enemy Heroes deal 35% more damage.
fullText.KaelthasManaAddict|KaelthasManaAddictTal: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Kael'thas's maximum Mana by 15.  Reward: After gathering 20 Globes, Kael'thas can activate Arcane Barrier to gain a Shield equal to 100% of his maximum Mana for 4 seconds. 45 second cooldown.
fullText.KaelthasMasterOfFlames|KaelthasMasterOfF: Living Bomb's spread from explosions can now also spread Living Bomb.
fullText.KaelthasMasteryFlamethrower|KaelthasFlam: Increases the cast range of Flamestrike by 40%. If Flamestrike hits 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasMasterySunfireEnchantment|Kaelth: Activating Verdant Spheres causes Kael'thas's next 2 Basic Attacks to instead deal 115 Spell Damage. If both of these Attacks hit enemy Heroes, gain 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasPhoenixRebirth|KaelthasPhoenixRe: Increases Phoenix duration by 100%. While alive, the Phoenix may be ordered to move to a different location. Stores 3 charges.
fullText.KaelthasPyroblastPresenceOfMind|Kaelthas: Increases Pyroblast's explosion radius by 50%. Heroes that are hit by Flamestrike or have Living Bomb spread to them reduce the cooldown of Pyroblast by 10 seconds.
fullText.KaelthasTwinSpheres|KaelthasVerdantSpher: Verdant Spheres gains a second charge.  Passive: Kael'thas benefits from all of his level 7 talents.
fullText.KaelthasVerdantSpheresFelInfusion|Kaelth: Increases Kael'thas's Spell Power by 4%. Kael'thas heals for 94 Health when activating Verdant Spheres.
fullText.KelThuzadAcceleratedDecay|KelThuzadAccel: Each time a Hero is hit by Death and Decay's pool, they take 25% more periodic damage from Death and Decay for the next 4 seconds, stacking up to 4 times.
fullText.KelThuzadArcaneEchoes|KelThuzadArcaneEch: Whenever Kel'Thuzad hits an enemy Hero with Death and Decay's explosion, its cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadArchlichArmor|KelThuzadArchlich: Activate to gain 50 Physical Armor for 4 seconds. Upon activation, nearby enemies take 45 damage and are Slowed by 35% for 4 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadBarbedChains|KelThuzadBarbedCha: Increase Chains of Kel'Thuzad damage by 125%. After gaining 30 Blight, Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces the Armor of pulled Heroes by 10 for 4 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadBlightedFrost|KelThuzadBlighted: Frost Nova deals 75% more damage to enemies in the center. After gaining 30 Blight, increase Frost Nova's Root duration by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadChainLink|KelThuzadChainLink|E|: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad reduces its cooldown by 5 seconds and refunds its Mana cost.
fullText.KelThuzadChainsOfIce|KelThuzadChainsOfIc: After Chains of Kel'Thuzad's Stun expires, the enemy is also Slowed by 60% for 1 second.
fullText.KelThuzadChillingTouch|KelThuzadChilling: Every 8 seconds, Kel'Thuzad's next Basic Attack hits all enemies in the area for 80%  additional damage, deals Spell damage instead of Physical, and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadDeathchill|KelThuzadDeathchill|: When Frost Blast's Root expires, enemies are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds. Heroes killed while under the effects of Frost Blast instantly release another Frost Blast explosion.
fullText.KelThuzadFrozenTomb|KelThuzadFrozenTomb|: Launch a meteor of ice at an enemy Hero. Upon impact, the meteor deals 115 damage to its target and 275 damage to enemies in the area. All enemies hit by Frost Blast are Rooted for 2 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadHungeringCold|KelThuzadHungerin: Enemies that are Rooted take an additional 55 damage each time they are damaged by Kel'Thuzad.
fullText.KelThuzadIceCold|KelThuzadIceCold|Passiv: Reduce the cooldown of Glacial Spike by 10 seconds and increase its damage by 400%.
