fullText.KelThuzadIcyGrasp|KelThuzadIcyGrasp|W|Le: Increase Frost Nova's Slow by 20%. Each time Kel'Thuzad damages enemies Slowed by Frost Nova, reduce the cooldown of Frost Nova by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadMightOfTheScourge|KelThuzadMigh: If a Hero is hit with Shadow Fissure, a second one is cast below them 1 second later. This second cast will not duplicate itself.
fullText.KelThuzadPhylactery|KelThuzadPhylactery|: Quest: Collect 12 Regeneration Globes to charge Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery.  Reward: Kel'Thuzad's Phylactery can be activated while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms, but must be charged again.  Passive: Kel'Thuzad heals for 10% of all Spell Damage dealt while the Phylactery is charged.
fullText.KelThuzadPowerOfIcecrown|KelThuzadPowerO: Stunning, Rooting, or Slowing a Hero grants 6% Spell Power for 10 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
fullText.KelThuzadShadowFissure|KelThuzadShadowFi: Create a fissure anywhere on the Battleground that explodes after 1.5 seconds, dealing 320 damage to enemy Heroes in its area. If an enemy Hero is hit, set its cooldown to 1.5 seconds.
fullText.KelThuzadShiftingMalice|KelThuzadShiftin: Activate to dash forward, dealing 150 damage to enemies in the path. Takedowns reset the cooldown of Shifting Malice.
fullText.KelThuzadStripShields|KelThuzadStripShie: Pulling a Hero with Chains of Kel'Thuzad grants Kel'Thuzad a permanent 128 Shield, stacking up to 2 times.  Additionally, Chains of Kel'Thuzad deals up to 270 bonus damage to Heroes' Shields.
fullText.KelThuzadTheDamnedReturn|KelThuzadTheDam: Activate to create a Shade of Naxxramas that lasts 15 seconds and mimics Kel'Thuzad's casts of Death and Decay.
fullText.KelThuzadThePlaguelands|KelThuzadThePlag: Increase Death and Decay's duration by 1 second. After gaining 30 Blight, increase the radius of Death and Decay's pool by 30%.
fullText.KerriganAssimilationAssimilationBlades|K: Damaging an enemy increases Basic Attack damage by 2% for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
fullText.KerriganAssimilationMastery|KerriganAssi: Regeneration Globe healing grants 50 points of Assimilation Shields per second while active. While Assimilation is active, Kerrigan's Health and Mana regeneration is increased by 150%.
fullText.KerriganAssimilationVolatilePower|Kerrig: Increase the amount of Assimilation Shields granted from damage dealt by 10%, but reduce duration of Assimilation by 3 seconds.
fullText.KerriganBladedMomentum|KerriganBladedMom: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Kerrigan's Basic Abilities by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.KerriganChrysalis|KerriganChrysalis|Acti: Activate to place Kerrigan in a Chrysalis with 650 Health for 5 seconds. While inside, Kerrigan regenerates 4% of her maximum Health per second.  Enemies can destroy the Chrysalis to end its effects early.
fullText.KerriganFuryOfTheSwarm|KerriganAssimilat: After casting Ravage, Kerrigan's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds splashes for 100% damage around the target.
fullText.KerriganHeroicAbilityMaelstrom|KerriganM: Deals 74 damage per second to nearby enemies. Lasts for 7 seconds.
fullText.KerriganHeroicAbilitySummonUltralisk|Ker: After 0.5 seconds, summon an Ultralisk that rushes forward upon spawning, dealing 225 damage to the first enemy Hero hit and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.  The Ultralisk's Basic Attacks deal 50% of their damage in an area around their target. Reactivate to retarget the Ultralisk.
fullText.KerriganImpalingBladesKineticFulmination: Damaging an enemy increases the damage of Kerrigan's next Impaling Blades within 10 seconds by 10%, up to 100%.
fullText.KerriganImpalingBladesPainfulSpikes|Kerr: Enemies hit by Impaling Blades take an additional 60 damage the next 6 times Kerrigan damages them within 5 seconds.
fullText.KerriganOmegastormMaelstrom|KerriganMael: Maelstrom's duration is increased by 0.4 seconds every time it damages a Hero.
fullText.KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicBarrier|Kerrig: Each enemy Hero hit by Primal Grasp grants 20 Spell Armor and 4% Movement Speed for 4 seconds, stacking up to 20% Movement Speed.
fullText.KerriganPrimalGraspPsionicPulse|Kerrigan: Primal Grasp explodes a second time 2 seconds after its first explosion.
fullText.KerriganPsionicShift|KerriganPsionicShif: Activate to teleport to a nearby location, dealing 50 damage to nearby enemies. Generates 300% increased Assimilation Shields from the damage dealt.
fullText.KerriganRavageBoundlessFury|KerriganRava: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants a charge of Ravage. Can only occur once every 12 seconds per Hero.
fullText.KerriganRavageMountingPotency|KerriganRa: Ravage grants 5% Spell Power for 5 seconds, up to 40%.
fullText.KerriganRavageQueenOfBlades|KerriganRava: Reduce the cooldown of Ravage by 4 seconds and increase its damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 100%.
fullText.KerriganRavageRavagingFerocity|KerriganR: Ravage grants Kerrigan 25% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.KerriganRavageSiphoningImpact|KerriganRa: Hitting an enemy Hero with Ravage grants 100 points of Assimilation Shields.
fullText.KerriganTorrasqueSummonUltralisk|Kerriga: Increase the Health and Basic Attack damage of the Ultralisk by 20%. The Ultralisk morphs into an egg when it dies. If the egg isn't killed within 4 seconds, a new Ultralisk is born.
fullText.KerriganUnbridledEnergy|KerriganUnbridle: Damaging a Hero with a Heroic Ability grants 35% Spell Power for 4 seconds.
fullText.L90ETCMasteryDeathMetal|L90ETCDeathMetal: Upon dying, a ghost uses Mosh Pit at E.T.C's location.
fullText.L90ETCMasteryFaceMeltLoudSpeakers|L90ETC: Increases Face Melt range and knockback by 50%.
fullText.L90ETCMasteryFaceMeltPinballWizard|ETCPi: Hitting an enemy with Powerslide causes the next Face Melt against them within 2 seconds to deal 300% more damage.
fullText.L90ETCMasteryMoshPitTourBus|L90ETCMoshPi: Channeling Mosh Pit refreshes Powerslide's cooldown, and it can be cast to increase Mosh Pit's duration by 2 seconds.
fullText.L90ETCMasteryStageDiveCrowdPleaser|ETCSt: Stage Dive's impact area is 50% bigger, and its Slow is increased by 30%.
fullText.L90ETCPoweroftheHorde|L90ETCPoweroftheHo: Activate to grant nearby allied Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 30% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds, increased by 2% for each other allied Hero in the area.
fullText.L90ETCRidetheLightning|L90ETCRidetheLigh: Activate to teleport to a nearby location and deal 48 damage to nearby enemy Heroes. The cooldown is reduced by 10 second for every enemy Hero hit, up to 50 seconds.
fullText.LeoricBurningDespairTalent|LeoricBurning: Deal 40 damage per second to nearby enemies.   While Drain Hope is active, gain 40 Armor and the damage and area is increased by 100%.
fullText.LeoricDrainHopeCrushingHopeTalent|Leoric: If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, it instantly deals an additional 15% of the target's maximum Health as damage. This damage does not heal Leoric.
fullText.LeoricHeroicAbilityEntomb|LeoricEntomb|H: Create an unpassable tomb for 4 seconds.
fullText.LeoricHeroicAbilityMarchoftheBlackKing|L: Leoric becomes Unstoppable and walks forward, swinging his mace 3 times. Enemies hit take 250 damage, and Heroes hit heal Leoric for 12% of his maximum Health.
fullText.LeoricMasteryBuriedAliveEntomb|LeoricBur: The duration of Entomb is lowered by 1 second, but enemies trapped inside are Silenced and take 50 damage every 1 second.
fullText.LeoricMasteryConsumeVitalitySkeletalSwin: Skeletal Swing's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit heal Leoric for 4% of his maximum Health.
fullText.LeoricMasteryDeathMarchMarchoftheBlackKi: The final swing of March of the Black King also applies Drain Hope to nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.LeoricMasteryDrainMomentumDrainHope|Leor: Drain Hope no longer reduces Leoric's Movement Speed. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, gain 30% Movement Speed for 4 seconds.
fullText.LeoricMasteryFealtyUntoDeathUndying|Leor: When a nearby friendly or enemy Minion dies, Leoric restores 32 Health and 6 Mana.
fullText.LeoricMasteryGhastlyReachSkeletalSwing|L: Increase the range of Skeletal Swing by 25%.
fullText.LeoricMasteryHopelessnessDrainHope|Leori: Increase the range of Drain Hope by 25%.
fullText.LeoricMasteryOsseinRenewal|LeoricOsseinR: Activate to heal Leoric for 30% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. Regeneration Globes lower the cooldown of this Ability by 20 seconds.
fullText.LeoricMasteryParalyzingRageSkeletalSwing: Increase the Slow of Skeletal Swing by 20%.
fullText.LeoricMasteryRoyalFocusWraithWalk|Leoric: Wraith Walk increases the damage of the next Skeletal Swing within 5 seconds by 50%. Each enemy Hero hit by Skeletal Swing reduces the cooldown of Wraith Walk by 7 seconds.
fullText.LeoricMasterySpectralLeech|LeoricSpectra: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage to the primary target damage equal 2.5% of the Hero's maximum Health and heal Leoric for 200% of the bonus damage dealt.
fullText.LeoricMasteryUnyieldingDespairDrainHope|: Drain Hope's cooldown is reduced by 0.75 seconds for every 1 second it is active. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, its cooldown is reduced by an additional 2 seconds.
fullText.LeoricMasteryWillingVesselDrainHope|Leor: Increase the healing from Drain Hope to 25% of Leoric's maximum Health. If Drain Hope lasts its full duration, Leoric instantly heals for an additional 5% of his maximum Health.
fullText.LeoricMithrilMaceTalent|LeoricMithrilMac: Increase Leoric's Attack Speed by 20%.  Repeatable Quest: Nearby enemy Minion deaths grant 0.3% permanent Attack Speed, and Takedowns grant 3% permanent Attack Speed, up to 30%.
fullText.LeoricShroudoftheDeadKingTalent|LeoricSh: Activate to become Protected for 3 seconds, preventing all damage.
fullText.LeoricSkeletalSwingKneelPeasantsTalent|L: Skeletal Swing deals 75% additional damage to Mercenaries and Monsters, and hitting them activates Skeletal Swing's cost and cooldown refund.
fullText.LeoricWraithWalkOminousWraithTalent|Leor: Increase Wraith Walk's duration by 100%. Enemy Heroes that come in contact with the wraith deal 50% less damage for 4 seconds.
fullText.LiLiBlessingsOfYulon|LiLiBlessingsOfYulo: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased healing received and heals them for an additional 0.5% of their maximum Health each time it attacks.
fullText.LiLiEagerAdventurer|LiLiEagerAdventurer|: Increase Fast Feet's duration by 150% and increase Mana regeneration by 150% while Fast Feet is active.
fullText.LiLiFreeDrinks|LiLiFreeDrinks|Q|Level1: When Healing Brew heals a Hero under 50% Health, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second, and its Mana cost is refunded.
fullText.LiLiHeroicAbilityJugof1000Cups|LiLiJugof: Channel for up to 6 seconds. Every 0.25 seconds, increase the cooldown of Jug of 1,000 Cups by 2 seconds, up to 50 additional seconds, and heal the lowest Health nearby allied Hero for 75 Health.
fullText.LiLiHeroicAbilityWaterDragon|LiLiWaterDr: Li Li channels for 2 seconds, summoning a Water Dragon that hits the nearest enemy Hero within 12 range and all enemies near them, dealing 300 damage and slowing their Movement Speed by 70% for 4 seconds.
fullText.LiLiHinderingWinds|LiLiHinderingWinds|E|: Increase Blinding Wind's Slow amount to 30% and its duration to 2 seconds.
fullText.LiLiLetsGo|LiLiLetsGo|Active|Level7: Activate to heal an allied Hero for 160 and make them Unstoppable for 1 second. Let's Go's cooldown is affected by Fast Feet.  Cannot be used on Li Li.
fullText.LiLiMasteryBlindingWindGaleForce|LiLiBli: Increase Blinding Wind's Blind duration by 0.75 seconds. Li Li's Basic Attacks against Blinded Heroes deal 100% increased damage.
fullText.LiLiMasteryBlindingWindMassVortex|LiLiBl: Increase the number of enemies hit by Blinding Wind from 2 to 3. Blinding Wind deals 75% more damage when it targets 3 Heroes.
fullText.LiLiMasteryBlindingWindSurgingWinds|LiLi: If Blinding Wind targets 2 or more Heroes, its cooldown is instantly reduced by 2 seconds and Li Li gains 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
fullText.LiLiMasteryCloudSerpentLightningSerpent|: Cloud Serpent attacks bounce to hit 2 additional targets for 13 damage and 10 healing.
fullText.LiLiMasteryCloudSerpentSerpentSidekick|L: Cloud Serpent no longer costs Mana and while Fast Feet is active its cooldown refreshes an additional 75% faster.
fullText.LiLiMasteryFastFeetSafetySprint|LiLiSafe: Activate to gain Fast Feet, 30 Armor, and 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.  Passive: While Fast Feet is active, Li Li gains 10 Armor.
fullText.LiLiMasteryHealingBrewTheGoodStuff|LiLiH: Healing Brew heals for an additional 42 over 3 seconds. While Fast Feet is active, this heal amount is increased by 100%.
fullText.LiLiMasteryHealingBrewTwoForOne|LiLiHeal: Increases the number of allies healed by Healing Brew to 2, but increases the cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.LiLiMasteryJugof1000CupsJugof1000000Cups: Jug of 1,000 Cups heals two allies at a time.
fullText.LiLiMasteryWaterDragonDoubleDragon|LiLiW: After hitting a target with Water Dragon, another Water Dragon is summoned at the point of impact.
fullText.LiLiMistweaver|LiLiMistweaver|Active|Lev: Activate to heal nearby allied Heroes for 149. Basic Attacks and Cloud Serpent attacks reduce the cooldown of Mistweaver by 1 second.
fullText.LiLiPickMeUp|LiLiPickMeUp|Q|Level16: Healing Brew heals for 33% more when the target is under 50% Health.
fullText.LiLiShakeItOff|LiLiShakeItOffTalent|Trai: While Stunned, Silenced, or Rooted and for 2 seconds afterwards, Li Li gains 35 Armor.  Passive: Increase Fast Feet's cooldown refresh rate to 75%.
fullText.LiLiWindSerpent|LiLiWindSerpent|W|Level4: Cloud Serpent grants its bearer 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Blinding Wind increases this bonus to 20% for 3 seconds.   Passive: Cloud Serpent attacks 25% faster.
fullText.LostVikingsGoGoGo64KBMarathon|LostViking: Activating Go Go Go! grants an additional 40% Movement Speed and breaks the Vikings out of Roots and Slows.
fullText.LostVikingsHeroicAbilityLongboatRaid|Los: Hop into an Unstoppable Longboat that fires at nearby enemies for 128 damage per second and can fire a mortar that deals 228 damage in an area.  The boat has increased Health for each Viking inside. If the boat is destroyed by enemies, all Vikings are Stunned for 1 second. Lasts 15 seconds.  Requires all surviving Vikings to be nearby.
fullText.LostVikingsHeroicAbilityPlayAgain|LostVi: Summon, fully heal, and revive all Lost Vikings at target location after a Viking channels for 2 seconds.   Only one Viking may attempt to summon at a time.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryBaleogTheFierce|LostVi: Increase Baleog's attack range by 2.5. While near Olaf and Erik, he becomes inspired by the power of teamwork and his Attack Speed is increased by 50%.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryCheckpointReached|Lost: 10 seconds after using Play Again!, any dead Vikings are revived and summoned again, and all are healed to full.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryErikTheSwift|LostVikin: Permanently increases Erik's base Movement Speed by 10%, and as long as Erik is moving he heals 34 Health per second.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryExplosiveAttacks|LostV: Baleog's Basic Attack splash damage against non-Heroes is no longer reduced by 50%.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryHunkaBurningOlaf|LostV: Olaf deals 34 damage every second to nearby enemies.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryImpatienceIsAVirtue|Lo: Enemies damaged by a Viking's Basic Attack reduce the cooldown of all Viking Abilities by 0.3125 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryItsASabotage|LostVikin: Erik's Basic Attacks against Structures light them on fire for 3 seconds, causing 225 damage.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryJump|LostVikingsJump|W: Makes all Vikings Invulnerable and able to pass over enemies for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryLargeAndInCharge|LostV: When Olaf charges enemies, they are stunned for 1 second.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryNordicAttackSquad|Lost: While Olaf, Baleog, and Erik are near each of the other two Vikings, their Basic Attacks deal bonus damage equal to 1.25% maximum Health to enemy Heroes.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryNorseForce|LostVikings: All Vikings gain a 140 to 308 point Shield, increasing in strength for each Viking alive. Lasts 4 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryOlafTheStout|LostVikin: Passive: Olaf gains 20% bonus maximum Health.  Every 5 seconds, Olaf gains 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryPainDontHurt|LostVikin: Baleog's Basic Attacks and splash damage heal for 20% of the damage dealt. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
fullText.LostVikingsMasterySpinToWin|LostVikingsS: Activate to have each Viking deal 85 damage to nearby enemies.  Deals 100% bonus damage to enemy Heroes.
fullText.LostVikingsMasterySpyGames|LostVikingsSp: After standing still for 3 seconds, Erik gains Stealth and his Sight Radius is increased by 75%. The Stealth persists for 3 seconds after moving and once removed, Erik gains 75% bonus Basic Attack damage for 6 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryTheSequel|LostVikingsT: Reduces the Lost Vikings's death timer by 50%.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryVikingBribery|LostViki: Enemy Minions or captured Mercenaries killed near The Lost Vikings grant stacks of Bribe. Use 40 stacks to bribe target Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum stacks available: 200.
fullText.LostVikingsMasteryWereOnABoat|LostViking: The Longboat can attack two targets at once and the range of its Mortar is increased by 100%. Reduce Longboat Raid!'s cooldown by 30 seconds.
fullText.LostVikingsTalentFuryoftheStorm|LostViki: Every 5 seconds, the next Basic Attack will deal an additional 41 damage to the target, and 105 damage to all nearby Minions, Mercenaries and Monsters. Each Viking has their own cooldown.
fullText.LucioAmpItUpRejuvenescencia|LucioAmpItUp: While Amp It Up is active, Crossfade's Healing Boost heals for an additional 2.5% of the target's maximum Health each second.
fullText.LucioAmpItUpUpTheFrequency|LucioAmpItUpU: Hitting enemy Heroes with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Amp It Up by 0.3 seconds.  Passive: Wall Ride increases Basic Attack range by 2.2.
fullText.LucioAmpItUpUpToEleven|LucioAmpItUpUpToE: Hitting an enemy Hero with Soundwave or Push Off increases the duration of Amp It Up.  Soundwave grants 0.5 seconds and Push Off grants 1 second. If Amp It Up is not active, these bonuses are granted to its next activation, up to 3 seconds.  Passive: Increase the duration of Amp It Up by 1 second.
fullText.LucioBoombox|LucioBoomboxBoombox|Active|: Place a boombox that plays Lúcio's active Crossfade track. Its volume adjusts with Amp It Up. Allied Heroes near the boombox gain 5 Armor.  Crossfade tracks from Lúcio and the Boombox do not stack.
fullText.LucioCrossfadeAllTogetherTalent|LucioCro: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 5% Movement Speed that stacks with other bonuses.
fullText.LucioCrossfadeMixingFire|LucioHighFiveMi: High Five can now be cast on enemy Heroes, dealing 160 damage and reducing all healing received by 50% for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cost and cooldown of High Five by 30%.
fullText.LucioCrossfadePartyMixQuest|LucioCrossfa: Quest: Play Lúcio's Crossfade tracks to nearby allies. Multiple allies provide additional time.  Reward: For every 1 Minute played, permanently increase Lúcio's maximum Mana by 10.  Reward: Once you have played for 8 minutes or more, permanently increase Crossfade's radius by 20%.
fullText.LucioHighFive|LucioHighFive|Heroic|Level: Quickly skate to an allied Hero. Upon arrival the ally is healed for 230, Lúcio is healed for 80, and both gain Unstoppable for 1 second.
fullText.LucioItemSummerAnthem|LucioItemSummerAnt: Activate for allies affected by Crossfade to become Unkillable for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.LucioPassiveHouseParty|LucioPassiveHouse: For each ally affected by Crossfade, Lúcio gains 8% increased healing.
fullText.LucioPassiveSmoothMoves|LucioPassiveSmoo: While Wall Ride is active, Basic Attacks heal for 30% of the damage dealt and restore 0.5 Mana.  Passive: Increase Wall Ride duration by 1 second.
fullText.LucioPushOffHeavyCasters|LucioPushOffHea: Push Off no longer Slows the first Hero hit, and instead Stuns them for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.LucioPushOffSupersonic|LucioPushOffSuper: While Wall Ride is active, Push Off's cooldown recharges 100% faster.
fullText.LucioReverseAmp|LucioReverseAmp|W|Level7: Blast Lúcio's active Crossfade track at enemy Heroes. While Amp It Up is active, Healing Boost deals 50 damage per second and Speed Boost Slows by 20%.  This ability is unaffected by Crossfade talents.
fullText.LucioSoundBarrierBossaNova|LucioSoundBar: Reduce the cooldown of Sound Barrier to 30 seconds, but the Shield now decays over 4 seconds.
fullText.LucioSoundBarrier|LucioSoundBarrier|Hero: After 1 second, Lúcio and nearby allied Heroes gain a 1296 point Shield that rapidly decays over 6 seconds.
fullText.LucioSoundwaveGoodVibrations|LucioSoundw: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave grants Lúcio a 38 Shield for 8 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes grants 3 times this amount.
fullText.LucioSoundwaveOffTheWall|LucioSoundwaveO: Hitting an enemy with Soundwave while Wall Ride is active sets its cooldown to 5 seconds and refunds 15 Mana.
fullText.LucioSoundwaveSubwoofer|LucioSoundwaveSu: Enemies within the first half of Soundwave's range are knocked back 75% further.  Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Soundwave.  Reward: Increase Soundwave's arc by 50% and its range by 20%.
fullText.LucioWallRideAccelerando|LucioWallRideAc: Wall Ride's Movement Speed bonus gradually increases to 40% over 6 seconds while Lúcio maintains its effect.
fullText.LucioWallRideSlip|LucioWallRideSlip|Z|Le: While Wall Ride is active, passing near an enemy Hero increases its Movement Speed bonus to 40%, and grants 15 Armor, for 1 second.
fullText.MaievArmoredAssault|MaievArmoredAssault|: While Maiev has positive Armor of any kind, all Physical Damage dealt is increased by 25%.
fullText.MaievContainmentDisc|MaievContainmentDis: Throw a glaive in the target direction. If an enemy Hero is hit, Containment Disc can be reactivated to remove their vision and Time Stop them for 4 seconds. Leaving Containment Silences the enemy Hero for 1.5 seconds.  Containment Disc automatically activates 6 seconds after hitting a Hero.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnivesBladeDance|MaievFanOfKni: Using Fan of Knives deals 50 Physical Damage to enemies around Maiev.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnivesBladedArmor|MaievFanOfKn: Each enemy Hero hit by Fan of Knives grants 5 Armor for 5 seconds, up to 20 Armor.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnivesElunesWrath|MaievFanOfKn: Hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives causes the next Fan of Knives to drop a star on targets that deals 77 damage when it impacts.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnivesNaishasMemento|MaievFanO: Activate to make primary Basic Attacks bounce between nearby enemies up to 2 times. Lasts 8 seconds.  Recharge Naisha's Memento by hitting at least 2 Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.
fullText.MaievFanOfKnivesPinDown|MaievFanOfKnives: Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives.  Reward: Increase Fan of Knives damage by 35%.  Reward: Each additional time 3 enemy Heroes are hit by a single Fan of Knives, gain an additional 5% damage, up to 50%.  Reward: Hit 4 enemy Heroes with a single Fan of Knives to instantly gain all Rewards.
fullText.MaievShadowOrbHuntress|MaievShadowOrbHun: Activate to increase Movement Speed and Attack Speed by 40% for 5 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Physical Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
fullText.MaievShadowOrbShadowStrike|MaievShadowOr: Activate to deal 75 damage to an enemy Hero, Slowing them by 30% and reducing their Armor by 20 for 4 seconds.  Recharge Shadow Orb by dealing Spell Damage to enemy Heroes 10 times.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceRuthlessSpirit|Mai: Each enemy Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance increases all damage Maiev deals by 15% for 4 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceShadowArmor|MaievS: Blink grants 20 Armor for 3.5 seconds. Maiev's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes refresh this duration.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceShadowOrbVengeance: Activate to reset the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance.  Recharge Shadow Orb by damaging enemy Heroes with Spirit of Vengeance 5 times.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceSuddenVengeance|Ma: After blinking with Spirit of Vengeance, the shadow explodes, damaging all nearby enemy Heroes for 6% of their maximum Health.
fullText.MaievSpiritOfVengeanceVengefulKnives|Mai: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes causes the next cast of Fan of Knives that hits enemy Heroes to deal 1% maximum Health as bonus damage, up to 5%.
fullText.MaievUmbralBindBondsOfCorruption|MaievUm: Enemy Heroes pulled by Umbral Bind have their Armor reduced by 15 and are Slowed by 25% for 3 seconds
fullText.MaievUmbralBindBondsOfJustice|MaievUmbra: Quest: Each tether applied to a secondary target of Umbral Bind permanently increases Umbral Bind's pull damage by 15.  Reward: After applying 5 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's pull damage by 75.  Reward: After applying 10 tethers to secondary targets, increase Umbral Bind's cleave damage by 30%.
fullText.MaievUmbralBindChainGang|MaievUmbralBind: Tethering at least 2 enemy Heroes with Umbral Bind grants 35 Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.MaievUmbralBindCruelChain|MaievUmbralBin: Umbral Bind grants 25% Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds. In addition, each time Maiev deals damage to tethered targets, Umbral Bind's pull damage to all targets is increased by 30%, up to 150%.
fullText.MaievUmbralBindPursuitOfVengeance|MaievU: Each Hero tethered by Umbral Bind reduces the cooldown of Spirit of Vengeance by 2.5 seconds and each Hero hit by Spirit of Vengeance reduces the cooldown of Umbral Bind by 1 second.
fullText.MaievWardensCage|MaievWardensCage|Heroic: Summon 8 Warden Avatars as a cage around Maiev. After 1.5 seconds, enemy Heroes that come in contact with an Avatar consume it and are knocked to the center of the cage. Warden Avatars last 5 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionCelestialAlignment|MalfurionMoo: Increase Moonfire's reveal duration by 3 seconds. Malfurion's Basic Attacks against Heroes revealed by Moonfire deal 85% more damage.
fullText.MalfurionCombatStyleShandosClarity|Malfu: Gain a second charge of Innervate. Its cooldown recharges 25% faster per ally affected by Regrowth.
fullText.MalfurionEntanglingRootsDeepRootsTalent|: Entangling Roots grows 25% larger, and persist on the ground 40% longer.  Repeatable Quest: Every time an enemy Hero becomes Rooted, gain 14 Mana permanently.
fullText.MalfurionEntanglingRootsEmeraldDreams|Ma: Entangling Roots Sleeps enemy Heroes for 2 seconds after its Root expires.
fullText.MalfurionHeroicAbilityTranquility|Malfur: Heal nearby allied Heroes for 80 Health per second for 8 seconds. Allies affected by Regrowth within Tranquility's area gain 10 Armor.
fullText.MalfurionHeroicAbilityTwilightDream|Malf: After 0.5 seconds, deal 310 damage in a large area around Malfurion, Silencing enemies making them unable to use Abilities for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionLifebloomRegrowth|MalfurionRegr: Casting Regrowth instantly heals its target for 10% of their missing Health.
fullText.MalfurionMasteryAstralCommunion|Malfurio: Activate to Channel for 1 second, and then instantly teleport and cast Twilight Dream at the targeted location. Cooldown is shared with Twilight Dream.  Passive: Increase Twilight Dream's Silence duration to 5 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionMasteryHinderingMoonfire|Malfur: Moonfire Slows Heroes hit by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionMasteryLunarShower|MalfurionMoo: If Moonfire hits a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 1 second and the next Moonfire within 6 seconds deals 20% more damage. This damage bonus stacks up to 60%.
fullText.MalfurionMasterySerenity|MalfurionTranqu: Each enemy Hero hit by Moonfire reduces the cooldown of Tranquility by 3 seconds. Increase Tranquility's healing by 25% and 10% per ally affected by Regrowth.
fullText.MalfurionMasteryTenaciousRootsEntangling: Increase the Root duration of Entangling Roots by 25%. When Malfurion is Stunned, the cooldown of Entangling Roots is instantly reset. This can only occur every 10 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionMasteryVengefulRoots|MalfurionE: Entangling Roots spawns a Treant that deals 58 damage per second and loses Health over 11 seconds.  Repeatable Quest: Hitting enemy Heroes with Entangling Roots permanently increases the Treant's Basic Attack damage by 7.
fullText.MalfurionMoonfireMoonlitHarmonyTalent|Ma: Increase Moonfire's heal by 20%, and 15% per ally affected by Regrowth.
fullText.MalfurionNaturesCureRegrowth|MalfurionNa: Activate to remove all Stuns, Roots, and Slows from allies affected by Regrowth.
fullText.MalfurionRegrowthNaturesBalance|Malfurio: Increase Moonfire's area by 25% and Regrowth's duration by 5 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionRegrowthNaturesSwiftness|Malfur: Malfurion gains 6% Movement Speed for every active Regrowth.
fullText.MalfurionRejuvenation|MalfurionRejuvenat: Casting Regrowth on an ally also grants Malfurion its effect for 50% normal duration.
fullText.MalfurionRevitalizeInnervateTalent|Malfu: Using Innervate also grants Malfurion 15% of his max Mana and causes his Basic Ability cooldowns to refresh 50% faster for 5 seconds.
fullText.MalfurionWildGrowthTalent|MalfurionMoonf: Each Hero hit by Moonfire extends the duration of currently active Regrowths by 1 second.
fullText.MalfurionYserasGift|MalfurionYserasGift|: While Malfurion is above 75% Health, Regrowth's healing-over-time is increased by 75%.
fullText.MalGanisCarrionSwarmSeekerSwarm|MalGanis: Upon expiring, Carrion Swarm's bats seek nearby enemy Heroes, dealing 132 damage and Sleeping them for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisCarrionSwarm|MalGanisCarrionSwar: After 1 second, disperse into an Invulnerable swarm of bats for 3 seconds, dealing 120 damage per second to enemies.  Vampiric Touch heals for 75% of Carrion Swarm's damage to Heroes.
fullText.MalGanisDarkConversionWrathOfNathreza|Ma: Enemy Heroes near the target suffer 75% of the transferred Health as damage over 3 seconds.  Does not benefit from Vampiric Touch.
fullText.MalGanisDarkConversion|MalGanisDarkConve: Channel on an enemy Hero for 0.75 seconds, then swap Health percentages with the target over 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsBlackClaws|MalGanisFelCl: After Mal'Ganis hits an enemy Hero with Fel Claws, his next Basic Attack deals 60% more damage and reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes by 15 for 2 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsBlindAsABat|MalGanisFelC: Activate to erupt with blind rage, removing the cooldown and Mana cost of Fel Claws, but losing all vision. Lasts 5.5 seconds.   Enemy Heroes hit by the final slash of Fel Claws reduces the cooldown of this Ability by 4 seconds.  Does not provide quest stacks while active.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsVanquishTheWeak|MalGanis: Damage from Fel Claws and Basic Attacks Slows enemies by 25% for 1.5 seconds, and Vampiric Touch converts 10% more damage into healing versus Slowed Heroes.
fullText.MalGanisFelClawsWillOfTichondrius|MalGan: Quest: Hit Heroes with Fel Claws to permanently increase Fel Claw's damage by 0.5. Quest: Hit 4 Heroes in the first 2 slashes to cause the final slash to increase damage by 2.  Reward: Upon gaining 40 bonus Damage, the final Stun is increased by 0.5 seconds and the final slash steals 4% of enemy Hero Health.
fullText.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceEchoOfDoom|MalGan: When Necrotic Embrace expires, it explodes again for 68 damage. For each enemy Hero hit, gain 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Necrotic Embrace by 0.75 seconds.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.
fullText.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceFueledByTorment|M: Necrotic Embrace now Slows nearby enemies by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceMightOfSargeras|M: Necrotic Embrace now provides 35 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisNecroticEmbracePlagueBats|MalGan: Necrotic Embrace unleashes a wave of bats in front of Mal'Ganis, dealing 81 damage.
fullText.MalGanisNecroticEmbraceWingedGuard|MalGa: Each time Necrotic Embrace hits an enemy Hero, gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack.  If Winged Guard has no charges, Mal'Ganis will gain 1 charge after 6 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisNightRushAloneInTheDark|MalGanis: Reduce the cooldown of Night Rush by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes put to Sleep by Night Rush have their vision greatly reduced during the Sleep and for 2 seconds after.
fullText.MalGanisNightRushDeepSleep|MalGanisNight: Increase Night Rush's Sleep duration by 0.75 seconds and its Movement Speed bonus by 10%.
fullText.MalGanisNightRushSpreadingPlague|MalGani: After casting Night Rush, deal 33 damage per second to nearby enemies. This effect lasts for 5 seconds and Basic Attacks against Heroes refresh its duration.  Does not wake Sleeping targets.
fullText.MalGanisNightRushTheNightBeckons|MalGani: Basic Attacks deal 200% bonus damage to Sleeping enemies. After Night Rush's Sleep ends, targets are Slowed by 30% for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisVampiricTouchBloodRush|MalGanisV: When Mal'Ganis is healed by a Hero, he gains 1% Movement Speed for 6 seconds, up to 15%.
fullText.MalGanisVampiricTouchFrenziedAssault|Mal: Basic Attacks against Heroes with a higher Health percentage heal for an additional 50% of damage dealt.  Basic Attacks against Heroes with a lower Health percentage grant 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.MalGanisVampiricTouchTimeToFeed|MalGanis: Mal'Ganis heals for 70 when damaging a nearby enemy Hero. This can occur once every 6 seconds against each enemy Hero, but is also refreshed when they are Slept by Night Rush.
fullText.MalGanisVampiricTouchVampiricAura|MalGan: Mal'Ganis heals for 40% of Physical Damage dealt, and nearby allied Heroes heal for 20% of Physical Damage dealt.
fullText.MalthaelAngelOfDeath|MalthaelAngelOfDeat: Last Rites heals for 100% of the damage dealt, and its current and future cooldown reduction bonuses are doubled.
fullText.MalthaelBlackHarvest|MalthaelBlackHarves: Quest: Apply Reaper's Mark to Heroes for a total of 150 seconds.  Reward: Permanently increase Reaper's Mark's duration by 2 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelColdHand|MalthaelColdHand|Q|Leve: Soul Rip Slows enemies by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelDieAlone|MalthaelDieAlone|Q|Leve: Soul Rip deals 50% more damage to Heroes if it hits only one Hero.
fullText.MalthaelEtherealExistence|MalthaelEthere: Gain 10 Physical Armor per enemy Hero afflicted by Reaper's Mark, up to a maximum of 30.
fullText.MalthaelFearTheReaper|MalthaelFearTheRea: Activate to increase Movement Speed by 25% and pass through other units for 4 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelFinalCurtain|MalthaelFinalCurtai: Death Shroud leaves a trail in its wake for 4 seconds, applying Reaper's Mark to enemies in its area.
fullText.MalthaelInevitableEnd|MalthaelInevitable: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds, but remove all active Reaper's Marks.
fullText.MalthaelLastRites|MalthaelLastRites|Hero: Apply a death sentence to an enemy Hero that, after 2 seconds, deals damage equal to 50% of their missing Health.  Quest: Enemies killed between the application of Last Rites and within 1.5 seconds of it dealing damage permanently reduce its cooldown by 5 seconds, to a minimum of 20 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelMassacre|MalthaelMassacre|W|Leve: Wraith Strike now damages and applies Reaper's Mark to enemies around its target.
fullText.MalthaelMementoMori|MalthaelMementoMori|: Reaper's Mark deals 60% increased damage after afflicting an enemy for more than 4 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelMortality|MalthaelMortality|W|Le: When damaging a Hero, Wraith Strike deals bonus damage equal to 8% of the Hero's maximum Health.
fullText.MalthaelNoOneCanStopDeath|MalthaelNoOneC: Activate while dead to immediately respawn at the Hall of Storms but increase Malthael's next respawn time by 25%.
fullText.MalthaelOnAPaleHorse|MalthaelOnAPaleHors: Gain an additional 20% Movement Speed while mounted.
fullText.MalthaelReaperOfSouls|MalthaelReaperOfSo: Increase the duration of Tormented Souls to 6 seconds, and while Tormented Souls is active, Hero Takedowns refresh its duration.  If 2 or more enemy Heroes are in Tormented Souls' radius, it does not decay.
fullText.MalthaelShroudOfWisdom|MalthaelShroudOfW: After 2 seconds, gain 50 Spell Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelSoulCollector|MalthaelSoulCollec: Reduce Soul Rip's cooldown by 0.5 seconds and increase its range by 25%.
fullText.MalthaelSoulSiphon|MalthaelSoulSiphon|Q|: Increase Soul Rip's bonus healing from Heroes to 4.75% of the Hero's maximum Health.
fullText.MalthaelThrowingShade|MalthaelThrowingSh: Increase Death Shroud's range by 33%, reduce its cooldown by 3 seconds, and reduce its Mana cost from 50 to 30.  Death Shroud's initial impact deals 2% maximum Health as damage to non-Structure enemies.
fullText.MalthaelTormentedSouls|MalthaelTormented: Unleash a torrent of souls, continually applying Reaper's Mark to nearby enemies for 4 seconds.  Tormented Souls resets the cooldown of Wraith Strike when activated, and while active, Wraith Strike costs no Mana its cooldown is reduced to 2 seconds.
fullText.MalthaelTouchOfDeath|MalthaelTouchOfDeat: Activate to reduce healing received by Heroes afflicted by Reaper's Mark by 50% for 4 seconds.
fullText.MedicBedsideManner|MedicBedsideManner|E|: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes deal bonus damage equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Hitting an enemy Hero with Displacement Grenade increases the next instance of this damage against them to 6% for 6 seconds.
fullText.MedicBlastShield|MedicBlastShield|E|Leve: Enemy Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade are Slowed by 50% for 1 second after being knocked away and grant Lt. Morales a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health. This shield stacks up to 5 times.
fullText.MedicCaduceusFeedback|MedicCaduceusFeedb: Increases Attack Range by 1.1 and Basic Attacks against Heroes generate 4 Energy.
fullText.MedicCellularReactor|MedicCellularReacto: Consume 30 Energy to heal Lt. Morales for 30% of her maximum Health over 3 seconds. Caduceus Reactor is disabled while this is active.  Passive: Generate 2 Energy each time Safeguard reduces damage, up to a maximum of 10 Energy per use.
fullText.MedicClear|MedicClearTalent|E|Level1: Quest: Each enemy Hero hit with Displacement Grenade restores 3 Energy.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Displacement Grenade from 12 seconds to 9 seconds.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, increase the detonation area of Displacement Grenade by 25%.
fullText.MedicEMPGrenade|MedicEMPGrenadeTalent|E|: Displacement Grenade deals an additional 96 damage over 2 seconds, and up to 400 bonus damage to Heroes' Shields.
fullText.MedicExtendedCare|MedicExtendedCare|Q|Le: Channeling Healing Beam on a Hero for at least 3 seconds causes them to be healed for 258 over 3 seconds when Healing Beam ends.   Passive: Increase the range of Healing Beam by 30%.
fullText.MedicFirstResponder|MedicFirstResponder|: While above 60 Energy, Healing Beam's healing is increased by 20% and both Lt. Morales and her Healing Beam target gain 15% Movement Speed.
fullText.MedicHeroicAbilityMedivacDropship|MedicM: Unlock the Medivac Dropship and Reinforcements abilities. These abilities share a cooldown.  Medivac Dropship Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to 10 seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.  Reinforcements Call down a Medivac Dropship at your Hall of Storms for your allies. After 10 seconds, or when the Ability is activated again, the Medivac will travel to the original cast location to unload its passengers.
fullText.MedicHeroicAbilityStimDrone|MedicStimDro: Grant an allied Hero 75% Attack Speed and 25% Movement Speed for 10 seconds.
fullText.MedicHospiceCare|MedicHospiceCare|W|Leve: Safeguard grants its target Unkillable for 1 second. If the target is under 50% maximum Health when the Unkillable effect ends, they are healed for 8% of their maximum Health.
fullText.MedicHyperactivity|MedicHyperactivity|He: Reduce the cooldown of Stim Drone from 70 seconds to 35 seconds, and increase the Movement Speed bonus from 25% to 50%.
fullText.MedicLifeSupport|MedicLifeSupport|Q|Leve: During the first 2 seconds of Energy regeneration, Healing Beam regenerates 100% more Energy.  Passive: Increase your maximum Energy by 10.
fullText.MedicMediDrone|MedicMediDrone|W|Level7: Allies with Safeguard receive 75% of the healing done by Healing Beam on another ally.
fullText.MedicPhysicalTherapy|MedicPhysicalTherap: Safeguard removes all Slows from its target and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
fullText.MedicSafeZone|MedicSafeZoneTalent|Heroic: After exiting the Medivac, allies are Protected from all damage for 3 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Medivac Dropship abilities by 15 seconds.
fullText.MedicSecondOpinion|MedicSecondOpinion|E|: Hitting 2 or more Heroes with Displacement Grenade reduces its cooldown to 2 seconds.
fullText.MedicShieldSequencer|MedicShieldSequence: Safeguard gains a second charge and its range is increased by 60%.
fullText.MedicSystemShock|MedicSystemShockTalent|: Heroes hit by Displacement Grenade deal 30% less damage for 3 seconds.
fullText.MedicTraumaTrigger|MedicTraumaTriggerTal: Taking damage while below 40% Health grants 40 Armor for 3 seconds. This effect has a 30 second cooldown.  Passive: Increase the healing provided by Caduceus Reactor from 2% to 4% of Lt. Morales's maximum Health per second.
fullText.MedicVanadiumPlating|MedicVanadiumPlatin: While an ally affected by Safeguard is Stunned or Rooted, Safeguard grants an additional 20 Armor.  Passive: Increase the duration of Safeguard by 1 second.
fullText.MedivhArcaneBrilliance|MedivhArcaneBrill: Activate to instantly restore 200 mana to all nearby allied Heroes and grant them 15% Spell Power for 10 seconds.
fullText.MedivhArcaneRiftArcaneCharge|MedivhArcan: When Arcane Rift damages an enemy Hero, the next Arcane Rift deals 15% more damage.
fullText.MedivhArcaneRiftGuardianOfTirisfal|Mediv: Minions and Catapults hit by Arcane Rift are instantly killed.  Range is increased by 50%.
fullText.MedivhDustOfAppearance|MedivhDustOfAppea: Activate to greatly increase sight range for 5 seconds and reveal enemy Heroes in the area for 8 seconds. Does not cancel Raven Form.  Passive: Increase Medivh's sight range while in Raven Form by 25%.
fullText.MedivhDustofDisappearance|MedivhDustofDi: Stealth an allied Hero for 40 seconds, they are Unrevealable for the first 0.5 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.MedivhForceofMagic|MedivhForceofMagic|W|: Preventing at least 268 damage with a single cast of Force of Will grants 35% Spell Power for 15 seconds. Stacks up to 2 times.
fullText.MedivhForceOfWillArcaneExplosion|MedivhF: When Force of Will expires, it deals 80 damage to nearby enemies, plus 50% of the damage it prevented, up to 315 additional damage.
fullText.MedivhForceOfWillCircleOfProtection|Medi: Force of Will also applies to allies near the target.
fullText.MedivhForceOfWillEnduringWill|MedivhForc: Preventing at least 268 damage with Force of Will reduces its cooldown to 4 seconds.
fullText.MedivhForceOfWillReabsorption|MedivhForc: Increase the amount of healing from Force of Will to 70% of the damage it absorbed.
fullText.MedivhLeyLineSealMedivhCheats|MedivhLeyL: Increase the duration of the Time Stop by 33% and gain the ability to redirect the wave once while it's active.
fullText.MedivhLeyLineSeal|MedivhLeyLineSeal|Hero: After 0.5 seconds, unleash a wave of energy that places enemy Heroes in Time Stop for 3 seconds.
fullText.MedivhMysticAssault|MedivhMysticAssault|: If Arcane Rift hits an enemy Hero, Medivh's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 50% more damage and heals for 50% of the damage dealt.
fullText.MedivhPolyBombGlyphOfPolyBomb|MedivhPoly: Poly Bomb now hits an area, instantly Polymorphing enemy Heroes, hitting the same area again 1 second later.  Poly Bomb's duration is reduced to 1 second, and the spread radius is increased by 25%.
fullText.MedivhPolyBomb|MedivhPolyBomb|Heroic|Lev: Polymorph an enemy Hero for 2 seconds, Silencing them and making them unable to attack. On expiration, Poly Bomb spreads to other nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.MedivhPortalMageArmor|MedivhPortalMageAr: The first time an ally uses a Portal, they gain 40 Armor for 5 seconds, reducing their damage taken by 40%.
fullText.MedivhPortalPortalMastery|MedivhPortalPo: Medivh can manually place both Portal locations and it no longer breaks Raven Form.   Activate Medivh's Trait to cancel an unlinked Portal.
fullText.MedivhPortalRavenFamiliar|MedivhPortalRa: A Raven Familiar joins allies each time they use a Portal. The Raven will dive at the ally's next Basic Attack against a Hero within 5 seconds, dealing 114 damage and Slowing them by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MedivhPortalStablePortal|MedivhPortalSta: Decrease Portal cooldown by 25% and increase Portal duration by 50%.
fullText.MedivhTemporalFlux|MedivhTemporalFlux|Q|: Basic Attacks reduce Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 3%. Each enemy Hero hit by Arcane Rift reduces Medivh's Heroic Ability cooldown by 9%.
fullText.MedivhTransformRavenRavensIntellect|Medi: Raven Form increases Medivh's Mana and Health Regeneration by 200%.
fullText.MedivhTransformRavenWindsOfCelerity|Medi: Increases Raven Form's Movement Speed bonus by 100%.
fullText.MeiOWAcclimation|MeiOWAcclimation|Passiv: Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero, the damage she deals and healing she receives is increased by 1%, stacking up to 20 times. While at maximum stacks, Mei also gains 10 Armor. Lasts 8 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWAvalanche|MeiOWAvalanche|Heroic|Lev: After 0.5 seconds, roll a massive snowball that consumes enemy Heroes in its path. At the end of its path, the snowball crumbles, releasing the consumed Heroes, dealing 220 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds per Hero consumed.
fullText.MeiOWBackupBattery|MeiOWBackupBattery|Ac: Activate to remove all Roots and Slows and regenerate 20% of maximum Health over 2 seconds. The cooldown of this ability is reduced by 10 seconds each time Mei picks up a Regeneration Globe.
fullText.MeiOWBlackIce|MeiOWBlackIce|E|Level16: Icing's Slow effect no longer decays over its duration. Icing deals 300% more damage to enemies very close to Mei.
fullText.MeiOWCascade|MeiOWCascade|Heroic|Level20: While traveling, Avalanche constantly launches a volley of untalented Snow Blind snowballs ahead of itself.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Avalanche by 30 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWColdFront|MeiOWColdFront|E|Level4: Reduce the cooldown of Icing by 3 seconds. If Mei enters her own Blizzard while Icing is active, the cooldown of Icing is reduced by 5 seconds and she gains 80 Mana.
fullText.MeiOWCryoFreezeCoolingServos|MeiOWCryoFr: While Cryo-Freeze is active, Mei's Basic Ability cooldowns recover 200% faster.  Passive: Basic Attacks Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWCrystallize|MeiOWCrystallize|Trait|: Reduce the cooldown of Cryo-Freeze by 10 seconds. Mei gains 40 Spell Armor while Cryo-Freeze is active and for 1 second after.
fullText.MeiOWFlashFreeze|MeiOWFlashFreeze|Trait|: When Mei takes fatal damage she instantly gains Cryo-Freeze. This effect has a 180 second cooldown.
fullText.MeiOWFlurry|MeiOWFlurry|W|Level13: While in her own Blizzard, Mei gains 50% increased Attack Speed and Blizzard's cooldown refreshes 125% faster. If Mei is in her own Blizzard when it ends, gain these bonuses for 3 additional seconds.
fullText.MeiOWFreshPowder|MeiOWFreshPowder|Q|Leve: Snow Blind gains an additional charge and its range is increased by 33%.
fullText.MeiOWHeatTransfer|MeiOWHeatTransfer|Pass: Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed Heroes deal 33% more damage. Each time Mei Stuns or Slows an enemy Hero she heals for 16 Health.
fullText.MeiOWHeavyPack|MeiOWHeavyPack|Q|Level1: Increases the duration of Snow Blind's Slow by 1.5 seconds. Each time Blizzard damages an enemy Hero, reduce the cooldown of Snow Blind by 0.5 seconds and gain 3 Mana.
fullText.MeiOWIceStorm|MeiOWBlizzardIceStorm|W|Le: Every 3rd hit of Blizzard against enemy Heroes deals an additional 42 damage. Blizzard's final Stun damage is increased by 150% against all enemies.
fullText.MeiOWIceWall|MeiOWIceWall|Heroic|Level10: Vector Targeting After a 0.75 second delay, create an impassable wall that traps enemy Heroes hit for 2.5 seconds. When the wall expires, trapped Heroes are Slowed by 75%, decaying over 3 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWInduceHibernation|MeiOWInduceHibern: Blizzard reduces the damage dealt by enemy Heroes inside of its area by 40%.   When Blizzard ends, enemy Heroes still within its area gain this effect for an additional 4 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWPolarVortex|MeiOWPolarVortex|Passiv: Using an ability causes Mei to deal 24 damage a second to nearby enemies for 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes damaged by this effect also have their Movement Speed and Attack Speed Slowed by 20%.
fullText.MeiOWShatter|MeiOWShatter|Heroic|Level20: When Ice Wall expires, trapped enemy Heroes hit take 210 damage and have their Armor reduced by 25 for 5 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWSkatingAway|MeiOWSkatingAway|E|Leve: When Icing ends, Mei and all nearby allied Heroes gain 20% Movement Speed and 50 Physical Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWSlushball|MeiOWSlushball|Q|Level4: Snow Blind deals 75% increased damage and Structures hit are disabled for 3 seconds.
fullText.MeiOWTheBigOne|MeiOWTheBigOne|Q|Level20: Every 15 seconds, the next Snow Blind you cast has 67% increased area and 200% increased damage.
fullText.MephistoAnimosity|MephistoAnimosity|W|Le: Increase the duration of Lightning Nova by 1 second and the maximum amount of bonus damage it can deal from 30% to 42%.
fullText.MephistoConsumeSoulsConsumedByHatred|Mep: Consume Souls deals bonus damage equal to 10% of the target's missing Health. If Consume Souls initial cast kills a Hero it will cast 1 additional time.
fullText.MephistoConsumeSouls|MephistoConsumeSoul: Channel for 2.5 seconds, revealing all enemy Heroes. After the Channel completes, all enemy Heroes take 357 damage and are Slowed by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MephistoDuranceOfHateUnspeakableHorror|M: Durance of Hate Silences enemies while they are Rooted and for 3 seconds after its Root expires.
fullText.MephistoDuranceOfHate|MephistoDuranceOfH: After 1 second, unleash a wave of evil spirits that Root the first enemy Hero hit for 2.5 seconds and deal 250 damage to them over the same duration.  Durance of Hate spreads outwards from its initial target, Rooting and damaging additional nearby enemy Heroes.
fullText.MephistoLightningNovaFuriousSpark|Mephis: Every 3rd hit from Lightning Nova against the same target deals 65 bonus damage and grants Mephisto 2 Mana.
fullText.MephistoLightningNovaMimic|MephistoLight: While both Shade of Mephisto and Lightning Nova are active, Lightning Nova also casts from the Shade's location.
fullText.MephistoLightningNovaStaticBarrier|Mephi: At the end of its duration, Lightning Nova grants Mephisto a Shield equal to 40% of the damage it dealt to Heroes. Lasts 5 seconds.
fullText.MephistoLightningNovaStaticField|Mephist: When Lightning Nova's damage bonus reaches 30%, enemy Heroes within its radius take damage equal to 10% of their maximum Health.
fullText.MephistoLordOfHatredHysteria|MephistoLor: Lord of Hatred also reduces the cooldown of Mephisto's Heroic Ability. Mephisto is healed for 15% of his maximum Health and Mana when he casts his Heroic Ability.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephistoFrostStorm|Mephis: While Shade of Mephisto is active, enemies who are hit by Lightning Nova are Slowed by 15% for 1 second and the Slow from Skull Missile is increased to 50%.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephistoGhastlyArmor|Meph: Shade of Mephisto grants 25 Armor while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephistoMaliciousIntent|M: Shade of Mephisto grants 25% Spell Power while active and for 2.5 seconds after ending.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then increase the duration of the Spell Power bonus to 10 seconds after it ends.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephistoShadeLord|Mephist: Activate to swap locations with Shade of Mephisto and refresh its duration.  Passive: Shade of Mephisto benefits from all of Mephisto's level 7 Talents.
fullText.MephistoShadeOfMephistoTrickery|Mephisto: Shade of Mephisto grants 20% Movement Speed while active and for 2.5 seconds after it ends.  If Mephisto hits enemy Heroes at least 18 times with his Basic Abilities while Shade of Mephisto is active, then reset the cooldown of Shade of Mephisto.
fullText.MephistoShardOfHate|MephistoShardOfHate|: Basic Attacks hit enemies near the primary target and activate Lord of Hatred against enemy Heroes, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second per Hero hit.
fullText.MephistoSkullMissileAbhorredSkull|Mephis: Hitting a Hero with Skull Missile grants 25% Spell Power for 6 seconds. Skull Missile deals 40% more damage to Heroes under 50% Health.
fullText.MephistoSkullMissileHatefulMending|Mephi: Skull Missile grants 10 Mana and heals Mephisto for 70% of the damage it deals to Heroes.
fullText.MephistoSkullMissileLightningReaction|Me: Skull Missile explodes on contact with Lightning Nova, dealing 120 damage to nearby enemies.
fullText.MephistoSkullMissileUnyieldingPower|Meph: Quest: Hit Heroes with Skull Missile.  Reward: After hitting 20 Heroes, increase Skull Missile's damage by 100.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Skull Missile gains an additional charge.
fullText.MephistoSpite|MephistoSpite|Passive|Leve: Increase Regeneration Globe healing duration by 100%. Every tick of Regeneration Globe healing activates Lord of Hatred, reducing Basic Ability cooldowns by 1 second.
fullText.MonkAirAlly|MonkAirAlly|Active|Level4: Place an Air Ally that gives allied Heroes 20% Spell Power, grants vision, and reveals a large area around it. Has 300 Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Air Allies.
fullText.MonkBlazingFistsDeadlyReach|MonkBlazingF: Increase the duration of Deadly Reach by 100%. Every 3rd Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Deadly Reach by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.MonkBlindingSpeedRadiantDash|MonkBlindin: Decreases Radiant Dash's cooldown by 2 seconds and increases the maximum number of charges by 1.
fullText.MonkCleansingTouchRadiantDash|MonkCleans: Radiant Dashing to an ally makes them Unstoppable for 1 second.
fullText.MonkEarthAlly|MonkEarthAlly|Active|Level: Place an Earth Ally that grants nearby allied Heroes 50 Physical Armor against Heroic Basic Attacks, reducing damage taken by 50%. Has 400 Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Earth Allies.
fullText.MonkEchoofHeavenBreathofHeaven|MonkEchoo: Breath of Heaven heals 75% of its normal amount, but heals a second time 3 seconds later.
fullText.MonkEpiphany|MonkEpiphany|Active|Level20: Activate to restore 70% of Kharazim's maximum Mana and refill 2 charges of Radiant Dash.
fullText.MonkFistsofLegendTrait|MonkFistsofLegend: Gain 50% of the benefit from both level 1 talents that were not chosen.
fullText.MonkHeavenlyZealBreathofHeaven|MonkHeave: Increases Breath of Heaven's Movement Speed bonus to 30%. Radiant Dashing to an ally increases the healing they receive from Breath of Heaven by 50% for 3.5 seconds.
fullText.MonkHeroicAbilityDivinePalm|MonkDivinePa: Protect an allied Hero from death, causing them to be healed for 1200 if they take fatal damage in the next 4 seconds.
fullText.MonkHeroicAbilitySevenSidedStrike|MonkSe: Become Invulnerable and strike 7 times over 2 seconds. Each strike hits the highest Health nearby Hero for 7% of their maximum Health.
fullText.MonkInsight|MonkInsightTalent|Trait|Leve: Quest: Every 3rd Basic Attack restores 14 Mana, grants a stack of Insight, and gives 25% increased Movement Speed for 2.5 seconds.  Reward: Upon getting 100 stacks of Insight, every 3rd attack also reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.75 seconds.
fullText.MonkIronFists|MonkIronFistsTalent|Trait|: Every 3rd Basic Attack deals 110% bonus damage and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MonkPeacefulReposeDivinePalm|MonkPeacefu: Divine Palm's healing amount is increased by 75% and its cooldown is set to 5 seconds if the Hero does not die.
fullText.MonkQuicksilverRadiantDash|MonkQuicksilv: Radiant Dashing to an ally gives Kharazim and the target 30% bonus Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.MonkSixthSense|MonkSixthSense|Passive|Le: While Stunned or Rooted, gain 75 Physical Armor against Hero Basic Attacks for 4 seconds, reducing their damage by 75%.
fullText.MonkSpiritAlly|MonkSpiritAlly|Active|Lev: Place a Spirit Ally that heals allied Heroes in a large area around it for 2% of their maximum Health every second. Has 150 Health and lasts 10 seconds. Kharazim can Radiant Dash to Spirit Allies.
fullText.MonkTranscendence|MonkTranscendenceTalen: Every 3rd Basic Attack heals the lowest nearby allied Hero for 104 and gives 25% increased Move Speed for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.MonkWayoftheHundredFistsRadiantDash|Monk: Radiant Dashing to an enemy launches a rapid volley of 6 Basic Attacks dealing 45% damage each.
fullText.MuradinBronzebeardRage|MuradinBronzebear: Deal 15 damage per second to nearby enemies and heal for 75% of the damage dealt. Hitting an enemy Hero with Storm Bolt increase this damage by 200% for 3 seconds.
fullText.MuradinCombatStyleSkullcracker|MuradinSe: Every 3rd Basic Attack against the same enemy deals 90% bonus damage and Stuns them for 0.25 seconds.
fullText.MuradinCombatStyleThirdWind|MuradinSecon: Increases Health Restoration rate to 90 per second, and raises Health threshold to 60% Health for improved 180 per second Restoration.
fullText.MuradinDwarfBlock|MuradinDwarfBlock|E|Le: Casting Dwarf Toss grants 3 charges of Block. Each Block charge grants 75 Physical Armor against a single enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
fullText.MuradinExtraCharges|MuradinExtraCharges|: Thunder Clap and Dwarf Toss each gain a 2nd charge.
fullText.MuradinGiveEmTheAxeExecutioner60DamageBo: Attacking a Hero that is Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed increases Muradin's Basic Attack damage by 40% for 3 seconds.
fullText.MuradinHeroicAbilityHaymaker|MuradinHaym: Stun target enemy Hero, and wind up a punch dealing 319 damage and knocking the target back, hitting enemies in the way for 319 damage and knocking them aside.
fullText.MuradinMasteryAvatarUnstoppableForce|Mur: While active, Avatar grants 20 Armor and causes Muradin's Basic Attacks to reduce the cooldowns of Thunder Clap and Dwarf Toss by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.MuradinMasteryDwarfTossDwarfLaunch|Murad: Increase the range of Dwarf Toss by 30%. Hitting an enemy Hero with Dwarf Toss reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.MuradinMasteryDwarfTossHeavyImpact|Murad: Enemies hit by Dwarf Toss are Slowed by 80% for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.MuradinMasteryHaymakerGrandSlam|MuradinH: Haymaker gains a 2nd charge and its damage is increased by 25%. If a Hero dies within 3 seconds of being hit by Haymaker, instantly gain 1 charge.
fullText.MuradinMasteryPassiveStoneform|MuradinSe: Activate to heal Muradin for 30% of his maximum Health over 10 seconds. Second Wind is disabled during this time.
fullText.MuradinMasteryStormhammerSledgehammer|Mu: Storm Bolt deals 500% damage to non-Heroic enemies.  Stormbolt cooldown is reduced by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.MuradinMasteryThunderburn|MuradinThunder: Hitting an enemy Hero with Thunder Clap triggers a second Thunder Clap explosion 2 seconds later in the same location that deals 72 damage.
fullText.MuradinMasteryThunderclapHealingStatic|M: Muradin heals for 6% of his maximum Health for each Hero hit by Thunder Clap.
fullText.MuradinMasteryThunderclapReverberation|M: Increases the Attack Speed Slow of Thunder Clap from 30% to 50% and the duration from 2.5 seconds to 3.5 seconds. Each enemy Hero hit reduces your Heroic Ability cooldown by 5%.
fullText.MuradinMasteryThunderclapThunderstrike|M: Thunder Clap deals 200% more damage if only one target is hit.  Passive: Increase the duration of Dwarf Toss's Armor by 2 seconds.
fullText.MuradinStormboltPerfectStorm|MuradinStor: Storm Bolt's cooldown is reset and 25 Mana is refunded if an enemy dies within 3 seconds of being hit by it. This effect has an 8.5 second cooldown.
fullText.MurkyAFishyDeal|MurkyAFishyDeal|Active|L: Killing a Minion with Pufferfish grants a stack of Bribe. Use 8 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries.  Maximum of 32 stacks of Bribe.
fullText.MurkyEggShell|MurkyEggShell|Trait|Level1: Upon casting Spawn Egg, or when one of his eggs is killed, Murky gains a Shield for an amount equal to 50% of Murky's current Health.
fullText.MurkyFishEye|MurkyFishEye|Trait|Level1: Spawning from his Egg increases Murky's mount speed to 45% for 5 seconds.  Passive: Increase the Egg's Health by 100%, its sight radius by 300%, and it reveals all enemies in its sight radius.
fullText.MurkyFishOil|MurkyFishOil|W|Level16: The Pufferfish casts Slime at its location upon landing.
fullText.MurkyFishTank|MurkyFishTank|Passive|Leve: Murky is healed for 20% of the damage he deals with Basic Attacks and Basic Abilities.
fullText.MurkyHeroicAbilityMarchoftheMurlocs|Murk: After 0.75 seconds, Murky commands a legion of Murlocs to march in a target direction, each one leaping onto the first enemy Hero or Structure they find. Each Murloc deals 130 damage and slows its target by 15% for 5 seconds. Murlocs deal 50% damage to Structures.
fullText.MurkyHeroicAbilityOctoGrab|MurkyOctoGrab: Murky becomes Unstoppable and Stuns target enemy Hero for 3 seconds while he hits them for 1 damage a second.
fullText.MurkyLivingtheDream|MurkyLivingTheDreamT: Quest: Every 15 seconds Murky is alive, he gains 5% Spell Power, up to 25%. This bonus is reset upon his death.
fullText.MurkyMakingInky|MurkyMakingInky|Q|Level2: Reduces the cooldown of Slime by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.MurkyMasteryAndASharkToo|MurkyOctoGrabAn: Increase the damage of Octo-Grab by 13700%.
fullText.MurkyMasteryNeverEndingMurlocs|MurkyMarc: March of the Murlocs can be channeled indefinitely, and will always last its base duration when canceled early.   In addition, it no longer deals reduced damage to Structures.
fullText.MurkyMasteryRejuvenatingBubble|MurkyReju: Safety Bubble restores 40% of Murky's maximum Health.
fullText.MurkyMasteryTufferfish|MurkyPufferfishTu: Pufferfish gains 50 Spell Armor and deals 50% more damage to Slimed targets.
fullText.MurkyMasteryWrathOfCod|MurkyPufferfishWr: Heroes hit by Pufferfish take additional damage equal to 16% of their maximum Health over 4 seconds.
fullText.MurkyShellGame|MurkyEggHuntTalent|Trait|: Murky can now place 2 Eggs and will randomly revive from them, however, the cooldown of placing an Egg is increased by 15 seconds.
fullText.MurkySlimeTime|MurkySlimeTime|Q|Level4: Quest: Slime enemy Heroes that are already Slimed.  Reward: After Sliming 10 Heroes, increase Slime's bonus damage by 125.  Reward: After Sliming 20 Heroes, increase Slime's slow amount to 30%.
fullText.MurkySlipperyWhenWet|MurkySafetyBubbleSl: Gain 50% Movement Speed and move through units while in Safety Bubble. Additionally, Safety Bubble's cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
fullText.MurkyTimetoKrill|MurkyTimetoKrill|Passiv: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal an additional 7 damage a second and slow the target by 7% for 4 seconds. This effect can stack up to 5 times.
fullText.MurkyToxicBuildup|MurkyToxicBuildup|Q|Le: Every 3rd consecutive Basic Attack against an enemy Hero causes a free Slime to be cast upon them.
fullText.NecromancerBoneArmorWallOfBonesTalent|Ne: Increase the Shield amount of Bone Armor to 35% of Xul's maximum Health, and Xul gains 20 Spell Armor for its duration.
fullText.NecromancerHeroicAbilityPoisonNova|Necro: After 0.5 seconds, release poisonous missiles that deal 630 damage to all enemies hit over 10 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerHeroicAbilitySkeletalMages|Ne: Vector Targeting Summon 4 Frost Mages in a line that attack nearby enemies for 47 damage a second and Slow them by 30% for 2 seconds. Last up to 15 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentAmplifyDamage|Necromanc: Increase the Root duration of Bone Prison by 0.25 seconds.  Enemies Rooted by Bone Prison lose 25 Armor for 2 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentAndarielsVisage|Necroma: Poison Nova heals for 50% of the damage dealt and its duration is increased by 50%.
fullText.NecromancerTalentBoneArmorBacklash|Necro: When Bone Armor expires, nearby enemy Heroes take damage equal to 12% of their maximum Health.
fullText.NecromancerTalentBoneArmorShackler|Necro: While Bone Armor is active, nearby enemies are Slowed by 35% for 1 second. Basic Attacks against Heroes that are Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor by 2 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentBoneArmorShade|Necroman: While Bone Armor is active, Xul evades all Basic Attacks, but increases the cooldown of Bone Armor by 10 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentBoneSpear|NecromancerBo: Deal 230 damage to enemies in a line.
fullText.NecromancerTalentColdHandOfDeath|Necroma: Increase the Slow of Frost Mages by 20%.    Every 5th Spectral Scythe that hits enemy Heroes spawns a Frost Mage instead of a Skeletal Warrior at their location.
fullText.NecromancerTalentDecrepify|NecromancerDe: Enemy Heroes that are damaged by Spectral Scythe or Skeletal Warriors are Slowed by 30% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentEchoesOfDeath|Necromanc: Spectral Scythe spawns 2 additional scythes next to the first after 1.5 seconds, dealing 40% damage.
fullText.NecromancerTalentGrimScythe|NecromancerC: Increase Xul's Basic Attack damage by 15%.  Each enemy hit by Cursed Strikes reduces its cooldown by 1 second, up to 12 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentHarvestVitality|Necroma: Cursed Strikes heals for 70% of the damage dealt to Heroes.
fullText.NecromancerTalentJailors|NecromancerJail: Bone Prison spawns 2 Skeletal Warriors.  These do not count towards Xul's Raise Skeleton maximum.  Quest: Spawn 80 Skeletal Warriors.  Reward: While fixating on an enemy, Skeletal Warriors gain 25% Movement and Attack Speed.
fullText.NecromancerTalentKalansEdict|Necromancer: Each time Skeletal Warriors deal damage, reduce the cooldown of Bone Armor and Xul's Heroic Ability by 1.5%.
fullText.NecromancerTalentMortalWound|Necromancer: Enemy Heroes hit by Spectral Scythe receive 75% less healing for 4 seconds.
fullText.NecromancerTalentRapidHarvest|Necromance: Gain 5% Attack Speed for 3 seconds each time Cursed Strikes hits an enemy, up to 75%.
fullText.NecromancerTalentReapersToll|Necromancer: Reduce the cooldown of Spectral Scythe by 2 seconds and its Mana cost by 15.
fullText.NecromancerTalentTragOulsEssence|Necroma: Every time a Skeletal Warrior attacks an enemy, restore 0.5% of Xul's maximum Health and 0.2% of his maximum Mana.
fullText.NecromancerTalentWeaken|NecromancerWeake: Enemy Heroes who are damaged by Cursed Strikes or Skeletal Warriors deal 35% less damage for 3 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterBloodRageHealmonger|NexusHunt: If Blood Rage damages an enemy Hero below 50% Health, it heals for an additional 210 Health.
fullText.NexusHunterBloodRageYourPainMyGain|Nexus: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero causes Qhira to gain 10 Armor for 3 seconds. Stacks 3 times.
fullText.NexusHunterCarnageMaximumEffort|NexusHun: If Carnage damages the same enemy Hero 3 times it deals an additional 108 damage and Slows by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterChainsaw|NexusHunterChainsaw|: Carnage's cooldown recharges 100% faster while an enemy Hero has maximum Blood Rage stacks.
fullText.NexusHunterEnsnaringSwing|NexusHunterEns: The primary target of Revolving Sweep is Slowed by 60% while Qhira is attached to them. Secondary targets hit by Revolving Sweep's swing are Slowed by 40% for 3 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterFatalWounds|NexusHunterFatalW: While at maximum stacks, Blood Rage's bleed deals 30% additional damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health.  Quest: Damage enemy Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage.   Reward: After damaging Heroes with Blood Rage's bleed damage 150 times, Blood Rage's duration is increased by 2 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterFinalStrikeUnleashedPotential: Increase the damage to enemy Heroes under 50% Health from 25% to 50%.  If an enemy Hero dies within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Final Strike, then reset the cooldowns of Final Strike and all of Qhira's Basic Abilities.
fullText.NexusHunterFinalStrike|NexusHunterFinalS: After 1 second, deal 410 damage to enemies in a line. This damage is increased by 25% against enemy Heroes who are below 50% Health.
fullText.NexusHunterFinishingTouch|NexusHunterFin: Gain 20% Basic Attack damage. When Qhira Basic Attacks an enemy Hero below 50% Health it deals 20% additional damage, and she gains 35% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterGrapplingHookUtilityBelt|Nexu: Grappling Hook's cooldown is reset when hitting an enemy Hero with the initial impact of Revolving Sweep and recharges 900% faster if Qhira hasn't taken damage within the last 2 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterHuntersVengeanceNoSanctuary|N: Nearby enemy Heroes below 50% Health are revealed and you gain 20% Movement Speed while an enemy Hero is revealed by you in this way.  Additionally, you deal 20% increased damage to these revealed enemies.
fullText.NexusHunterPulsingPain|NexusHunterPulsin: Each additional enemy Hero hit by Revolving Sweep causes the primary target to take an additional 135 damage.
fullText.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepBoomingKick|Nex: Increase the Stun duration of Revolving Sweep's re-activation by 0.25 seconds. Enemy Heroes around the primary target are also affected by Revolving Sweep's re-activation.
fullText.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepLingeringAilmen: Enemy Heroes hit by Revolving Sweep or by Grappling Hook have their Armor reduced by 35 for 4 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterRevolvingSweepSwingLifeAway|N: Revolving Sweep's cooldown recharges 250% faster while Qhira is swinging around her target. She also gains 60 Spell Armor for 5 seconds after the re-activation impact.
fullText.NexusHunterSiphoningLink|NexusHunterSiph: Damaging an enemy Hero with Revolving Sweep's initial impact or swing causes Qhira to regenerate 96 Health over 4 seconds. Stacks up to 4 times.  Passive: Basic Attacks heal for 20% of the damage dealt.
fullText.NexusHunterTheHunted|NexusHunterTheHunte: Basic Attacking an enemy Hero increases your Basic Attack damage against that Hero by 25%. Stacks up to 4 times and lasts 4 seconds. Bonus is reset if a different Hero is attacked.
fullText.NexusHunterTheThirst|NexusHunterTheThirs: Carnage heals for 50% of the damage dealt to enemy Heroes. Anytime Carnage damages an enemy Hero, Qhira's next Basic Attack within 4 seconds against an enemy Hero deals 15% additional damage, stacking up to 10 times.
fullText.NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikesSilentKille: Hitting enemy Heroes with Unrelenting Strikes Silences them for 0.5 seconds and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterUnrelentingStrikes|NexusHunte: Deal 44 damage to nearby enemies every 0.5 seconds for 2.5 seconds as your sword grows outward. Upon expiring, deal 160 damage to nearby enemy Heroes and Stun them for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.NexusHunterUpstage|NexusHunterUpstage|W|: Damaging at least 2 Heroes with Blood Rage causes Qhira to Evade the next 4 Heroic Basic Attacks within 12 seconds.
fullText.NovaAdvancedCloaking|NovaPermanentCloakS: After being Stealthed for 1 second, gain an additional 10% Movement Speed. While Stealthed, regenerate 6 Mana per second.
fullText.NovaApolloSuit|NovaGhostProtocolApolloSu: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 2 seconds.
fullText.NovaCombatStyleAntiArmorShells|NovaAntiA: Nova's Basic Attacks deal 250% damage and decrease the Physical Armor of Heroic targets by 15 for 4 seconds, but her Attack Speed is proportionally slower.
fullText.NovaCombatStyleOneintheChamber|NovaOnein: After using an Ability, Nova's next Basic Attack within 3 seconds deals 65% additional damage.
fullText.NovaCovertMission|NovaCovertMissionTalen: Enemy Minions killed near Nova grant a stack of Bribe. Hero Takedowns grant 10 stacks of Bribe. Use 25 stacks to bribe a Mercenary, instantly defeating them. Does not work on Elite Mercenaries. Maximum of 100 stacks. If a camp is defeated entirely with Bribe, the camp respawns 50% faster.
fullText.NovaCovertOps|NovaCovertOpsTalent|W|Leve: After being Stealthed for 2 seconds, Pinning Shot's Slow is increased to 60% and costs no Mana. Bonus is lost after losing Stealth for 1 second.
fullText.NovaHeroicAbilityPrecisionStrike|NovaPre: After a 1.5 second delay, deals 435 damage to enemies within an area. Unlimited range.
fullText.NovaHeroicAbilityTripleTap|NovaTripleTap: Locks in on the target Hero, then fires 3 shots that hit the first Hero or Structure they come in contact with for 372 damage each.
fullText.NovaHoloStability|NovaHoloDecoyHoloStabi: Increase the cast range of Holo Decoy by 100% and its duration by 120%.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Ghost Protocol by 15 seconds.
fullText.NovaIonicForceField|NovaIonicForceFieldT: Gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds after losing Stealth.
fullText.NovaMasteryCripplingShot|NovaPinningShot: Pinning Shot lowers a Hero's Armor by 20 for the duration of the Slow, causing them to take 20% increased damage.
fullText.NovaMasteryDoubleTap|NovaPinningShotDoub: Pinning Shot now has 2 charges, but its cooldown is increased by 2 seconds.
fullText.NovaMasteryExplosiveShot|NovaSnipeExplos: Snipe also deals 90% damage to enemies near the impact.
fullText.NovaMasteryFastReload|NovaTripleTapFastR: Triple Tap's cooldown is reset if it kills an enemy Hero.
fullText.NovaMasteryLethalDecoy|NovaHoloDecoyLeth: Increases the damage Holo Decoy deals to 30% of Nova's damage.
fullText.NovaMasteryLongshot|NovaPinningShotLongs: Increases the cast range of Pinning Shot by 30%. Pinning Shot also increases the range of Nova's next Basic Attack by 2.3.
fullText.NovaMasteryPerfectShotSnipe|NovaPerfectS: Hitting an enemy with Snipe reduces its cooldown by 2 seconds and refunds half its Mana cost, doubled against enemy Heroes.
fullText.NovaMasteryPrecisionBarrage|NovaPrecisio: Precision Strike gains a 2nd charge and its cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
fullText.NovaMasteryPsionicEfficiency|NovaSnipePs: Snipe's range is increased by 15% and hitting a Hero grants an additional stack of Precision Sniper.
fullText.NovaRapidProjection|NovaHoloDecoyRapidPr: Reduces Holo Decoy's cooldown and Mana cost by 60%.
fullText.OrpheaAbyssalSymbiosis|OrpheaAbyssalSymb: Hitting a Hero with Chomp instantly grants Orphea maximum Chaos and a 170 Shield for 3 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaAllegrissimo|OrpheaAllegrissimo|Q|: Reduce the cooldown of Shadow Waltz by 1 second.  Hitting Heroes with the end of Shadow Waltz sets its cooldown to 0.75 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaAncestralStrength|OrpheaAncestralS: Non-Heroic Abilities deal 15% more damage to Stunned, Rooted, Silenced or Slowed enemies. Enemy Heroes who are hit with Overflowing Chaos are Slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaBackbiter|OrpheaBackbiter|W|Level4: If Chomp hits a Hero, Orphea immediately dashes a short distance backwards.  Passive: Gain 15% maximum Health.
fullText.OrpheaBondOfAnguish|OrpheaBondOfAnguish|: Shadow Waltz deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 3% of their maximum Health, healing Orphea for 50% of damage dealt.
fullText.OrpheaChaoticAssault|OrpheaChaoticAssaul: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes while having 3 stacks of Chaos deal an additional 75% bonus damage.
fullText.OrpheaCrushingJaws|OrpheaCrushingJaws|He: After 1.25 seconds, pull enemies in an area towards the center, dealing 250 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaDeadMagic|OrpheaDeadMagic|Trait|Le: Basic Attacks that consume Chaos ignore Armor and deal 90 Spell Damage to the target and all enemies around them.
fullText.OrpheaDetermination|OrpheaDetermination|: After dashing with Shadow Waltz, Orphea gains 50 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability, stacking up to 2 times. While Orphea has Determination, her Physical damage is increased by 15%.
fullText.OrpheaEldritchConduit|OrpheaEldritchCond: Each Chaos consumed increases Orphea's Spell Power by 3%, up to 30%. After reaching the maximum bonus, the Spell Power is increased by an additional 30%. Lasts 10 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaEngulfingOblivion|OrpheaEngulfingO: Crushing Jaws reduces the Armor of Heroes hit by 50 for 3 seconds. Takedowns set its cooldown to 5 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaEnPointe|OrpheaEnPointe|Q|Level1: Shadow Waltz deals an increased 90% damage to enemies hit by its end and grants 1 additional Chaos.
fullText.OrpheaEternalFeast|OrpheaEternalFeast|He: After 1.5 seconds, deal 210 damage in an area. Eternal Feast repeats every 1 second as long as it hits an enemy Hero.
fullText.OrpheaFinalToccata|OrpheaFinalToccata|Ac: Activate to instantly reset the cooldown of Shadow Waltz. For the next 5 seconds, dashing with Shadow Waltz resets its cooldown and increases the duration of Final Toccata by 1 second.
fullText.OrpheaGrowingNightmare|OrpheaGrowingNigh: Increase Dread's damage by 50%.   Quest: Hit 3 enemy Heroes with a single cast of Dread's eruption.  Reward: Permanently increase Dread's eruption damage by 50% and increase the Slow amount of Dread's eruption by 15%.
fullText.OrpheaInsatiable|OrpheaInsatiable|W|Leve: Hitting a Hero with Chomp sets its cooldown to 2 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaInvasiveMiasma|OrpheaInvasiveMiasm: Activate to deal 150 damage to all nearby enemies after 2 seconds. For each Hero hit, heal for 182 and gain 1 Chaos.
fullText.OrpheaLurkingTerror|OrpheaLurkingTerror|: After Dread erupts and for 2 seconds after, activate to cast Chomp from the eruption area. Enemy Heroes hit by this Chomp are Slowed by 70% for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.OrpheaMindDevourer|OrpheaMindDevourer|E|: Quest: Hitting Heroes with Dread increases its damage by 5, up to 150.  Reward: After hitting 30 Heroes, hitting an enemy Hero with Dread's eruption sets its cooldown to 6 seconds and refunds 50 Mana.
fullText.OrpheaMonsterWithin|OrpheaMonsterWithin|: Eternal Feast grants 1 Chaos each time it hits a Hero. While Eternal Feast is active and for 5 seconds afterwards, Orphea's Basic Abilities recharge 150% faster.
fullText.OrpheaRavenousHunger|OrpheaRavenousHunge: Quest: Minions that die within 1.5 seconds of being hit by Chomp permanently increase its damage by 2 and heal Orphea for 60.   Heroes that die increase its damage by 40 and heal Orphea for 25% of her maximum Health.
fullText.ProbiusAggressiveMatrixWarpInPylon|Probi: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 35% increased Attack Damage.
fullText.ProbiusConstructAdditionalPylonsPylonOve: Probius can now have up to 3 active Pylons, and increase the damage of Pylon Overcharge by 25%.
fullText.ProbiusEchoPulseDisruptionPulse|ProbiusE: Disruption Pulse now returns to Probius 1.25 seconds after reaching its target, dealing 100% damage on the return trip.
fullText.ProbiusGateKeeperNullGate|ProbiusGateKee: Null Gate lasts indefinitely if either end is within a Power Field.
fullText.ProbiusGatherMineralsPhotonCannonQuest|P: Quest: Gather Minerals to increase the Health of Photon Cannons by 8, up to 560.   Reward: After collecting 70 Minerals, Photon Cannons deal 35% more damage.
fullText.ProbiusGravityWellWarpRift|ProbiusGravit: Enemies are Slowed more the closer they are to the center of the Warp Rift, up to a maximum slow of 60%.
