fullText.ProbiusInterferenceWarpRift|ProbiusInter: Enemy Heroes hit by Warp Rift explosions have their Spell Power reduced by 35% for 5 seconds. Additionally, enemies hit by Warp Rift explosions are knocked away from the center.
fullText.ProbiusNullGateHeroic|ProbiusNullGate|He: Vector Targeting Project a barrier of negative energy in the target direction that lasts 4 seconds. Enemies who touch the barrier take 76 damage per second and are Slowed by 80% for as long as they remain in contact with it.
fullText.ProbiusParticleAcceleratorDisruptionPuls: After hitting 3 Heroes with Disruption Pulse, the next Warp Rift detonated by a Disruption Pulse fires 4 additional pulses that deal 78 damage from the impact location in different directions.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ProbiusPhotonBarrierPhotonCannon|Probius: While a Photon Cannon is alive and powered, Probius gains 40 Spell Armor.
fullText.ProbiusPowerOverflowingWarpInPylon|Probi: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 10% increased Spell Power and 2 Mana per second.
fullText.ProbiusProbiusLoopWarpRift|ProbiusProbiu: Whenever a Rift explosion hits 1 or more enemy Heroes, create a new Warp Rift in the same location.
fullText.ProbiusPylonOverchargeHeroic|ProbiusPylo: For 8 seconds, increase the size of Pylon power fields and allow them to attack enemy Heroes within it for 96 damage per second. Pylons are Invulnerable for the duration.
fullText.ProbiusQuantumEntanglementWarpRift|Probi: Enemies continue to be Slowed for 3 seconds after their last contact with a Warp Rift.
fullText.ProbiusRiftShockWarpRift|ProbiusRiftShoc: Hitting a Warp Rift with Disruption Pulse within 1 second of it arming deals 105 damage over 3 seconds.
fullText.ProbiusShieldBatteryWarpInPylon|ProbiusS: Pylon's Power Field grants allied Heroes 28 Shields per second, up to 112. Shields persist for 2 seconds after exiting a Pylon Power Field.
fullText.ProbiusShieldCapacitor|ProbiusShieldCapa: Probius gains permanent Shields equal to 10% of his max Health. Shields regenerate quickly as long as he hasn't taken damage recently.
fullText.ProbiusShootEmUptoRiftsDisruptionPulse|P: Enemy Heroes hit by Disruption Pulse take a bonus 2.5% of their maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Reduce the cooldown of Disruption Pulse by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ProbiusTowerDefensePhotonCannon|ProbiusT: Reduce Photon Cannon's cooldown by 3.5 seconds when Disruption Pulse or Warp Rift damages an enemy Hero.
fullText.ProbiusTurboChargedWorkerRush|ProbiusTur: Worker Rush grants an additional 10% passive Movement Speed while in a Power Field, and its cooldown is reduced by 14 seconds.
fullText.ProbiusWarpResonanceWarpRiftQuest|Probiu: Quest: Hit Heroes with Warp Rift explosions.  Reward: After hitting 8 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, increase the explosion damage by 120.  Reward: After hitting 16 Heroes with Warp Rift explosions, Warp Rift gains 1 additional charge.
fullText.RagnarosBlastWaveBlastEcho|RagnarosBlast: After Blast Wave explodes, another Blast Wave is created on Ragnaros.
fullText.RagnarosBlastWaveEngulfingFlame|Ragnaros: Increase Blast Wave's damage by 75% and its radius by 15%.
fullText.RagnarosBlastWaveSlowBurn|RagnarosBlastW: Blast Wave Slows enemies hit by 40% for 2 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosBlastWaveTemperedFlame|RagnarosB: When Blast Wave damages an enemy Hero, gain a Shield equal to 100% of the damage dealt for 3 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosBlisteringAttacks|RagnarosBliste: Every 10 seconds, Ragnaros's next Basic Attack against a Hero deals 60% bonus damage. Hitting enemies with Basic Abilities reduces this cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.RagnarosCatchingFire|RagnarosCatchingFir: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Ragnaros' Health Regeneration by 1.25 per second, up to 18.75.  Reward: After gathering 15 Regeneration Globes, activate Catching Fire to gain 25 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 25%.
fullText.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasCauterizeWounds|R: Empower Sulfuras heals for an additional 45% of damage dealt to Heroes over 2 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasGiantScorcher|Rag: Empower Sulfuras burns enemy Heroes for 9% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds. This additional damage does not heal Ragnaros.
fullText.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasHandOfRagnaros|Ra: If Empower Sulfuras hits at least 2 enemy Heroes, refund 10 Mana and its cooldown recharges 100% faster for 4 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosEmpowerSulfurasSulfurasHungers|R: Quest: Every time Empower Sulfuras kills a Minion, its damage is increased by 1, up to 25.  Reward: After killing 25 Minions, increase its damage by an additional 100.
fullText.RagnarosLavaWaveLavaSurge|RagnarosLavaWa: Lava Wave gains an additional charge and its cooldown is reduced by 30 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosLavaWave|RagnarosLavaWaveTargetP: Release a wave of lava from Ragnaros's Core that travels down the targeted lane, dealing 240 damage per second to non-Structure enemies in its path and instantly killing enemy Minions. Damage increased by 100% versus Heroes.
fullText.RagnarosLivingMeteorFireWard|RagnarosLiv: When Living Meteor hits an enemy Hero, gain a charge of Spell Armor, reducing damage from the next enemy ability by 50%.  Stores up to 2 charges.
fullText.RagnarosLivingMeteorMeteorBomb|RagnarosL: Living Meteor explodes at the end of its path, dealing 220 damage. Enemies at its center take 30% increased damage.
fullText.RagnarosLivingMeteorMoltenPower|Ragnaros: If Living Meteor hits enemy Heroes at least 5 times, reduce its cooldown by 7 seconds, and refund 30 Mana.
fullText.RagnarosLivingMeteorShiftingMeteor|Ragna: Each time an enemy is hit by the same Living Meteor, they take 6% increased damage from it.  Quest: Hit 75 Heroes with Living Meteor.  Reward: After hitting 75 Heroes with Living Meteor, its duration is increased to 2.25 seconds, and it can be reactivated to change its direction once per use.
fullText.RagnarosMoltenCoreHeroicDifficulty|Ragna: Molten Core has 25% increased Health and Damage, and its cooldown is reduced by 50 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosResilientFlame|RagnarosResilient: When Ragnaros is Stunned, he gains 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%.   This effect has a 15 second cooldown.
fullText.RagnarosSubmerge|RagnarosSubmerge|Active: Ragnaros submerges below, entering Stasis and healing for 600 Health over 3 seconds.
fullText.RagnarosSulfurasSmashFlamesOfSulfuron|Ra: Sulfuras Smash Slows enemies by 50% for 2.5 seconds, and the Stun duration of enemies hit in the center is increased by 1 second.
fullText.RagnarosSulfurasSmash|RagnarosSulfurasSm: Hurl Sulfuras at the target area, landing after 0.75 seconds, dealing 250 damage. Enemies in the center take 594 damage instead and are Stunned for 0.5 seconds.
fullText.RaynorAceInTheHole|RaynorAceInTheHole|Pa: Deal 12% more damage to Stunned or Slowed Heroes.  Enemy Heroes hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper are Slowed by 10% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.RaynorAdrenalineRushRaidersRoll|RaynorAd: Adrenaline Rush grants Unstoppable and continues healing for an additional 2 seconds. The additional duration ends upon reaching 70% Health.
fullText.RaynorBasicAttackSustainingRounds|Raynor: Give 'Em Some Pepper heals Raynor for 3% of his maximum Health, increased to 6% if the primary target is a Hero.
fullText.RaynorBehemothArmor|RaynorBehemothArmor|: Gain 200 bonus maximum Health.    Quest: Every time Give 'Em Some Pepper's primary target is a Hero, gain an additional 8 maximum Health.
fullText.RaynorBountyHunter|RaynorBountyHunter|Tr: If Give 'Em Some Pepper's target is a Hero, it deals an additional 3% of their maximum Health as damage and grants Raynor 10 Armor for 3 seconds.   Activate Give 'Em Some Pepper to apply it to Raynor's next Basic Attack.
fullText.RaynorDuskWing|RaynorRaynorsRaidersDuskW: Increase the Health and leash range of Raynor's Raider by 100%. Its Basic Attack lowers enemy Hero Armor by 3 for 1 second, stacking up to 30.
fullText.RaynorGive'EmSomePepperSergeantPepper|Ra: Give 'Em Some Pepper now activates every 3 Basic Attacks.
fullText.RaynorGiveEmSomePepperExterminator|Rayno: Basic Attacks deal 50% more damage to Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters. This is increased to 125% while Inspire is active.   Passive: Inspire does not expire on friendly Minions and Mercenaries.
fullText.RaynorGiveEmSomePepperUnstableCompound|R: Increase the radius of Give 'Em Some Pepper by 15%. Each enemy Hero hit by Give 'Em Some Pepper grants Raynor 10 Mana and reduces the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.RaynorHeroicAbilityHyperion|RaynorHyperi: Order the Hyperion to make a strafing run for 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemies for 66 damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it can fire its Yamato Cannon at a Structure, dealing 794 damage.
fullText.RaynorHeroicAbilityRaynorsRaiders|Raynor: Summon a Banshee that assists Raynor. The Banshee deals 84 damage per second and regenerates 75 Health per second if it hasn't taken damage in the last 4 seconds. Can reactivate to retarget or move the Banshee.  The Banshee respawns automatically after 45 seconds.
fullText.RaynorHyperionCavalrysArrived|RaynorCava: Give 'Em Some Pepper lowers the cooldown of Hyperion by 5 seconds if the primary target is a Hero. These Heroes are targeted by the Hyperion for 100% increased damage for 6 seconds.
fullText.RaynorHyperionExecuteOrders|RaynorHyperi: When Raynor is killed, the Hyperion is cast towards the closest enemy Hero. It lasts 12 seconds, hitting up to 4 enemy Heroes of the lowest Health in the area for 66 damage every second. Every 4 seconds, it will also fire its Yamato Cannon at the lowest Health enemy Hero, dealing 395 damage.  Passive: Reduce Raynor's death timer by 35 seconds.
fullText.RaynorInspireFuelTheRush|RaynorInspireFu: While Inspire is active, Adrenaline Rush's cooldown reduction from Basic Attacks is increased to 2.25 seconds against non-Heroes, and to 4.5 seconds against Heroes.  Passive: Reduce the Mana cost of Adrenaline Rush from 75 to 45.
fullText.RaynorInspireGiddyUp|RaynorInspireGiddyU: Gain 10% Movement Speed while mounted and unmounted. Inspire grants 10% more Movement Speed.
fullText.RaynorInspireRallyingCry|RaynorInspireRa: Increase the Attack Speed bonus of Inspire by 20%.  Passive: After every 12 Basic Attacks, cast Inspire for free.
fullText.RaynorMasteryFightorFlightAdrenalineRush: Reduce Adrenaline Rush's cooldown by 10 seconds. Casting Adrenaline Rush grants 25 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.RaynorMasteryGiveMeMoreAdrenalineRush|Ra: While Inspire is active, gain 1 Basic Attack range.  Passive: Increase Adrenaline Rush duration by 0.5 seconds, increasing the total amount healed by 12.5% of Raynor's maximum Health.
fullText.RaynorPenetratingRoundHeavySlugs|RaynorP: Increase Penetrating Round's Slow by 15% and its duration by 2 seconds.
fullText.RaynorPenetratingRoundLine'EmUp|RaynorPe: Reduce the cooldown of Penetrating Round by 3 seconds. Penetrating Round hitting two or more enemy Heroes reduces its cooldown by an additional 3 seconds.
fullText.RaynorPenetratingRoundPaintThemRed|Rayno: Increase the damage of Penetrating Round by 50% and heal for 90% of the damage Penetrating Round deals to Heroes.
fullText.RaynorVeteranMarksman|RaynorVeteranMarks: Quest: Every time the primary target of Give 'Em Some Pepper is a Hero, permanently increase its damage bonus by 0.75%.  Gambit: Gain 60% bonus Give 'Em Some Pepper damage. Every death reduces this bonus by 15%.
fullText.RehgarAncestralHealingFarseersBlessing|R: After 1.5 seconds, Ancestral Healing is cast a second time on the same target. Allies near the target are healed for 590.
fullText.RehgarAncestralHealing|RehgarAncestralHe: After 1 second, heal an allied Hero for 1180 Health.
fullText.RehgarBloodAndThunder|RehgarBloodAndThun: Ghost Wolf attacks reduce Basic Ability cooldowns by 1.5 seconds and restore 4% of Rehgar's maximum Mana.
fullText.RehgarBloodlust|RehgarBloodlust|Heroic|L: Grant nearby allied Heroes 40% Attack Speed and 35% Movement Speed and causes them to heal for 30% of the Basic Attack damage to their primary target. Lasts for 6 seconds.
fullText.RehgarEarthbindTotemColossalTotem|Rehgar: Reactivate Earthbind Totem to move an existing totem to a new location. This can be used once per cast.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's area and duration by 50%, and Health by 25%.
fullText.RehgarEarthbindTotemEarthgraspTotem|Rehg: When Earthbind Totem is first cast, it deals 90 damage and Slows nearby enemies by 90% for 1 second.
fullText.RehgarEarthbindTotemGroundedTotem|Rehgar: Enemy Heroes in Earthbind Totem's area also have their Attack Speed Slowed by 15% and their Spell Power reduced by 15%.  Passive: Increase Earthbind Totem's cast range by 45%.
fullText.RehgarEarthlivingEnchant|RehgarEarthlivi: When Chain Heal heals a Hero below 50% Health, they are healed an additional 160 Health over 4 seconds.
fullText.RehgarElementalConduit|RehgarElementalCo: Activate to gain Lightning Shield and grant all nearby allied Heroes a Shield equal to 10% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.   For up to 5 seconds after activating, hitting an enemy Hero with this effects' Lightning Shield gives nearby allies a Shield equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health for 5 seconds.
fullText.RehgarFeralHeart|RehgarGhostWolfFeralHea: Ghost Wolf's Movement Speed bonus is increased to 40% for the first second, then falls to 30%. Entering or exiting Ghost Wolf form grants 15 Armor for 1 second.
fullText.RehgarGladiatorsWarShout|RehgarBloodlust: Increase the duration and range of Bloodlust by 100%.
fullText.RehgarHealingTotem|RehgarHealingTotem|Ac: Activate to place a Totem that heals allied Heroes in an area for 2% of their maximum Health every second. This Totem has 125 Health and lasts for 10 seconds.
fullText.RehgarHungerOfTheWolf|RehgarHungeroftheW: Ghost Wolf attacks against Heroes deal an additional 6% of the target's maximum Health and heal Rehgar for 6% of his maximum Health.
fullText.RehgarLightningShieldEarthShield|RehgarL: Lightning Shield gives Heroes a Shield that absorbs damage equal to 14% of their maximum Health for 3 seconds.
fullText.RehgarLightningShieldElectricCharge|Rehg: The bearer of Lightning Shield Heals for 20% of the damage it deals to enemy Heroes, doubled if the bearer is Rehgar.  While Lightning Shield is damaging an enemy, its bearer gains 10% increased Movement Speed.
fullText.RehgarLightningShieldRisingStorm|RehgarL: Every time a Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, increase its damage by 10%. Stacks up to 15 times.  Passive: Increase the duration of Lightning Shield by 3 seconds.
fullText.RehgarLightningShieldStormcaller|RehgarL: Increase the radius of Lightning Shield by 25%.   Quest: Each time Lightning Shield damages an enemy Hero, permanently increase Rehgar's Health by 2 and Mana by 1, stacking up to 200 times.
fullText.RehgarMasteryTidalWaves|RehgarChainHealT: Reduces Chain Heal's cooldown by 1 second for each Hero healed, and reduces its Mana cost from 60 to 40.
fullText.RehgarPitFighter|RehgarPitFighter|Passiv: Gain 10% increased Attack Damage and 3 Spell Power. Each nearby ally Hero grants an additional stack of this effect, up to 5 stacks.   While at 2 or more stacks, Purge's cooldown refreshes 50% faster.
fullText.RehgarPurification|RehgarPurification|Tr: If Purge removes a Slow, Stun, Root, or Silence effect from an ally, heal them for 220.  Using Purge on an enemy Hero deals up to 330 damage to Shields and reduces healing received by 40% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Purge's cooldown by 15 seconds.
fullText.RehgarWellspring|RehgarWellspring|E|Leve: Every 2 seconds, Earthbind Totem will cast an untalented Chain Heal at the nearest allied Hero with the lowest Health. This Chain Heal heals for 35% of its normal amount.
fullText.RexxarAnimalHusbandry|RexxarAnimalHusban: Rexxar and Misha gain 2 Maximum Health every second Rexxar remains alive. These bonuses are lost on Rexxar's death.
fullText.RexxarAspectoftheBeastCharge|RexxarAspec: Misha's Basic Attacks lower the cooldown of Misha, Charge! by 1 second.
fullText.RexxarAspectOfTheHawkSpiritSwoop|RexxarA: When Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, Rexxar gains 125% Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Misha's Basic Attacks increase the duration of this buff by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.RexxarDireBeast|RexxarDireBeast|W|Level1: Rexxar and Misha's Basic Attacks increase the damage of the next Misha, Charge! by 15%, stacking up to a 150% bonus.
fullText.RexxarFeignDeath|RexxarFeignDeath|Active: Rexxar fakes his death, becoming Invulnerable and untargetable for 5 seconds. During this time you control Misha.
fullText.RexxarFlare|RexxarFlare|Active|Level1: Fire a flare at an area, revealing it for 20 seconds.
fullText.RexxarFrenzyofKalimdor|RexxarFrenzyofKal: Rexxar's Basic Attacks deal 10% more damage, and Misha's Basic Attacks slow the target by 20% for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.RexxarHardenedSkin|RexxarHardenedSkin|Ac: Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Armor for 4 seconds, reducing damage taken by 75%.
fullText.RexxarHeroicAbilityBestialWrath|RexxarBe: Increases Misha's Basic Attack damage by 200% for 12 seconds.
fullText.RexxarHeroicAbilityUnleashTheBoars|Rexxa: Release a herd of boars that track down all enemy Heroes in a direction, dealing 110 damage, revealing, and slowing enemies by 40% for 5 seconds.
fullText.RexxarHungryBear|RexxarHungryBearTalent|: Misha's Basic Attacks heal her for 4.5% of her maximum Health.
fullText.RexxarHunterGatherer|RexxarHunterGathere: Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Rexxar and Misha's Health Regeneration by 1 per second, up to 25 per second.   Reward: After gathering 25 Globes, Rexxar and Misha gain 15 Armor.
fullText.RexxarSpiritBondEasyPrey|RexxarSpiritBon: Increases Misha's basic attack damage to Minions and Mercenaries by 150%, and Misha gains 50 Armor against Minions and Mercenaries, reducing damage taken by 50%.
fullText.RexxarSpiritBondGrizzledFortitude|Rexxar: Every 6 seconds, Rexxar and Misha gain 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing the damage taken by 75%.  Stores up to 2 charges. Both Rexxar and Misha have their own charges.
fullText.RexxarSpiritBondPrimalIntimidation|Rexxa: Activate to Slow the Attack Speed by 50% and Movement Speed by 20% of Heroes and Summons near Rexxar and Misha for 2.5 seconds.  Passive: Heroes and Summons that attack Rexxar or Misha have their Attack Speed slowed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.RexxarSpiritBondWildfireBear|RexxarSpiri: Misha deals 28 damage per second to nearby enemies.
fullText.RexxarSpiritBond|RexxarSpiritBondTalent|: Increases the duration of Bestial Wrath by 50% and Misha's Basic Attacks heal Rexxar for 50% of her damage dealt during Bestial Wrath.
fullText.RexxarSpiritSwoopBirdOfPrey|RexxarSpirit: Increases Spirit Swoop's damage by 150% to Minions.
fullText.RexxarSpiritSwoopCripplingTalons|RexxarC: Increases Spirit Swoop's slow amount to 50% and its duration to 3.5 seconds.
fullText.RexxarTakingFlightSpiritSwoop|RexxarTaki: Increases Spirit Swoop's range by 20%. If Spirit Swoop hits an enemy Hero, the Mana cost is refunded and its cooldown is reduced by 2 seconds.
fullText.RexxarThrilloftheHunt|RexxarThrilloftheH: Rexxar's Basic Attacks increase both his and Misha's Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds.
fullText.RexxarUnleashTheBoarsKillCommand|RexxarU: Unleash the Boars deals 50% more damage and Roots for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.SamuroAdvancingStrikesDeflection|SamuroD: Advancing Strikes grants Samuro and his Mirror Images 35 Physical Armor.
fullText.SamuroBlademastersPursuit|SamuroBlademas: Advancing Strikes grants an additional 15% Movement Speed for Samuro and his Mirror Images, and its duration is increased by 2 seconds.
fullText.SamuroBurningBlade|SamuroBurningBlade|W|: Critical Strikes from Samuro or his Mirror Images deal bonus Spell Damage equal to 50% of their Basic Attack damage to the target and other nearby enemies.
fullText.SamuroCrushingBlow|SamuroOverpoweringBlo: Samuro's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce Critical Strike's cooldown by 2 seconds.  Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes increase Samuro's Basic Attack damage by 10% for 4 seconds, up to 30%.
fullText.SamuroDanceOfDeath|SamuroDanceOfDeathTal: Mirror Images use Bladestorm when Samuro does, but for 45% damage. If Samuro hits at least 20 enemy Heroes with Bladestorm, then reset its cooldown.
fullText.SamuroHarshWinds|SamuroHarshWinds|E|Leve: If Wind Walk is broken by Samuro attacking an enemy Hero, he deals 30% additional damage to that target for 3 seconds.
fullText.SamuroHeroicAbilityBladestorm|SamuroBlad: Cause a Bladestorm of destructive force around Samuro for 3 seconds, granting him 25 Armor and dealing 180 damage per second to nearby enemies.
fullText.SamuroHeroicAbilityIllusionMaster|Samuro: Mirror Images can be controlled individually or as a group and their damage is increased by 100%.   Passive: Image Transmission's cooldown is reduced to 8 seconds.
fullText.SamuroMercilessStrikes|SamuroMercilessSt: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Stunned, Rooted, or Slowed enemies are always Critical Strikes.
fullText.SamuroMirage|SamuroMirage|Q|Level4: Mirror Image grants Samuro and his Images 40 Spell Armor against the next 2 sources of Spell Damage, reducing their damage by 40%.
fullText.SamuroMirroredSteel|SamuroMirroredSteelT: Samuro's Basic Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Mirror Image by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.SamuroMirrorImageWayOfTheBlade|SamuroWay: Critical Strike now happens for Samuro and his Mirror Images every 3rd Basic Attack.   Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes from Samuro or his Mirror Images reduces their Physical Armor by 5 for 2.25 seconds, up to a maximum reduction of 15 Physical Armor.
fullText.SamuroPhantomPain|SamuroPhantomsStrikeTa: Samuro's Critical Strikes against enemy Heroes reduce Image Transmission's cooldown by 1 second, and deal 35% more damage for each active Mirror Image.
fullText.SamuroPressTheAttack|SamuroPressTheAttac: Basic Attacks from Samuro or his Mirror Images against enemy Heroes or while Advancing Strikes is active increases their Attack Speed by 10%, up to 40%.  These bonuses are lost when losing Advancing Strikes.
fullText.SamuroShukuchi|SamuroShukuchiTalent|E|Le: Wind Walk teleports Samuro a short distance in the direction he's currently facing.
fullText.SamuroThreeBladeStyle|SamuroThreeBladeSt: Samuro's Mirror Images only deal half of the damage they take to themselves, effectively increasing their Health by 25%, and their duration is increased to 16 seconds.
fullText.SamuroWayOfIllusion|SamuroWayOfIllusion|: Quest: Every time a Mirror Image Critically Strikes a Hero, Samuro gains 0.25 Attack Damage, up to 10.  Reward: After hitting 40 Heroes, Samuro gains an additional 30 Attack Damage.
fullText.SamuroWayOfTheWind|SamuroWayOfTheWind|E|: After activating or exiting Wind Walk, Samuro gains 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.  Activating Wind Walk instantly heals Samuro for 3% of his maximum Health.
fullText.SamuroWindStrider|SamuroWindStrider|E|Le: Wind Walk's cooldown is reduced by 6 seconds.
fullText.SamuroWindwalkKawarimi|WindwalkKawarimiT: Wind Walk creates a Mirror Image at Samuro's location that will continue whatever he was doing.
fullText.SamuroWindwalkOneWithTheWind|SamuroOneWi: While Samuro has Wind Walk active and for 3 seconds after breaking it, both he and his Mirror Images gain 25 Armor, taking 25% reduced damage from all sources.
fullText.SgtHammerAmbush|SgtHammerSiegeModeAmbush: Gain Stealth when entering Siege Mode or after not taking or dealing damage for 3 seconds while in Siege Mode. Basic Attacks while Stealthed deal 125% more damage.  Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
fullText.SgtHammerBarricade|SgtHammerConcussiveBl: Reduce Concussive Blast's cooldown by 4 seconds, its Mana cost by 40, and when cast create an impassable wall in front of Sgt. Hammer for 4 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerConcussiveBlastEntrenched|SgtHa: While in Siege Mode, Concussive Blasts's damage and knockback distance are increased by 75%.
fullText.SgtHammerGraduatingRange|SgtHammerSiegeM: While in Siege Mode, Basic Attack range is increased by 1 every 1.5 seconds, up to 3.
fullText.SgtHammerHeroicAbilityBluntForceGun|SgtH: Fire a missile across the battlefield, dealing 500 damage to non-Structure enemies in its path.
fullText.SgtHammerHeroicAbilityNapalmStrike|SgtHa: Deals 164 damage on impact, and leaves a napalm area that deals 50 damage per second. Lasts for 4 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerHyperCoolingEngines|SgtHammerTh: While in Siege Mode, hitting Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks reduces the cooldown of Thrusters by 5 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerMasteryAdvancedLavaStrikeNapalm: Increase the cast range of Napalm Strike by 75%, and its impact deals 65% more damage.
fullText.SgtHammerMasteryHoverSiegeMode|SgtHammer: Sgt. Hammer can move at 50% Movement Speed while in Siege Mode.
fullText.SgtHammerMasteryOrbitalBFGBluntForceGun|: Blunt Force Gun's missile orbits the planet every 5 seconds. Only the last missile fired orbits.
fullText.SgtHammerNeosteelPlatingMechanicalKnowho: Neosteel Plating grants 20% maximum Health as a Shield for 2 seconds and increases Basic Attack damage by 30% for 5 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerNeosteelPlatingSiegeTactics|Sgt: Using Neosteel Plating while in Siege Mode grants Unstoppable for 2 seconds, as long as she remains in Siege Mode.
fullText.SgtHammerSiegeModeAdvancedArtillery|SgtH: Increase Siege Mode's splash damage to 60% of Basic Attack damage, and increase its splash radius by 25%.
fullText.SgtHammerSiegeModeMaelstromRounds|SgtHam: Activate to increase Basic Attack damage dealt by 40% for 5 seconds. Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode reduces the cooldown of Maelstrom Rounds by 5 seconds.  Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.SgtHammerSiegeModeRegenerativeBioSteel|S: Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode heal for 10% of the damage dealt.
fullText.SgtHammerSiegeModeUltraCapacitors|SgtHam: Hitting enemy Heroes or Structures with Basic Attacks while in Siege Mode grants 10% Attack Speed for 5 seconds, up to 60%.
fullText.SgtHammerSpiderMinesPulseDetonationCore|: Spider Mines detonate 3 times over 3 seconds. All damage from Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant 5 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Spider Mines by 1.5 seconds. Increase this bonus to 2.5 seconds while in Siege Mode.
fullText.SgtHammerSpiderMinesShrapnelMines|SgtHam: Upon detonating, Spider Mines reduce the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 10, up to 50, for 4 seconds.
fullText.SgtHammerSpiderMinesTacticalMineDeployme: Moving while Thrusters is active leaves a trail of up to 5 Spider Mines. Additionally, increase the Slow of Spider Mines by 15%.
fullText.StitchesChopChop|StitchesChopChop|Trait|: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror grants 40% increased Attack Speed for 4 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration of this effect.
fullText.StitchesDigestiveJuices|StitchesDigestiv: Devour deals an additional 140 damage over 5 seconds. When used on a Hero, its cooldown is reduced by 4 seconds and causes the Hero hit to deal 50% reduced damage for 4 seconds.
fullText.StitchesFlareUp|StitchesFlareUp|Trait|Le: Deals 15 damage per second to nearby enemies. Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook or activating Shambling Horror increases this damage by 150% for 4 seconds.
fullText.StitchesGasBag|StitchesGasBag|Trait|Leve: Activating Shambling Horror grants Unstoppable for 3 seconds.  Passive: Shambling Horror's cooldown is reduced by 20 seconds.
fullText.StitchesGiftFromTheEmbalmer|StitchesGift: Putrid Bile deals 100% more damage to Heroes.  Quest: Each time Putrid Bile damages an enemy Hero, the duration of Stitches' next death timer is reduced by 2%, to a maximum of 80% total reduction. All stacks of this effect are lost upon death.
fullText.StitchesHeroicAbilityGorge|StitchesGorge: Consume an enemy Hero, trapping them for 4 seconds. When Gorge ends, the enemy Hero takes 274 damage. The trapped Hero cannot move or act and doesn't take damage from other sources.
fullText.StitchesHeroicAbilityPutridBile|Stitches: Emit bile that deals 37 damage per second to enemies within, Slowing them by 35% for 1.5 seconds. Gain 20% Movement Speed while emitting bile. Lasts 8 seconds.
fullText.StitchesHookMasterHooker|StitchesHookMas: Reduce the cooldown of Hook by 4 seconds. Enemy Heroes hit by Hook have 75% reduced healing for 2 seconds. Allies hit by Helping Hand are Unkillable for 2 seconds.
fullText.StitchesHungryforMore|StitchesHungryforM: Gain 5% Movement Speed.  Quest: Gathering a Regeneration Globe increases Stitches's maximum Health by 25.   Reward: Every 20 Globes gathered permanently increases Stitches' Movement Speed by an additional 5%.
fullText.StitchesHungryHungryStitchesGorge|Stitch: For 4 seconds after using Gorge, Stitches can teleport a short distance to additional targets and Gorge them. Enemies are Slowed by 75% for 1 second after Gorge ends.
fullText.StitchesMeatHook|StitchesMeatHook|Q|Leve: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook heals Stitches for 20% of his maximum Health over 5 seconds. While active, Basic Attacks against the Hero hit refresh the duration of this effect.
fullText.StitchesPatchworkCreation|StitchesPatchw: Gain 3 Armor for every unit afflicted with Vile Gas, stacking up to 8 times. While Shambling Horror is active, this Armor amount is doubled.  Passive: Increase regeneration effects and all healing received by 15%.
fullText.StitchesPlaytime|StitchesPlaytime|W|Leve: Basic Attacks restore 5 Mana and reduce Slam's cooldown by 0.75 seconds.  For each enemy Hero hit by Slam's inner area, restore 5 Mana and reduce its cooldown by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.StitchesPulverizeSlam|StitchesSlamPulver: All enemies hit by Slam are Slowed by 70% for 0.75 seconds and Heroes have their Armor reduced by 10 for 3 seconds.
fullText.StitchesPutrefaction|StitchesPutrefactio: While Shambling Horror is active, Vile Gas reduces healing received by 40%.  Passive: Vile Gas heals Stitches for 75% of the damage dealt.
fullText.StitchesSavortheFlavorDevour|StitchesDev: Quest: Hitting an enemy Hero with Devour increases Stitches' Health Regeneration by 1.5 and the damage of Vile Gas by 2%, stacking up to 100 times.
fullText.StitchesSecondHelping|StitchesSecondHelp: Devour gains 1 additional charge with a 6 second cooldown between uses.   Gambit: If Stitches is at max Health after using Devour, he gains a Shield equal to 15% of his maximum Health for 10 seconds. Every death, reduce this Shield by 3%.
fullText.StitchesSerratedEdge|StitchesSerratedEdg: Hitting an enemy Hero with Hook deals bonus damage equal to 5% of their maximum Health, reduces Hook's cooldown by 4 seconds, and restores 35 Mana.
fullText.StitchesTenderizer|StitchesVileGasTender: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes Slow by 20% for 1.5 seconds and restore 1.75% of Stitches' maximum Health.
fullText.StitchesUnderPressure|StitchesUnderPress: Increase Slam's damage by 25.  Quest: After damaging Heroes with Vile Gas 6 times, permanently increase the damage of Slam by 1, to a maximum of 75 additional damage.
fullText.StitchesVileCleaver|StitchesVileCleaver|: Basic Attacks against enemies with Vile Gas deal 35% more damage and spreads Vile Gas to nearby enemies.   Passive: Slam applies Vile Gas to all targets hit.
fullText.StukovBioExplosionSwitch|StukovBioExplos: Bio-Kill Switch now also detonates Lurking Arm, dealing 230 damage, applying a Weighted Pustule, and Silencing enemy Heroes inside for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.StukovBioticArmor|StukovBioticArmorTalen: Healing Pathogen grants 10 Physical Armor to targets while active on them. Detonating Bio-Kill Switch increases this bonus to 50 for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.StukovControlledChaos|StukovControlledCh: Flailing Swipe gains 2 additional charges, but each use only swings 1 time, at maximum range. Additionally, its cooldown is decreased to 25 seconds, and its Mana cost is reduced from 60 to 25.
fullText.StukovFetidTouch|StukovFetidTouchTalent|: Basic Attacks become ranged and Slow enemies by 20% for 1.5 seconds, but deal 35% less damage. This effect can be toggled.  Quest: Hit Heroes with Weighted Pustule.  Reward: After hitting 15 Heroes, reduce the cooldown of Weighted Pustule by 5 seconds and remove its Mana cost.
fullText.StukovGrowingInfestation|StukovGrowingIn: Lurking Arm's area expands by 50% over 2.5 seconds, but it cannot be Channeled for longer than 3 seconds.
fullText.StukovHeroicAbilityFlailingSwipe|StukovF: Swipe 3 times in front of Stukov over 1.75 seconds, dealing 48 damage to enemies hit and knocking them away. Each swipe is larger than the previous.
fullText.StukovHeroicAbilityMassiveShove|StukovMa: Extend Stukov's arm. If it hits an enemy Hero, they are rapidly shoved until they collide with terrain, dealing 190 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Stukov gains 50 Armor while shoving an enemy.
fullText.StukovItHungers|StukovLurkingArmItHunger: Increase the range of Lurking Arm by 30%. If Lurking Arm damages enemy Heroes 8 times, its cooldown is reset and its Mana cost is refunded.
fullText.StukovLongPitch|StukovLongPitchTalent|W|: Increase the range of Weighted Pustule by 50%. Detonating 2 or more Weighted Pustules causes Stukov's Bio-Kill Switch and Basic Ability cooldowns to recharge 100% faster for 4 seconds.
fullText.StukovLowBlow|StukovLowBlowTalent|E|Leve: Lurking Arm deals 100% more damage to enemy Heroes below 50% Health and persists for 1 second after it is canceled.
fullText.StukovOneGoodSpread|StukovOneGoodSpreadT: After a Healing Pathogen infests 3 targets, restore 10 Mana and reduce the cooldown of Healing Pathogen by 2 seconds.
fullText.StukovPoppinPustules|StukovPoppinPustule: Detonating Weighted Pustule with Bio-Kill Switch within 1.5 seconds of its expiration increases its damage by 150% and applies its damage and Slow in an area. Enemy Heroes hit have a Weighted Pustule applied to them.
fullText.StukovPoxPopuli|StukovPoxPopuliTalent|Tr: Bio-Kill Switch no longer removes Healing Pathogen but instead sets its duration to 3 seconds.
fullText.StukovPushComesToShove|StukovPushComesTo: Massive Shove Slows its target by 50% for 4 seconds upon colliding with terrain. If Massive Shove pushes a target for more than 1.25 seconds, its cooldown is reduced by 15 seconds.
fullText.StukovSuperstrain|StukovSuperstrainTalen: Whenever an ally with Healing Pathogen is Stunned or Rooted, they are instantly healed for 300 Health.
fullText.StukovTargetedExcision|StukovTargetedExc: Detonating exactly 1 Weighted Pustule (but any number of Healing Pathogens) with Bio-Kill Switch reduces the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch to 7 seconds and other Basic Abilities by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.StukovTopOff|StukovTopOffTalent|Q|Level2: Healing Pathogen's heal over time is increased by 30% while its target is above 60% Health.
fullText.StukovUniversalCarrier|StukovUniversalCa: Healing Pathogen can continually spread through Stukov, but its healing is reduced by 25%.
fullText.StukovVigorousReuptake|StukovVigorousReu: Bio-Kill Switch heals for 30% more when detonating 3 or more Healing Pathogens.
fullText.StukovVirulentReaction|StukovVirulentRea: Detonating a Weighted Pustule on an enemy who is inside of Lurking Arm Roots them for 1.5 seconds.
fullText.StukovWeightedPustuleReactiveBallistospo: Activate to instantly spread a Weighted Pustule to all nearby enemy Heroes and reset the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch.  Passive: While below 50% Health, the cooldown of Bio-Kill Switch refreshes 100% faster.
fullText.SylvanasDarkLadysCall|SylvanasDarkLadysC: Heroes hit by Mind Control have their vision radius greatly reduced for 5 seconds. Mind Control's cooldown is reduced by 25 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasHauntingArrows|SylvanasBlackArro: Black Arrows can now be activated to cause all Basic Attacks and Abilities to Stun Minions and Structures for 3 seconds. Lasts for 10 seconds. Basic Attacks against Structures reduce this cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasHeroicAbilityWailingArrow|Sylvan: Shoot an arrow that can be reactivated to deal 228 damage and Silence enemies in an area for 2.5 seconds. The arrow detonates automatically if it reaches maximum range.
fullText.SylvanasMindControl|SylvanasMindControlM: After 0.25 seconds, fire a missile that Mind Controls the first enemy Hero hit. Heroes hit are Silenced, Slowed by 30%, have 3 stacks of Black Arrows applied to them, and are forced to walk towards Sylvanas for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasTalentColdEmbrace|SylvanasShadow: Shadow Dagger reduces the Armor of the initial target by 25 and any enemy it spreads to by 10 for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasTalentFesteringWounds|SylvanasBl: Increase Haunting Wave's damage by 15%. Haunting Wave applies 3 stacks of Black Arrows.
fullText.SylvanasTalentLifeDrain|SylvanasBlackArr: Heal for 15% of damage dealt by Sylvanas to enemies with 3 stacks of Black Arrows. Healing is doubled against Heroes.
fullText.SylvanasTalentLostSoul|SylvanasShadowDag: Basic Attacks against Heroes and Structures with 3 stacks of Black Arrows reduce the cooldown of Shadow Dagger by 0.75 seconds, doubled against Heroes.
fullText.SylvanasTalentMercenaryQueen|SylvanasMer: Friendly non-Elite Mercenaries near Sylvanas deal 60% more damage.   Sylvanas's Basic Attacks Stun and instantly apply 3 stacks of Black Arrows to neutral Mercenaries.  Sylvanas deals 30% additional damage to Mercenaries with 3 stacks of Black Arrows.
fullText.SylvanasTalentMightOfTheBansheeQueen|Syl: Hitting an enemy Hero with Withering Fire increases Sylvanas's Attack Speed and Spell Power by 5% for 6 seconds, stacking up to 5 times.
fullText.SylvanasTalentOverwhelmingAffliction|Syl: Enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows are Slowed by 15%. Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against Slowed enemy Heroes deal 1% of their maximum Health as damage.
fullText.SylvanasTalentRemorseless|SylvanasRemors: Sylvanas's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes with 3 stacks of Black Arrows shoot an untalented shot of Withering Fire. This shot of Withering Fire applies Black Arrows.   Increase Sylvanas's Basic Attack range by 1.
fullText.SylvanasTalentUnstablePoison|SylvanasBla: Minions that die under the effects of Shadow Dagger or Sylvanas's Traits explode, dealing 150 damage to nearby Minions, Mercenaries, and Summons.
fullText.SylvanasTalentWillOfTheForsaken|Sylvanas: Activate to become Unstoppable and gain 40% Movement Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasTalentWindrunnerHauntingWave|Syl: Haunting Wave can be cast a second time for free within 4 seconds after teleporting. Teleporting with Haunting Wave resets the cooldown of Withering Fire.
fullText.SylvanasTalentWitheringBarrage|SylvanasW: Withering Fire applies Black Arrows, and Heroes hit by Withering Fire reduce its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.SylvanasTalentWitheringFireBarbedShot|Sy: Hitting the same enemy with 5 shots of Withering Fire causes the 5th shot to deal 400% bonus damage.
fullText.SylvanasTalentWitheringFireEvasiveFire|S: Hitting an enemy with Withering Fire grants 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%. Basic Attacks refresh this duration.
fullText.SylvanasUnrelentingTorment|SylvanasUnrel: Increase the damage of Shadow Dagger by 20% and increase its duration by 1 second.
fullText.SylvanasWailingArrowDeafeningBlast|Sylva: Enemies at the center of Wailing Arrow's explosion take 50% more damage and are Silenced for twice as long.
fullText.TassadarArcDischarge|TassadarArcDischarg: When Resonance Beam is fully charged, Tassadar's Basic Attack range is increased by 1 and its next instance of damage also creates a Psionic Storm on the target.  This effect has a 20 second cooldown that decays twice as fast while Resonance Beam is fully charged.
fullText.TassadarBeamAlignment|TassadarBeamAlignm: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, Shock Ray's cooldown refreshes 100% faster and its Slow duration is increased to 4 seconds.  Passive: Reduce the Mana cost of Shock Ray from 55 to 40.
fullText.TassadarElectricFence|TassadarElectricFe: Force Wall deals 92 damage a second to nearby enemies and Slows them by 35%.
fullText.TassadarExecutorsWill|TassadarExecutorsW: Activate to gain full Resonance Beam charge, 20% Spell Power, and cause Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns to regenerate 25% faster. This effect lasts as long as Resonance Beam remains at full charge.
fullText.TassadarFeedback|TassadarFeedback|W|Leve: When an enemy Hero is affected by Psionic Storm, Resonance Beam's Slow is increased to 50% and it reduces Physical Armor by 25.
fullText.TassadarHeroicAbilityArchon|TassadarArch: Tassadar transforms into an Archon, gaining a Shield equal to 25% of his maximum Health and empowering Resonance Beam. Lasts for 12 seconds.  Resonance Beam: Deals 140 damage to the target and splashes 70 damage to nearby enemies. Heroes hit have their Spell Armor reduced by 20 for 2 seconds. Resonance Beam is fully charged while Archon is active.
fullText.TassadarHeroicAbilityBlackHole|TassadarB: After a 0.5 second cast, create a Black Hole that travels in a long line. Enemy Heroes within the Black Hole's area are quickly pulled towards its center. Touching the center deals 310 damage and Stuns the target for 1.25 seconds.
fullText.TassadarInduction|TassadarInduction|Q|Le: Tassadar gains 10% increased Movement Speed. Casting Shock Ray increases this bonus to 30% for 3 seconds.
fullText.TassadarKhalasGift|TassadarKhalasGift|Pa: Gain 4% Spell Power for yourself and each nearby ally Hero, up to 20% total Spell Power. Your total bonus is shared with all contributing allies.
fullText.TassadarKhaydarinAmulet|TassadarKhaydari: Quest: Resonance Beam charges 50% faster.  Reward: After Resonance Beam has been fully charged for 80 seconds, it bounces to hit 1 additional target for 75% damage, prioritizing Heroes.  Reward: After Resonance Beam has been fully charged for 160 seconds, it bounces to hit 2 additional targets for 75% damage, prioritizing Heroes.
fullText.TassadarKugelblitz|TassadarKugelblitz|He: Enemy Heroes hit by Black Hole's center have their Armor reduced by 20 for 3 seconds and have a Psionic Storm created at their location.
fullText.TassadarMasteryForceBarrier|TassadarForc: Increase the duration of Force Wall by 0.5 seconds, its cast range by 50%, and reduce its cooldown by 10 seconds.
fullText.TassadarMasteryTwilightArchon|TassadarAr: Basic Attacks while in Archon form increase its duration by 2 seconds.
fullText.TassadarOracle|TassadarOracleTargeted|Ac: Passive: While stationary, gain 30 Spell Armor for 0.75 seconds and restore 12 Health a second.  Activate to Channel for up to 4 seconds, revealing a gradually increasing area anywhere on the map.
fullText.TassadarPlasmaShield|TassadarPlasmaShiel: While Resonance Beam is fully charged, gain a Shield equal to 3% of max Health every second, stacking up to 12%.
fullText.TassadarPsionicEcho|TassadarPsionicEcho|: Casting Psionic Storm causes your next Shock Ray within 3 seconds to only cost 30 Mana and create a Psionic Storm on the first enemy Hero hit.
fullText.TassadarPsionicStormPsiInfusion|Tassadar: Each non-Structure enemy hit by Psionic Storm restores 0.5 Mana, increased to 5 against Heroes.  Passive: Increase the cast range of Psionic Storm by 33%.
fullText.TassadarShadowWalk|TassadarShadowWalk|Ac: Tassadar becomes Stealthed and Unrevealable, but cannot attack or use Abilities for 1.5 seconds. While this effect is active, gain 40% increased Movement Speed and 35 Armor.  Can be cast while Channeling Shock Ray.
fullText.TassadarStaticCharge|TassadarStaticCharg: Quest: Heroes hit by Shock Ray permanently increases its damage by 5 and grants 33% Resonance Beam charge.   Maximum of 200 bonus damage.
fullText.TassadarThermalLance|TassadarThermalLanc: Shock Ray deals an additional 8% of maximum Health as damage to the first Hero it hits.
fullText.ThrallAlphaWolf|ThrallAlphaWolf|W|Level1: For 3 seconds after a Hero is hit by Feral Spirit, Thrall's Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 3% of the target's maximum Health as damage.  Passive: Increase the duration of Feral Spirit's Root to 1.5 seconds.
fullText.ThrallAncestralWrath|ThrallAncestralWrat: Activate to consume 8 stacks of Ancestral Wrath, damaging a target enemy Hero for 15% of their maximum Health over 3 seconds, and healing Thrall for 150% of the damage dealt.  Gain 1 stack of Ancestral Wrath every time Frostwolf Resilience activates.
fullText.ThrallCrashLightning|ThrallCrashLightnin: Quest: Hit at least 2 Heroes with a single use of Chain Lightning. Upon dying, lose 4 stacks. Gained rewards cannot be lost.  Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 15 times, Chain Lightning deals 270 additional damage on its bounces after the initial strike.  Mythic Reward: After hitting multiple Heroes 30 times, Chain Lightning deals 325 additional damage on its bounces, and prioritizes bouncing to enemy Heroes.
fullText.ThrallEchooftheElements|ThrallEchooftheE: Quest: Kill Minions or Heroes within 2 seconds of hitting them with Chain Lightning.  Reward: After killing 20 enemies, reduce the Mana cost of Chain Lightning from 40 to 20.  Reward: After killing 50 enemies, Chain Lightning gains an extra charge.  Mythic Reward: After killing 125 enemies, Chain Lightning can now strike the same target multiple times, and also strikes 1 additional target per bounce.
fullText.ThrallElementalAssault|ThrallElementalAs: After using an Ability, Thrall's next Basic Attack within 4 seconds deals 45% more damage.
fullText.ThrallElementalMomentum|ThrallElementalM: Basic Attacks reduce Thrall's Basic and Heroic Ability cooldowns by 0.25 seconds, tripled against Heroes.
fullText.ThrallFeralResilience|ThrallFeralResilie: Heroes damaged by Feral Spirit grant 4 stacks of Frostwolf Resilience and 2 stacks of Feral Resilience, granting 75 Physical Armor against the next incoming Hero Basic Attack.  Stacks are consumed on the next cast of Feral Spirit.
fullText.ThrallFrostwolfPack|ThrallFrostwolfPack|: Quest: Hit 6 Heroes with Feral Spirit. Progress is lost on death and when Thrall fails to hit a Hero.  Reward: Reduce the cooldown and Mana cost of Feral Spirit by 50%.
fullText.ThrallHeroicAbilityEarthquake|ThrallEart: After 0.5 seconds, summon a massive Earthquake that pulses every 4 seconds. Each pulse lasts 2 seconds, Slowing all enemies in the area by 50%, and deals 50 damage to enemy Heroes. Does 3 pulses.
fullText.ThrallHeroicAbilitySundering|Sundering|H: After 0.5 seconds, sunder the earth in a long line, dealing 290 damage and shoving enemies to the side, Stunning them for 1 second.
fullText.ThrallMaelstromWeapon|ThrallMaelstromWea: Quest: Basic Attack Heroes while Windfury's Movement Speed bonus is active.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, increase the Movement Speed bonus of Windfury to 40% and Thrall's Basic Attacks deal 40 additional damage.  Reward: After hitting 55 Heroes, Thrall permanently gains 15% increased Movement Speed and his Basic Attacks gain an additional 75 damage.  Mythic Reward: After hitting 100 Heroes, Frostwolf Resilience healing restores 200% more Health.
fullText.ThrallMasteryEarthenShields|ThrallEarthe: Allies within the Earthquake area gain a Shield equal to 15% of their maximum Health each pulse. This shield lasts 4 seconds.
fullText.ThrallMasteryFrostwolfsGrace|ThrallFrost: Frostwolf Resilience can be activated to instantly heal. This healing is increased by up to 100% based on Thrall's missing health.
fullText.ThrallMasteryGraceOfAir|ThrallGraceOfAir: Windfury attacks grant twice as many stacks of Frostwolf Resilience.
fullText.ThrallMasteryManaTide|ThrallManaTideTale: Frostwolf Resilience restores 15 Mana and reduces Basic Ability cooldowns by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ThrallMasteryRollingThunder|ThrallRollin: Passive: Chain Lightning bounces an additional time.  For 8 seconds after hitting an enemy with Chain Lightning, Thrall's next Basic Attack against them grants a stack of Frostwolf Resilience. If the target is an enemy Hero, then he also deals damage to them equal to 3% of their maximum Health and healing for the same amount.
fullText.ThrallMasteryTempestFury|ThrallTempestFu: The final strike of Windfury hits 3 times for 75% normal damage. These hits do not provide quest progress.
fullText.ThrallMasteryWorldbreaker|ThrallWorldbre: Lower the cooldown of Sundering by 40 seconds. After Sundering impacts, it leaves behind an impassable rift, blocking unit movement for 3 seconds.
fullText.ThrallSpiritShield|ThrallSpiritShield|Ac: Every 45 seconds, gain 70 Spell Armor against the next enemy Ability and subsequent Abilities for 4 seconds. Frostwolf Resilience reduces this cooldown by 10 seconds.  Can be toggled to allow or prevent this talent from triggering automatically.
fullText.ThrallThunderstorm|ThrallThunderstorm|Q|: Chain Lightning Slows the primary target by 8% for 2 seconds when used on Heroes.  Quest: Targeting a Hero directly with Chain Lightning increases this Slow by 8%, up to an additional 40%.  Reward: While at a 40% bonus, Chain Lightning's damage is increased by 30%.  Bonuses are reset if Chain Lightning is used on the same Hero it was last used on, or if Thrall dies.
fullText.ThrallWindRush|ThrallWindRush|Active|Lev: Activate to immediately teleport to a target location and gain Windfury.
fullText.TinkerHeroicAbilityGravOBomb3000|TinkerG: After a 1.5 second delay, pull enemies toward the center of an area, dealing 220 damage and Stunning them for 0.5 seconds. Basic Abilities deal 30% more damage for 5 seconds after casting Grav-O-Bomb 3000.
fullText.TinkerHeroicAbilityRoboGoblin|TinkerRobo: Activate to become Unstoppable for 1.5 seconds.   Passive: Basic Attacks deal 100 bonus damage over 5 seconds, stacking up to 3 times.
fullText.TinkerItsRainingScrap|TinkerItsRainingSc: Reduce the Scrap cost of Rock-It! Turrets by 1. Regain 2 Scrap for each Scrap pickup.
fullText.TinkerMasteryEZPZDimensionalRipper|Tinke: Activate to gain 40 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 40%, and reduce damage dealt by all nearby enemy Heroes and Summons by 50% for 3 seconds
fullText.TinkerMasteryGoblinFusion|GazloweDethLaz: Generate 3 Scrap for each Hero hit by Deth Lazor.
fullText.TinkerMasteryMechaLord|TinkerRoboGoblinM: Basic Attacks increase Gazlowe's Armor by 10 for 10 seconds, up to a maximum of 30, and deal 50% bonus damage to Stunned or Slowed enemies.
fullText.TinkerMasteryMiniatureBlackHole|TinkerGr: Increase Grav-O-Bomb 3000's radius by 25% and its damage by 50%. Each enemy Hero pulled reduces its cooldown by 12 seconds.
fullText.TracerBulletSprayMelee|TracerBulletSpray: Increases the radius of Melee by 30%, and causes it to damage all enemies in range.
fullText.TracerChronoTriggers|TracerChronoTrigger: Casting Blink causes Basic Attacks to not consume ammo for 1 second.
fullText.TracerCompositionBPulseBomb|TracerCompos: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero also drops another one at their feet that deals 50% damage and explodes slightly earlier.
fullText.TracerFocusFire|TracerFocusFire|Trait|Le: If an entire ammo magazine is unloaded on an enemy within 2 seconds, the last bullet will deal 80 bonus damage. This is equal to 35% of the total magazine.
fullText.TracerGetStuffedMelee|TracerGetStuffedMe: Increases Melee's Pulse Bomb charge against Heroes from 10% to 20%. Hitting an enemy with Melee who is stuck with a Pulse Bomb causes the bomb to instantly explode and knock the target away.
fullText.TracerHeavyHanded|TracerHeavyHanded|W|Le: Heroes hit by Melee have their Armor reduced by 15 for 4 seconds.
fullText.TracerIsThataHealthPack|TracerIsthataHea: Collecting a Regeneration Globe instantly heals Tracer for 15% of her maximum Health and reduces the cooldown of Healing Fountain by 15 seconds.  Drinking from a Healing Fountain instantly heals for 20% of Tracer's maximum Health.
fullText.TracerJumper|TracerJumper|Q|Level13: Passive: When Blink has no charges remaining, its cooldown refreshes 100% faster.  Casting Blink grants Tracer a Shield equal to 6% of her maximum Health for 3 seconds. This Shield stacks up to 3 times.
fullText.TracerLeechingRounds|TracerLeechingRound: Increase the healing from Basic Attacks by up to 200%, based on the amount of health Tracer is missing.
fullText.TracerLockedandLoaded|TracerLockedandLoa: Reactivate Reload within the last 50% of its cast time to increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 40% for that magazine.
fullText.TracerOneTwoPunch|TracerOneTwoPunch|W|Le: Reduce the cooldown of Melee by 1 second and it gains an additional charge.
fullText.TracerPartingGift|TracerPartingGift|E|Le: Recall leaves behind 6 bombs that deal 240 damage each to different targets. Heroes hit with these bombs are Slowed by 50% for 0.75 seconds and grant 7% Pulse Bomb charge.
fullText.TracerPulseGenerator|TracerPulseGenerato: Successfully sticking a Pulse Bomb to an enemy Hero heals Tracer for 12% of her maximum Health over 1.5 seconds and refunds a charge of Blink.
fullText.TracerPulseRounds|TracerPulseRounds|Hero: Increases Pulse Bomb's range and charge rate from Basic Attacks against Heroes by 100%.
fullText.TracerQuantumSpike|TracerQuantumSpike|He: Pulse Bomb deals an additional 6% of maximum Health as damage to Heroes.
fullText.TracerRicochetHeroWeapon|TracerRicochetH: Tracer's Basic Attacks have a 60% chance to hit another nearby enemy, prioritizing Heroes.
fullText.TracerSleightofHand|TracerSleightofHand|: Reduces Reload time by 50%. This equals 20% more damage per second.
fullText.TracerStickyBomb|TracerStickyBomb|Heroic: Increases Pulse Bomb's radius by 50% and enemies hit are Slowed by 70% for 3 seconds.
fullText.TracerTelefrag|TracerTelefrag|E|Level13: Passive: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce the cooldown of Recall by 0.1875 seconds.  When Tracer arrives at her Recall location she becomes Unkillable for 1 second and nearby enemies take 175 damage and are knocked back.
fullText.TracerTotalRecallRecall|TracerTotalRecal: Recall heals Tracer equal to the amount of Health she lost during that time.
fullText.TracerTracerRounds|TracerTracerRounds|Tr: Increase Basic Attack range by 10%. Basic Attacks against Heroes reveal a small area around them for 3 seconds.
fullText.TracerUntouchable|TracerUntouchable|Q|Le: Passive: After Blinking, gain 20% Movement Speed for 1.25 seconds.  Quest: Takedowns increase Tracer's Basic Attack damage by 5%, up to 25%. These bonuses are lost on death.
fullText.TychusCanDoThisAllDayOverkillTalent|Tych: Reduce Overkill's cooldown by 5 seconds. While Channeling Overkill, Tychus gains 40 Armor.
fullText.TychusCombatTactician|TychusCombatTactic: Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by 4 seconds. Reduce the cooldown of Minigun by an additional 4 seconds after using Run and Gun.
fullText.TychusHeroicAbilityCommandeerOdin|Tychus: Call down an Odin to pilot. The Odin deals increased Damage, has 100% increased Basic Attack range, and uses different Abilities. The Odin has 25 Armor and lasts 23 seconds.
fullText.TychusHeroicAbilityDrakkenLaserDrill|Tyc: Call down a Laser Drill to attack nearby enemies, dealing 142 damage every second. Reactivate to assign a new target. Lasts 22 seconds.
fullText.TychusInTheRhythm|TychusIntheRhythmTalen: Quest: While Minigun is active, Basic Attacks against Heroes permanently increase future Minigun durations by 0.03 seconds.
fullText.TychusMasterAssassin|TychusMasterAssassi: Passive: Increase Tychus's Attack Speed by 10%.   Reward: After getting 15 Takedowns, Tychus's Attack Speed is increased by an additional 15%.
fullText.TychusMasteryDrakkenLaserFocusingDiodes|: Increases the range of the Drakken Laser Drill by 50%. Deals increasing damage the longer it remains on a single target, up to 100% additional damage.
fullText.TychusMasteryFragGrenadeTitanGrenade|Tyc: Frag Grenade deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 5% of their maximum Health. Each enemy Hero hit by Frag Grenade reduces its cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.TychusMasteryOdinBigRedButton|TychusComm: Odin lasts 50% longer and Ragnarok Missiles also launches a Nuclear Missile which lands 2.5 seconds later, dealing 319 damage in its area.
fullText.TychusMasteryOverkillArmorPiercingRounds: Each time Overkill hits an enemy, its damage against them is increased by 15%, stacking up to 60% bonus damage.
fullText.TychusMasteryQuarterback|TychusFragGrena: Increases Frag Grenade's damage by 10% and its range by 45%.
fullText.TychusMasteryRunandGunDash|TychusRunandG: Increase the range of Run and Gun by 50%. When cast, increase Tychus's Movement Speed by 20% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.TychusMasterySprayNPray|TychusOverkillSp: Overkill Slows enemy Movement Speed by 25% and its range is increased by 25%.
fullText.TychusMeltingPoint|TychusMeltingPoint|W|: Enemies hit by Frag Grenade take an additional 75 damage over 3 seconds. This damage is increased by 100% against Minions, Mercenaries, and Monsters.
fullText.TychusNeosteelCoating|TychusNeosteelCoat: Activate to gain 75 Spell Armor for 4 seconds, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.
fullText.TychusPressTheAdvantage|TychusPressTheAd: Increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.
fullText.TychusRelentlessSoldier|TychusRelentless: Being Stunned or Rooted grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, reducing damage taken by 30%.
fullText.TychusRunAndGunBobAndWeave|TychusRunAndG: Run and Gun and Odin's Thrusters gain 2 additional charges and reduces Run and Gun's Mana cost from 50 to 25. After using Run and Gun, increase Tychus's Basic Attack range by 1.5 for 4 seconds.
fullText.TychusSizzlinAttacks|TychusSizzlinAttack: Basic Attacks deal bonus damage to Heroes equal to 1% of their maximum Health. Stacks with Minigun.
fullText.TychusThatsTheStuff|TychusThatsTheStuff|: Minigun heals Tychus for 100% of the bonus damage dealt after it expires.
fullText.TychusTheBiggerTheyAre|TychusTheBiggerTh: Increase the damage bonus to 4% while enemy Heroes are above 30% Health, but Minigun no longer has any effect on targets below 30%.
fullText.TyraelArdentRestoration|TyraelArdentRest: Dealing damage to a Hero heals Tyrael for 20 Health over 5 seconds. Dealing damage resets this timer, and the heal amount stacks up to 8 times.  Quest: Every Regeneration Globe gathered increases this heal amount by 1%.
fullText.TyraelAspectofJustice|TyraelAspectofJust: After 1.25 seconds, gain the effects of Archangel's Wrath without dying. Cooldown is reduced by 15% for each enemy Hero hit by the explosion.
fullText.TyraelBurningHalo|TyraelBurningHalo|Q|Le: Both Tyrael and El'druin deal 12 damage per second to nearby enemies. Teleporting increases this damage from Tyrael by 125% for 2 seconds.
fullText.TyraelDefenseOfTheAngels|TyraelDefenseOf: Activate to gain 50 Armor for 3 seconds.  Each time Tyrael damages an enemy Hero with a Basic Attack or Basic Ability, increase the duration of this Armor bonus by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.TyraelDivineVigor|TyraelDivineVigor|E|Le: If Smite hits an enemy, Tyrael's Basic Attacks within the next 4 seconds heal for 70% of the damage dealt.
fullText.TyraelElDruinsMightBoundByLaw|TyraelElDr: El'Druin's Might's Slow is increased to 65% for 1 second, decaying to 30% over the remaining duration.
fullText.TyraelHeroicAbilityJudgement|TyraelJudgm: After 0.75 seconds, charge an enemy Hero, dealing 150 damage and Stunning them for 1.5 seconds. Nearby enemies are knocked away and take 75 damage.
fullText.TyraelHeroicAbilitySanctification|Tyrael: After 0.5 seconds create a field of holy energy that makes allied Heroes Invulnerable. Lasts 3 seconds.
fullText.TyraelHoradricReforging|TyraelElDruinsMi: Tyrael's Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of El'druin's Might by 2 seconds.
fullText.TyraelJusticeForAll|TyraelJusticeForAll|: Increase the Shield applied to allies by Righteousness to 80% of the Shield gained by Tyrael.
fullText.TyraelMasteryElDruinsMightSwordOfJustice: Upon teleporting using El'druin's Might, El'druin swaps places with Tyrael, and El'druin's Might can be reactivated to teleport an additional time.
fullText.TyraelMasteryHolyGround|TyraelElDruinsMi: Create a ring for 3 seconds that blocks enemies from entering the area teleported to using El'druin's Might.
fullText.TyraelMasteryJudgmentAngelofJustice|Tyra: Increases the cast range of Judgment by 50%, and reduces the cooldown by 40 seconds.
fullText.TyraelMasteryLawAndOrder|TyraelRighteous: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite reduces the cooldown of Righteousness by 1 second. Each allied Hero Shielded by Righteousness increases the damage of the next Smite by 35%.
fullText.TyraelMasteryPurgeEvil|TyraelSmitePurgeE: Each enemy Hero hit by Smite increases Tyrael's Basic Attack damage by 60% for 4 seconds.
fullText.TyraelMasteryRighteousnessReciprocate|Ty: When Tyrael's Shield from Righteousness expires or is destroyed, it deals 170 damage to nearby Heroes and Summons.  For each enemy Hero damaged by Reciprocate or El'Druin's Might, Tyrael heals for 3% of his maximum Health.
fullText.TyraelMasterySanctificationHolyArena|Tyr: Increase the duration of Sanctification by 1 second and increase the damage of allies inside by 25%.
fullText.TyraelMasterySwiftRetribution|TyraelSmit: Smite grants 20% more Movement Speed and also grants 25% Attack Speed for 2 seconds.
fullText.TyraelSalvation|TyraelSalvation|W|Level1: Increase the Shield amount Tyrael gains from Righteousness by 35% and heal Tyrael for 150 Health if his Shield is destroyed. Does not increase the Shield amount gained by allies.
fullText.TyraelSealOfElDruin|TyraelSealofElDruin|: Using a Basic Ability grants 50% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.TyraelSmiteTheWicked|TyraelSmiteTheWicke: While El'druin's Might is active, and for 2 seconds after teleporting, Smite's cooldown recharges 125% faster.
fullText.TyraelStalwartAngel|TyraelStalwartAngel|: Gain 25 Armor while El'druin's Might is active, and for 3 seconds after teleporting.
fullText.TyrandeCelestialAttunement|TyrandeLightO: Light of Elune removes Stuns, Silences, and Slows from its target.
fullText.TyrandeDarnassianArchery|TyrandeDarnassi: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant a stacking 12% increased Attack Damage bonus for 4 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeElunesChosen|TyrandeElunesChosen|: Activate to make Tyrande's Basic Attacks heal target allied Hero for 175% of the damage dealt. Lasts for 8 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeEmpower|TyrandeSentinelEmpowerTal: Reduce Sentinel's cooldown by 3 seconds. Heroes hit by Sentinel takes bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.
fullText.TyrandeEyesOfTheHuntress|TyrandeEyesOfTh: Shadowstalk reveals all enemy Heroes for 10 seconds and heals for 100% more.
fullText.TyrandeHarshMoonlight|TyrandeHarshMoonli: Sentinel Slows enemies hit by 35% and reduces their damage dealt by 35% for 3 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeHeroicAbilityShadowstalk|TyrandeS: Grant all allied Heroes Stealth for 10 seconds and heal them for 380 Health over 10 seconds. Remaining stationary for at least 1.5 seconds while Stealthed grants Invisible.
fullText.TyrandeHeroicAbilityStarfall|TyrandeStar: Deal 92 damage per second and Slow enemies by 20% in an area. Lasts 6 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeHuntressFury|TyrandeHuntersMarkHu: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against targets with Hunter's Mark bounce to nearby enemy Heroes.  Passive: Increase Hunter's Mark duration by 1 second, and its cast range by 25%.
fullText.TyrandeIcebladeArrows|TyrandeIcebladeArr: Increase Attack Speed by 20%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes reduce their damage dealt by 8% for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
fullText.TyrandeKaldoreiResistance|TyrandeKaldore: Light of Elune grants the target 10 Spell Armor for 2 seconds. This effect stacks up to 2 times.
fullText.TyrandeLightOfEluneEverlastingLight|Tyra: If Light of Elune's second charge is cast on a different target from the first, it heals for 80% more.
fullText.TyrandeMarkofMending|TyrandeHuntersMarkM: Tyrande's Basic Attacks against Marked targets heal other allied Heroes near the enemy for 4% of their maximum Health.
fullText.TyrandeMasteryLightofEluneQuickeningBles: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Light of Elune increases the target's Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeMasteryStarfallCelestialWrath|Tyr: Increase the Slow of Starfall to 60% and cause it to apply Hunter's Mark to enemy Heroes while inside of its area of effect.
fullText.TyrandeMoonlitArrows|TyrandeMoonlitArrow: Basic Attacks decrease the cooldown of Light of Elune by an additional 0.5 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeRangersMark|TyrandeHuntersMarkRan: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hunter's Mark by 2 second. Basic Attacks against marked targets reduce the cooldown of Lunar Flare by 4 seconds.
fullText.TyrandeRanger|TyrandeSentinelRangerTalen: Sentinel width is increased by 25% and deals up to 250% more damage based on distance traveled.
fullText.TyrandeTrueshotAura|TyrandeHuntersMarkTr: Activate to grant Tyrande and nearby allied Heroes 40% increased Attack Damage for 5 seconds, and to reset the cooldown of Hunter's Mark.
fullText.UtherBeaconOfLight|UtherBeaconOfLight|Q|: Uther receives 125% bonus self-healing when targeting others with Holy Light. This bonus is increased to 250% while he is below 50% Health.
fullText.UtherCombatStyleHammerOfTheLightbringer|: Quest: Basic Attack enemies 75 times.  Reward: Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Hammer of Justice by 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Basic Attacks restore 1.5% of Uther's maximum Mana.
fullText.UtherEternalDevotionArmorOfFaith|UtherEt: Being Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants Uther 90 Mana and causes Holy Light's cooldown to recharge 200% faster for 6 seconds. This effect has a 20 second cooldown.
fullText.UtherEternalDevotionDivineProtection|Uth: Increase Devotion Armor to 50 and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.UtherEternalDevotionGuardianOfAncientKin: Healing a Hero with a Basic Ability that is Stunned, Rooted, or Silenced grants them 50 Armor for 3 seconds.
fullText.UtherHammerOfJusticePursuitOfJustice|Uth: Hammer of Justice increases Uther's Movement Speed by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.UtherHammerOfJusticeWellMet|UtherHammerO: When used against Heroes, Hammer of Justice reduces the target's Movement Speed and damage dealt by 25% for 3 seconds.
fullText.UtherHandOfProtection|UtherHandOfProtect: Activate to make target ally Unstoppable for 1 second. Cannot be cast on Uther. Basic Attacks reduce Hand of Protection's cooldown by 5 seconds.
fullText.UtherHeroicAbilityDivineShield|UtherDivi: Make an allied Hero Invulnerable and increase their Movement Speed by 20% for 3 seconds.
fullText.UtherHeroicAbilityDivineStorm|UtherDivin: Deal 170 damage and Stun nearby enemies for 1.75 seconds.
fullText.UtherHolyFire|UtherHolyFireTalent|Passiv: Deal 13 damage per second to nearby enemies. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes increase this damage by 20% for 3 seconds. This can stack up to 3 times.
fullText.UtherHolyLightSilverTouch|UtherHolyLight: Quest: Reduce damage from Heroic sources with Devotion.  Reward: After reducing damage 40 times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced from 80 to 60.  Reward: After reducing damage 80 times, Holy Light's Mana cost is reduced to 40, and its range is increased by 50%.
fullText.UtherHolyRadianceTyrsDeliverance|UtherHo: Increase the damage and healing of Holy Radiance by 10%. Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes cause Uther's next cast of Holy Radiance to have its damage and healing increased by an additional 10%, stacking up to 7 times.
fullText.UtherMasteryBenediction|UtherBenediction: Activate to reduce the Mana cost of Uther's next Basic Ability by 50 and its cooldown by 10 seconds.
fullText.UtherMasteryBlessedChampion|UtherEternal: For the next 5 seconds after using Holy Light, Uther's Basic Attacks heal him and nearby allied Heroes for 15% of the total amount healed by Holy Light.
fullText.UtherMasteryBulwarkOfLightDivineShield|U: Divine Shield is also applied to all nearby allied Heroes and lasts 1 second longer.
fullText.UtherMasteryDivineHurricaneDivineStorm|U: Divine Storm's radius is increased by 50% and its cooldown is reduced by 40 seconds.
fullText.UtherMasteryHolyShock|UtherHolyLightHoly: Activate to deal 145 damage to the target enemy, and gain the self-healing benefits of Holy Light. Shares a cooldown with Holy Light.
fullText.UtherMasteryRedemption|UtherRedemptionTa: After Eternal Vanguard ends, Uther revives at the spirit's location with 50% of his maximum Health.  This effect has a 180 second cooldown.
fullText.UtherMasteryWaveofLightHolyRadiance|Uthe: Quest: Damage or heal Heroes 60 times with Holy Radiance.  Reward: Increase the duration of Devotion by 0.5 seconds.  Passive: Damaging or healing Heroes with Holy Radiance refunds 5 Mana and reduces its cooldown by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.ValeeraAmbushAssassinate|ValeeraAssassin: Ambush deals 50% additional damage and reduces the target's Armor by an additional 10 if no other enemy Heroes are within 4 range of the victim.
fullText.ValeeraAmbushDeathFromAbove|ValeeraDeath: Teleporting with Ambush reduces the cooldown of Vanish by 4 seconds.
fullText.ValeeraBladeFlurryFatalFinesse|ValeeraFa: Quest: Each time Blade Flurry damages an enemy Hero, its damage increases by 6, up to 90.  Reward: After damaging 15 Heroes with Blade Flurry, permanently reduce its Energy cost by 20.
fullText.ValeeraCheapShotBlind|ValeeraBlind|W|Lev: Increase the duration of Cheap Shot's Blind by 2.5 seconds.
fullText.ValeeraCloakOfShadowsEnvelopingShadows|V: Whenever Valeera uses Vanish, she also gains Cloak of Shadows.
fullText.ValeeraCloakOfShadows|ValeeraCloakOfShad: Valeera is enveloped in a Cloak of Shadows, which immediately removes all damage over time effects from her. For 1.5 seconds, she becomes Unstoppable and gains 75 Spell Armor, reducing Ability Damage taken by 75%.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraCombatReadiness|ValeeraCombatRead: Each Combo Point spent grants 75 Physical Armor against the next enemy Hero Basic Attack, reducing its damage by 75%. Stores up to 3 charges.
fullText.ValeeraCripplingPoison|ValeeraCripplingP: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds Slow targets by 20% for 4 seconds.  Activating Crippling Poison does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraEviscerateSliceAndDice|ValeeraSli: Eviscerating an enemy with 3 Combo Points grants 400% Attack Speed. Lasts 3 seconds or 3 Basic Attacks.  Passive: Basic Attacks restore 2 Energy.
fullText.ValeeraGarroteHemorrhage|ValeeraHemorrha: Valeera's Basic Attacks deal 40% additional damage to enemies affected by Garrote.
fullText.ValeeraGarroteRupture|ValeeraRupture|E|L: Increase Garrote's damage over time by 100%. Valeera's Basic Attacks refresh the duration of Garrote.
fullText.ValeeraGarroteStrangle|ValeeraStrangle|E: Using Garrote on a Hero reduces their Spell Power by 40% for 6 seconds.
fullText.ValeeraSinisterStrikeMutilate|ValeeraMut: Sinister Strike now hits with both blades, dealing 125% additional damage, but its range is reduced by 1.
fullText.ValeeraSinisterStrikeRelentlessStrikes|V: Reduces the Energy cost of Sinister Strike by 10.
fullText.ValeeraSinisterStrikeSealFate|ValeeraSea: Sinister Strike deals 50% additional damage and generates an additional Combo Point when used against Silenced, Rooted, or Stunned enemy Heroes.
fullText.ValeeraSmokeBombAdrenalineRush|ValeeraAd: While in the Smoke Bomb, Valeera regenerates an additional 40 Energy per second.
fullText.ValeeraSmokeBomb|ValeeraSmokeBomb|Heroic: Create a cloud of smoke. While in the smoke, Valeera is Unrevealable, can pass through other units, and gains 60 Armor, reducing damage taken by 60%. Valeera can continue to attack and use abilities without being revealed. Lasts 5 seconds.  Using this Ability does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraThistleTea|ValeeraThistleTea|Acti: Activate to instantly restore 100 Energy.  Activating Thistle Tea does not break Stealth.
fullText.ValeeraVanishElusiveness|ValeeraElusiven: Increases Valeera's Movement Speed while Vanished by an additional 20%.
fullText.ValeeraVanishInitiative|ValeeraInitiativ: Ambush, Cheap Shot, and Garrote grant 15% Movement Speed for 3 seconds and award 2 Combo Points.
fullText.ValeeraVanishSubtlety|ValeeraSubtlety|Tr: After teleporting with Ambush, Cheap Shot, or Garrote, regenerate 10 Energy per second for 5 seconds.
fullText.ValeeraVigor|ValeeraVigor|Passive|Level1: Valeera regenerates an additional 3 Energy per second.  Reward: After Gathering 20 Regen Globes, increase Valeera's maximum Energy to 120.
fullText.ValeeraWoundPoison|ValeeraWoundPoison|Ac: Activate to make Valeera's next damaging Ability and subsequent Abilities within 4 seconds reduce enemy healing received by 50% for 4 seconds.  Activating Wound Poison does not break Stealth.
fullText.VarianBannerOfDalaran|VarianBannerOfDala: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20% increased Spell Power to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
fullText.VarianBannerOfIronforge|VarianBannerOfIr: Activate to place a Banner that grants 20 Armor to nearby allied Heroes, reducing damage taken by 20%. Lasts 12 seconds.
fullText.VarianBannerOfStormwind|VarianBannerOfSt: Activate to place a Banner that grants 25% increased Movement Speed to nearby allied Heroes. Lasts 12 seconds.
fullText.VarianBannersGloryToTheAlliance|VarianBa: Banner now also increases health regeneration and all healing received for nearby allied Heroes by 50%, and the cooldown is reduced by 50%.
fullText.VarianChargeJuggernaut|VarianChargeJugge: Charge deals bonus damage to Heroes equal to 4% of their maximum Health.
fullText.VarianChargeWarbringer|VarianChargeWarbr: Reduce Charge's cooldown by 8 seconds and Mana cost from 45 to 25. Additionally, Charge can be cast on allied Heroes.
fullText.VarianColossusSmashMasterAtArms|VarianCo: Colossus Smash affects all enemies near the target, and its cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
fullText.VarianColossusSmash|VarianColossusSmash|: Smash a target enemy, dealing 185 damage and lowering their Armor by 25 for 3 seconds, causing them to take 25% increased damage.  Passive: Base Attack Damage increased by 100%. Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration reduced by 10%.
fullText.VarianDemoralizingShout|VarianDemoralizi: Activate to demoralize nearby enemy Heroes, reducing damage they deal by 40% for 5 seconds.  Each time an enemy Hero affected by Demoralizing Shout deals damage to a Hero, reduce its cooldown and Parry's cooldown by 5%.
fullText.VarianHighKingsQuestQuest|VarianHighKing: Quest: Hit 50 Heroes with Basic Attacks. Quest: Participate in 5 Hero Takedowns. Quest: Gather 15 Regeneration Globes.  Reward: Completing a Quest grants 10 Base Attack Damage. Completing all 3 Quests grants an additional 30 Base Attack Damage.
fullText.VarianLionsFangLionheart|VarianLionsFang: Increase Lion's Fang's healing from Heroes by 75%.
fullText.VarianLionsFangLionsMawQuest|VarianLions: Quest: Every time Lion's Fang hits a Hero, increase its damage by 7, up to 175.  Reward: After hitting 25 Heroes, the Slow is increased to 50% and its duration is increased to 2 seconds.
fullText.VarianMortalStrike|VarianMortalStrike|Tr: Heroes hit by Heroic Strike receive 40% reduced healing for 4 seconds.
fullText.VarianParryOverpower|VarianParryOverpowe: When Parry blocks a Hero's Basic Attack, Heroic Strike's cooldown is refreshed and the next one does 40% more damage.
fullText.VarianParryShieldWall|VarianParryShieldW: Parry grants Protected, preventing all incoming damage while active. Additionally, Parry's cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds, but it loses 1 charge.
fullText.VarianSecondWind|VarianSecondWind|Passiv: Basic Attacks heal Varian for 1% of his maximum Health. While below 50% Health, they also heal him for 50% of the damage dealt.
fullText.VarianShatteringThrow|VarianShatteringTh: Activate to throw a sword at a target Hero that deals 50 damage, and up to 1400 bonus damage to their Shields.  Passive: Basic Attacks against Heroes deal up to 200% bonus Physical Damage to Shields.
fullText.VarianTauntVigilance|VarianTauntVigilanc: Being hit by a Hero Basic Attack reduces the cooldown of Taunt by 1 second.
fullText.VarianTaunt|VarianTaunt|Heroic|Level4: Silence a target Hero and force them to attack Varian for 1.25 seconds.  Passive: Maximum Health and Health Regeneration increased by 40%.
fullText.VarianTwinBladesOfFuryFrenzy|VarianTwinB: Twin Blades of Fury increases Heroic Strike damage by an additional 25%, and Basic Attacks increase his Movement Speed by an additional 10%.
fullText.VarianTwinBladesOfFury|VarianTwinBladesO: Basic Attacks reduce Heroic Strike's cooldown by an additional 7 seconds, and increase Varian's Movement Speed by 30% for 2 seconds.  Passive: Attack Speed increased by 100%. Passive: Base Attack Damage reduced by 25%.
fullText.VarianVictoryRush|VarianVictoryRush|Pass: Every 30 seconds, Varian's next Basic Attack will heal him for 350 Health. When a nearby enemy Minion or Monster dies, the cooldown is reduced by 10 seconds.
fullText.WhitemaneDesperatePleaMartyrdom|Whiteman: Desperate Plea's healing is increased by 30%. Increase this by an additional 10% for each active Zeal.
fullText.WhitemaneDesperatePleaRadiance|Whitemane: Reaching 3 stacks of Desperation heals for 175 and reapplies Zeal to allies with Zeal.
fullText.WhitemaneDesperatePleaUnwaveringFaith|Wh: Increase Whitemane's Basic Attack range by 1.1. Whitemane gains 20% increased Basic Attack damage for each active Zeal buff.
fullText.WhitemaneDesperatePleaZealousSpirit|Whit: Upon reaching 2 stacks of Desperation, Whitemane gains Zeal.
fullText.WhitemaneDivineReckoningJudgmentDay|Whit: Divine Reckoning deals 50% more damage and pulls enemies to its center the first time it hits them.
fullText.WhitemaneDivineReckoning|WhitemaneDivine: After 1 second, consecrate an area for 4 seconds, dealing 50 damage every 0.5 seconds to enemies inside. 25% of the damage dealt to Heroes is returned as Mana.
fullText.WhitemaneGuidingLight|WhitemaneGuidingLi: Activate to cast a permanent Zeal on an allied Hero that costs no Mana and doesn't grant Desperation. Only one can be active at a time and has global cast range.
fullText.WhitemaneInquisitionSharedPunishment|Whi: Upon casting, Inquisition can chain to an additional enemy Hero near its target, dealing 50 damage every 0.5 seconds. Affected enemies lose 10 Armor.
fullText.WhitemaneInquisitionSubjugation|Whiteman: Inquisition reduces all damage the target deals by 50%.
fullText.WhitemaneInquisitorsPrayer|WhitemaneInqu: Repeatable Quest: Hit Heroes with Searing Lash. Repeatable Quest: Hit 3 Heroes with Basic Attacks.  Reward: Permanently increase Whitemane's maximum Health by 3 and Mana by 2. Heroes hit with the second strike of Searing Lash count as 2 hits.
fullText.WhitemaneIntercession|WhitemaneIntercess: Activate to make an ally Unstoppable for 1 second.
fullText.WhitemanePurgeTheWicked|WhitemanePurgeTh: Activate to blast an enemy Hero with holy fire, reducing their Armor by 25 and dealing 300 damage over 4 seconds.
fullText.WhitemaneSaintlyGreatstaff|WhitemaneSain: Enemy Heroes hit by Searing Lash are marked for 3 seconds. Basic Attacks against them deal an additional 55 Spell damage and remove the mark.
fullText.WhitemaneScarletAegisScarletCrusade|Whit: Scarlet Aegis heals for 50% more and makes affected allies Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
fullText.WhitemaneScarletAegis|WhitemaneScarletAe: Bolster the spirits of nearby allied Heroes, healing them for 300 and granting them 40 Armor for 4 seconds.
fullText.WhitemaneSearingLashHarshDiscipline|Whit: Hitting a Hero with Searing Lash while they are being targeted by Inquisition Roots them for 1.5 seconds.  Passive: Reduce Inquisition's cooldown by 2 seconds.
fullText.WhitemaneSearingLashLashingOut|Whitemane: If Searing Lash's second strike hits an enemy Hero, reduce its cooldown to 1 second.
