fullText.WhitemaneSearingLashRighteousFlame|White: Searing Lash deals 25% more damage to enemies. If the second strike hits an enemy Hero, they take an additional 25% damage and Whitemane gains 40% Attack Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.WhitemaneZealIndulgence|WhitemaneZealInd: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Increase this by an additional 5% for each active Zeal.
fullText.WhitemaneZealPityTheFrail|WhitemaneZealP: For every Hero hit with Searing Lash, lower the cooldown of Inquisition by 1.5 seconds. Allies below 30% Health receive 25% more healing from Whitemane.
fullText.WhitemaneZealScarletWrath|WhitemaneZealS: Basic Attacks against Heroes increase the duration of all active Zeals by 0.75 seconds, restore 0.5% Mana to all Zeal targets, and lower the cooldown of Zeals activation by 4 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorAnnihilatingSpirits|WitchDoct: When Ravenous Spirit damages an enemy Hero, reduce their healing received by 50% for 1 second and increase Ravenous Spirit's damage by 5% for the rest of its duration.  Passive: Increases the range of Ravenous Spirit by 50%.
fullText.WitchDoctorBadMedicine|WitchDoctorBadMed: Consume 5 stacks of Voodoo Ritual to become Unstoppable, gain 20% increased Movement Speed, and 50 Armor for 2 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorBigVoodoo|WitchDoctorBigVoodo: Increases the Health and Mana bonuses from Voodoo Ritual by 100%.
fullText.WitchDoctorBloodRitual|WitchDoctorVoodoo: If an enemy dies while poisoned by Voodoo Ritual, restore 2% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana.  Passive: Takedowns grant 3 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.
fullText.WitchDoctorDeadRush|WitchDoctorZombieWal: Zombie Wall deals 100% more damage. When it expires up to 5 remaining Zombies uproot and attack nearby enemies, losing Health over 3 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorGuardianToads|WitchDoctorGuar: Hitting an enemy Hero with Plague of Toads grants 30 Armor for 3 seconds, stacking up to 6 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorHeroicAbilityGargantuan|Witch: Summon a Gargantuan to guard an area, losing Health over 29 seconds. Deals 100 damage when summoned, attacks for 140 damage, and can be ordered to stomp nearby enemies. The Gargantuan's Stomp deals 240 damage and Slows by 30% for 2 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorHeroicAbilityRavenousSpirits|: Channel a Ravenous Spirit that deals 230 damage per second. Cannot move while channeling. Lasts for 8 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorHexedCrawlers|WitchDoctorHexe: Corpse Spiders restore 1% of Nazeebo's maximum Health and Mana when they attack an enemy Hero.
fullText.WitchDoctorHumongoid|WitchDoctorGargantu: Gargantuan Stomp's area is increased by 25% and its Slow amount is increased to 50%.  Passive: Reduce Gargantuan's cooldown by 40 seconds and its Mana cost by 50%.
fullText.WitchDoctorPandemic|WitchDoctorPandemic|: Quest: Hit Heroes with Plague of Toads.  Reward: After hitting 35 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it spawns 2 additional toads.  Reward: After hitting 70 Heroes with Plague of Toads, it reduces the damage Heroes deal by 5%, stacking up to 25%.
fullText.WitchDoctorRingOfPoison|WitchDoctorRingO: Zombie Wall lasts 1 second longer, and the center is filled with poison that deals a total of 319 damage over 4 seconds. This damage starts small and increases over the duration.
fullText.WitchDoctorSoulHarvest|WitchDoctorSoulHa: Activate to increase Nazeebo's Health and Spell Power by 7% for each nearby enemy, up to a maximum of 35%. Lasts 15 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorSpiderColony|WitchDoctorSpide: Corpse Spider Attacks against Heroes reduce the cooldown of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 0.125 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorSpiritofArachyr|WitchDoctorSp: The number of Corpse Spiders spawned is increased from 3 to 4. If Corpse Spiders' jar hits only one enemy, it creates an additional spider.
fullText.WitchDoctorSuperstition|WitchDoctorSuper: Gain 40 Spell Armor. Heroic Basic Attacks against Nazeebo remove this bonus for 3 seconds and spawn a Corpse Spider to attack the Hero.
fullText.WitchDoctorThingOfTheDeep|WitchDoctorThi: Increase the range of Nazeebo's Basic Abilities by 20%.  Reward: After gaining 50 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain 5% Spell Power.  Reward: After gaining 100 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, gain an additional 5% Spell Power.
fullText.WitchDoctorToadsofHugeness|WitchDoctorPl: Increase the damage and explosion radius of Plague of Toads by 25% after each hop, up to a maximum of 100%.
fullText.WitchDoctorVileInfection|WitchDoctorVile: Quest: Reach 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual.  Reward: After reaching 175 stacks of Voodoo Ritual, it can also be applied to Heroes and its damage is increased from 67 to 167 over 6 seconds.
fullText.WitchDoctorWidowmakers|WitchDoctorWidowm: Enemies hit by Corpse Spiders' jar are Slowed by 25% for 1 second.  Reward: After Corpse Spiders attack Heroes 100 times, their attack damage is increased by 25% and their duration is increased by 1 second.
fullText.WizardAetherWalker|WizardAetherWalkerTal: Teleport costs no Mana. If Li-Ming hasn't taken damage in the last 3 seconds, Teleport's cooldown is decreased by 2 seconds. Casting Teleport causes Li-Ming's next cast of Magic Missiles to deal 10% bonus damage.
fullText.WizardArcaneOrbArcaneOrbit|WizardArcaneO: Arcane Orb travels 25% farther, increasing its maximum distance damage bonus from 270 to 371.
fullText.WizardArcaneOrbTriumvirate|WizardArcaneO: If Arcane Orb hits an enemy Hero after traveling at least 50% of its base range, the cooldown is reduced by 5 seconds and 40 Mana is refunded.
fullText.WizardArcaneOrbZeisVengeance|WizardArcan: Increase Arcane Orb's damage increase for distance traveled by 30%. Additionally, reduce its cooldown by 1 second.
fullText.WizardArchonPurePower|WizardArchonPurePo: Activate to enter Archon form, allowing Li-Ming to repeatedly use Disintegrate, but be unable to cast other Abilities.
fullText.WizardCannoneer|WizardCannoneerTalent|Pa: When Li-Ming uses an Ability, her next Basic Attack's damage is increased by 75% and deals Spell damage instead of Physical. Stacks up to 3 times.
fullText.WizardDisintegrateTemporalFlux|WizardDis: Disintegrate gradually Slows enemies caught in its beam, to a maximum of 60%.
fullText.WizardDominance|WizardDominanceTalent|Tr: Takedowns restore 30% of Li-Ming's missing Health.
fullText.WizardFireflies|WizardFireflies|Q|Level1: Drastically increases Magic Missiles speed. Its cooldown is reduced by 1 second, and its Mana cost is reduced by 5.
fullText.WizardForceArmor|WizardForceArmorTalent|: When Magic Missiles damages an enemy Hero, gain 50 Spell Armor, reducing the damage taken by the next Ability by 50%. Gain 1 charge per cast and store up to 4 charges.  Passive: Li-Ming's Mana regeneration is increased by 100% while below 35% Mana.
fullText.WizardGlassCannon|WizardGlassCannonTalen: Increase Li-Ming's Spell Power by 20%, but decrease her maximum Health by 15%.
fullText.WizardHeroicAbilityDisintegrate|WizardDi: Channel a powerful beam, dealing 480 damage over 2.6 seconds to enemies while they are in it. The direction of the beam changes with your mouse cursor position.
fullText.WizardHeroicAbilityWaveOfForce|WizardWav: Knock away all enemies from an area and deal 160 damage.
fullText.WizardMagicMissilesChargedBlast|WizardMa: Basic Attacking a target recently hit by a Magic Missile does an extra 87 damage.
fullText.WizardMagicMissilesMirrorball|WizardMagi: Magic Missiles fires an additional 2 missiles, but its Mana cost is increased by 5.
fullText.WizardMagicMissilesSeeker|WizardMagicMis: If three Magic Missiles hit the same target, the third one deals an additional 140 damage.
fullText.WizardPowerHungry|WizardPowerHungryTalen: Regeneration Globes restore 100% more Mana and grant 10% Spell Power for 20 seconds.
fullText.WizardTalRashasElements|WizardTalRashasE: Casting Abilities increases the damage of the next Ability by 5%, up to 20%. This bonus is reset when the same Ability is used within a chain.
fullText.WizardTeleportCalamity|WizardTeleportCal: Teleport does 300 damage to enemy Heroes near the destination.
fullText.WizardTeleportDiamondSkin|WizardTeleport: Teleport grants a Shield equal to 25% of Li-Ming's maximum Health for 4 seconds.
fullText.WizardTeleportIllusionist|WizardTeleport: If Li-Ming loses more than 20% of her Health at once, its cooldown is instantly refreshed.   This effect has a 4 second cooldown.  Passive: Increases Teleport range by 50%
fullText.WizardWaveOfForceRepulsion|WizardWaveOfF: Increases Wave of Force knockback distance by 175% and increases its cast range by 95%.
fullText.YrelArdentDefenderWordOfGlory|YrelArdent: Increase the amount that Yrel heals from damage received from 50% to 75%. Ardent Defender heals nearby allied Heroes for 100% of the healing received by Yrel.
fullText.YrelArdentDefender|YrelArdentDefender|He: Surround Yrel in a barrier for 3 seconds, absorbing all damage taken and healing her for 50% of the damage received.
fullText.YrelAvengingWrathAegisOfLight|YrelAvengi: Upon landing, Avenging Wrath grants other nearby allied Heroes 40 Armor for 5 seconds.
fullText.YrelAvengingWrathHolyAvenger|YrelAvengin: Hitting an enemy Hero with Avenging Wrath at maximum charge deals 25% more damage and reduces its cooldown to 1 second.
fullText.YrelAvengingWrathRepentance|YrelAvenging: Increase Avenging Wrath's Slow by 25% and duration by 0.75 seconds.
fullText.YrelBubbleHearth|YrelBubbleHearth|Active: After 1 second, Yrel becomes Invulnerable and casts Hearthstone. Cannot be canceled.
fullText.YrelDauntless|YrelDauntless|Passive|Leve: Casting a Basic Ability grants Yrel 35 Physical Armor for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.YrelDivinePurposeDivineFavor|YrelDivineP: Casting a Basic Ability reduces the cooldown of Divine Purpose by 2.5 seconds.
fullText.YrelDivinePurposeGiftOfTheNaaru|YrelDivi: Divine Purpose heals the lowest Health nearby allied Hero other than Yrel for 275.
fullText.YrelDivineSteed|YrelDivineSteed|Z|Level7: Mounting is instant and grants 60% Movement Speed that decays over 3 seconds.
fullText.YrelHandOfFreedom|YrelHandOfFreedom|Acti: Grant an allied Hero 30% Movement Speed for 3 seconds and remove all Slows and Roots from them.
fullText.YrelHolyWrath|YrelHolyWrath|Passive|Leve: After casting a Basic Ability, Yrel's next Basic Attack splashes for 35% increased damage around the target.
fullText.YrelMaraadsInsight|YrelMaraadsInsight|Pa: After damaging an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability, Yrel's next Basic Attack heals her for 160.
fullText.YrelRighteousHammerRighteousMomentum|Yre: Gain 5% Movement Speed. Yrel is no longer Slowed while Channeling Righteous Hammer, and instead this bonus is quadrupled.
fullText.YrelRighteousHammerTemplarsVerdict|YrelR: Righteous Hammer reduces the Armor of enemy Heroes hit by 15 for 4 seconds and deals bonus damage equal to 6% of their maximum Health.
fullText.YrelSacredGroundHallowedGround|YrelSacre: Casting Avenging Wrath while inside Sacred Ground moves Sacred Ground to Yrel's location upon landing.
fullText.YrelSacredGround|YrelSacredGround|Heroic: Yrel sanctifies the ground around her, gaining 50 Armor until she leaves the area.
fullText.YrelSeraphim|YrelSeraphim|Active|Level20: Activate to become Unstoppable for 2 seconds.
fullText.YrelVelensChosen|YrelVelensChosen|Passiv: Hitting an enemy Hero with a Basic Ability at maximum charge grants 10% Spell Power for 10 seconds, up to 30%.
fullText.YrelVindicationAldorPeacekeeper|YrelVind: Enemy Heroes hit by Vindication at maximum charge deal 40% less damage for 3 seconds.
fullText.YrelVindicationLightOfKarabor|YrelVindic: Increase Vindication's radius by 15%. Hitting an enemy Hero increases Vindication's healing by 45%. If more than one Hero is hit, the bonus is increased to 90%.
fullText.ZagaraBroodmother|ZagaraBroodmother|Q|Le: Every 3rd Basic Attack also launches a Baneling towards the target.  Passive: Gain 20% bonus Attack Speed.
fullText.ZagaraCombatStyleMedusaBlades|ZagaraMedu: Basic Attacks deal 33% damage to three nearby targets.
fullText.ZagaraHeroicAbilityDevouringMaw|ZagaraDe: Summon a Devouring Maw that devours enemies for 4 seconds. Devoured enemies cannot fight and take 94 damage per second.  Usable on Unstoppable enemies.
fullText.ZagaraHeroicAbilityNydusAssault|ZagaraNy: Summon a Nydus Worm on Creep anywhere that Zagara has vision. Zagara can enter a Nydus Worm and travel to any other Nydus Worm by right-clicking near it. While inside a Nydus Worm, Zagara regenerates 10% Health and Mana per second.  Stores up to 2 charges. Maximum of 4 Nydus Worms at a time.  Passive: Creep spreads 15% farther.  Passive: While on Creep, each Basic Attack reduces all of Zagara's cooldowns by 0.4 seconds.
fullText.ZagaraJaggedBarbsTalent|ZagaraCreepTumor: While on Creep, Zagara gains 50% more Basic Attack damage and her attack range is increased by 1.1.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryBanelingMassacre|ZagaraBane: Gain 2 additional charges of Banelings Barrage, but increase its cooldown by 2 seconds.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryBileDrop|ZagaraInfestedDrop: Quest: Passively increases the radius of Infested Drop by 20%.  Reward: After hitting 12 Heroes with Infested Drop, it spawns an additional Roachling.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryCorpseFeeders|ZagaraInfeste: Reduces the cooldown of Infested Drop by 3 seconds and Roachlings have 30% more Health.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryCorrosiveSaliva|ZagaraCorro: When attacking Heroes, Hunter Killers and Roachlings deal additional damage equal to 1.5% of their maximum Health.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryEndlessCreep|ZagaraCreepTum: Increase Creep Tumor's cast range from 2.5 to 50. Creep Tumors now last 600 seconds. While on Creep, Zagara gains an additional 10% Movement Speed.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryEnvenomedSpines|ZagaraEnven: Activate to have Zagara's next Basic Attack apply 230 damage over 5 seconds.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryHydraliskTransfusion|Zagara: Zagara is healed for 60% of the damage dealt by Hunter Killers' Basic Attacks to Heroes.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryInfest|ZagaraInfest|Active|: Nearby Ranged Minions deal an additional 100% damage, plus an additional 1% per 1000 Siege damage Zagara has dealt. Can be toggled on or off.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryMutalisk|ZagaraHunterKiller: Reduce the cooldown of Hunter Killer by 4 seconds. Hunter Killer now spawns a Mutalisk. Mutalisks have a bounce attack, lose Health over 42 seconds, and have 420 Health.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryProtectiveCoating|ZagaraCre: While on Creep, Zagara gains 20 Armor, taking 20% less damage.
fullText.ZagaraMasterySerratedSpines|ZagaraSerrat: Quest: Each Basic Attack against a Hero increases Zagara's Attack Damage by 0.2%.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryTyrantMaw|ZagaraDevouringMa: Devouring Maw deals 50% more damage. Takedowns reduce its cooldown by 25 seconds.
fullText.ZagaraMasteryVolatileAcid|ZagaraBaneling: Banelings can travel 50% further before exploding.
fullText.ZagaraPackInstinct|ZagaraPackInstinct|W|: Zagara and her summons deal 20% more damage to enemies attacked by a Hunter Killer in the last 2 seconds.
fullText.ZagaraViscousAcid|ZagaraViscousAcid|Q|Le: Banelings Slow enemies by 25% for 2.5 seconds.
fullText.ZaryaDeepBurn|ZaryaDeepBurn|Q|Level7: Hitting a Hero with Particle Grenade causes Basic Attacks against them to generate 2 Energy. Lasts 4 seconds.
fullText.ZaryaDefensiveShielding|ZaryaDefensiveSh: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier and Shield Ally grant 75 Physical Armor against the next 2 Hero Basic Attacks for 6 seconds, reducing the damage taken by 75%.
fullText.ZaryaEnergyBornInBattle|ZaryaEnergyBornI: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya's cooldowns regenerate 25% faster.
fullText.ZaryaEnergyEnduranceTraining|ZaryaEnergy: While at or above 75 Energy, Zarya gains 20 Armor, reducing all damage taken by 20%.
fullText.ZaryaEnergyMaximumChargeQuest|ZaryaEnerg: Regen Globes now instantly grant 20 Energy.  Quest: Spend 150 seconds at or above 50 Energy.  Reward: Gain an additional 20 maximum Energy.
fullText.ZaryaExpulsionZoneClearOut|ZaryaExpulsio: Reduce Expulsion Zone's cooldown by 25 seconds and increase its duration by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.ZaryaGravitonSurgeGravityKills|ZaryaGrav: Increases Graviton Surge's duration by 1 second and it Silences Heroes caught in its area.
fullText.ZaryaHeroicAbilityExpulsionZone|ZaryaExp: Launch a gravity bomb that deals 124 damage and creates an expulsion zone for 3.5 seconds. Enemies who enter the affected area are knocked back and have their Movement Speed reduced by 50% for 1 second.
fullText.ZaryaHeroicAbilityGravitonSurge|ZaryaGra: Launch a gravity bomb that detonates after 1 second and draws enemy Heroes toward the center for 2.5 seconds. Affected Heroes take 30 damage a second.
fullText.ZaryaPainIsTemporary|ZaryaPainIsTemporar: Activate to consume all Energy and gain a Shield that absorbs 0.8% of Zarya's maximum Health per Energy consumed and lasts for 3 seconds. Zarya may only have one personal Shield active on herself at a time.
fullText.ZaryaParticleGrenadeDemolitionsExpertQue: Quest: For every 5 enemy Heroes hit by Particle Grenade, its recharge rate lowers by 0.4375 seconds, up to 3.5 seconds.  Reward: Once Particle Grenade has hit 40 enemy Heroes, its radius is increased by 15%.
fullText.ZaryaParticleGrenadeGrenadier|ZaryaParti: All Particle Grenade charges are returned at once.
fullText.ZaryaParticleGrenadePinpointAccuracy|Zar: Particle Grenade deals 25 more damage and Slows Movement Speed by 25% for 2 seconds to enemies hit by the center of the blast.
fullText.ZaryaPersonalBarrierExplosiveBarrier|Zar: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier explodes, dealing 110 damage to nearby enemies.
fullText.ZaryaPersonalBarrierIAmTheStrongest|Zary: Personal Barrier absorbs an additional 140 damage.   Passive: Damage absorbed by Zarya's Shields contributes 20% more Energy.
fullText.ZaryaPersonalBarrierSpellBarrier|ZaryaPe: Upon expiration or breaking, Personal Barrier grants Zarya 75 Spell Armor for 3 seconds, reducing the damage taken from Abilities by 75%.
fullText.ZaryaPersonalBarrierUnstoppableCompetito: Personal Barrier makes Zarya Unstoppable for up to 2 seconds.
fullText.ZaryaShieldAllyCleansingShield|ZaryaShie: Causes Shield Ally to remove all disabling effects and reduces its cooldown by 3 seconds.
fullText.ZaryaShieldAllyGainTrain|ZaryaShieldAlly: Shield Ally now grants an untalented Shield to a nearby ally upon impact.
fullText.ZaryaShieldAllyGiveMeTwentyQuest|ZaryaSh: Quest: Regeneration Globes increase Shield Ally absorb amount by 15, up to 300 permanently.   Reward: After collecting 20 Regen Globes, permanently reduce the cooldown of Shield Ally by 2 seconds.
fullText.ZaryaShieldAllySpeedBarrier|ZaryaShieldA: Shield Ally increases the allied Hero's Movement Speed by 50% for the duration.
fullText.ZaryaShieldAllyTogetherWeAreStrong|Zarya: For 3 seconds after gaining Shield Ally, every 5.35 damage done by the bearer contributes 1 Energy to Zarya, up to 40 Energy per Shield.
fullText.ZaryaUnyieldingDefender|ZaryaUnyieldingD: Activate to reset the cooldown of Personal Barrier and Shield Ally.
fullText.ZaryaWeaponFeelTheHeat|ZaryaWeaponFeelTh: Zarya's Basic Attack deals 50% additional damage to enemies in melee range. While above 40 Energy, Zarya's Basic Attack size is increased by 35%.
fullText.ZeratulDarknessDescends|ZeratulDarknessD: Activate to gain 40% Attack Speed for 5 seconds.  Passive: Gain 20% Attack Speed.
fullText.ZeratulHeroicAbilityVoidPrison|ZeratulVo: Slows time in an area to a near standstill, placing allies and enemies in Time Stop for 5 seconds. Zeratul is not affected.
fullText.ZeratulMasterWarpBlade|ZeratulMasterWarp: Every third consecutive Basic Attack against the same target deals 125% more damage.
fullText.ZeratulMasteryGreaterCleaveCleave|Zeratu: Increases the radius of Cleave by 33%.
fullText.ZeratulMendingStrikes|ZeratulMendingStri: Basic Attacks heal for 35% of the damage dealt.
fullText.ZeratulMightOfTheNerazim|ZeratulMightOfT: Activate to cast an untalented version of Zeratul's most recently used Basic Ability, dealing 50% less damage.  Passive: After using an Ability, Zeratul's next Basic Attack within 6 seconds deals 30% more damage.
fullText.ZeratulMoveUnseen|ZeratulMoveUnseen|Trai: Reduce the cooldown of Permanent Cloak by 1 second. Gain 30% Movement Speed while Stealthed.
fullText.ZeratulPsionicStrength|ZeratulPsionicStr: Dealing damage to enemy Heroes increases all damage dealt by 6% for 3 seconds, stacking up to 30%.
fullText.ZeratulRendingCleave|ZeratulCleaveRendin: Cleave deals an additional 40% damage over 3 seconds.
fullText.ZeratulSeekerInTheDark|ZeratulSeekerInTh: Singularity Spike takes 50% longer to explode. It can be reactivated to teleport to the target, granting 30% increased Move Speed for 3 seconds.
fullText.ZeratulSentencedtoDeath|ZeratulSentenced: Deal 25% increased damage to enemies while they are marked or Slowed by Singularity Spike.
fullText.ZeratulShadowHunter|ZeratulShadowHunter|: Quest: Gather Regeneration Globes to lower the Mana cost of Blink by 3, up to 45.  Reward: Upon gathering 15 Regeneration Globes, Basic Attacks reduce the cooldown of Blink by 1.5 seconds.
fullText.ZeratulShadowMending|ZeratulShadowMendin: Heal for 60% of Spell Damage dealt to Heroes.
fullText.ZeratulShadowStrideTalent|ZeratulShadowS: Reduce the cooldown of Vorpal Blade by 10 seconds. Casting Vorpal Blade grants Zeratul a Shield that absorbs up to 260 damage for 3 seconds.
fullText.ZeratulShroudofAdun|ZeratulShroudofAdun|: Zeratul gains a Shield equal to 20% of his Maximum Health over 3 seconds while under Permanent Cloak.
fullText.ZeratulTwilightFalls|ZeratulTwilightFall: Might of the Nerazim resets the cooldown of all Basic Abilities.
fullText.ZeratulUnwaveringPressure|ZeratulUnwaver: Singularity Spike no longer costs Mana. Basic Attacks against enemies reduce its cooldown by 1.25 seconds, double versus Heroes.
fullText.ZeratulVoidSlash|ZeratulVoidSlashTalent|: If Cleave hits more than one enemy Hero, it deals 40% increased damage and its cooldown is reduced by 3 seconds.
fullText.ZeratulWarpSkirmisherTalent|ZeratulWarpS: Vorpal Blade gains a 2nd charge. Teleporting to an enemy with Vorpal Blade or entering Permanent Cloak causes Zeratul's next Basic Attack to deal 50% more damage.
fullText.ZeratulWormhole|ZeratulWormholeTalent|E|: After 1.25 seconds, reactivate Blink to return to the point where it was cast from within 4 seconds.
fullText.Zul'jinAmaniRageAmaniHide|Zul'jinAmaniRa: Lower the cooldown of Amani Rage by 10 seconds and gain 15 Armor while regenerating Health from it.
fullText.ZuljinAmaniResilience|ZuljinAmaniResilie: Increase Taz'dingo's duration by 1 second. Upon expiring, Zul'jin heals for 50% of the damage he dealt during Taz'dingo.
fullText.ZuljinArcaniteAxes|ZuljinArcaniteAxes|W|: Quest: Twin Cleave's damage is permanently increased by 0.75 every time it hits a Hero.
fullText.ZuljinBoneslicer|ZuljinBoneslicer|Q|Leve: Grievous Throw now pierces through all enemies hit and restores 15 Mana per Hero hit. Additionally, Grievous Throw's mark is no longer removed by Basic Attacks.
fullText.ZuljinBuzzsaw|ZuljinBuzzsaw|Heroic|Level: After impact, Guillotine continues forward, dealing 75% damage to enemies hit. If a Hero is killed by Guillotine, Zul'jin is instantly healed to full.
fullText.ZuljinEnsnare|ZuljinEnsnare|Active|Level: Throw a net forward, Rooting the first enemy Hero hit for 1.5 seconds. If no Heroes are hit, Ensnare's cooldown is reduced to 10 seconds.
fullText.ZuljinEyeOfZuljin|ZuljinEyeOfZuljin|Pass: Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes grant Zul'jin 6% Movement Speed for 2 seconds, up to 30%.
fullText.ZuljinFerocity|ZuljinFerocity|Trait|Leve: Increases the Attack Speed bonus of Berserker by 40%.
fullText.ZuljinForestMedicine|ZuljinForestMedicin: Regeneration is no longer Channeled, and cannot be interrupted.
fullText.ZuljinGuillotine|ZuljinGuillotine|Heroic: Zul'jin launches a massive axe into the air that drops on the targeted area, dealing 330 damage plus bonus damage the lower his Health is.
fullText.ZuljinHeadhunter|ZuljinHeadhunter|Passiv: Quest: Zul'jin's first Takedown against each enemy Hero permanently increases his damage dealt by 2.5%.  Reward: After getting Takedowns on every enemy Hero, Basic Attack range is increased by 1.1.
fullText.ZuljinLacerate|ZuljinLacerate|W|Level13: Increase the Slow amount of each Twin Cleave axe by 10% and its duration by 0.5 seconds.
fullText.ZuljinLetTheKillingBegin|ZuljinLetTheKil: When Zul'jin kills an enemy, his Attack Speed is increased by 5%, up to 40%, for 12 seconds. Basic Attacks refresh the duration.  Hero Takedowns instantly grant 40% Attack Speed.
fullText.ZuljinNoMercyTalent|ZuljinNoMercyTalent|: Zul'jin's Basic Attacks against enemy Heroes marked with Grievous Throw ignore Armor and deal an additional 2% of maximum Health as damage.
fullText.ZuljinPassiveASurpriseForYa|Zul'jinPassi: Basic Attacks bounce to a nearby enemy for 50% damage, prioritizing enemy Heroes.
fullText.ZuljinRecklessness|ZuljinRecklessness|Tr: While Zul'jin is below 75% Health, he gains 10% Spell Power. While he is below 50% Health, his Basic Attack damage is increased by 10% and Basic Attacks against Heroes grant an additional stack of You Want Axe?.
fullText.ZuljinTazdingo|ZuljinTazdingo|Heroic|Lev: For the next 4 seconds, Zul'jin is Unkillable, and cannot be reduced to less than 1 Health. Taz'dingo!
fullText.ZuljinTrollsBlood|ZuljinTrollsBlood|E|Le: Increase Regeneration's healing by 25%. If Regeneration fully finishes, restore 10% of Zul'jin's maximum Mana.
fullText.ZuljinViciousAssault|ZuljinViciousAssaul: Increase the duration of Grievous Throw's mark by 3 seconds and its damage bonus by 45%.
fullText.ZuljinVoodooShuffle|ZuljinVoodooShuffle|: Activate to remove Roots and Slows.  Passive: Lower the cooldown and Mana cost of Regeneration by 40%.
fullText.ZuljinWrongPlaceWrongTime|ZuljinWrongPla: If an enemy is hit by both Twin Cleave axes at the same time, they take an additional 100 damage and count as 5 Hero hits for You Want Axe?.

description.AbathurSymbiote: Spawn and attach a Symbiote to a target ally or Structure. While active, Abathur controls the Symbiote, gaining access to new Abilities. The Symbiote is able to gain XP from nearby enemy deaths.
description.MedicMedivacDropship: Target a location for a Medivac transport. For up to 10 seconds before takeoff, allies can right-click to enter the Medivac.
